## File: components/course/LessonSidebar.tsx
`````typescript
  1: 'use client'
  2: import { useState } from 'react'
  3: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
  4: import { CheckCircle2, PlayCircle, Lock, CalendarDays, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react"
  5: interface Lesson {
  6:     id: string
  7:     title: string
  8:     order: number
  9: }
 10: interface LessonSidebarProps {
 11:     lessons: Lesson[]
 12:     currentLessonId: string
 13:     onLessonSelect: (lessonId: string) => void
 14:     progress: Record<string, any>
 15:     startedAt: Date | null
 16:     resetAt: Date | null
 17:     onResetStartDate: (date: Date) => Promise<void>
 18: }
 19: function formatDateVN(date: Date | null) {
 20:     if (!date) return ''
 21:     return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' })
 22: }
 23: // Chuyển Date → string cho input (yyyy-MM-dd)
 24: function toInputValue(date: Date | null): string {
 25:     if (!date) return ''
 26:     const d = new Date(date)
 27:     return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
 28: }
 29: function isLessonUnlocked(lesson: Lesson, lessons: Lesson[], progress: Record<string, any>) {
 30:     if (lesson.order === 1) return true
 31:     const prev = lessons.find(l => l.order === lesson.order - 1)
 32:     if (!prev) return true
 33:     const p = progress[prev.id]
 34:     return p?.status === 'COMPLETED' && (p?.totalScore ?? 0) >= 5
 35: }
 36: export default function LessonSidebar({
 37:     lessons, currentLessonId, onLessonSelect, progress, startedAt, resetAt, onResetStartDate
 38: }: LessonSidebarProps) {
 39:     const [showDatePicker, setShowDatePicker] = useState(false)
 40:     const [dateInput, setDateInput] = useState(toInputValue(startedAt))
 41:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
 42:     // Lọc progress chỉ hiển thị các bài học không bị reset (lộ trình hiện tại)
 43:     const filteredProgress = Object.entries(progress).reduce((acc, [lessonId, p]: [string, any]) => {
 44:         // Chỉ hiển thị progress không có status RESET
 45:         if (p.status !== 'RESET') {
 46:             acc[lessonId] = p
 47:         }
 48:         return acc
 49:     }, {} as Record<string, any>)
 50:     const handleReset = async () => {
 51:         if (!dateInput) return
 52:         // Hiển thị cảnh báo trước khi reset
 53:         const confirmReset = window.confirm(
 54:             "⚠️ Cảnh báo: Dữ liệu học tập cũ sẽ không được tính vào lộ trình mới.\n\n" +
 55:             "Bạn sẽ bắt đầu lại từ bài 1. Tiến trình cũ vẫn lưu trong hệ thống để admin xem lại.\n\n" +
 56:             "Nhấn OK để xác nhận đổi ngày bắt đầu mới."
 57:         )
 58:         if (!confirmReset) return
 59:         setSaving(true)
 60:         try {
 61:             await onResetStartDate(new Date(dateInput))
 62:             setShowDatePicker(false)
 63:         } finally {
 64:             setSaving(false)
 65:         }
 66:     }
 67:     return (
 68:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-zinc-900 border-r border-zinc-800 w-80 shrink-0">
 69:             {/* ── Ngày bắt đầu block ── */}
 70:             <div className="p-4 border-b border-zinc-800 space-y-2">
 71:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 72:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-zinc-300">
 73:                         <CalendarDays className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-400 shrink-0" />
 74:                         <div>
 75:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Ngày bắt đầu lộ trình</p>
 76:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">
 77:                                 {startedAt ? formatDateVN(startedAt) : '-- / -- / ----'}
 78:                             </p>
 79:                         </div>
 80:                     </div>
 81:                     <button
 82:                         onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(!showDatePicker)}
 83:                         className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/40 hover:border-orange-400 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 transition-colors"
 84:                     >
 85:                         <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" />
 86:                         Đặt lại
 87:                     </button>
 88:                 </div>
 89:                 {showDatePicker && (
 90:                     <div className="bg-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-3 space-y-2 border border-zinc-700">
 91:                         <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-400">Chọn ngày mới (dd/mm/yyyy):</p>
 92:                         <input
 93:                             type="date"
 94:                             value={dateInput}
 95:                             onChange={e => setDateInput(e.target.value)}
 96:                             className="w-full bg-zinc-700 text-white text-sm rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500"
 97:                         />
 98:                         <div className="flex gap-2">
 99:                             <button
100:                                 onClick={handleReset}
101:                                 disabled={!dateInput || saving}
102:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs font-bold bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg py-1.5 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
103:                             >
104:                                 {saving ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Xác nhận'}
105:                             </button>
106:                             <button
107:                                 onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(false)}
108:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs text-zinc-400 hover:text-white border border-zinc-600 rounded-lg py-1.5 transition-colors"
109:                             >
110:                                 Hủy
111:                             </button>
112:                         </div>
113:                     </div>
114:                 )}
115:             </div>
116:             {/* ── Tiêu đề danh sách ── */}
117:             <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-zinc-800">
118:                 <h2 className="font-bold text-sm text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Nội dung khóa học</h2>
119:             </div>
120:             {/* ── Danh sách bài ── */}
121:             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
122:                 {lessons.map((lesson) => {
123:                     const prog = filteredProgress[lesson.id]
124:                     const isCompleted = prog?.status === 'COMPLETED'
125:                     const isActive = currentLessonId === lesson.id
126:                     const unlocked = isLessonUnlocked(lesson, lessons, filteredProgress)
127:                     return (
128:                         <button
129:                             key={lesson.id}
130:                             onClick={() => unlocked && onLessonSelect(lesson.id)}
131:                             disabled={!unlocked}
132:                             title={!unlocked ? 'Hoàn thành bài trước ≥5đ để mở khóa' : undefined}
133:                             className={cn(
134:                                 "w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-4 text-left transition-colors border-b border-zinc-800/50",
135:                                 isActive && "bg-zinc-800 border-l-2 border-l-orange-500",
136:                                 unlocked && !isActive && "hover:bg-zinc-800/50",
137:                                 !unlocked && "opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed"
138:                             )}
139:                         >
140:                             <div className="shrink-0">
141:                                 {isCompleted ? (
142:                                     <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />
143:                                 ) : isActive ? (
144:                                     <PlayCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-400" />
145:                                 ) : !unlocked ? (
146:                                     <Lock className="w-4 h-4 text-zinc-600" />
147:                                 ) : (
148:                                     <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 border-zinc-700 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] text-zinc-500">
149:                                         {lesson.order}
150:                                     </div>
151:                                 )}
152:                             </div>
153:                             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
154:                                 <p className={cn("text-sm font-medium line-clamp-2", isActive ? "text-white" : "text-zinc-400")}>
155:                                     {lesson.title}
156:                                 </p>
157:                                 {prog?.totalScore !== undefined && (
158:                                     <span className={cn("text-[10px] font-bold", prog.totalScore >= 5 ? "text-emerald-500" : "text-orange-400")}>
159:                                         {prog.totalScore >= 5 ? '✓' : '✗'} {prog.totalScore}/10đ
160:                                     </span>
161:                                 )}
162:                             </div>
163:                         </button>
164:                     )
165:                 })}
166:             </div>
167:         </div>
168:     )
169: }
`````

## File: lib/email-parser.ts
`````typescript
  1: export interface ParsedTransfer {
  2:   phone: string | null;
  3:   userId: number | null; // Thêm userId
  4:   amount: number;
  5:   courseCode: string | null;
  6:   bankName: string | null;
  7:   accountNumber: string | null;
  8:   transferTime: Date | null;
  9:   rawContent: string;
 10: }
 11: interface BankParser {
 12:   pattern: RegExp;
 13:   extract: (matches: RegExpMatchArray) => ParsedTransfer;
 14: }
 15: const bankParsers: BankParser[] = [
 16:   // Mới: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03 (linh hoạt khoảng trống, dấu chấm, gạch dưới)
 17:   {
 18:     pattern: /SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})[\s\._]*HV[\s\._]*(\d+)[\s\._]*COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i,
 19:     extract: (matches) => ({
 20:       phone: matches[1],
 21:       userId: parseInt(matches[2]),
 22:       courseCode: matches[3].toUpperCase(), // Chuyển sang chữ hoa ngay lập tức
 23:       amount: 0,
 24:       bankName: null,
 25:       accountNumber: null,
 26:       transferTime: null,
 27:       rawContent: matches[0]
 28:     })
 29:   },
 30:   {
 31:     pattern: /(\d{10,11})\s*c[oó]\s*(\w+)|(\w+)\s*c[oó]\s*(\d{10,11})/i,
 32:     extract: (matches) => ({
 33:       phone: matches[1] || matches[4] || null,
 34:       userId: null,
 35:       amount: 0,
 36:       courseCode: matches[2] || matches[3] || null,
 37:       bankName: null,
 38:       accountNumber: null,
 39:       transferTime: null,
 40:       rawContent: matches[0]
 41:     })
 42:   },
 43:   {
 44:     pattern: /ND:\s*(\d{10,11})\s+(\w+)|(\w+)\s+(\d{10,11})/i,
 45:     extract: (matches) => ({
 46:       phone: matches[1] || matches[4] || null,
 47:       userId: null,
 48:       amount: 0,
 49:       courseCode: matches[2] || matches[3] || null,
 50:       bankName: null,
 51:       accountNumber: null,
 52:       transferTime: null,
 53:       rawContent: matches[0]
 54:     })
 55:   },
 56:   {
 57:     pattern: /(\d{10,11}).*?(c[oó]?|nạp).*?(\w{2,10})/i,
 58:     extract: (matches) => ({
 59:       phone: matches[1] || null,
 60:       userId: null,
 61:       amount: 0,
 62:       courseCode: matches[3] || null,
 63:       bankName: null,
 64:       accountNumber: null,
 65:       transferTime: null,
 66:       rawContent: matches[0]
 67:     })
 68:   }
 69: ];
 70: export function parseBankEmail(content: string): ParsedTransfer | null {
 71:   const normalizedContent = content.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
 72:   for (const parser of bankParsers) {
 73:     const matches = normalizedContent.match(parser.pattern);
 74:     if (matches) {
 75:       return parser.extract(matches);
 76:     }
 77:   }
 78:   const phoneMatch = normalizedContent.match(/(\d{10,11})/);
 79:   const courseMatch = normalizedContent.match(/c[oó]\s*(\w{2,10})|(\w{2,10})\s*c[oó]/i);
 80:   if (phoneMatch || courseMatch) {
 81:     return {
 82:       phone: phoneMatch?.[1] || null,
 83:       userId: null,
 84:       amount: 0,
 85:       courseCode: courseMatch?.[1] || courseMatch?.[2] || null,
 86:       bankName: null,
 87:       accountNumber: null,
 88:       transferTime: null,
 89:       rawContent: normalizedContent.substring(0, 200)
 90:     };
 91:   }
 92:   return null;
 93: }
 94: export function extractAmount(content: string): number {
 95:   const amountPatterns = [
 96:     /(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*)\s*đ/gi,
 97:     /SMT:\s*(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*)/gi,
 98:     /(\d{6,12})/g
 99:   ];
100:   for (const pattern of amountPatterns) {
101:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
102:     if (matches) {
103:       const amountStr = matches[0]
104:         .replace(/\D/g, '')
105:         .replace(/^0+/, '');
106:       const amount = parseInt(amountStr, 10);
107:       if (amount >= 10000 && amount <= 1000000000) {
108:         return amount;
109:       }
110:     }
111:   }
112:   return 0;
113: }
114: export function extractBankName(content: string): string | null {
115:   const bankNames = [
116:     'Vietcombank', 'VCB',
117:     'Techcombank', 'TCB',
118:     'MB Bank', 'MBBank', 'MB',
119:     'BIDV',
120:     'Agribank', 'AGRIBANK',
121:     'ACB',
122:     'Vietinbank', 'VTB',
123:     'TPBank', 'TPB',
124:     'Sacombank', 'SCB',
125:     'SHB',
126:     'SeABank',
127:     'Eximbank', 'EIB',
128:     'HD Bank',
129:     'Bac A Bank', 'BAB',
130:     'Oceanbank',
131:     'GPBank',
132:     'Kiên Long', 'KLB',
133:     'Nam A Bank', 'NAB',
134:     'PGBank',
135:     'Public Bank', 'PB',
136:     'Saigonbank', 'SGB'
137:   ];
138:   const upperContent = content.toUpperCase();
139:   for (const bank of bankNames) {
140:     if (upperContent.includes(bank.toUpperCase())) {
141:       return bank;
142:     }
143:   }
144:   return null;
145: }
146: export function extractAccountNumber(content: string): string | null {
147:   const patterns = [
148:     /STK[:\s]*(\d{6,20})/i,
149:     /TK[:\s]*(\d{6,20})/i,
150:     /(\d{6,20})/g
151:   ];
152:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
153:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
154:     if (matches && matches[1]) {
155:       return matches[1];
156:     }
157:   }
158:   return null;
159: }
160: export function extractTransferTime(content: string): Date | null {
161:   const patterns = [
162:     /(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/,
163:     /(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})/,
164:     /(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s+(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})/
165:   ];
166:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
167:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
168:     if (matches) {
169:       try {
170:         if (matches.length >= 6) {
171:           const [_, d1, d2, y, h, min] = matches;
172:           return new Date(`${y}-${d2}-${d1}T${h || '00'}:${min || '00'}:00`);
173:         }
174:       } catch {
175:         continue;
176:       }
177:     }
178:   }
179:   return null;
180: }
181: export interface FullParsedTransfer {
182:   phone: string | null;
183:   userId: number | null; // Thêm userId
184:   amount: number;
185:   courseCode: string | null;
186:   bankName: string | null;
187:   accountNumber: string | null;
188:   transferTime: Date | null;
189:   rawContent: string;
190: }
191: export function parseFullTransferEmail(content: string): FullParsedTransfer {
192:   const parsed = parseBankEmail(content);
193:   const amount = extractAmount(content);
194:   const bankName = extractBankName(content);
195:   const accountNumber = extractAccountNumber(content);
196:   const transferTime = extractTransferTime(content);
197:   return {
198:     phone: parsed?.phone || null,
199:     userId: parsed?.userId || null,
200:     amount,
201:     courseCode: parsed?.courseCode || null,
202:     bankName,
203:     accountNumber,
204:     transferTime,
205:     rawContent: content.substring(0, 500)
206:   };
207: }
208: export function matchWithEnrollment(
209:   transfer: FullParsedTransfer,
210:   enrollments: Array<{
211:     id: number;
212:     userId: number; // Thêm userId vào input
213:     courseId: number;
214:     course: {
215:       id_khoa: string;
216:       phi_coc: number;
217:       noidung_stk: string | null;
218:     };
219:     user: {
220:       phone: string | null;
221:     };
222:     status: string;
223:   }>
224: ): { matched: boolean; enrollmentId: number | null; reason: string } {
225:   for (const enrollment of enrollments) {
226:     if (enrollment.status !== 'PENDING') continue;
227:     const courseCode = enrollment.course.id_khoa.toUpperCase();
228:     const transferCourseCode = transfer.courseCode?.toUpperCase();
229:     // Khớp mã khóa học
230:     const courseCodeMatch = transferCourseCode && 
231:       (courseCode.includes(transferCourseCode) || transferCourseCode.includes(courseCode));
232:     // Khớp số tiền
233:     const amountMatch = transfer.amount >= enrollment.course.phi_coc;
234:     // Ưu tiên 1: Khớp theo userId
235:     const userIdMatch = transfer.userId && transfer.userId === enrollment.userId;
236:     if (userIdMatch && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch) {
237:       return {
238:         matched: true,
239:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
240:         reason: `Khớp tuyệt đối: Mã HV ${transfer.userId} + Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
241:       };
242:     }
243:     // Ưu tiên 2: Khớp theo SĐT (6 số cuối hoặc full)
244:     const userPhone = enrollment.user.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || '';
245:     const transferPhone = transfer.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || '';
246:     const phoneMatch = transferPhone && userPhone && userPhone.includes(transferPhone);
247:     if (phoneMatch && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch) {
248:       return {
249:         matched: true,
250:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
251:         reason: `Khớp: SĐT ${transfer.phone} + Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
252:       };
253:     }
254:     // Ưu tiên 3: Chỉ khớp SĐT + Số tiền
255:     if (phoneMatch && amountMatch && !transfer.courseCode) {
256:       return {
257:         matched: true,
258:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
259:         reason: `Khớp: SĐT ${transfer.phone} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
260:       };
261:     }
262:     // Ưu tiên 4: Chỉ khớp Mã KH + Số tiền
263:     if (courseCodeMatch && amountMatch && !transfer.phone && !transfer.userId) {
264:       return {
265:         matched: true,
266:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
267:         reason: `Khớp: Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
268:       };
269:     }
270:   }
271:   return {
272:     matched: false,
273:     enrollmentId: null,
274:     reason: 'Không tìm thấy enrollment phù hợp'
275:   };
276: }
`````

## File: lib/vietqr.ts
`````typescript
  1: export interface VietQRRequest {
  2:   accountNo: string
  3:   accountName: string
  4:   acqId: string
  5:   amount: number
  6:   addInfo: string
  7:   template?: string
  8:   format?: string
  9: }
 10: export interface VietQRResponse {
 11:   code: string
 12:   desc: string
 13:   data: {
 14:     qrCode: string
 15:     qrDataURL: string
 16:   }
 17: }
 18: export function generateTransferContent(options: {
 19:   phone: string
 20:   userId: number
 21:   courseCode: string
 22: }): string {
 23:   // Format: SDT [phone_cuoi] HV [id] COC [code]
 24:   const { phone, userId, courseCode } = options
 25:   const cleanPhone = phone.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-6)
 26:   const content = `SDT ${cleanPhone} HV ${userId} COC ${courseCode}`.toUpperCase()
 27:   return content.slice(0, 50) // Tăng giới hạn ký tự lên 50 vì có khoảng cách
 28: }
 29: export async function generateVietQR(options: {
 30:   accountNo: string
 31:   accountName: string
 32:   acqId: string // Nhận bank_stk từ Course
 33:   amount: number
 34:   addInfo: string
 35: }): Promise<{ qrCode: string; qrDataURL: string }> {
 36:   // Map tên ngân hàng sang mã BIN
 37:   const bankMap: Record<string, string> = {
 38:     'SACOMBANK': '970403',
 39:     'VIETCOMBANK': '970436',
 40:     'VCB': '970436',
 41:     'ACB': '970416',
 42:     'MBBANK': '970422',
 43:     'MB': '970422',
 44:     'TECHCOMBANK': '970407',
 45:     'TCB': '970407',
 46:     'VIETINBANK': '970415',
 47:     'CTG': '970415',
 48:     'BIDV': '970418',
 49:     'AGRIBANK': '970405',
 50:     'TPBANK': '970423',
 51:     'VPBANK': '970432'
 52:   }
 53:   const bankId = bankMap[options.acqId?.toUpperCase()] || options.acqId || '970403'
 54:   const requestBody: VietQRRequest = {
 55:     accountNo: options.accountNo,
 56:     accountName: options.accountName.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z ]/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' '),
 57:     acqId: bankId,
 58:     amount: options.amount,
 59:     addInfo: options.addInfo,
 60:     template: 'qr_only',
 61:     format: 'text'
 62:   }
 63:   const response = await fetch('https://api.vietqr.io/v2/generate', {
 64:     method: 'POST',
 65:     headers: {
 66:       'x-client-id': process.env.VIETQR_CLIENT_ID || '',
 67:       'x-api-key': process.env.VIETQR_API_KEY || '',
 68:       'Content-Type': 'application/json'
 69:     },
 70:     body: JSON.stringify(requestBody)
 71:   })
 72:   if (!response.ok) {
 73:     const errorText = await response.text()
 74:     throw new Error(`VietQR API error: ${response.status} - ${errorText}`)
 75:   }
 76:   const data: VietQRResponse = await response.json()
 77:   if (data.code !== '00') {
 78:     throw new Error(`VietQR error: ${data.desc}`)
 79:   }
 80:   return {
 81:     qrCode: data.data.qrCode,
 82:     qrDataURL: data.data.qrDataURL
 83:   }
 84: }
 85: export async function createPaymentQR(options: {
 86:   phone: string
 87:   userId: number
 88:   courseId: number
 89:   courseCode: string
 90:   accountNo: string
 91:   accountName: string
 92:   acqId: string // Thêm acqId
 93:   amount: number
 94: }): Promise<{
 95:   transferContent: string
 96:   qrCodeUrl: string
 97: }> {
 98:   const transferContent = generateTransferContent({
 99:     phone: options.phone,
100:     userId: options.userId,
101:     courseCode: options.courseCode
102:   })
103:   const qrResult = await generateVietQR({
104:     accountNo: options.accountNo,
105:     accountName: options.accountName,
106:     acqId: options.acqId, // Truyền acqId vào
107:     amount: options.amount,
108:     addInfo: transferContent
109:   })
110:   return {
111:     transferContent,
112:     qrCodeUrl: qrResult.qrDataURL
113:   }
114: }
`````

    7: This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
    8: It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
    9: or other automated processes.

  267:  4:         signIn: '/login',
  268:  5:     },
  269:  6:     callbacks: {
  270:  7:         authorized({ auth, request: { nextUrl } }) {
  271:  8:             const isLoggedIn = !!auth?.user;
  272:  9:             const isOnDashboard = nextUrl.pathname.startsWith('/dashboard');
  273: 10:             if (isOnDashboard) {
  274: 11:                 if (isLoggedIn) return true;
  275: 12:                 return false; // Redirect unauthenticated users to login page

  280: 17:             return true;
  281: 18:         },
  282: 19:     },

  292: ## File: lib/utils/id-generator.ts
  293: ````typescript
  294:  1: import { RESERVED_IDS } from '../constants';
  295:  2: import prisma from '@/lib/prisma';
  296:  3: export async function generateStudentId(): Promise<number> {
  297:  4:     // Find the highest ID currently in use
  298:  5:     // We exclude reserved IDs from the max calculation to avoid skipping large gaps if a reserved ID is manually inserted.
  299:  6:     // Actually, standard max logic is fine, but we must check if nextId hits a reserved one.
  300:  7:     const aggregation = await prisma.user.aggregate({
  301:  8:         _max: {
  302:  9:             id: true,
  303: 10:         },
  304: 11:     });
  305: 12:     let nextId = (aggregation._max.id ?? 0) + 1;
  306: 13:     // Check if nextId is in reserved list
  307: 14:     while (RESERVED_IDS.includes(nextId)) {
  308: 15:         nextId++;
  309: 16:     }
  310: 17:     // Also check if this specific ID already exists (in case of race conditions or manual inserts)
  311: 18:     // Though with standard max+1 logic, collision is unlikely unless manual insert of arbitrary ID happened.
  312: 19:     // Ideally we'd use a transaction or lock, but for MVP this loop is acceptable.
  313: 20:     let exists = await prisma.user.findUnique({
  314: 21:         where: { id: nextId },
  315: 22:     });
  316: 23:     while (exists || RESERVED_IDS.includes(nextId)) {
  317: 24:         if (RESERVED_IDS.includes(nextId)) {
  318: 25:             nextId++;
  319: 26:             continue;
  320: 27:         }
  321: 28:         // If it exists but not reserved (e.g. race condition), try next
  322: 29:         nextId++;
  323: 30:         exists = await prisma.user.findUnique({
  324: 31:             where: { id: nextId },
  325: 32:         });
  326: 33:     }
  327: 34:     return nextId;
  328: 35: }
  329: ````

  428: ## File: prisma/seed.ts
  429: ````typescript
  430:  1: import { PrismaClient, Role } from '@prisma/client'
  431:  2: import * as dotenv from 'dotenv'
  432:  3: dotenv.config({ path: '.env.local' })
  433:  4: dotenv.config()
  434:  5: const options: any = {
  435:  6:     datasourceUrl: process.env.DATABASE_URL
  436:  7: }
  437:  8: const prisma = new PrismaClient(options)
  438:  9: async function main() {
  439: 10:     console.log('Starting seed...')
  440: 11:     try {
  441: 12:         const admin = await prisma.user.upsert({
  442: 13:             where: { id: 0 },
  443: 14:             update: {},
  444: 15:             create: {
  445: 16:                 id: 0,
  446: 17:                 email: 'admin@brk.com',
  447: 18:                 name: 'BRK Admin',
  448: 19:                 role: Role.ADMIN,
  449: 20:                 phone: '0909000000', // Example phone
  450: 21:                 // password: admin123
  451: 22:                 password: '$2b$10$EpRnTzVlqHNP0.fMdQbL.e/KA/1h.q9s525aw.z8M.CI6k.v1Giv2',
  452: 23:             },
  453: 24:         })
  454: 25:         console.log('Seed successful:', { admin })
  455: 26:     } catch (error) {
  456: 27:         console.error('Seed failed:', error)
  457: 28:         throw error
  458: 29:     }
  459: 30: }
  460: 31: main()
  461: 32:     .then(async () => {
  462: 33:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  463: 34:     })
  464: 35:     .catch(async (e) => {
  465: 36:         console.error(e)
  466: 37:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  467: 38:         process.exit(1)
  468: 39:     })
  469: ````

  473:  1: This is a [Next.js](https://nextjs.org) project bootstrapped with [`create-next-app`](https://nextjs.org/docs/app/api-reference/cli/create-next-app).

  511: ## File: scripts/add-reserved-id.ts
  512: ````typescript
  513:  1: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
  514:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
  515:  3: async function main() {
  516:  4:     const args = process.argv.slice(2)
  517:  5:     if (args.length < 1) {
  518:  6:         console.error('Usage: npm run add-reserved <id> [note]')
  519:  7:         process.exit(1)
  520:  8:     }
  521:  9:     const id = parseInt(args[0])
  522: 10:     const note = args[1] || 'Reserved by Admin'
  523: 11:     if (isNaN(id)) {
  524: 12:         console.error('Error: ID must be a number')
  525: 13:         process.exit(1)
  526: 14:     }
  527: 15:     try {
  528: 16:         const existing = await prisma.reservedId.findUnique({ where: { id } })
  529: 17:         if (existing) {
  530: 18:             console.log(`⚠️  ID ${id} is already reserved: "${existing.note}"`)
  531: 19:             return
  532: 20:         }
  533: 21:         await prisma.reservedId.create({
  534: 22:             data: {
  535: 23:                 id,
  536: 24:                 note
  537: 25:             }
  538: 26:         })
  539: 27:         console.log(`✅ Successfully reserved ID ${id} (${note}). New users will skip this ID.`)
  540: 28:     } catch (error) {
  541: 29:         console.error('❌ Error:', error)
  542: 30:     } finally {
  543: 31:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  544: 32:     }
  545: 33: }
  546: 34: main()
  547: ````
  548: 
  549: ## File: scripts/change-id.ts
  550: ````typescript
  551:  1: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
  552:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
  553:  3: async function main() {
  554:  4:     const args = process.argv.slice(2)
  555:  5:     if (args.length !== 2) {
  556:  6:         console.error('Usage: npm run change-id <current_id> <new_id>')
  557:  7:         process.exit(1)
  558:  8:     }
  559:  9:     const currentId = parseInt(args[0])
  560: 10:     const newId = parseInt(args[1])
  561: 11:     if (isNaN(currentId) || isNaN(newId)) {
  562: 12:         console.error('Error: IDs must be numbers')
  563: 13:         process.exit(1)
  564: 14:     }
  565: 15:     console.log(`🔄 Attempting to change User ID from ${currentId} to ${newId}...`)
  566: 16:     try {
  567: 17:         // 1. Kiểm tra User cũ có tồn tại không
  568: 18:         const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: currentId } })
  569: 19:         if (!user) {
  570: 20:             console.error(`❌ User with ID ${currentId} not found.`)
  571: 21:             process.exit(1)
  572: 22:         }
  573: 23:         // 2. Kiểm tra User mới có bị trùng không
  574: 24:         const existingNewUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: newId } })
  575: 25:         if (existingNewUser) {
  576: 26:             console.error(`❌ Target ID ${newId} is already taken by user: ${existingNewUser.name} (${existingNewUser.email})`)
  577: 27:             process.exit(1)
  578: 28:         }
  579: 29:         // 3. Kiểm tra xem ID mới có phải Reserved ID không (Để thông báo thôi, Admin thì quyền lực tối cao)
  580: 30:         const reserved = await prisma.reservedId.findUnique({ where: { id: newId } })
  581: 31:         if (reserved) {
  582: 32:             console.log(`💎 Target ID ${newId} is a RESERVED ID ("${reserved.note}"). allowing change because you are Admin.`)
  583: 33:         }
  584: 34:         // 4. Thực hiện đổi ID
  585: 35:         // Vì ta đã set ON UPDATE CASCADE trong Schema, nên chỉ cần update User là xong.
  586: 36:         // Tuy nhiên, Prisma Client không cho update Primary Key trực tiếp trong phương thức update().
  587: 37:         // Ta phải dùng executeRaw hoặc delete/create (rủi ro mất data).
  588: 38:         // Tốt nhất là dùng executeRaw để tận dụng tính năng CASCADE của SQL.
  589: 39:         console.log('⚡ Updating ID in database...')
  590: 40:         // Cập nhật bảng User (Các bảng con Account, Session, User(referrer) sẽ tự động nhảy theo đv Postgres Cascade)
  591: 41:         const result = await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(`UPDATE "User" SET id = ${newId} WHERE id = ${currentId}`)
  592: 42:         if (result > 0) {
  593: 43:             console.log(`✅ Success! User ${user.email} now has ID: ${newId}`)
  594: 44:         } else {
  595: 45:             console.error('❌ Failed to update ID. No rows affected.')
  596: 46:         }
  597: 47:         // 5. Reset Sequence (Quan trọng để các user sau không bị lỗi)
  598: 48:         console.log('🔄 Resetting Sequence...')
  599: 49:         await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"User"', 'id'), coalesce(max(id)+1, 1), false) FROM "User";`)
  600: 50:     } catch (error) {
  601: 51:         console.error('❌ Error:', error)
  602: 52:     } finally {
  603: 53:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  604: 54:     }
  605: 55: }
  606: 56: main()
  607: ````

  609: ## File: scripts/check-duplicates.ts
  610: ````typescript
  611:  1: import fs from 'fs'
  612:  2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
  613:  3: const results: any[] = []
  614:  4: const emailCount: Record<string, number> = {}
  615:  5: fs.createReadStream('processed-users.preview.csv')
  616:  6:     .pipe(csv())
  617:  7:     .on('data', (data) => {
  618:  8:         results.push(data)
  619:  9:         const email = data.email
  620: 10:         emailCount[email] = (emailCount[email] || 0) + 1
  621: 11:     })
  622: 12:     .on('end', () => {
  623: 13:         console.log('Duplicate Emails Found:')
  624: 14:         for (const [email, count] of Object.entries(emailCount)) {
  625: 15:             if (count > 1) {
  626: 16:                 console.log(`- ${email}: ${count} times`)
  627: 17:                 // Tìm các ID trùng
  628: 18:                 const ids = results.filter(r => r.email === email).map(r => r.id)
  629: 19:                 console.log(`  IDs: ${ids.join(', ')}`)
  630: 20:             }
  631: 21:         }
  632: 22:     })
  633: ````

  635: ## File: scripts/check-missing-ids.ts
  636: ````typescript
  637:  1: import fs from 'fs'
  638:  2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
  639:  3: async function checkMissingIds() {
  640:  4:     const ids = new Set<number>()
  641:  5:     const csvFilePath = 'processed-users.preview.csv'
  642:  6:     if (!fs.existsSync(csvFilePath)) {
  643:  7:         console.error(`File not found: ${csvFilePath}`)
  644:  8:         return
  645:  9:     }
  646: 10:     console.log(`Checking IDs in ${csvFilePath}...`)
  647: 11:     fs.createReadStream(csvFilePath)
  648: 12:         .pipe(csv())
  649: 13:         .on('data', (row) => {
  650: 14:             if (row.id) {
  651: 15:                 ids.add(parseInt(row.id))
  652: 16:             }
  653: 17:         })
  654: 18:         .on('end', () => {
  655: 19:             console.log(`Found ${ids.size} unique IDs.`)
  656: 20:             const missingIds: number[] = []
  657: 21:             // Check range 0 to 838 (inclusive)
  658: 22:             for (let i = 0; i <= 838; i++) {
  659: 23:                 if (!ids.has(i)) {
  660: 24:                     missingIds.push(i)
  661: 25:                 }
  662: 26:             }
  663: 27:             if (missingIds.length > 0) {
  664: 28:                 console.log(`❌ Missing IDs found (${missingIds.length}):`)
  665: 29:                 console.log(missingIds.join(', '))
  666: 30:             } else {
  667: 31:                 console.log('✅ No missing IDs in range 0-838.')
  668: 32:             }
  669: 33:         })
  670: 34: }
  671: 35: checkMissingIds()
  672: ````
  673: 
  674: ## File: scripts/cleanup-v3-data.js
  675: ````javascript
  676:  1: const fs = require('fs');
  677:  2: const csv = require('csv-parser');
  678:  3: const { createObjectCsvWriter } = require('csv-writer');
  679:  4: async function readCsv(filePath) {
  680:  5:     const results = [];
  681:  6:     return new Promise((resolve) => {
  682:  7:         fs.createReadStream(filePath)
  683:  8:             .pipe(csv())
  684:  9:             .on('data', (data) => results.push(data))
  685: 10:             .on('end', () => resolve(results));
  686: 11:     });
  687: 12: }
  688: 13: async function cleanup() {
  689: 14:     console.log("=== BẮT ĐẦU DỌN DẸP DỮ LIỆU CHUẨN HÓA ===");
  690: 15:     // 1. CLEAN USERS
  691: 16:     const users = await readCsv('User.csv');
  692: 17:     const emailMap = {}; // email -> first_id
  693: 18:     const cleanedUsers = users.map(u => {
  694: 19:         const email = u.email.toLowerCase().trim();
  695: 20:         if (emailMap[email]) {
  696: 21:             const firstId = parseInt(emailMap[email]);
  697: 22:             const currentId = parseInt(u.id);
  698: 23:             if (currentId > firstId) {
  699: 24:                 const parts = u.email.split('@');
  700: 25:                 u.email = `${parts[0]}_${u.id}@${parts[1]}`;
  701: 26:                 console.log(`Fix duplicate email: ${email} -> ${u.email} (ID: ${u.id})`);
  702: 27:             }
  703: 28:         } else {
  704: 29:             emailMap[email] = u.id;
  705: 30:         }
  706: 31:         return u;
  707: 32:     });
  708: 33:     // 1.2 CLEAN COURSES (Ensure id_khoa is unique)
  709: 34:     const courses = await readCsv('Course.csv');
  710: 35:     const courseKhoaMap = {};
  711: 36:     const cleanedCourses = courses.map(c => {
  712: 37:         const khoa = c.id_khoa.trim();
  713: 38:         if (courseKhoaMap[khoa]) {
  714: 39:             c.id_khoa = `${khoa}_${c.id}`;
  715: 40:             console.log(`Fix duplicate id_khoa: ${khoa} -> ${c.id_khoa}`);
  716: 41:         } else {
  717: 42:             courseKhoaMap[khoa] = true;
  718: 43:         }
  719: 44:         return c;
  720: 45:     });
  721: 46:     const userWriter = createObjectCsvWriter({
  722: 47:         path: 'User.csv',
  723: 48:         header: Object.keys(cleanedUsers[0]).map(k => ({ id: k, title: k }))
  724: 49:     });
  725: 50:     await userWriter.writeRecords(cleanedUsers);
  726: 51:     const courseWriter = createObjectCsvWriter({
  727: 52:         path: 'Course.csv',
  728: 53:         header: Object.keys(cleanedCourses[0]).map(k => ({ id: k, title: k }))
  729: 54:     });
  730: 55:     await courseWriter.writeRecords(cleanedCourses);
  731: 56:     console.log("✅ Đã cập nhật User.csv và Course.csv");
  732: 57:     // 2. CLEAN ENROLLMENTS
  733: 58:     const enrollments = await readCsv('Enrollment.csv');
  734: 59:     const seenPairs = new Set();
  735: 60:     const cleanedEnrollments = [];
  736: 61:     let dupCount = 0;
  737: 62:     enrollments.forEach(e => {
  738: 63:         const key = `${e.userId}-${e.courseId}`;
  739: 64:         if (!seenPairs.has(key)) {
  740: 65:             seenPairs.add(key);
  741: 66:             cleanedEnrollments.push(e);
  742: 67:         } else {
  743: 68:             dupCount++;
  744: 69:         }
  745: 70:     });
  746: 71:     const enrollWriter = createObjectCsvWriter({
  747: 72:         path: 'Enrollment.csv',
  748: 73:         header: Object.keys(cleanedEnrollments[0]).map(k => ({ id: k, title: k }))
  749: 74:     });
  750: 75:     await enrollWriter.writeRecords(cleanedEnrollments);
  751: 76:     console.log(`✅ Đã cập nhật Enrollment.csv (Loại bỏ ${dupCount} dòng trùng lặp)`);
  752: 77: }
  753: 78: cleanup();
  754: ````
  755: 
  756: ## File: scripts/debug-data.ts
  757: ````typescript
  758:  1: import fs from 'fs'
  759:  2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
  760:  3: async function main() {
  761:  4:     const courses: any[] = []
  762:  5:     const registrations: any[] = []
  763:  6:     // 1. Phân tích KhoaHoc.csv
  764:  7:     await new Promise((resolve) => {
  765:  8:         fs.createReadStream('KhoaHoc.csv')
  766:  9:             .pipe(csv())
  767: 10:             .on('data', (data) => courses.push(data))
  768: 11:             .on('end', resolve)
  769: 12:     })
  770: 13:     console.log('--- PHÂN TÍCH KHOAHOC.CSV ---')
  771: 14:     console.log(`Tổng số khóa học: ${courses.length}`)
  772: 15:     const courseIds = courses.map(c => c.id_khoa).filter(Boolean)
  773: 16:     const courseLops = courses.map(c => c.id_lop).filter(Boolean)
  774: 17:     console.log('Unique id_khoa in KhoaHoc:', Array.from(new Set(courseIds)))
  775: 18:     console.log('Unique id_lop in KhoaHoc:', Array.from(new Set(courseLops)))
  776: 19:     const aiCourse = courses.find(c =>
  777: 20:         (c.name_lop && c.name_lop.includes('AI')) ||
  778: 21:         (c.mo_ta_ngan && c.mo_ta_ngan.includes('AI')) ||
  779: 22:         (c.mo_ta_dai && c.mo_ta_dai.includes('AI'))
  780: 23:     )
  781: 24:     console.log('Tìm kiếm khóa học AI:', aiCourse ? `Tìm thấy: ${aiCourse.name_lop} (ID: ${aiCourse.id_khoa})` : 'Không thấy')
  782: 25:     // 2. Phân tích LS_DangKy.csv
  783: 26:     await new Promise((resolve) => {
  784: 27:         fs.createReadStream('LS_DangKy.csv')
  785: 28:             .pipe(csv())
  786: 29:             .on('data', (data) => registrations.push(data))
  787: 30:             .on('end', resolve)
  788: 31:     })
  789: 32:     console.log('\n--- PHÂN TÍCH LS_DANGKY.CSV ---')
  790: 33:     console.log(`Tổng số bản ghi: ${registrations.length}`)
  791: 34:     const regKhoas = registrations.map(r => r.id_khoa).filter(Boolean)
  792: 35:     const regLops = registrations.map(r => r.id_lop).filter(Boolean)
  793: 36:     const uniqueRegKhoas = Array.from(new Set(regKhoas))
  794: 37:     console.log('Unique id_khoa in LS_DangKy:', uniqueRegKhoas)
  795: 38:     const missingKhoas = uniqueRegKhoas.filter(id => !courseIds.includes(id))
  796: 39:     console.log('\nCác id_khoa trong LS_DangKy KHÔNG có trong KhoaHoc:', missingKhoas)
  797: 40:     // Kiểm tra xem các id_khoa bị thiếu có nằm trong id_lop không?
  798: 41:     const foundInLop = missingKhoas.filter(id => courseLops.includes(id))
  799: 42:     console.log('Các id_khoa bị thiếu NHƯNG tìm thấy trong cột id_lop của KhoaHoc:', foundInLop)
  800: 43: }
  801: 44: main()
  802: ````
  803: 
  804: ## File: scripts/fill-missing-ids.ts
  805: ````typescript
  806:  1: import { PrismaClient, Role } from '@prisma/client'
  807:  2: import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
  808:  3: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
  809:  4: async function main() {
  810:  5:     const missingIds = [208, 228, 304, 641]
  811:  6:     const defaultHash = await bcrypt.hash('Brk@3773', 10)
  812:  7:     console.log('Filling missing IDs...')
  813:  8:     for (const id of missingIds) {
  814:  9:         try {
  815: 10:             const idSuffix = id.toString().padStart(3, '0')
  816: 11:             await prisma.user.create({
  817: 12:                 data: {
  818: 13:                     id: id,
  819: 14:                     name: `Học viên ${id}`, // Tên placeholder
  820: 15:                     email: `noemail${id}@gmail.com`,
  821: 16:                     phone: `3773986${idSuffix}`,
  822: 17:                     password: defaultHash,
  823: 18:                     role: Role.STUDENT,
  824: 19:                     referrerId: null,
  825: 20:                     createdAt: new Date(), // Thời gian hiện tại
  826: 21:                 }
  827: 22:             })
  828: 23:             console.log(`✅ Created placeholder user for ID: ${id}`)
  829: 24:         } catch (error) {
  830: 25:             console.error(`❌ Failed to create ID ${id}:`, error)
  831: 26:         }
  832: 27:     }
  833: 28:     // Reset sequence lần nữa cho chắc
  834: 29:     await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"User"', 'id'), coalesce(max(id)+1, 1), false) FROM "User";`)
  835: 30:     console.log('Done.')
  836: 31: }
  837: 32: main()
  838: 33:     .catch(e => {
  839: 34:         console.error(e)
  840: 35:         process.exit(1)
  841: 36:     })
  842: 37:     .finally(async () => {
  843: 38:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  844: 39:     })
  845: ````
  846: 
  847: ## File: scripts/import-csv.ts
  848: ````typescript
  849:   1: import fs from 'fs'
  850:   2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
  851:   3: import { PrismaClient, Role } from '@prisma/client'
  852:   4: import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
  853:   5: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
  854:   6: interface UserRow {
  855:   7:     id: string
  856:   8:     name: string
  857:   9:     email: string
  858:  10:     phone: string
  859:  11:     password?: string
  860:  12:     role: string
  861:  13:     referrerId?: string
  862:  14:     createdAt?: string
  863:  15: }
  864:  16: async function main() {
  865:  17:     const results: UserRow[] = []
  866:  18:     const csvFilePath = 'processed-users.preview.csv'
  867:  19:     if (!fs.existsSync(csvFilePath)) {
  868:  20:         console.error(`Error: File '${csvFilePath}' not found. Please run 'npm run process-legacy' first.`)
  869:  21:         process.exit(1)
  870:  22:     }
  871:  23:     // Đọc toàn bộ file vào bộ nhớ
  872:  24:     console.log('Reading processed CSV file...')
  873:  25:     await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
  874:  26:         fs.createReadStream(csvFilePath)
  875:  27:             .pipe(csv())
  876:  28:             .on('data', (data) => results.push(data))
  877:  29:             .on('end', resolve)
  878:  30:             .on('error', reject)
  879:  31:     })
  880:  32:     console.log(`Loaded ${results.length} users.`)
  881:  33:     try {
  882:  34:         // 1. XÓA SẠCH DỮ LIỆU CŨ (Để tránh conflict ID)
  883:  35:         console.log('🗑️  Cleaning existing database...')
  884:  36:         // Xóa theo thứ tự để tránh lỗi ràng buộc khóa ngoại
  885:  37:         await prisma.account.deleteMany()
  886:  38:         await prisma.session.deleteMany()
  887:  39:         await prisma.user.deleteMany()
  888:  40:         console.log('✅ Database cleaned.')
  889:  41:         // 2. PHASE 1: INSERT USER (Chưa có Referrer)
  890:  42:         console.log('🚀 Phase 1: Inserting Users (Ignoring Referrer)...')
  891:  43:         // Hash password mặc định 1 lần dùng chung cho nhanh (nếu ko có pass riêng)
  892:  44:         const defaultHash = await bcrypt.hash('Brk@3773', 10)
  893:  45:         // Map để theo dõi email đã sử dụng (để tránh lỗi Unique Email)
  894:  46:         const usedEmails = new Set<string>()
  895:  47:         let successCount = 0
  896:  48:         for (const row of results) {
  897:  49:             let email = row.email
  898:  50:             // XỬ LÝ TRÙNG EMAIL: Nếu email đã có trong batch này
  899:  51:             if (usedEmails.has(email)) {
  900:  52:                 const originalEmail = email
  901:  53:                 email = `duplicate_${row.id}_${email}`
  902:  54:                 console.warn(`⚠️  Email conflict for ID ${row.id}: '${originalEmail}' -> Renamed to '${email}'`)
  903:  55:             }
  904:  56:             usedEmails.add(email)
  905:  57:             let passwordHash = defaultHash
  906:  58:             if (row.password && row.password !== 'Brk@3773') {
  907:  59:                 passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(row.password, 10)
  908:  60:             }
  909:  61:             await prisma.user.create({
  910:  62:                 data: {
  911:  63:                     id: parseInt(row.id), // GIỮ NGUYÊN ID CŨ
  912:  64:                     name: row.name,
  913:  65:                     email: email, // Email đã xử lý trùng
  914:  66:                     phone: row.phone,
  915:  67:                     password: passwordHash,
  916:  68:                     role: row.role as Role,
  917:  69:                     referrerId: null, // Để null trước, update sau
  918:  70:                     createdAt: row.createdAt ? new Date(row.createdAt) : new Date(),
  919:  71:                 }
  920:  72:             })
  921:  73:             process.stdout.write('.')
  922:  74:             successCount++
  923:  75:         }
  924:  76:         console.log(`\n✅ Phase 1 Finished: Inserted ${successCount} users.`)
  925:  77:         // 3. PHASE 2: UPDATE REFERRER
  926:  78:         console.log('🔗 Phase 2: Linking Referrers...')
  927:  79:         let linkCount = 0
  928:  80:         // Tạo Map để tra cứu nhanh ID tồn tại (tránh lỗi key nếu referrerId ko có trong list)
  929:  81:         const allIds = new Set(results.map(r => parseInt(r.id)))
  930:  82:         for (const row of results) {
  931:  83:             const referrerId = row.referrerId ? parseInt(row.referrerId) : null
  932:  84:             if (referrerId && referrerId > 0) {
  933:  85:                 // Chỉ update nếu referrerId CÓ TỒN TẠI trong danh sách import
  934:  86:                 if (allIds.has(referrerId)) {
  935:  87:                     await prisma.user.update({
  936:  88:                         where: { id: parseInt(row.id) },
  937:  89:                         data: { referrerId: referrerId }
  938:  90:                     })
  939:  91:                     linkCount++
  940:  92:                 } else {
  941:  93:                     // console.warn(`\n⚠️  Warning: User ${row.id} has referrerId ${referrerId} but that ID does not exist. Skipped link.`)
  942:  94:                 }
  943:  95:             }
  944:  96:         }
  945:  97:         console.log(`\n✅ Phase 2 Finished: Linked ${linkCount} referrals.`)
  946:  98:         // 4. RESET SEQUENCE
  947:  99:         console.log('🔄 Resetting Database Sequence...')
  948: 100:         await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"User"', 'id'), coalesce(max(id)+1, 1), false) FROM "User";`)
  949: 101:         console.log('✅ Sequence reset successful.')
  950: 102:     } catch (error) {
  951: 103:         console.error('\n❌ Import Failed:', error)
  952: 104:     } finally {
  953: 105:         await prisma.$disconnect()
  954: 106:     }
  955: 107: }
  956: 108: main()
  957: ````
  958: 
  959: ## File: scripts/import-reserved-list.ts
  960: ````typescript
  961:  1: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
  962:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
  963:  3: const reservedList = [
  964:  4:     8286,
  965:  5:     8386,
  966:  6:     8668,
  967:  7:     8686,
  968:  8:     3773,
  969:  9:     2689,
  970: 10:     9139,
  971: 11:     1102,
  972: 12:     1568,
  973: 13:     9319
  974: 14: ]
  975: 15: async function main() {
  976: 16:     console.log(`Start importing ${reservedList.length} reserved IDs...`)
  977: 17:     let count = 0
  978: 18:     for (const id of reservedList) {
  979: 19:         try {
  980: 20:             const existing = await prisma.reservedId.findUnique({ where: { id } })
  981: 21:             if (existing) {
  982: 22:                 console.log(`- ID ${id}: Already reserved`)
  983: 23:             } else {
  984: 24:                 await prisma.reservedId.create({
  985: 25:                     data: {
  986: 26:                         id,
  987: 27:                         note: 'VIP List (Batch Import)'
  988: 28:                     }
  989: 29:                 })
  990: 30:                 console.log(`+ ID ${id}: Success`)
  991: 31:                 count++
  992: 32:             }
  993: 33:         } catch (error) {
  994: 34:             console.error(`x ID ${id}: Failed`, error)
  995: 35:         }
  996: 36:     }
  997: 37:     console.log(`\nImport completed! Added ${count} new reserved IDs.`)
  998: 38: }
  999: 39: main()
 1000: 40:     .catch(e => console.error(e))
 1001: 41:     .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect())
 1002: ````
 1003: 
 1004: ## File: scripts/import-students.ts
 1005: ````typescript
 1006:  1: import { PrismaClient, Role } from '@prisma/client'
 1007:  2: import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
 1008:  3: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 1009:  4: // Giả lập danh sách học viên cũ (Bạn có thể đọc từ file Excel/CSV ở đây)
 1010:  5: const oldStudents = [
 1011:  6:     { name: 'Nguyễn Văn A', email: 'a@gmail.com', phone: '0901234567' },
 1012:  7:     { name: 'Trần Thị B', email: 'b@gmail.com', phone: '0901234568' },
 1013:  8:     // ... thêm 100 học viên khác
 1014:  9: ]
 1015: 10: async function main() {
 1016: 11:     console.log('Start importing...')
 1017: 12:     // Mật khẩu mặc định cho học viên cũ (ví dụ: 123456)
 1018: 13:     const defaultPassword = await bcrypt.hash('123456', 10)
 1019: 14:     for (const student of oldStudents) {
 1020: 15:         const user = await prisma.user.create({
 1021: 16:             data: {
 1022: 17:                 name: student.name,
 1023: 18:                 email: student.email,
 1024: 19:                 phone: student.phone,
 1025: 20:                 password: defaultPassword,
 1026: 21:                 role: Role.STUDENT,
 1027: 22:                 // ID sẽ tự động tăng (3 -> 4 -> 5...) do Database Sequence quản lý
 1028: 23:                 // Không sợ xung đột với dữ liệu hiện tại
 1029: 24:             },
 1030: 25:         })
 1031: 26:         console.log(`Created user with id: ${user.id}`)
 1032: 27:     }
 1033: 28:     console.log('Import finished.')
 1034: 29: }
 1035: 30: main()
 1036: 31:     .catch((e) => console.error(e))
 1037: 32:     .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect())
 1038: ````
 1039: 
 1040: ## File: scripts/import-v3-data.ts
 1041: ````typescript
 1042:   1: import fs from 'fs'
 1043:   2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
 1044:   3: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
 1045:   4: import bcrypt from 'bcryptjs'
 1046:   5: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 1047:   6: async function readCsv(filePath: string): Promise<any[]> {
 1048:   7:     const results: any[] = []
 1049:   8:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 1050:   9:         fs.createReadStream(filePath)
 1051:  10:             .pipe(csv())
 1052:  11:             .on('data', (data) => results.push(data))
 1053:  12:             .on('end', () => resolve(results))
 1054:  13:             .on('error', reject)
 1055:  14:     })
 1056:  15: }
 1057:  16: async function main() {
 1058:  17:     console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu quy trình nạp dữ liệu chuẩn hóa (V3 - Nâng cấp)...')
 1059:  18:     try {
 1060:  19:         const users = await readCsv('User.csv')
 1061:  20:         const courses = await readCsv('Course.csv')
 1062:  21:         const enrollments = await readCsv('Enrollment.csv')
 1063:  22:         // 1. DỌN DẸP DATABASE
 1064:  23:         console.log('🗑️  Đang làm sạch Database...')
 1065:  24:         await (prisma as any).enrollment.deleteMany()
 1066:  25:         await (prisma as any).account.deleteMany()
 1067:  26:         await (prisma as any).session.deleteMany()
 1068:  27:         await (prisma as any).course.deleteMany()
 1069:  28:         await (prisma as any).user.deleteMany()
 1070:  29:         console.log('✅ Đã làm sạch dữ liệu cũ.')
 1071:  30:         // 2. NẠP KHÓA HỌC
 1072:  31:         console.log('📚 Đang nạp danh sách Khóa học...')
 1073:  32:         for (const row of courses) {
 1074:  33:             await (prisma as any).course.create({
 1075:  34:                 data: {
 1076:  35:                     id: parseInt(row.id),
 1077:  36:                     id_khoa: row.id_khoa,
 1078:  37:                     name_lop: row.name_lop,
 1079:  38:                     name_khoa: row.name_khoa,
 1080:  39:                     date_join: row.date_join,
 1081:  40:                     status: row.status.toUpperCase() === 'TRUE',
 1082:  41:                     mo_ta_ngan: row.mo_ta_ngan,
 1083:  42:                     mo_ta_dai: row.mo_ta_dai,
 1084:  43:                     link_anh_bia: row.link_anh_bia_khoa,
 1085:  44:                     link_zalo: row.link_zalo,
 1086:  45:                     phi_coc: parseInt(row.phi_coc) || 0,
 1087:  46:                     stk: row.stk,
 1088:  47:                     name_stk: row.name_stk,
 1089:  48:                     bank_stk: row.bank_stk,
 1090:  49:                     noidung_stk: row.noidung_stk,
 1091:  50:                     link_qrcode: row.link_qrcode,
 1092:  51:                     file_email: row.file_email,
 1093:  52:                     noidung_email: row.noidung_email,
 1094:  53:                 }
 1095:  54:             })
 1096:  55:         }
 1097:  56:         console.log(`✅ Đã nạp ${courses.length} khóa học.`)
 1098:  57:         // 3. NẠP NGƯỜI DÙNG (Phase 1: Không có Referrer)
 1099:  58:         console.log('👤 Đang nạp danh sách Học viên (Kèm mã hóa mật khẩu)...')
 1100:  59:         const userCount = users.length;
 1101:  60:         for (let i = 0; i < users.length; i++) {
 1102:  61:             const u = users[i];
 1103:  62:             try {
 1104:  63:                 // Mã hóa mật khẩu nếu có
 1105:  64:                 let passwordHash = null;
 1106:  65:                 if (u.password && u.password.trim() !== '') {
 1107:  66:                     passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(u.password.trim(), 10);
 1108:  67:                 }
 1109:  68:                 // Chuẩn hóa dữ liệu trước khi nạp
 1110:  69:                 const data: any = {
 1111:  70:                     id: parseInt(u.id),
 1112:  71:                     name: u.name || null,
 1113:  72:                     email: u.email.trim(),
 1114:  73:                     phone: u.phone && u.phone.trim() !== '' ? u.phone.trim() : null,
 1115:  74:                     role: u.role || 'STUDENT',
 1116:  75:                     password: passwordHash,
 1117:  76:                 };
 1118:  77:                 // Xử lý ngày tháng
 1119:  78:                 if (u.createdAt) {
 1120:  79:                     const parts = u.createdAt.split(' ');
 1121:  80:                     const dateParts = parts[0].split('/');
 1122:  81:                     if (dateParts.length === 3) {
 1123:  82:                         const d = parseInt(dateParts[0]);
 1124:  83:                         const m = parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1;
 1125:  84:                         const y = parseInt(dateParts[2]);
 1126:  85:                         if (parts[1]) {
 1127:  86:                             const t = parts[1].split(':');
 1128:  87:                             data.createdAt = new Date(y, m, d,
 1129:  88:                                 parseInt(t[0] || '0'),
 1130:  89:                                 parseInt(t[1] || '0'),
 1131:  90:                                 parseInt(t[2] || '0'));
 1132:  91:                         } else {
 1133:  92:                             data.createdAt = new Date(y, m, d);
 1134:  93:                         }
 1135:  94:                     } else {
 1136:  95:                         data.createdAt = new Date(u.createdAt);
 1137:  96:                     }
 1138:  97:                 }
 1139:  98:                 await (prisma as any).user.create({ data });
 1140:  99:                 if ((i + 1) % 100 === 0) console.log(`... Đã nạp ${i + 1}/${userCount} học viên.`);
 1141: 100:             } catch (err: any) {
 1142: 101:                 console.error(`❌ Lỗi tại User ID ${u.id} (${u.email}):`, err);
 1143: 102:                 throw err;
 1144: 103:             }
 1145: 104:         }
 1146: 105:         // 4. CẬP NHẬT REFERRER (Phase 2)
 1147: 106:         console.log('🔗 Đang nối quan hệ Người giới thiệu...')
 1148: 107:         for (const u of users) {
 1149: 108:             // Sửa logic: Cho phép id 0 làm người giới thiệu
 1150: 109:             if (u.referrerId && u.referrerId.trim() !== '') {
 1151: 110:                 await (prisma as any).user.update({
 1152: 111:                     where: { id: parseInt(u.id) },
 1153: 112:                     data: { referrerId: parseInt(u.referrerId) }
 1154: 113:                 }).catch(() => { });
 1155: 114:             }
 1156: 115:         }
 1157: 116:         // 5. NẠP ĐĂNG KÍ KHÓA HỌC
 1158: 117:         console.log('📋 Đang nạp danh sách Đăng ký (Enrollments)...')
 1159: 118:         const enrCount = enrollments.length;
 1160: 119:         for (let i = 0; i < enrollments.length; i++) {
 1161: 120:             const e = enrollments[i];
 1162: 121:             try {
 1163: 122:                 const data: any = {
 1164: 123:                     userId: parseInt(e.userId),
 1165: 124:                     courseId: parseInt(e.courseId),
 1166: 125:                     status: e.status || 'ACTIVE',
 1167: 126:                     phi_coc: parseInt(e.phi_coc) || 0,
 1168: 127:                     link_anh_coc: e.link_anh_coc || null,
 1169: 128:                 };
 1170: 129:                 // Xử lý ngày bắt đầu (startedAt) nếu có
 1171: 130:                 if (e.startedAt && e.startedAt.trim() !== '') {
 1172: 131:                     data.startedAt = new Date(e.startedAt);
 1173: 132:                 }
 1174: 133:                 if (e.createdAt) {
 1175: 134:                     const parts = e.createdAt.split(' ');
 1176: 135:                     const dateParts = parts[0].split('/');
 1177: 136:                     if (dateParts.length === 3) {
 1178: 137:                         const d = parseInt(dateParts[0]);
 1179: 138:                         const m = parseInt(dateParts[1]) - 1;
 1180: 139:                         const y = parseInt(dateParts[2]);
 1181: 140:                         if (parts[1]) {
 1182: 141:                             const t = parts[1].split(':');
 1183: 142:                             data.createdAt = new Date(y, m, d, parseInt(t[0] || '0'), parseInt(t[1] || '0'), parseInt(t[2] || '0'));
 1184: 143:                         } else {
 1185: 144:                             data.createdAt = new Date(y, m, d);
 1186: 145:                         }
 1187: 146:                     } else {
 1188: 147:                         data.createdAt = new Date(e.createdAt);
 1189: 148:                     }
 1190: 149:                 }
 1191: 150:                 await (prisma as any).enrollment.create({ data });
 1192: 151:                 if ((i + 1) % 100 === 0) console.log(`... Đã nạp ${i + 1}/${enrCount} lượt đăng ký.`);
 1193: 152:             } catch (err: any) {
 1194: 153:                 console.error(`❌ Lỗi tại Enrollment dòng ${i + 2} (User: ${e.userId}, Course: ${e.courseId}):`, err.message);
 1195: 154:                 // Nếu là lỗi trùng lặp (P2002), ta có thể bỏ qua
 1196: 155:                 if (!err.message.includes('P2002')) throw err;
 1197: 156:             }
 1198: 157:         }
 1199: 158:         console.log(`✅ Đã hoàn tất nạp lượt đăng ký.`)
 1200: 159:         // 6. RESET SEQUENCES (PostgreSQL)
 1201: 160:         console.log('🔄 Đang đồng bộ lại bộ đếm ID (Sequence)...')
 1202: 161:         await (prisma as any).$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"User"', 'id'), (SELECT MAX(id) FROM "User"));`)
 1203: 162:         await (prisma as any).$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"Course"', 'id'), (SELECT MAX(id) FROM "Course"));`)
 1204: 163:         await (prisma as any).$executeRawUnsafe(`SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('"Enrollment"', 'id'), (SELECT MAX(id) FROM "Enrollment"));`)
 1205: 164:         console.log('🎯 HOÀN TẤT NẠP DỮ LIỆU CHUẨN HÓA V3!')
 1206: 165:     } catch (error) {
 1207: 166:         console.error('❌ LỖI TRONG QUÁ TRÌNH NẠP:', error)
 1208: 167:     } finally {
 1209: 168:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 1210: 169:     }
 1211: 170: }
 1212: 171: main()
 1213: ````

 1215: ## File: scripts/inspect_csv.py
 1216: ````python
 1217:  1: import csv
 1218:  2: def inspect_khoa_hoc():
 1219:  3:     print("=== INSPECTING KHOAHOC.CSV ===")
 1220:  4:     courses = []
 1221:  5:     with open('KhoaHoc.csv', mode='r', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
 1222:  6:         reader = csv.DictReader(f)
 1223:  7:         for row in reader:
 1224:  8:             courses.append(row)
 1225:  9:     print(f"Total courses parsed: {len(courses)}")
 1226: 10:     for i, c in enumerate(courses):
 1227: 11:         print(f"{i+1}. id_khoa: [{c.get('id_khoa')}] | id_lop: [{c.get('id_lop')}] | name: {c.get('name_lop')}")
 1228: 12:         if 'AI' in (c.get('name_lop') or ''):
 1229: 13:             print(f"   >>> FOUND AI COURSE: {c.get('name_lop')}")
 1230: 14:     return courses
 1231: 15: def inspect_ls_dang_ky(courses):
 1232: 16:     print("\n=== INSPECTING LS_DANGKY.CSV ===")
 1233: 17:     course_ids_in_db = {c.get('id_khoa') for c in courses if c.get('id_khoa')}
 1234: 18:     course_lops_in_db = {c.get('id_lop') for c in courses if c.get('id_lop')}
 1235: 19:     reg_counts = {}
 1236: 20:     total_reg = 0
 1237: 21:     with open('LS_DangKy.csv', mode='r', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
 1238: 22:         reader = csv.DictReader(f)
 1239: 23:         for row in reader:
 1240: 24:             total_reg += 1
 1241: 25:             kid = row.get('id_khoa')
 1242: 26:             lid = row.get('id_lop')
 1243: 27:             key = kid if kid else lid
 1244: 28:             reg_counts[key] = reg_counts.get(key, 0) + 1
 1245: 29:     print(f"Total registrations in CSV: {total_reg}")
 1246: 30:     print("Registration breakdown by id_khoa (or id_lop if empty):")
 1247: 31:     for key, count in sorted(reg_counts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True):
 1248: 32:         status = "MATCHED (id_khoa)" if key in course_ids_in_db else ("MATCHED (id_lop)" if key in course_lops_in_db else "MISSING")
 1249: 33:         print(f"- {key}: {count} regs | {status}")
 1250: 34: if __name__ == "__main__":
 1251: 35:     courses = inspect_khoa_hoc()
 1252: 36:     inspect_ls_dang_ky(courses)
 1253: ````
 1254: 
 1255: ## File: scripts/inspect-csv.js
 1256: ````javascript
 1257:  1: const fs = require('fs');
 1258:  2: const csv = require('csv-parser');
 1259:  3: async function inspect() {
 1260:  4:     console.log("=== COMPREHENSIVE DATA INSPECTION ===");
 1261:  5:     // 1. Parse KhoaHoc.csv
 1262:  6:     const courses = [];
 1263:  7:     await new Promise((resolve) => {
 1264:  8:         fs.createReadStream('KhoaHoc.csv')
 1265:  9:             .pipe(csv({
 1266: 10:                 mapHeaders: ({ header }) => header.trim(),
 1267: 11:                 mapValues: ({ value }) => value.trim()
 1268: 12:             }))
 1269: 13:             .on('data', (data) => courses.push(data))
 1270: 14:             .on('end', resolve);
 1271: 15:     });
 1272: 16:     console.log(`\n--- KHOA HOC SUMMARY (${courses.length} entries) ---`);
 1273: 17:     courses.forEach((c, i) => {
 1274: 18:         console.log(`${i + 1}. id_khoa: [${c.id_khoa}] | id_lop: [${c.id_lop}] | name: ${c.name_lop}`);
 1275: 19:     });
 1276: 20:     // 2. Parse LS_DangKy.csv
 1277: 21:     const registrations = [];
 1278: 22:     await new Promise((resolve) => {
 1279: 23:         fs.createReadStream('LS_DangKy.csv')
 1280: 24:             .pipe(csv({
 1281: 25:                 mapHeaders: ({ header }) => header.trim(),
 1282: 26:                 mapValues: ({ value }) => value.trim()
 1283: 27:             }))
 1284: 28:             .on('data', (data) => registrations.push(data))
 1285: 29:             .on('end', resolve);
 1286: 30:     });
 1287: 31:     console.log(`\n--- LS DANG KY SUMMARY (${registrations.length} entries) ---`);
 1288: 32:     const regCounts = {};
 1289: 33:     registrations.forEach(r => {
 1290: 34:         // Kiểm tra mối liên hệ: LS_DangKy.id_khoa -> KhoaHoc.id_khoa
 1291: 35:         const key = r.id_khoa || r.id_lop || 'UNKNOWN';
 1292: 36:         if (!regCounts[key]) regCounts[key] = { count: 0, sample_lop: r.id_lop };
 1293: 37:         regCounts[key].count++;
 1294: 38:     });
 1295: 39:     const courseIds = new Set(courses.map(c => c.id_khoa));
 1296: 40:     const courseLops = new Set(courses.map(c => c.id_lop));
 1297: 41:     console.log("\nBreakdown of registrations and matching status:");
 1298: 42:     Object.entries(regCounts)
 1299: 43:         .sort((a, b) => b[1].count - a[1].count)
 1300: 44:         .forEach(([key, info]) => {
 1301: 45:             let match = "MISSING";
 1302: 46:             if (courseIds.has(key)) match = "MATCHED (id_khoa)";
 1303: 47:             else if (courseLops.has(key)) match = "MATCHED (id_lop)";
 1304: 48:             else {
 1305: 49:                 // Thử tìm xem có khóa học nào có id_khoa bắt đầu bằng key không (ví dụ AF386 vs AF)
 1306: 50:                 const fuzzy = courses.find(c => c.id_khoa.startsWith(key) || key.startsWith(c.id_khoa));
 1307: 51:                 if (fuzzy) match = `FUZZY MATCH with ${fuzzy.id_khoa}`;
 1308: 52:             }
 1309: 53:             console.log(`- ${key} (Lop: ${info.sample_lop}): ${info.count} regs | ${match}`);
 1310: 54:         });
 1311: 55: }
 1312: 56: inspect();
 1313: ````

 1315: ## File: scripts/make-admin.ts
 1316: ````typescript
 1317:  1: import { PrismaClient, Role } from '@prisma/client'
 1318:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 1319:  3: async function main() {
 1320:  4:     const args = process.argv.slice(2)
 1321:  5:     const email = args[0] || 'cuongchupanh001@gmail.com' // Email mặc định hoặc lấy từ tham số dòng lệnh
 1322:  6:     console.log(`Checking email: ${email}...`)
 1323:  7:     try {
 1324:  8:         const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } })
 1325:  9:         if (!user) {
 1326: 10:             console.error(`❌ User with email '${email}' not found.`)
 1327: 11:             return
 1328: 12:         }
 1329: 13:         const updatedUser = await prisma.user.update({
 1330: 14:             where: { email },
 1331: 15:             data: { role: Role.ADMIN },
 1332: 16:         })
 1333: 17:         console.log(`✅ Success! Updated user ${updatedUser.email} (ID: ${updatedUser.id}) to ADMIN role.`)
 1334: 18:     } catch (e) {
 1335: 19:         console.error('Error updating user:', e)
 1336: 20:     } finally {
 1337: 21:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 1338: 22:     }
 1339: 23: }
 1340: 24: main()
 1341: ````
