 1343: ## File: scripts/process-legacy-users.ts
 1344: ````typescript
 1345:   1: import fs from 'fs'
 1346:   2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
 1347:   3: import { createObjectCsvWriter } from 'csv-writer'
 1348:   4: import path from 'path'
 1349:   5: // Format ngày tháng từ DD/MM/YYYY H:mm:ss sang ISO
 1350:   6: function parseDate(dateStr: string): string {
 1351:   7:     if (!dateStr) return new Date().toISOString()
 1352:   8:     try {
 1353:   9:         // Giả sử định dạng DD/MM/YYYY H:mm:ss (ví dụ: 06/08/2023 6:08:37)
 1354:  10:         // Hoặc DD/MM/YYYY (ví dụ: 27/01/2025)
 1355:  11:         const [datePart, timePart] = dateStr.trim().split(' ')
 1356:  12:         const [day, month, year] = datePart.split('/').map(Number)
 1357:  13:         // Validate date
 1358:  14:         if (!day || !month || !year) return new Date().toISOString()
 1359:  15:         let hour = 0, minute = 0, second = 0
 1360:  16:         if (timePart) {
 1361:  17:             [hour, minute, second] = timePart.split(':').map(Number)
 1362:  18:         }
 1363:  19:         // Lưu ý: Month trong JS bắt đầu từ 0
 1364:  20:         return new Date(year, month - 1, day, hour || 0, minute || 0, second || 0).toISOString()
 1365:  21:     } catch (e) {
 1366:  22:         console.warn(`Invalid date: ${dateStr}. Using current time.`)
 1367:  23:         return new Date().toISOString()
 1368:  24:     }
 1369:  25: }
 1370:  26: async function main() {
 1371:  27:     const inputFilePath = 'User old - User.csv'
 1372:  28:     const outputFilePath = 'processed-users.preview.csv'
 1373:  29:     if (!fs.existsSync(inputFilePath)) {
 1374:  30:         console.error(`File not found: ${inputFilePath}`)
 1375:  31:         process.exit(1)
 1376:  32:     }
 1377:  33:     const rawRows: any[] = []
 1378:  34:     // Map: NameNormalized -> UserID[]
 1379:  35:     // Dùng để tra cứu referrer nếu referrerId là tên
 1380:  36:     const nameMap = new Map<string, string[]>()
 1381:  37:     console.log('📖 Reading CSV data...')
 1382:  38:     await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 1383:  39:         fs.createReadStream(inputFilePath)
 1384:  40:             .pipe(csv())
 1385:  41:             .on('data', (data) => {
 1386:  42:                 rawRows.push(data)
 1387:  43:                 // Build Name Map
 1388:  44:                 const name = data.name ? data.name.trim() : ''
 1389:  45:                 if (name) {
 1390:  46:                     const normalized = name.toLowerCase()
 1391:  47:                     if (!nameMap.has(normalized)) {
 1392:  48:                         nameMap.set(normalized, [])
 1393:  49:                     }
 1394:  50:                     nameMap.get(normalized)?.push(data.id)
 1395:  51:                 }
 1396:  52:             })
 1397:  53:             .on('end', resolve)
 1398:  54:             .on('error', reject)
 1399:  55:     })
 1400:  56:     console.log(`📊 Loaded ${rawRows.length} rows. Processing...`)
 1401:  57:     const processedData: any[] = []
 1402:  58:     let resolvedCount = 0
 1403:  59:     let ambiguousCount = 0
 1404:  60:     let notFoundCount = 0
 1405:  61:     for (const row of rawRows) {
 1406:  62:         const id = row.id
 1407:  63:         // 1. Xử lý Email
 1408:  64:         let email = row.email ? row.email.trim() : ''
 1409:  65:         if (!email) {
 1410:  66:             email = `noemail${id}@gmail.com`
 1411:  67:         }
 1412:  68:         // 2. Xử lý Phone
 1413:  69:         let phone = row.phone ? row.phone.trim() : ''
 1414:  70:         if (!phone) {
 1415:  71:             const idSuffix = id.toString().padStart(3, '0')
 1416:  72:             phone = `000000${idSuffix}` // Fake phone logic
 1417:  73:         }
 1418:  74:         // 3. Xử lý Password
 1419:  75:         let password = row.password ? row.password.trim() : ''
 1420:  76:         if (!password) {
 1421:  77:             password = 'Brk@3773'
 1422:  78:         }
 1423:  79:         // 4. Xử lý Role
 1424:  80:         let role = row.role ? row.role.trim() : ''
 1425:  81:         if (!role) {
 1426:  82:             role = 'STUDENT'
 1427:  83:         }
 1428:  84:         // 5. Xử lý Referrer
 1429:  85:         let referrerId = row.referrerId ? row.referrerId.trim() : null
 1430:  86:         // Nếu referrerId là tên (không phải số)
 1431:  87:         if (referrerId && isNaN(parseInt(referrerId))) {
 1432:  88:             const referrerNameNormalized = referrerId.toLowerCase()
 1433:  89:             const foundIds = nameMap.get(referrerNameNormalized)
 1434:  90:             if (foundIds && foundIds.length === 1) {
 1435:  91:                 // Tìm thấy chính xác 1 người -> RESOLVED
 1436:  92:                 referrerId = foundIds[0]
 1437:  93:                 resolvedCount++
 1438:  94:                 // console.log(`   ✅ Resolved referrer "${row.referrerId}" -> ID: ${referrerId}`)
 1439:  95:             } else if (foundIds && foundIds.length > 1) {
 1440:  96:                 // Tìm thấy nhiều người trùng tên -> AMBIGUOUS
 1441:  97:                 // console.warn(`   ⚠️  Ambiguous referrer "${row.referrerId}" for User ${id}. Matches IDs: ${foundIds.join(', ')}. Leaving NULL.`)
 1442:  98:                 ambiguousCount++
 1443:  99:                 referrerId = null
 1444: 100:             } else {
 1445: 101:                 // Không tìm thấy -> NOT FOUND
 1446: 102:                 // console.warn(`   ❌ Referrer "${row.referrerId}" not found for User ${id}. Leaving NULL.`)
 1447: 103:                 notFoundCount++
 1448: 104:                 referrerId = null
 1449: 105:             }
 1450: 106:         } else if (referrerId && !isNaN(parseInt(referrerId))) {
 1451: 107:             // Là số -> Giữ nguyên (Check tồn tại sẽ ở bước import)
 1452: 108:         } else {
 1453: 109:             referrerId = null
 1454: 110:         }
 1455: 111:         // 6. Xử lý CreatedAt
 1456: 112:         const createdAt = parseDate(row.createdAt)
 1457: 113:         processedData.push({
 1458: 114:             id: id,
 1459: 115:             name: row.name,
 1460: 116:             email: email,
 1461: 117:             phone: phone,
 1462: 118:             password: password,
 1463: 119:             role: role,
 1464: 120:             referrerId: referrerId,
 1465: 121:             createdAt: createdAt
 1466: 122:         })
 1467: 123:     }
 1468: 124:     console.log(`\n--- Summary ---`)
 1469: 125:     console.log(`Toal Users: ${processedData.length}`)
 1470: 126:     console.log(`Referrers Resolved (Name->ID): ${resolvedCount}`)
 1471: 127:     console.log(`Referrers Ambiguous (Skipped):   ${ambiguousCount}`)
 1472: 128:     console.log(`Referrers Not Found (Skipped):   ${notFoundCount}`)
 1473: 129:     // Ghi ra file CSV mới
 1474: 130:     const csvWriter = createObjectCsvWriter({
 1475: 131:         path: outputFilePath,
 1476: 132:         header: [
 1477: 133:             { id: 'id', title: 'id' },
 1478: 134:             { id: 'name', title: 'name' },
 1479: 135:             { id: 'email', title: 'email' },
 1480: 136:             { id: 'phone', title: 'phone' },
 1481: 137:             { id: 'password', title: 'password' },
 1482: 138:             { id: 'role', title: 'role' },
 1483: 139:             { id: 'referrerId', title: 'referrerId' },
 1484: 140:             { id: 'createdAt', title: 'createdAt' },
 1485: 141:         ]
 1486: 142:     })
 1487: 143:     await csvWriter.writeRecords(processedData)
 1488: 144:     console.log(`\n✅ Saved to: ${outputFilePath}`)
 1489: 145: }
 1490: 146: main()
 1491: ````
 1492: 
 1493: ## File: scripts/seed-courses.ts
 1494: ````typescript
 1495:   1: import fs from 'fs'
 1496:   2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
 1497:   3: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
 1498:   4: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 1499:   5: interface CourseRow {
 1500:   6:     id_lop: string
 1501:   7:     name_lop: string
 1502:   8:     id_khoa: string
 1503:   9:     name_khoa: string
 1504:  10:     date_join: string
 1505:  11:     status: string
 1506:  12:     mo_ta_dai: string
 1507:  13:     link_zalo: string
 1508:  14:     phi_coc: string
 1509:  15:     stk: string
 1510:  16:     name_stk: string
 1511:  17:     bank_stk: string
 1512:  18:     noidung_stk: string
 1513:  19:     link_qrcode: string
 1514:  20:     file_email: string
 1515:  21:     noidung_email: string
 1516:  22:     link_anh_bia_khoa: string
 1517:  23:     mo_ta_ngan: string
 1518:  24: }
 1519:  25: async function main() {
 1520:  26:     const results: CourseRow[] = []
 1521:  27:     const csvFilePath = 'KhoaHoc.csv'
 1522:  28:     if (!fs.existsSync(csvFilePath)) {
 1523:  29:         console.error(`Error: File '${csvFilePath}' not found.`)
 1524:  30:         process.exit(1)
 1525:  31:     }
 1526:  32:     console.log('Reading KhoaHoc.csv...')
 1527:  33:     await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 1528:  34:         fs.createReadStream(csvFilePath)
 1529:  35:             .pipe(csv())
 1530:  36:             .on('data', (data: CourseRow) => results.push(data))
 1531:  37:             .on('end', resolve)
 1532:  38:             .on('error', reject)
 1533:  39:     })
 1534:  40:     console.log(`Loaded ${results.length} course entries.`)
 1535:  41:     let successCount = 0
 1536:  42:     for (const row of results) {
 1537:  43:         if (!row.id_khoa) continue;
 1538:  44:         // Xử lý trùng id_khoa bằng cách tạo unique ID kết hợp tên lớp nếu cần
 1539:  45:         // Đặc biệt cho trường hợp AI
 1540:  46:         const uniqueKey = row.id_khoa === 'AI' ? `${row.id_khoa}_${row.name_lop.substring(0, 10)}` : row.id_khoa;
 1541:  47:         try {
 1542:  48:             await (prisma as any).course.upsert({
 1543:  49:                 where: { id_khoa: uniqueKey },
 1544:  50:                 update: {
 1545:  51:                     name_lop: row.name_lop,
 1546:  52:                     name_khoa: row.name_khoa,
 1547:  53:                     date_join: row.date_join,
 1548:  54:                     status: row.status.toUpperCase() === 'TRUE',
 1549:  55:                     mo_ta_ngan: row.mo_ta_ngan,
 1550:  56:                     mo_ta_dai: row.mo_ta_dai,
 1551:  57:                     link_anh_bia: row.link_anh_bia_khoa,
 1552:  58:                     link_zalo: row.link_zalo,
 1553:  59:                     phi_coc: parseInt(row.phi_coc) || 0,
 1554:  60:                     stk: row.stk,
 1555:  61:                     name_stk: row.name_stk,
 1556:  62:                     bank_stk: row.bank_stk,
 1557:  63:                     noidung_stk: row.noidung_stk,
 1558:  64:                     link_qrcode: row.link_qrcode,
 1559:  65:                     file_email: row.file_email,
 1560:  66:                     noidung_email: row.noidung_email,
 1561:  67:                 },
 1562:  68:                 create: {
 1563:  69:                     id_khoa: uniqueKey,
 1564:  70:                     name_lop: row.name_lop,
 1565:  71:                     name_khoa: row.name_khoa,
 1566:  72:                     date_join: row.date_join,
 1567:  73:                     status: row.status.toUpperCase() === 'TRUE',
 1568:  74:                     mo_ta_ngan: row.mo_ta_ngan,
 1569:  75:                     mo_ta_dai: row.mo_ta_dai,
 1570:  76:                     link_anh_bia: row.link_anh_bia_khoa,
 1571:  77:                     link_zalo: row.link_zalo,
 1572:  78:                     phi_coc: parseInt(row.phi_coc) || 0,
 1573:  79:                     stk: row.stk,
 1574:  80:                     name_stk: row.name_stk,
 1575:  81:                     bank_stk: row.bank_stk,
 1576:  82:                     noidung_stk: row.noidung_stk,
 1577:  83:                     link_qrcode: row.link_qrcode,
 1578:  84:                     file_email: row.file_email,
 1579:  85:                     noidung_email: row.noidung_email,
 1580:  86:                 }
 1581:  87:             })
 1582:  88:             successCount++
 1583:  89:         } catch (error) {
 1584:  90:             console.error(`❌ Failed to seed course ${row.id_khoa}:`, error)
 1585:  91:         }
 1586:  92:     }
 1587:  93:     console.log(`✅ Seeded ${successCount} courses successfully.`)
 1588:  94: }
 1589:  95: main()
 1590:  96:     .catch(e => {
 1591:  97:         console.error(e)
 1592:  98:         process.exit(1)
 1593:  99:     })
 1594: 100:     .finally(async () => {
 1595: 101:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 1596: 102:     })
 1597: ````

 1599: ## File: scripts/seed-enrollments.ts
 1600: ````typescript
 1601:   1: import fs from 'fs'
 1602:   2: import csv from 'csv-parser'
 1603:   3: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
 1604:   4: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 1605:   5: interface RegRow {
 1606:   6:     time_stamp: string
 1607:   7:     id_hocvien: string
 1608:   8:     name_hocvien: string
 1609:   9:     id_lop: string
 1610:  10:     id_khoa: string
 1611:  11:     phi_coc: string
 1612:  12:     trang_thai: string
 1613:  13: }
 1614:  14: async function main() {
 1615:  15:     const results: RegRow[] = []
 1616:  16:     const csvFilePath = 'LS_DangKy.csv'
 1617:  17:     if (!fs.existsSync(csvFilePath)) {
 1618:  18:         console.error(`Error: File '${csvFilePath}' not found.`)
 1619:  19:         process.exit(1)
 1620:  20:     }
 1621:  21:     console.log('Reading LS_DangKy.csv...')
 1622:  22:     await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 1623:  23:         fs.createReadStream(csvFilePath)
 1624:  24:             .pipe(csv())
 1625:  25:             .on('data', (data: RegRow) => results.push(data))
 1626:  26:             .on('end', resolve)
 1627:  27:             .on('error', reject)
 1628:  28:     })
 1629:  29:     console.log(`Loaded ${results.length} registration history entries.`)
 1630:  30:     // Lấy mapping Course để tránh query nhiều
 1631:  31:     const allCourses = await (prisma as any).course.findMany();
 1632:  32:     let successCount = 0
 1633:  33:     let skipCount = 0
 1634:  34:     let errorCount = 0
 1635:  35:     for (const row of results) {
 1636:  36:         const studentId = parseInt(row.id_hocvien)
 1637:  37:         if (isNaN(studentId)) {
 1638:  38:             skipCount++
 1639:  39:             continue
 1640:  40:         }
 1641:  41:         // SMART MAPPING FOR LEGACY CODES
 1642:  42:         let targetIdKhoa = row.id_khoa;
 1643:  43:         if (targetIdKhoa === '1kF') targetIdKhoa = 'LS03';
 1644:  44:         if (targetIdKhoa === 'AF386') targetIdKhoa = 'AF01';
 1645:  45:         if (targetIdKhoa === 'VRD') targetIdKhoa = 'AF01'; // Giả định theo id_lop=AF, sẽ kiểm tra lại với bác
 1646:  46:         // Tìm khóa học phù hợp theo id_khoa mới
 1647:  47:         let course = allCourses.find((c: any) => c.id_khoa === targetIdKhoa);
 1648:  48:         // Trường hợp AI trùng lặp, cần tìm khớp chính xác
 1649:  49:         if (targetIdKhoa === 'AI') {
 1650:  50:             // Thử tìm theo name chứa trong row (nếu có logic bổ sung)
 1651:  51:             // Ở đây lấy bản ghi đầu tiên khớp AI
 1652:  52:             course = allCourses.find((c: any) => c.id_khoa.startsWith('AI'));
 1653:  53:         }
 1654:  54:         if (!course && row.id_lop) {
 1655:  55:             // Thử tìm theo id_lop trong CSV khớp với id_khoa trong DB
 1656:  56:             course = allCourses.find((c: any) => c.id_khoa === row.id_lop);
 1657:  57:         }
 1658:  58:         if (!course) {
 1659:  59:             // console.log(`⚠️ Không tìm thấy khóa học cho: Lop=${row.id_lop}, Khoa=${row.id_khoa}`)
 1660:  60:             skipCount++
 1661:  61:             continue
 1662:  62:         }
 1663:  63:         try {
 1664:  64:             // Kiểm tra User có tồn tại không
 1665:  65:             const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: studentId } })
 1666:  66:             if (!user) {
 1667:  67:                 skipCount++
 1668:  68:                 continue
 1669:  69:             }
 1670:  70:             await (prisma as any).enrollment.upsert({
 1671:  71:                 where: {
 1672:  72:                     userId_courseId: {
 1673:  73:                         userId: studentId,
 1674:  74:                         courseId: course.id
 1675:  75:                     }
 1676:  76:                 },
 1677:  77:                 update: {
 1678:  78:                     status: 'ACTIVE' // Mặc định là đã kích hoạt theo yêu cầu
 1679:  79:                 },
 1680:  80:                 create: {
 1681:  81:                     userId: studentId,
 1682:  82:                     courseId: course.id,
 1683:  83:                     status: 'ACTIVE'
 1684:  84:                 }
 1685:  85:             })
 1686:  86:             successCount++
 1687:  87:         } catch (error) {
 1688:  88:             errorCount++
 1689:  89:             // console.error(`❌ Lỗi khi nạp Enrollment cho User ${studentId}:`, error)
 1690:  90:         }
 1691:  91:     }
 1692:  92:     console.log(`--- KẾT QUẢ ĐỒNG BỘ ---`)
 1693:  93:     console.log(`✅ Thành công: ${successCount}`)
 1694:  94:     console.log(`⏭️ Bỏ qua (không khớp/lỗi): ${skipCount}`)
 1695:  95:     console.log(`❌ Lỗi hệ thống: ${errorCount}`)
 1696:  96: }
 1697:  97: main()
 1698:  98:     .catch(e => {
 1699:  99:         console.error(e)
 1700: 100:         process.exit(1)
 1701: 101:     })
 1702: 102:     .finally(async () => {
 1703: 103:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 1704: 104:     })
 1705: ````
 1706: 
 1707: ## File: scripts/validate-v3-data.js
 1708: ````javascript
 1709:  1: const fs = require('fs');
 1710:  2: const csv = require('csv-parser');
 1711:  3: async function readCsv(filePath) {
 1712:  4:     const results = [];
 1713:  5:     return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
 1714:  6:         fs.createReadStream(filePath)
 1715:  7:             .pipe(csv())
 1716:  8:             .on('data', (data) => results.push(data))
 1717:  9:             .on('end', () => resolve(results))
 1718: 10:             .on('error', reject);
 1719: 11:     });
 1720: 12: }
 1721: 13: async function validate() {
 1722: 14:     console.log("=== BẮT ĐẦU KIỂM TRA DỮ LIỆU CHUẨN HÓA ===");
 1723: 15:     try {
 1724: 16:         const users = await readCsv('User.csv');
 1725: 17:         const courses = await readCsv('Course.csv');
 1726: 18:         const enrollments = await readCsv('Enrollment.csv');
 1727: 19:         console.log(`\n1. Kiểm tra số lượng:\n- Users: ${users.length}\n- Courses: ${courses.length}\n- Enrollments: ${enrollments.length}`);
 1728: 20:         const errors = [];
 1729: 21:         const warnings = [];
 1730: 22:         // HASH MAPS FOR LOOKUP
 1731: 23:         const userIds = new Set(users.map(u => u.id));
 1732: 24:         const userEmails = new Set();
 1733: 25:         const courseIds = new Set(courses.map(c => c.id));
 1734: 26:         const courseKhoas = new Set(courses.map(c => c.id_khoa));
 1735: 27:         const enrollmentPairs = new Set();
 1736: 28:         // VALIDATE USERS
 1737: 29:         users.forEach(u => {
 1738: 30:             if (!u.id) errors.push(`User thiếu ID: ${JSON.stringify(u)}`);
 1739: 31:             if (userEmails.has(u.email)) errors.push(`User trùng Email: ${u.email}`);
 1740: 32:             userEmails.add(u.email);
 1741: 33:         });
 1742: 34:         // VALIDATE COURSES
 1743: 35:         courses.forEach(c => {
 1744: 36:             if (!c.id) errors.push(`Course thiếu ID: ${c.id_khoa}`);
 1745: 37:             if (courseKhoas.has(c.id_khoa) && courses.filter(x => x.id_khoa === c.id_khoa).length > 1) {
 1746: 38:                 // Check for real duplicates manually if Set isn't enough
 1747: 39:             }
 1748: 40:         });
 1749: 41:         // VALIDATE ENROLLMENTS (INTEGRITY)
 1750: 42:         enrollments.forEach((e, index) => {
 1751: 43:             const rowNum = index + 2;
 1752: 44:             if (!userIds.has(e.userId)) {
 1753: 45:                 errors.push(`[Dòng ${rowNum}] Enrollment có userId (${e.userId}) không tồn tại trong User.csv`);
 1754: 46:             }
 1755: 47:             if (!courseIds.has(e.courseId)) {
 1756: 48:                 errors.push(`[Dòng ${rowNum}] Enrollment có courseId (${e.courseId}) không tồn tại trong Course.csv`);
 1757: 49:             }
 1758: 50:             const pair = `${e.userId}-${e.courseId}`;
 1759: 51:             if (enrollmentPairs.has(pair)) {
 1760: 52:                 warnings.push(`[Dòng ${rowNum}] Trùng lặp Enrollment cho User ${e.userId} và Course ${e.courseId} (Sẽ bị bỏ qua khi nạp)`);
 1761: 53:             }
 1762: 54:             enrollmentPairs.add(pair);
 1763: 55:             if (!['ACTIVE', 'PENDING'].includes(e.status)) {
 1764: 56:                 warnings.push(`[Dòng ${rowNum}] Trạng thái status '${e.status}' không chuẩn (Nên là ACTIVE hoặc PENDING)`);
 1765: 57:             }
 1766: 58:         });
 1767: 59:         console.log("\n2. Kết quả kiểm tra lỗi:");
 1768: 60:         if (errors.length === 0) {
 1769: 61:             console.log("✅ KHÔNG có lỗi nghiêm trọng (Ràng buộc dữ liệu tốt)");
 1770: 62:         } else {
 1771: 63:             console.log(`❌ Có ${errors.length} lỗi cần xử lý:`);
 1772: 64:             errors.slice(0, 10).forEach(err => console.log(` - ${err}`));
 1773: 65:             if (errors.length > 10) console.log("   ... và nhiều lỗi khác");
 1774: 66:         }
 1775: 67:         console.log("\n3. Cảnh báo (Nên lưu ý):");
 1776: 68:         if (warnings.length === 0) {
 1777: 69:             console.log("✅ Không có cảnh báo.");
 1778: 70:         } else {
 1779: 71:             console.log(`⚠️ Có ${warnings.length} cảnh báo:`);
 1780: 72:             warnings.slice(0, 5).forEach(w => console.log(` - ${w}`));
 1781: 73:         }
 1782: 74:     } catch (err) {
 1783: 75:         console.error("❌ Lỗi khi đọc file:", err.message);
 1784: 76:     }
 1785: 77: }
 1786: 78: validate();
 1787: ````

 1804: ## File: types/next-auth.d.ts
 1805: ````typescript
 1806:  1: import NextAuth, { DefaultSession } from "next-auth"
 1807:  2: import { Role } from "@prisma/client"
 1808:  3: import { AdapterUser } from "next-auth/adapters"
 1809:  4: declare module "next-auth" {
 1810:  5:     /**
 1811:  6:      * Returned by `useSession`, `getSession` and received as a prop on the `SessionProvider` React Context
 1812:  7:      */
 1813:  8:     interface Session {
 1814:  9:         user: {
 1815: 10:             id: string
 1816: 11:             role: Role
 1817: 12:         } & DefaultSession["user"]
 1818: 13:     }
 1819: 14:     interface User {
 1820: 15:         id?: string
 1821: 16:         role: Role
 1822: 17:     }
 1823: 18: }
 1824: 19: declare module "next-auth/adapters" {
 1825: 20:     interface AdapterUser {
 1826: 21:         role: Role
 1827: 22:     }
 1828: 23: }
 1829: 24: declare module "next-auth/jwt" {
 1830: 25:     interface JWT {
 1831: 26:         id: string
 1832: 27:         role: Role
 1833: 28:     }
 1834: 29: }
 1835: ````

 1837: ## File: app/actions/account-actions.ts
 1838: ````typescript
 1839:  1: 'use server'
 1840:  2: import { auth } from "@/auth"
 1841:  3: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
 1842:  4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache"
 1843:  5: export async function getUserWithAccounts() {
 1844:  6:     const session = await auth()
 1845:  7:     if (!session?.user?.id) return null
 1846:  8:     const userId = parseInt(session.user.id as string)
 1847:  9:     const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
 1848: 10:         where: { id: userId },
 1849: 11:         include: {
 1850: 12:             accounts: {
 1851: 13:                 select: {
 1852: 14:                     provider: true,
 1853: 15:                     providerAccountId: true,
 1854: 16:                 }
 1855: 17:             }
 1856: 18:         }
 1857: 19:     })
 1858: 20:     return user
 1859: 21: }
 1860: 22: export async function updateUserProfile(data: {
 1861: 23:     name?: string
 1862: 24:     phone?: string
 1863: 25:     image?: string
 1864: 26: }) {
 1865: 27:     const session = await auth()
 1866: 28:     if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false, message: "Unauthorized" }
 1867: 29:     const userId = parseInt(session.user.id as string)
 1868: 30:     try {
 1869: 31:         await prisma.user.update({
 1870: 32:             where: { id: userId },
 1871: 33:             data: {
 1872: 34:                 name: data.name,
 1873: 35:                 phone: data.phone,
 1874: 36:                 image: data.image,
 1875: 37:             }
 1876: 38:         })
 1877: 39:         revalidatePath('/account-settings')
 1878: 40:         return { success: true, message: "Cập nhật thành công" }
 1879: 41:     } catch (error) {
 1880: 42:         console.error("Update profile error:", error)
 1881: 43:         return { success: false, message: "Cập nhật thất bại" }
 1882: 44:     }
 1883: 45: }
 1884: 46: export async function changePassword(currentPassword: string, newPassword: string) {
 1885: 47:     const session = await auth()
 1886: 48:     if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false, message: "Unauthorized" }
 1887: 49:     const userId = parseInt(session.user.id as string)
 1888: 50:     const bcrypt = await import('bcryptjs')
 1889: 51:     const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
 1890: 52:         where: { id: userId }
 1891: 53:     })
 1892: 54:     if (!user?.password) {
 1893: 55:         return { success: false, message: "Tài khoản này không sử dụng mật khẩu" }
 1894: 56:     }
 1895: 57:     const passwordsMatch = await bcrypt.compare(currentPassword, user.password)
 1896: 58:     if (!passwordsMatch) {
 1897: 59:         return { success: false, message: "Mật khẩu hiện tại không đúng" }
 1898: 60:     }
 1899: 61:     const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(newPassword, 10)
 1900: 62:     await prisma.user.update({
 1901: 63:         where: { id: userId },
 1902: 64:         data: { password: hashedPassword }
 1903: 65:     })
 1904: 66:     return { success: true, message: "Đổi mật khẩu thành công" }
 1905: 67: }
 1906: ````
 1907: 
 1908: ## File: app/actions/payment-actions.ts
 1909: ````typescript
 1910:   1: 'use server'
 1911:   2: import { auth } from "@/auth"
 1912:   3: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
 1913:   4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache"
 1914:   5: export async function getPaymentByEnrollmentId(enrollmentId: number) {
 1915:   6:   try {
 1916:   7:     const payment = await prisma.payment.findUnique({
 1917:   8:       where: { enrollmentId }
 1918:   9:     })
 1919:  10:     return { success: true, payment }
 1920:  11:   } catch (error: any) {
 1921:  12:     console.error("Get Payment Error:", error)
 1922:  13:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 1923:  14:   }
 1924:  15: }
 1925:  16: export async function createPaymentForEnrollment(enrollmentId: number, courseFee: number) {
 1926:  17:   try {
 1927:  18:     const existingPayment = await prisma.payment.findUnique({
 1928:  19:       where: { enrollmentId }
 1929:  20:     })
 1930:  21:     if (existingPayment) {
 1931:  22:       return { success: true, payment: existingPayment }
 1932:  23:     }
 1933:  24:     const payment = await prisma.payment.create({
 1934:  25:       data: {
 1935:  26:         enrollmentId,
 1936:  27:         amount: courseFee,
 1937:  28:         status: 'PENDING'
 1938:  29:       }
 1939:  30:     })
 1940:  31:     return { success: true, payment }
 1941:  32:   } catch (error: any) {
 1942:  33:     console.error("Create Payment Error:", error)
 1943:  34:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 1944:  35:   }
 1945:  36: }
 1946:  37: export async function updatePaymentProof(enrollmentId: number, proofImageUrl: string) {
 1947:  38:   try {
 1948:  39:     const payment = await prisma.payment.update({
 1949:  40:       where: { enrollmentId },
 1950:  41:       data: {
 1951:  42:         proofImage: proofImageUrl,
 1952:  43:         verifyMethod: 'MANUAL_UPLOAD'
 1953:  44:       }
 1954:  45:     })
 1955:  46:     revalidatePath('/')
 1956:  47:     revalidatePath('/courses')
 1957:  48:     return { success: true, payment }
 1958:  49:   } catch (error: any) {
 1959:  50:     console.error("Update Payment Proof Error:", error)
 1960:  51:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 1961:  52:   }
 1962:  53: }
 1963:  54: export async function verifyPaymentAction(
 1964:  55:   enrollmentId: number,
 1965:  56:   method: 'AUTO_EMAIL' | 'MANUAL_UPLOAD' | 'MANUAL_ADMIN',
 1966:  57:   note?: string
 1967:  58: ) {
 1968:  59:   try {
 1969:  60:     const session = await auth()
 1970:  61:     if (!session?.user?.id) {
 1971:  62:       return { success: false, error: "Unauthorized" }
 1972:  63:     }
 1973:  64:     const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
 1974:  65:       where: { id: enrollmentId },
 1975:  66:       include: { course: true, payment: true }
 1976:  67:     })
 1977:  68:     if (!enrollment) {
 1978:  69:       return { success: false, error: "Enrollment not found" }
 1979:  70:     }
 1980:  71:     if (enrollment.status === 'ACTIVE') {
 1981:  72:       return { success: false, error: "Enrollment already active" }
 1982:  73:     }
 1983:  74:     const [payment, updatedEnrollment] = await prisma.$transaction([
 1984:  75:       prisma.payment.update({
 1985:  76:         where: { enrollmentId },
 1986:  77:         data: {
 1987:  78:           status: 'VERIFIED',
 1988:  79:           verifiedAt: new Date(),
 1989:  80:           verifyMethod: method,
 1990:  81:           note: note || null
 1991:  82:         }
 1992:  83:       }),
 1993:  84:       prisma.enrollment.update({
 1994:  85:         where: { id: enrollmentId },
 1995:  86:         data: { status: 'ACTIVE' }
 1996:  87:       })
 1997:  88:     ])
 1998:  89:     revalidatePath('/')
 1999:  90:     revalidatePath('/courses')
 2000:  91:     revalidatePath(`/courses/${enrollment.course.id_khoa}/learn`)
 2001:  92:     return { 
 2002:  93:       success: true, 
 2003:  94:       payment,
 2004:  95:       enrollment: updatedEnrollment,
 2005:  96:       message: `Đã kích hoạt khóa học "${enrollment.course.name_lop}" thành công!`
 2006:  97:     }
 2007:  98:   } catch (error: any) {
 2008:  99:     console.error("Verify Payment Error:", error)
 2009: 100:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2010: 101:   }
 2011: 102: }
 2012: 103: export async function rejectPaymentAction(enrollmentId: number, reason: string) {
 2013: 104:   try {
 2014: 105:     const session = await auth()
 2015: 106:     if (!session?.user?.id) {
 2016: 107:       return { success: false, error: "Unauthorized" }
 2017: 108:     }
 2018: 109:     const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
 2019: 110:       where: { id: enrollmentId },
 2020: 111:       include: { course: true }
 2021: 112:     })
 2022: 113:     if (!enrollment) {
 2023: 114:       return { success: false, error: "Enrollment not found" }
 2024: 115:     }
 2025: 116:     const payment = await prisma.payment.update({
 2026: 117:       where: { enrollmentId },
 2027: 118:       data: {
 2028: 119:         status: 'REJECTED',
 2029: 120:         note: reason,
 2030: 121:         verifyMethod: 'MANUAL_ADMIN'
 2031: 122:       }
 2032: 123:     })
 2033: 124:     revalidatePath('/')
 2034: 125:     revalidatePath('/courses')
 2035: 126:     return { success: true, payment }
 2036: 127:   } catch (error: any) {
 2037: 128:     console.error("Reject Payment Error:", error)
 2038: 129:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2039: 130:   }
 2040: 131: }
 2041: 132: export async function getPendingPayments() {
 2042: 133:   try {
 2043: 134:     const payments = await prisma.payment.findMany({
 2044: 135:       where: { status: 'PENDING' },
 2045: 136:       include: {
 2046: 137:         enrollment: {
 2047: 138:           include: {
 2048: 139:             user: {
 2049: 140:               select: { id: true, name: true, email: true, phone: true }
 2050: 141:             },
 2051: 142:             course: {
 2052: 143:               select: { id: true, id_khoa: true, name_lop: true, phi_coc: true }
 2053: 144:             }
 2054: 145:           }
 2055: 146:         }
 2056: 147:       },
 2057: 148:       orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }
 2058: 149:     })
 2059: 150:     return { success: true, payments }
 2060: 151:   } catch (error: any) {
 2061: 152:     console.error("Get Pending Payments Error:", error)
 2062: 153:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2063: 154:   }
 2064: 155: }
 2065: 156: export async function getAllPayments() {
 2066: 157:   try {
 2067: 158:     const payments = await prisma.payment.findMany({
 2068: 159:       include: {
 2069: 160:         enrollment: {
 2070: 161:           include: {
 2071: 162:             user: {
 2072: 163:               select: { id: true, name: true, email: true, phone: true }
 2073: 164:             },
 2074: 165:             course: {
 2075: 166:               select: { id: true, id_khoa: true, name_lop: true, phi_coc: true }
 2076: 167:             }
 2077: 168:           }
 2078: 169:         }
 2079: 170:       },
 2080: 171:       orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }
 2081: 172:     })
 2082: 173:     return { success: true, payments }
 2083: 174:   } catch (error: any) {
 2084: 175:     console.error("Get All Payments Error:", error)
 2085: 176:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2086: 177:   }
 2087: 178: }
 2088: 179: export async function autoVerifyPayment(enrollmentId: number, transferData: {
 2089: 180:   amount: number;
 2090: 181:   phone: string | null;
 2091: 182:   courseCode: string | null;
 2092: 183:   bankName: string | null;
 2093: 184:   accountNumber: string | null;
 2094: 185:   transferTime: Date | null;
 2095: 186:   content: string;
 2096: 187: }) {
 2097: 188:   try {
 2098: 189:     const payment = await prisma.payment.update({
 2099: 190:       where: { enrollmentId },
 2100: 191:       data: {
 2101: 192:         amount: transferData.amount,
 2102: 193:         phone: transferData.phone,
 2103: 194:         courseCode: transferData.courseCode,
 2104: 195:         bankName: transferData.bankName,
 2105: 196:         accountNumber: transferData.accountNumber,
 2106: 197:         transferTime: transferData.transferTime,
 2107: 198:         content: transferData.content,
 2108: 199:         status: 'VERIFIED',
 2109: 200:         verifiedAt: new Date(),
 2110: 201:         verifyMethod: 'AUTO_EMAIL'
 2111: 202:       }
 2112: 203:     })
 2113: 204:     await prisma.enrollment.update({
 2114: 205:       where: { id: enrollmentId },
 2115: 206:       data: { status: 'ACTIVE' }
 2116: 207:     })
 2117: 208:     return { success: true, payment }
 2118: 209:   } catch (error: any) {
 2119: 210:     console.error("Auto Verify Payment Error:", error)
 2120: 211:     return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2121: 212:   }
 2122: 213: }
 2123: ````

 2125: ## File: app/actions/post-actions.ts
 2126: ````typescript
 2127:  1: 'use server'
 2128:  2: import { auth } from "@/auth"
 2129:  3: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
 2130:  4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache"
 2131:  5: import { Role } from "@prisma/client"
 2132:  6: /**
 2133:  7:  * Lấy danh sách bài viết
 2134:  8:  */
 2135:  9: export async function getPostsAction() {
 2136: 10:     try {
 2137: 11:         const posts = await prisma.post.findMany({
 2138: 12:             where: { published: true },
 2139: 13:             include: {
 2140: 14:                 author: { select: { name: true, image: true } },
 2141: 15:                 _count: { select: { comments: true } }
 2142: 16:             },
 2143: 17:             orderBy: [{ pin: 'desc' }, { createdAt: 'desc' }]
 2144: 18:         })
 2145: 19:         return { success: true, posts }
 2146: 20:     } catch (error: any) {
 2147: 21:         return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2148: 22:     }
 2149: 23: }
 2150: 24: /**
 2151: 25:  * Tạo bài viết mới (Chỉ Admin)
 2152: 26:  */
 2153: 27: export async function createPostAction(data: { title: string, content: string, image?: string }) {
 2154: 28:     const session = await auth()
 2155: 29:     if (session?.user?.role !== Role.ADMIN) {
 2156: 30:         return { success: false, error: "Chỉ quản trị viên mới có quyền đăng bài." }
 2157: 31:     }
 2158: 32:     try {
 2159: 33:         const post = await prisma.post.create({
 2160: 34:             data: {
 2161: 35:                 title: data.title,
 2162: 36:                 content: data.content,
 2163: 37:                 image: data.image,
 2164: 38:                 authorId: parseInt(session.user.id!)
 2165: 39:             }
 2166: 40:         })
 2167: 41:         revalidatePath('/')
 2168: 42:         return { success: true, post }
 2169: 43:     } catch (error: any) {
 2170: 44:         return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2171: 45:     }
 2172: 46: }
 2173: 47: /**
 2174: 48:  * Lấy chi tiết bài viết kèm bình luận
 2175: 49:  */
 2176: 50: export async function getPostDetailAction(postId: string) {
 2177: 51:     try {
 2178: 52:         const post = await prisma.post.findUnique({
 2179: 53:             where: { id: postId },
 2180: 54:             include: {
 2181: 55:                 author: { select: { name: true, image: true } },
 2182: 56:                 comments: {
 2183: 57:                     include: {
 2184: 58:                         user: { select: { name: true, image: true } }
 2185: 59:                     },
 2186: 60:                     orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' }
 2187: 61:                 }
 2188: 62:             }
 2189: 63:         })
 2190: 64:         return { success: true, post }
 2191: 65:     } catch (error: any) {
 2192: 66:         return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2193: 67:     }
 2194: 68: }
 2195: 69: /**
 2196: 70:  * Bình luận vào bài viết
 2197: 71:  */
 2198: 72: export async function commentOnPostAction(postId: string, content: string) {
 2199: 73:     const session = await auth()
 2200: 74:     if (!session?.user?.id) {
 2201: 75:         return { success: false, error: "Vui lòng đăng nhập để bình luận." }
 2202: 76:     }
 2203: 77:     try {
 2204: 78:         const comment = await prisma.postComment.create({
 2205: 79:             data: {
 2206: 80:                 postId,
 2207: 81:                 userId: parseInt(session.user.id),
 2208: 82:                 content
 2209: 83:             }
 2210: 84:         })
 2211: 85:         revalidatePath('/')
 2212: 86:         return { success: true, comment }
 2213: 87:     } catch (error: any) {
 2214: 88:         return { success: false, error: error.message }
 2215: 89:     }
 2216: 90: }
 2217: ````

 2219: ## File: app/admin/courses/[id]/page.tsx
 2220: ````typescript
 2221:   1: 'use client'
 2222:   2: import { useState, useEffect, use } from 'react'
 2223:   3: import { updateCourseAction, updateLessonAction } from '@/app/actions/admin-actions'
 2224:   4: import { ArrowLeft, Save, Loader2, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, Play, Edit2, X, List, Settings } from 'lucide-react'
 2225:   5: import Link from 'next/link'
 2226:   6: // ─── Component Popup Chỉnh sửa Bài học ──────────────────────────────────────────
 2227:   7: function LessonEditModal({ lesson, onClose, onSave }: { lesson: any, onClose: () => void, onSave: (data: any) => Promise<void> }) {
 2228:   8:     const [title, setTitle] = useState(lesson.title || '')
 2229:   9:     const [videoUrl, setVideoUrl] = useState(lesson.videoUrl || '')
 2230:  10:     const [order, setOrder] = useState(lesson.order || 0)
 2231:  11:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
 2232:  12:     const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 2233:  13:         e.preventDefault()
 2234:  14:         setSaving(true)
 2235:  15:         await onSave({ id: lesson.id, title, videoUrl, order })
 2236:  16:         setSaving(false)
 2237:  17:         onClose()
 2238:  18:     }
 2239:  19:     return (
 2240:  20:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[150] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4" onClick={onClose}>
 2241:  21:             <div className="bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-[2.5rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-200" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
 2242:  22:                 <div className="bg-gray-900 p-6 text-white flex justify-between items-center">
 2243:  23:                     <h3 className="font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-widest">Sửa bài học #{lesson.order}</h3>
 2244:  24:                     <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full"><X className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-400" /></button>
 2245:  25:                 </div>
 2246:  26:                 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="p-6 space-y-5">
 2247:  27:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2248:  28:                         <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Tiêu đề bài học</label>
 2249:  29:                         <input type="text" value={title} onChange={(e) => setTitle(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" required />
 2250:  30:                     </div>
 2251:  31:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2252:  32:                         <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Link Video (YouTube)</label>
 2253:  33:                         <input type="text" value={videoUrl} onChange={(e) => setVideoUrl(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" placeholder="https://youtube.com/..." />
 2254:  34:                     </div>
 2255:  35:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2256:  36:                         <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Thứ tự hiển thị</label>
 2257:  37:                         <input type="number" value={order} onChange={(e) => setOrder(parseInt(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" required />
 2258:  38:                     </div>
 2259:  39:                     <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="w-full bg-black text-yellow-400 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
 2260:  40:                         {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> : <Save className="w-5 h-5" />}
 2261:  41:                         Cập nhật bài học
 2262:  42:                     </button>
 2263:  43:                 </form>
 2264:  44:             </div>
 2265:  45:         </div>
 2266:  46:     )
 2267:  47: }
 2268:  48: export default function EditCoursePage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
 2269:  49:     const { id } = use(params)
 2270:  50:     const [course, setCourse] = useState<any>(null)
 2271:  51:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 2272:  52:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
 2273:  53:     const [message, setMessage] = useState<{ type: 'success' | 'error', text: string } | null>(null)
 2274:  54:     const [selectedLesson, setSelectedLesson] = useState<any>(null)
 2275:  55:     const [nameLop, setNameLop] = useState('')
 2276:  56:     const [phiCoc, setPhiCoc] = useState(0)
 2277:  57:     const [idKhoa, setIdKhoa] = useState('')
 2278:  58:     const [noidungEmail, setNoidungEmail] = useState('')
 2279:  59:     const fetchData = async () => {
 2280:  60:         setLoading(true)
 2281:  61:         const res = await fetch(`/api/courses/${id}`).then(r => r.json())
 2282:  62:         if (res && !res.error) {
 2283:  63:             setCourse(res)
 2284:  64:             setNameLop(res.name_lop || '')
 2285:  65:             setPhiCoc(res.phi_coc || 0)
 2286:  66:             setIdKhoa(res.id_khoa || '')
 2287:  67:             setNoidungEmail(res.noidung_email || '')
 2288:  68:         }
 2289:  69:         setLoading(false)
 2290:  70:     }
 2291:  71:     useEffect(() => { fetchData() }, [id])
 2292:  72:     const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 2293:  73:         e.preventDefault()
 2294:  74:         setSaving(true)
 2295:  75:         setMessage(null)
 2296:  76:         const res = await updateCourseAction(parseInt(id), {
 2297:  77:             name_lop: nameLop, phi_coc: phiCoc, id_khoa: idKhoa, noidung_email: noidungEmail
 2298:  78:         })
 2299:  79:         if (res.success) setMessage({ type: 'success', text: 'Đã lưu thông tin khóa học!' })
 2300:  80:         else setMessage({ type: 'error', text: res.error || 'Lỗi khi lưu.' })
 2301:  81:         setSaving(false)
 2302:  82:     }
 2303:  83:     const handleUpdateLesson = async (data: any) => {
 2304:  84:         const res = await updateLessonAction(data.id, {
 2305:  85:             title: data.title, videoUrl: data.videoUrl, order: data.order
 2306:  86:         })
 2307:  87:         if (res.success) {
 2308:  88:             setMessage({ type: 'success', text: 'Đã cập nhật bài học thành công!' })
 2309:  89:             fetchData() // Tải lại danh sách
 2310:  90:         }
 2311:  91:     }
 2312:  92:     if (loading) return (
 2313:  93:         <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[400px] text-gray-400">
 2314:  94:             <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-purple-500 mb-2" />
 2315:  95:             <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase">Đang tải...</p>
 2316:  96:         </div>
 2317:  97:     )
 2318:  98:     return (
 2319:  99:         <div className="max-w-md mx-auto space-y-8 pb-32">
 2320: 100:             <Link href="/admin/courses" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-black text-gray-400 uppercase hover:text-purple-600 transition-colors">
 2321: 101:                 <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Khóa học
 2322: 102:             </Link>
 2323: 103:             {/* PHẦN 1: THÔNG TIN KHÓA HỌC */}
 2324: 104:             <div className="bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] p-6 shadow-xl border border-gray-100">
 2325: 105:                 <h1 className="text-xl font-black text-gray-900 mb-6 uppercase tracking-tight flex items-center gap-2">
 2326: 106:                     <Edit2 className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-500" /> Sửa Khóa học
 2327: 107:                 </h1>
 2328: 108:                 <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-5">
 2329: 109:                     <div className="space-y-1.5"><label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Tên lớp học</label>
 2330: 110:                         <input type="text" value={nameLop} onChange={(e) => setNameLop(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" required />
 2331: 111:                     </div>
 2332: 112:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
 2333: 113:                         <div className="space-y-1.5"><label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Học phí</label>
 2334: 114:                             <input type="number" value={phiCoc} onChange={(e) => setPhiCoc(parseInt(e.target.value))} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" />
 2335: 115:                         </div>
 2336: 116:                         <div className="space-y-1.5"><label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Mã khóa</label>
 2337: 117:                             <input type="text" value={idKhoa} onChange={(e) => setIdKhoa(e.target.value.toUpperCase())} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none" />
 2338: 118:                         </div>
 2339: 119:                     </div>
 2340: 120:                     <div className="space-y-1.5"><label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Email kích hoạt</label>
 2341: 121:                         <textarea value={noidungEmail} onChange={(e) => setNoidungEmail(e.target.value)} rows={4} className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm outline-none" />
 2342: 122:                     </div>
 2343: 123:                     {message && (
 2344: 124:                         <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-3 text-xs font-bold ${message.type === 'success' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-50 text-red-700'}`}>
 2345: 125:                             {message.type === 'success' ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" /> : <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />}
 2346: 126:                             {message.text}
 2347: 127:                         </div>
 2348: 128:                     )}
 2349: 129:                     <button type="submit" disabled={saving} className="w-full bg-black text-yellow-400 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all">
 2350: 130:                         {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> : <Save className="w-5 h-5" />} Lưu Khóa học
 2351: 131:                     </button>
 2352: 132:                 </form>
 2353: 133:             </div>
 2354: 134:             {/* PHẦN 2: DANH SÁCH BÀI HỌC */}
 2355: 135:             <div className="space-y-4">
 2356: 136:                 <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2 px-2 uppercase tracking-tight">
 2357: 137:                     <List className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-500" /> Bài giảng ({course?.lessons?.length || 0})
 2358: 138:                 </h2>
 2359: 139:                 <div className="space-y-3">
 2360: 140:                     {course?.lessons?.map((lesson: any) => (
 2361: 141:                         <div key={lesson.id} className="bg-white p-4 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 shadow-lg shadow-gray-100/50 flex items-center justify-between group">
 2362: 142:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 2363: 143:                                 <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-black font-mono">
 2364: 144:                                     #{lesson.order}
 2365: 145:                                 </div>
 2366: 146:                                 <div className="space-y-0.5">
 2367: 147:                                     <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-800 leading-tight">{lesson.title}</h4>
 2368: 148:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase">
 2369: 149:                                         <Play className="w-3 h-3" /> {lesson.videoUrl ? 'Đã có Video' : 'Chưa có Video'}
 2370: 150:                                     </div>
 2371: 151:                                 </div>
 2372: 152:                             </div>
 2373: 153:                             <button 
 2374: 154:                                 onClick={() => setSelectedLesson(lesson)}
 2375: 155:                                 className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-900 hover:text-white transition-all active:scale-90"
 2376: 156:                             >
 2377: 157:                                 <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
 2378: 158:                             </button>
 2379: 159:                         </div>
 2380: 160:                     ))}
 2381: 161:                 </div>
 2382: 162:             </div>
 2383: 163:             {/* MODAL SỬA BÀI HỌC */}
 2384: 164:             {selectedLesson && (
 2385: 165:                 <LessonEditModal 
 2386: 166:                     lesson={selectedLesson} 
 2387: 167:                     onClose={() => setSelectedLesson(null)} 
 2388: 168:                     onSave={handleUpdateLesson} 
 2389: 169:                 />
 2390: 170:             )}
 2391: 171:         </div>
 2392: 172:     )
 2393: 173: }
 2394: ````

 2396: ## File: app/admin/courses/page.tsx
 2397: ````typescript
 2398:  1: 'use client'
 2399:  2: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
 2400:  3: import { getAdminCoursesAction } from '@/app/actions/admin-actions'
 2401:  4: import { BookOpen, Users, DollarSign, Settings, Loader2, Plus, ArrowLeft } from 'lucide-react'
 2402:  5: import Link from 'next/link'
 2403:  6: export default function AdminCoursesPage() {
 2404:  7:     const [courses, setCourses] = useState<any[]>([])
 2405:  8:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 2406:  9:     useEffect(() => {
 2407: 10:         const fetchCourses = async () => {
 2408: 11:             setLoading(true)
 2409: 12:             const res = await getAdminCoursesAction()
 2410: 13:             if (res.success) {
 2411: 14:                 setCourses(res.courses || [])
 2412: 15:             }
 2413: 16:             setLoading(false)
 2414: 17:         }
 2415: 18:         fetchCourses()
 2416: 19:     }, [])
 2417: 20:     return (
 2418: 21:         <div className="space-y-6 pb-20">
 2419: 22:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 2420: 23:                 <div>
 2421: 24:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight">Khóa học</h1>
 2422: 25:                     <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs font-medium">Quản lý nội dung & học phí</p>
 2423: 26:                 </div>
 2424: 27:                 <button className="bg-black text-yellow-400 p-2.5 rounded-2xl shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all">
 2425: 28:                     <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
 2426: 29:                 </button>
 2427: 30:             </div>
 2428: 31:             <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
 2429: 32:                 <div className="w-full">
 2430: 33:                     <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse table-fixed">
 2431: 34:                         <thead>
 2432: 35:                             <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
 2433: 36:                                 <th className="px-2 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center w-14 border-r border-gray-100">ID</th>
 2434: 37:                                 <th className="px-3 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Thông tin Khóa học</th>
 2435: 38:                             </tr>
 2436: 39:                         </thead>
 2437: 40:                         <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
 2438: 41:                             {loading ? (
 2439: 42:                                 <tr>
 2440: 43:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
 2441: 44:                                         <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-purple-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
 2442: 45:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Đang tải...</p>
 2443: 46:                                     </td>
 2444: 47:                                 </tr>
 2445: 48:                             ) : courses.length === 0 ? (
 2446: 49:                                 <tr>
 2447: 50:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase">
 2448: 51:                                         Chưa có khóa học nào
 2449: 52:                                     </td>
 2450: 53:                                 </tr>
 2451: 54:                             ) : (
 2452: 55:                                 courses.map((course) => (
 2453: 56:                                     <tr key={course.id} className="hover:bg-orange-50/30 transition-colors">
 2454: 57:                                         <td className="px-2 py-4 text-center align-top space-y-3">
 2455: 58:                                             <div className="text-[10px] font-black font-mono text-gray-900 bg-gray-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded border border-gray-200">
 2456: 59:                                                 #{course.id}
 2457: 60:                                             </div>
 2458: 61:                                             <Link 
 2459: 62:                                                 href={`/admin/courses/${course.id}`} 
 2460: 63:                                                 className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-black text-yellow-400 rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-800 active:scale-90 transition-all shadow-md"
 2461: 64:                                             >
 2462: 65:                                                 <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />
 2463: 66:                                             </Link>
 2464: 67:                                         </td>
 2465: 68:                                         <td className="px-3 py-4 space-y-1 overflow-hidden">
 2466: 69:                                             <div className="font-black text-orange-600 text-sm truncate leading-tight uppercase tracking-tight">
 2467: 70:                                                 {course.name_lop}
 2468: 71:                                             </div>
 2469: 72:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 2470: 73:                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold">
 2471: 74:                                                     <DollarSign className="w-3 h-3 text-green-500" />
 2472: 75:                                                     {course.phi_coc.toLocaleString()}đ
 2473: 76:                                                 </div>
 2474: 77:                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold">
 2475: 78:                                                     <BookOpen className="w-3 h-3 text-blue-400" />
 2476: 79:                                                     {course._count?.lessons} bài
 2477: 80:                                                 </div>
 2478: 81:                                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold">
 2479: 82:                                                     <Users className="w-3 h-3 text-purple-400" />
 2480: 83:                                                     {course._count?.enrollments} HV
 2481: 84:                                                 </div>
 2482: 85:                                             </div>
 2483: 86:                                             <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-medium">
 2484: 87:                                                 Mã: <span className="font-bold text-gray-600">{course.id_khoa}</span>
 2485: 88:                                             </div>
 2486: 89:                                         </td>
 2487: 90:                                     </tr>
 2488: 91:                                 ))
 2489: 92:                             )}
 2490: 93:                         </tbody>
 2491: 94:                     </table>
 2492: 95:                 </div>
 2493: 96:             </div>
 2494: 97:         </div>
 2495: 98:     )
 2496: 99: }
 2497: ````
