 2499: ## File: app/admin/payments/page.tsx
 2500: ````typescript
 2501:   1: 'use client'
 2502:   2: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
 2503:   3: import { getPendingPayments, getAllPayments, verifyPaymentAction, rejectPaymentAction } from '@/app/actions/payment-actions'
 2504:   4: import Image from 'next/image'
 2505:   5: interface PaymentData {
 2506:   6:   id: number
 2507:   7:   amount: number
 2508:   8:   status: string
 2509:   9:   phone: string | null
 2510:  10:   courseCode: string | null
 2511:  11:   bankName: string | null
 2512:  12:   accountNumber: string | null
 2513:  13:   content: string | null
 2514:  14:   proofImage: string | null
 2515:  15:   verifyMethod: string | null
 2516:  16:   verifiedAt: Date | null
 2517:  17:   createdAt: Date
 2518:  18:   enrollment: {
 2519:  19:     id: number
 2520:  20:     status: string
 2521:  21:     user: {
 2522:  22:       id: number
 2523:  23:       name: string | null
 2524:  24:       email: string
 2525:  25:       phone: string | null
 2526:  26:     }
 2527:  27:     course: {
 2528:  28:       id: number
 2529:  29:       id_khoa: string
 2530:  30:       name_lop: string
 2531:  31:       phi_coc: number
 2532:  32:     }
 2533:  33:   }
 2534:  34: }
 2535:  35: export default function PaymentsPage() {
 2536:  36:   const [payments, setPayments] = useState<PaymentData[]>([])
 2537:  37:   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 2538:  38:   const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'PENDING' | 'ALL'>('PENDING')
 2539:  39:   const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState<number | null>(null)
 2540:  40:   useEffect(() => {
 2541:  41:     loadPayments()
 2542:  42:   }, [filter])
 2543:  43:   async function loadPayments() {
 2544:  44:     setLoading(true)
 2545:  45:     const result = filter === 'PENDING' 
 2546:  46:       ? await getPendingPayments()
 2547:  47:       : await getAllPayments()
 2548:  48:     if (result.success) {
 2549:  49:       setPayments(result.payments as PaymentData[])
 2550:  50:     }
 2551:  51:     setLoading(false)
 2552:  52:   }
 2553:  53:   async function handleVerify(paymentId: number) {
 2554:  54:     setActionLoading(paymentId)
 2555:  55:     const enrollmentId = payments.find(p => p.id === paymentId)?.enrollment.id
 2556:  56:     if (!enrollmentId) return
 2557:  57:     const result = await verifyPaymentAction(enrollmentId, 'MANUAL_ADMIN', 'Admin xác nhận thủ công')
 2558:  58:     if (result.success) {
 2559:  59:       await loadPayments()
 2560:  60:     }
 2561:  61:     setActionLoading(null)
 2562:  62:   }
 2563:  63:   async function handleReject(paymentId: number) {
 2564:  64:     const reason = prompt('Nhập lý do từ chối:')
 2565:  65:     if (!reason) return
 2566:  66:     setActionLoading(paymentId)
 2567:  67:     const enrollmentId = payments.find(p => p.id === paymentId)?.enrollment.id
 2568:  68:     if (!enrollmentId) return
 2569:  69:     const result = await rejectPaymentAction(enrollmentId, reason)
 2570:  70:     if (result.success) {
 2571:  71:       await loadPayments()
 2572:  72:     }
 2573:  73:     setActionLoading(null)
 2574:  74:   }
 2575:  75:   const statusColors: Record<string, string> = {
 2576:  76:     PENDING: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
 2577:  77:     VERIFIED: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
 2578:  78:     REJECTED: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
 2579:  79:     CANCELLED: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
 2580:  80:   }
 2581:  81:   return (
 2582:  82:     <div className="p-6">
 2583:  83:       <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
 2584:  84:         <div>
 2585:  85:           <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Quản lý thanh toán</h1>
 2586:  86:           <p className="text-gray-600">Xem và xác nhận thanh toán khóa học</p>
 2587:  87:         </div>
 2588:  88:         <div className="flex gap-2">
 2589:  89:           <button
 2590:  90:             onClick={() => setFilter('PENDING')}
 2591:  91:             className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium ${
 2592:  92:               filter === 'PENDING' 
 2593:  93:                 ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
 2594:  94:                 : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
 2595:  95:             }`}
 2596:  96:           >
 2597:  97:             Chờ xác nhận
 2598:  98:           </button>
 2599:  99:           <button
 2600: 100:             onClick={() => setFilter('ALL')}
 2601: 101:             className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium ${
 2602: 102:               filter === 'ALL' 
 2603: 103:                 ? 'bg-purple-600 text-white' 
 2604: 104:                 : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
 2605: 105:             }`}
 2606: 106:           >
 2607: 107:             Tất cả
 2608: 108:           </button>
 2609: 109:         </div>
 2610: 110:       </div>
 2611: 111:       {loading ? (
 2612: 112:         <div className="text-center py-12">
 2613: 113:           <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-purple-600 mx-auto"></div>
 2614: 114:           <p className="mt-4 text-gray-600">Đang tải...</p>
 2615: 115:         </div>
 2616: 116:       ) : payments.length === 0 ? (
 2617: 117:         <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
 2618: 118:           <p className="text-gray-500">Không có thanh toán nào</p>
 2619: 119:         </div>
 2620: 120:       ) : (
 2621: 121:         <div className="space-y-4">
 2622: 122:           {payments.map((payment) => (
 2623: 123:             <div key={payment.id} className="bg-white border rounded-xl p-4 shadow-sm">
 2624: 124:               <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
 2625: 125:                 <div className="flex-1">
 2626: 126:                   <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
 2627: 127:                     <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold ${statusColors[payment.status]}`}>
 2628: 128:                       {payment.status === 'PENDING' ? '⏳ Chờ xác nhận' :
 2629: 129:                        payment.status === 'VERIFIED' ? '✓ Đã xác nhận' :
 2630: 130:                        payment.status === 'REJECTED' ? '✗ Từ chối' : 'Đã hủy'}
 2631: 131:                     </span>
 2632: 132:                     <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
 2633: 133:                       #{payment.id} • {new Date(payment.createdAt).toLocaleString('vi-VN')}
 2634: 134:                     </span>
 2635: 135:                   </div>
 2636: 136:                   <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
 2637: 137:                     <div>
 2638: 138:                       <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Học viên</p>
 2639: 139:                       <p className="font-medium">{payment.enrollment.user.name || 'N/A'}</p>
 2640: 140:                       <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{payment.enrollment.user.email}</p>
 2641: 141:                       {payment.enrollment.user.phone && (
 2642: 142:                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">📱 {payment.enrollment.user.phone}</p>
 2643: 143:                       )}
 2644: 144:                     </div>
 2645: 145:                     <div>
 2646: 146:                       <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Khóa học</p>
 2647: 147:                       <p className="font-medium">{payment.enrollment.course.name_lop}</p>
 2648: 148:                       <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Mã: {payment.enrollment.course.id_khoa}</p>
 2649: 149:                       <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Phí: {payment.enrollment.course.phi_coc.toLocaleString()}đ</p>
 2650: 150:                     </div>
 2651: 151:                     <div>
 2652: 152:                       <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Thông tin chuyển khoản</p>
 2653: 153:                       {payment.amount > 0 && (
 2654: 154:                         <p className="font-medium text-green-600">Số tiền: {payment.amount.toLocaleString()}đ</p>
 2655: 155:                       )}
 2656: 156:                       {payment.phone && <p className="text-sm">📱 {payment.phone}</p>}
 2657: 157:                       {payment.bankName && <p className="text-sm">🏦 {payment.bankName}</p>}
 2658: 158:                       {payment.content && <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">ND: {payment.content}</p>}
 2659: 159:                       {payment.verifyMethod && (
 2660: 160:                         <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
 2661: 161:                           Cách xác nhận: {
 2662: 162:                             payment.verifyMethod === 'AUTO_EMAIL' ? 'Tự động email' :
 2663: 163:                             payment.verifyMethod === 'MANUAL_UPLOAD' ? 'Upload biên lai' :
 2664: 164:                             'Thủ công'
 2665: 165:                           }
 2666: 166:                         </p>
 2667: 167:                       )}
 2668: 168:                     </div>
 2669: 169:                   </div>
 2670: 170:                   {payment.proofImage && (
 2671: 171:                     <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-lg">
 2672: 172:                       <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 font-medium mb-2">📎 Biên lai đã upload:</p>
 2673: 173:                       <div className="relative w-48 h-36 border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
 2674: 174:                         <Image
 2675: 175:                           src={payment.proofImage}
 2676: 176:                           alt="Biên lai"
 2677: 177:                           fill
 2678: 178:                           className="object-cover"
 2679: 179:                         />
 2680: 180:                       </div>
 2681: 181:                     </div>
 2682: 182:                   )}
 2683: 183:                 </div>
 2684: 184:                 {payment.status === 'PENDING' && (
 2685: 185:                   <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 ml-4">
 2686: 186:                     <button
 2687: 187:                       onClick={() => handleVerify(payment.id)}
 2688: 188:                       disabled={actionLoading === payment.id}
 2689: 189:                       className="px-4 py-2 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-green-600 disabled:opacity-50"
 2690: 190:                     >
 2691: 191:                       {actionLoading === payment.id ? '...' : '✓ Xác nhận'}
 2692: 192:                     </button>
 2693: 193:                     <button
 2694: 194:                       onClick={() => handleReject(payment.id)}
 2695: 195:                       disabled={actionLoading === payment.id}
 2696: 196:                       className="px-4 py-2 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-red-600 disabled:opacity-50"
 2697: 197:                     >
 2698: 198:                       {actionLoading === payment.id ? '...' : '✗ Từ chối'}
 2699: 199:                     </button>
 2700: 200:                   </div>
 2701: 201:                 )}
 2702: 202:               </div>
 2703: 203:             </div>
 2704: 204:           ))}
 2705: 205:         </div>
 2706: 206:       )}
 2707: 207:     </div>
 2708: 208:   )
 2709: 209: }
 2710: ````
 2711: 
 2712: ## File: app/admin/posts/page.tsx
 2713: ````typescript
 2714:   1: 'use client'
 2715:   2: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
 2716:   3: import { getPostsAction, createPostAction } from '@/app/actions/post-actions'
 2717:   4: import { Plus, Newspaper, Save, Loader2, Image as ImageIcon, X, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'
 2718:   5: import Link from 'next/link'
 2719:   6: export default function AdminPostsPage() {
 2720:   7:     const [posts, setPosts] = useState<any[]>([])
 2721:   8:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 2722:   9:     const [showCreate, setShowCreate] = useState(false)
 2723:  10:     const [title, setTitle] = useState('')
 2724:  11:     const [content, setContent] = useState('')
 2725:  12:     const [image, setImage] = useState('')
 2726:  13:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
 2727:  14:     const fetchPosts = async () => {
 2728:  15:         setLoading(true)
 2729:  16:         const res = await getPostsAction()
 2730:  17:         if (res.success) {
 2731:  18:             setPosts(res.posts || [])
 2732:  19:         }
 2733:  20:         setLoading(false)
 2734:  21:     }
 2735:  22:     useEffect(() => {
 2736:  23:         fetchPosts()
 2737:  24:     }, [])
 2738:  25:     const handleCreate = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 2739:  26:         e.preventDefault()
 2740:  27:         setSaving(true)
 2741:  28:         const res = await createPostAction({ title, content, image })
 2742:  29:         if (res.success) {
 2743:  30:             setTitle('')
 2744:  31:             setContent('')
 2745:  32:             setImage('')
 2746:  33:             setShowCreate(false)
 2747:  34:             fetchPosts()
 2748:  35:         } else {
 2749:  36:             alert(res.error)
 2750:  37:         }
 2751:  38:         setSaving(false)
 2752:  39:     }
 2753:  40:     return (
 2754:  41:         <div className="space-y-6 pb-20">
 2755:  42:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 2756:  43:                 <div>
 2757:  44:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight">Bảng tin</h1>
 2758:  45:                     <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs font-medium">Quản lý bài viết cộng đồng</p>
 2759:  46:                 </div>
 2760:  47:                 <button 
 2761:  48:                     onClick={() => setShowCreate(!showCreate)}
 2762:  49:                     className="bg-black text-yellow-400 p-2.5 rounded-2xl shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
 2763:  50:                 >
 2764:  51:                     {showCreate ? <X className="w-5 h-5" /> : <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />}
 2765:  52:                 </button>
 2766:  53:             </div>
 2767:  54:             {/* Form Đăng bài mới */}
 2768:  55:             {showCreate && (
 2769:  56:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] p-6 shadow-xl border border-purple-100 animate-in slide-in-from-top-4 duration-300">
 2770:  57:                     <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-gray-900 mb-4 uppercase tracking-tight flex items-center gap-2">
 2771:  58:                         <Newspaper className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-500" /> Đăng bài mới
 2772:  59:                     </h2>
 2773:  60:                     <form onSubmit={handleCreate} className="space-y-4">
 2774:  61:                         <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2775:  62:                             <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Tiêu đề bản tin</label>
 2776:  63:                             <input 
 2777:  64:                                 type="text" 
 2778:  65:                                 value={title}
 2779:  66:                                 onChange={(e) => setTitle(e.target.value)}
 2780:  67:                                 className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 transition-all"
 2781:  68:                                 placeholder="Nhập tiêu đề thu hút..."
 2782:  69:                                 required
 2783:  70:                             />
 2784:  71:                         </div>
 2785:  72:                         <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2786:  73:                             <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Nội dung chi tiết</label>
 2787:  74:                             <textarea 
 2788:  75:                                 value={content}
 2789:  76:                                 onChange={(e) => setContent(e.target.value)}
 2790:  77:                                 rows={5}
 2791:  78:                                 className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 transition-all"
 2792:  79:                                 placeholder="Bạn muốn chia sẻ điều gì với cộng đồng?"
 2793:  80:                                 required
 2794:  81:                             />
 2795:  82:                         </div>
 2796:  83:                         <div className="space-y-1.5">
 2797:  84:                             <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1">Link ảnh minh họa (không bắt buộc)</label>
 2798:  85:                             <div className="relative">
 2799:  86:                                 <ImageIcon className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
 2800:  87:                                 <input 
 2801:  88:                                     type="text" 
 2802:  89:                                     value={image}
 2803:  90:                                     onChange={(e) => setImage(e.target.value)}
 2804:  91:                                     className="w-full bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl pl-11 pr-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 transition-all"
 2805:  92:                                     placeholder="https://postimg.cc/..."
 2806:  93:                                 />
 2807:  94:                             </div>
 2808:  95:                         </div>
 2809:  96:                         <button 
 2810:  97:                             type="submit"
 2811:  98:                             disabled={saving}
 2812:  99:                             className="w-full bg-black text-yellow-400 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
 2813: 100:                         >
 2814: 101:                             {saving ? <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" /> : <Save className="w-5 h-5" />}
 2815: 102:                             Đăng bản tin ngay
 2816: 103:                         </button>
 2817: 104:                     </form>
 2818: 105:                 </div>
 2819: 106:             )}
 2820: 107:             {/* Danh sách bài viết hiện có */}
 2821: 108:             <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
 2822: 109:                 <div className="w-full">
 2823: 110:                     <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse table-fixed">
 2824: 111:                         <thead>
 2825: 112:                             <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
 2826: 113:                                 <th className="px-3 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest">Bản tin đã đăng</th>
 2827: 114:                                 <th className="px-3 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center w-16">Xóa</th>
 2828: 115:                             </tr>
 2829: 116:                         </thead>
 2830: 117:                         <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
 2831: 118:                             {loading ? (
 2832: 119:                                 <tr>
 2833: 120:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
 2834: 121:                                         <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-purple-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
 2835: 122:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Đang tải bản tin...</p>
 2836: 123:                                     </td>
 2837: 124:                                 </tr>
 2838: 125:                             ) : posts.length === 0 ? (
 2839: 126:                                 <tr>
 2840: 127:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase">
 2841: 128:                                         Chưa có bài viết nào
 2842: 129:                                     </td>
 2843: 130:                                 </tr>
 2844: 131:                             ) : (
 2845: 132:                                 posts.map((post) => (
 2846: 133:                                     <tr key={post.id} className="hover:bg-purple-50/30 transition-colors">
 2847: 134:                                         <td className="px-3 py-4">
 2848: 135:                                             <div className="font-black text-gray-900 text-sm truncate leading-tight uppercase">{post.title}</div>
 2849: 136:                                             <div className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase mt-1">
 2850: 137:                                                 {new Date(post.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')} • {post._count?.comments || 0} bình luận
 2851: 138:                                             </div>
 2852: 139:                                         </td>
 2853: 140:                                         <td className="px-3 py-4 text-center">
 2854: 141:                                             <button className="p-2 text-gray-300 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors">
 2855: 142:                                                 <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
 2856: 143:                                             </button>
 2857: 144:                                         </td>
 2858: 145:                                     </tr>
 2859: 146:                                 ))
 2860: 147:                             )}
 2861: 148:                         </tbody>
 2862: 149:                     </table>
 2863: 150:                 </div>
 2864: 151:             </div>
 2865: 152:         </div>
 2866: 153:     )
 2867: 154: }
 2868: ````

 2870: ## File: app/admin/reserved-ids/page.tsx
 2871: ````typescript
 2872:  1: import { deleteReservedIdAction, getReservedIds } from "@/app/actions/admin-actions"
 2873:  2: import { AddReservedIdForm } from "./add-form"
 2874:  3: import { ChangeUserIdForm } from "./change-id-form"
 2875:  4: export default async function ReservedIdsPage() {
 2876:  5:     const reservedIds = await getReservedIds()
 2877:  6:     return (
 2878:  7:         <div className="space-y-8">
 2879:  8:             <div>
 2880:  9:                 <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-800">💎 Cấp số đẹp cho Học viên</h2>
 2881: 10:                 <ChangeUserIdForm />
 2882: 11:             </div>
 2883: 12:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
 2884: 13:                 {/* Cột Trái: Danh sách */}
 2885: 14:                 <div>
 2886: 15:                     <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-800">Danh sách ID Đã giữ ({reservedIds.length})</h3>
 2887: 16:                     <div className="bg-white border rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto">
 2888: 17:                         <table className="min-w-full divide-y divide-gray-200">
 2889: 18:                             <thead className="bg-gray-50">
 2890: 19:                                 <tr>
 2891: 20:                                     <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">ID</th>
 2892: 21:                                     <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Ghi chú</th>
 2893: 22:                                     <th className="px-6 py-3 text-right text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Action</th>
 2894: 23:                                 </tr>
 2895: 24:                             </thead>
 2896: 25:                             <tbody className="bg-white divide-y divide-gray-200">
 2897: 26:                                 {reservedIds.map((item: any) => (
 2898: 27:                                     <tr key={item.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
 2899: 28:                                         <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-bold text-purple-600">{item.id}</td>
 2900: 29:                                         <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-gray-500">{item.note}</td>
 2901: 30:                                         <td className="px-6 py-4 whitespace-nowrap text-right text-sm font-medium">
 2902: 31:                                             <form action={async () => {
 2903: 32:                                                 'use server'
 2904: 33:                                                 await deleteReservedIdAction(item.id)
 2905: 34:                                             }}>
 2906: 35:                                                 <button className="text-red-600 hover:text-red-900 border px-2 py-1 rounded hover:bg-red-50">Xóa</button>
 2907: 36:                                             </form>
 2908: 37:                                         </td>
 2909: 38:                                     </tr>
 2910: 39:                                 ))}
 2911: 40:                                 {reservedIds.length === 0 && (
 2912: 41:                                     <tr>
 2913: 42:                                         <td colSpan={3} className="px-6 py-4 text-center text-sm text-gray-500">Chưa có ID nào được giữ.</td>
 2914: 43:                                     </tr>
 2915: 44:                                 )}
 2916: 45:                             </tbody>
 2917: 46:                         </table>
 2918: 47:                     </div>
 2919: 48:                 </div>
 2920: 49:                 {/* Cột Phải: Thêm mới */}
 2921: 50:                 <div>
 2922: 51:                     <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-800">Giữ thêm số mới</h3>
 2923: 52:                     <AddReservedIdForm />
 2924: 53:                 </div>
 2925: 54:             </div>
 2926: 55:         </div>
 2927: 56:     )
 2928: 57: }
 2929: ````

 2931: ## File: app/admin/students/[id]/page.tsx
 2932: ````typescript
 2933:   1: 'use client'
 2934:   2: import { useState, useEffect, use } from 'react'
 2935:   3: import { getStudentDetailsAction } from '@/app/actions/admin-actions'
 2936:   4: import { User, Mail, Phone, Calendar, BookOpen, CheckCircle, ArrowLeft, Loader2, Award, Info, X, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react'
 2937:   5: import Link from 'next/link'
 2938:   6: // ─── Component Popup Bảng Điểm ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 2939:   7: function ScoreModal({ enroll, onClose }: { enroll: any, onClose: () => void }) {
 2940:   8:     return (
 2941:   9:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[150] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4" onClick={onClose}>
 2942:  10:             <div className="bg-white w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl flex flex-col animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-200" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
 2943:  11:                 <div className="bg-purple-600 p-4 text-white flex items-center justify-between">
 2944:  12:                     <div>
 2945:  13:                         <h3 className="font-black text-sm uppercase tracking-tight line-clamp-1">{enroll.course.name_lop}</h3>
 2946:  14:                         <p className="text-[10px] opacity-80 font-bold uppercase">Bảng điểm chi tiết</p>
 2947:  15:                     </div>
 2948:  16:                     <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
 2949:  17:                 </div>
 2950:  18:                 <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 custom-scrollbar">
 2951:  19:                     <div className="space-y-3">
 2952:  20:                         {enroll.course.lessons.map((lesson: any) => {
 2953:  21:                             const prog = enroll.lessonProgress.find((p: any) => p.lessonId === lesson.id)
 2954:  22:                             const scores = prog?.scores || {}
 2955:  23:                             return (
 2956:  24:                                 <div key={lesson.id} className={`p-3 rounded-2xl border ${prog?.status === 'COMPLETED' ? 'border-green-100 bg-green-50/30' : 'border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50 opacity-60'}`}>
 2957:  25:                                     <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
 2958:  26:                                         <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
 2959:  27:                                             <span className="bg-white px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-gray-200 text-[10px] font-black font-mono">#{lesson.order}</span>
 2960:  28:                                             <span className="font-bold text-gray-800 text-xs leading-tight">{lesson.title}</span>
 2961:  29:                                         </div>
 2962:  30:                                         <span className={`text-xs font-black ${prog?.status === 'COMPLETED' ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
 2963:  31:                                             {prog?.totalScore ?? 0}/10
 2964:  32:                                         </span>
 2965:  33:                                     </div>
 2966:  34:                                     {prog && (
 2967:  35:                                         <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-1 text-[9px] font-bold text-center uppercase tracking-tighter">
 2968:  36:                                             <div className="bg-white p-1 rounded-md border border-gray-100">Vid: {scores.video ?? 0}</div>
 2969:  37:                                             <div className="bg-white p-1 rounded-md border border-gray-100">Tâm: {scores.reflection ?? 0}</div>
 2970:  38:                                             <div className="bg-white p-1 rounded-md border border-gray-100">Làm: {scores.link ?? 0}</div>
 2971:  39:                                             <div className="bg-white p-1 rounded-md border border-gray-100">Giúp: {scores.support ?? 0}</div>
 2972:  40:                                             <div className={`p-1 rounded-md border border-gray-100 ${scores.timing === 1 ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700' : scores.timing === -1 ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' : 'bg-white'}`}>
 2973:  41:                                                 Hạn: {scores.timing ?? 0}
 2974:  42:                                             </div>
 2975:  43:                                         </div>
 2976:  44:                                     )}
 2977:  45:                                 </div>
 2978:  46:                             )
 2979:  47:                         })}
 2980:  48:                     </div>
 2981:  49:                 </div>
 2982:  50:             </div>
 2983:  51:         </div>
 2984:  52:     )
 2985:  53: }
 2986:  54: export default function StudentDetailPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
 2987:  55:     const { id } = use(params)
 2988:  56:     const [student, setStudent] = useState<any>(null)
 2989:  57:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 2990:  58:     const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
 2991:  59:     const [selectedEnroll, setSelectedEnroll] = useState<any>(null)
 2992:  60:     useEffect(() => {
 2993:  61:         const fetchDetails = async () => {
 2994:  62:             setLoading(true)
 2995:  63:             const res = await getStudentDetailsAction(parseInt(id))
 2996:  64:             if (res.success) {
 2997:  65:                 setStudent(res.student)
 2998:  66:             } else {
 2999:  67:                 setError(res.error || 'Lỗi tải dữ liệu')
 3000:  68:             }
 3001:  69:             setLoading(false)
 3002:  70:         }
 3003:  71:         fetchDetails()
 3004:  72:     }, [id])
 3005:  73:     if (loading) return (
 3006:  74:         <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[400px] gap-2 text-gray-400">
 3007:  75:             <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-purple-500" />
 3008:  76:             <p className="text-xs font-black uppercase">Đang tải hồ sơ...</p>
 3009:  77:         </div>
 3010:  78:     )
 3011:  79:     return (
 3012:  80:         <div className="max-w-md mx-auto space-y-6 pb-20">
 3013:  81:             {/* Nút quay lại */}
 3014:  82:             <Link href="/admin/students" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-black text-gray-400 uppercase hover:text-purple-600 transition-colors">
 3015:  83:                 <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4" /> Danh sách học viên
 3016:  84:             </Link>
 3017:  85:             {/* Thẻ Hồ sơ (Profile Card) */}
 3018:  86:             <div className="bg-white rounded-[2rem] p-6 shadow-xl shadow-purple-100 border border-purple-50">
 3019:  87:                 <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center space-y-3">
 3020:  88:                     <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-4xl font-black shadow-lg shadow-purple-200 ring-4 ring-purple-50">
 3021:  89:                         {student.name ? student.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() : '?'}
 3022:  90:                     </div>
 3023:  91:                     <div>
 3024:  92:                         <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 leading-tight">{student.name || 'N/A'}</h1>
 3025:  93:                         <p className="text-xs font-black text-purple-500 font-mono tracking-widest mt-1 uppercase">Mã học tập: #{student.id}</p>
 3026:  94:                     </div>
 3027:  95:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 w-full gap-2 pt-4">
 3028:  96:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100">
 3029:  97:                             <Phone className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
 3030:  98:                             <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">{student.phone || 'Chưa cập nhật'}</span>
 3031:  99:                         </div>
 3032: 100:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100">
 3033: 101:                             <Mail className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
 3034: 102:                             <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700 truncate">{student.email}</span>
 3035: 103:                         </div>
 3036: 104:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-100">
 3037: 105:                             <Calendar className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-400" />
 3038: 106:                             <span className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 italic">Gia nhập: {new Date(student.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')}</span>
 3039: 107:                         </div>
 3040: 108:                     </div>
 3041: 109:                 </div>
 3042: 110:             </div>
 3043: 111:             {/* Phần Khóa học */}
 3044: 112:             <div className="space-y-4">
 3045: 113:                 <h2 className="text-lg font-black text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2 px-2 uppercase tracking-tight">
 3046: 114:                     <Award className="w-5 h-5 text-yellow-500" />
 3047: 115:                     Lộ trình học tập
 3048: 116:                 </h2>
 3049: 117:                 {student.enrollments.length === 0 ? (
 3050: 118:                     <div className="bg-gray-100 rounded-3xl p-8 text-center text-gray-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200">
 3051: 119:                         Chưa đăng ký khóa nào
 3052: 120:                     </div>
 3053: 121:                 ) : (
 3054: 122:                     student.enrollments.map((enroll: any) => {
 3055: 123:                         const totalLessons = enroll.course.lessons.length
 3056: 124:                         const completedCount = enroll.lessonProgress.filter((p: any) => p.status === 'COMPLETED').length
 3057: 125:                         const progressPct = totalLessons > 0 ? Math.round((completedCount / totalLessons) * 100) : 0
 3058: 126:                         return (
 3059: 127:                             <div key={enroll.id} className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-gray-100 shadow-lg shadow-gray-100/50 space-y-4">
 3060: 128:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 3061: 129:                                     <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-indigo-50 flex items-center justify-center text-xl shadow-inner border border-indigo-100">
 3062: 130:                                         📘
 3063: 131:                                     </div>
 3064: 132:                                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 3065: 133:                                         <h3 className="font-black text-gray-900 text-sm uppercase leading-tight truncate">{enroll.course.name_lop}</h3>
 3066: 134:                                         <p className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase mt-0.5 ${enroll.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-orange-500'}`}>
 3067: 135:                                             ● {enroll.status === 'ACTIVE' ? 'Đã kích hoạt' : 'Chờ thanh toán'}
 3068: 136:                                         </p>
 3069: 137:                                     </div>
 3070: 138:                                 </div>
 3071: 139:                                 <div className="space-y-1.5">
 3072: 140:                                     <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 tracking-widest">
 3073: 141:                                         <span>Tiến độ</span>
 3074: 142:                                         <span className="text-purple-600">{progressPct}%</span>
 3075: 143:                                     </div>
 3076: 144:                                     <div className="h-2.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden border border-gray-50">
 3077: 145:                                         <div 
 3078: 146:                                             className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-indigo-500 transition-all duration-1000" 
 3079: 147:                                             style={{ width: `${progressPct}%` }}
 3080: 148:                                         />
 3081: 149:                                     </div>
 3082: 150:                                     <p className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase text-right">Đã xong {completedCount}/{totalLessons} bài</p>
 3083: 151:                                 </div>
 3084: 152:                                 <button 
 3085: 153:                                     onClick={() => setSelectedEnroll(enroll)}
 3086: 154:                                     className="w-full bg-gray-900 text-white py-3 rounded-2xl text-[11px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-black active:scale-[0.98] transition-all"
 3087: 155:                                 >
 3088: 156:                                     <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />
 3089: 157:                                     Xem bảng điểm chi tiết
 3090: 158:                                 </button>
 3091: 159:                             </div>
 3092: 160:                         )
 3093: 161:                     })
 3094: 162:                 )}
 3095: 163:             </div>
 3096: 164:             {/* Popup Bảng Điểm */}
 3097: 165:             {selectedEnroll && (
 3098: 166:                 <ScoreModal enroll={selectedEnroll} onClose={() => setSelectedEnroll(null)} />
 3099: 167:             )}
 3100: 168:         </div>
 3101: 169:     )
 3102: 170: }
 3103: ````
 3104: 
 3105: ## File: app/admin/students/page.tsx
 3106: ````typescript
 3107:   1: 'use client'
 3108:   2: import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
 3109:   3: import Link from 'next/link'
 3110:   4: import { getStudentsAction } from '@/app/actions/admin-actions'
 3111:   5: import { Search, User, Mail, Phone, Calendar, BookOpen, CheckCircle, Loader2, Info, ArrowUpDown } from 'lucide-react'
 3112:   6: export default function AdminStudentsPage() {
 3113:   7:     const [students, setStudents] = useState<any[]>([])
 3114:   8:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 3115:   9:     const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')
 3116:  10:     const [selectedRole, setSelectedRole] = useState<string>('STUDENT') 
 3117:  11:     const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('desc')
 3118:  12:     const fetchStudents = async (query?: string, role?: string) => {
 3119:  13:         setLoading(true)
 3120:  14:         const res = await getStudentsAction(query, (role || selectedRole) as any)
 3121:  15:         if (res.success) {
 3122:  16:             let data = res.students || []
 3123:  17:             // Sắp xếp dữ liệu theo thời gian tạo (createdAt)
 3124:  18:             data.sort((a: any, b: any) => {
 3125:  19:                 const timeA = new Date(a.createdAt).getTime()
 3126:  20:                 const timeB = new Date(b.createdAt).getTime()
 3127:  21:                 return sortOrder === 'asc' ? timeA - timeB : timeB - timeA
 3128:  22:             })
 3129:  23:             setStudents(data)
 3130:  24:         }
 3131:  25:         setLoading(false)
 3132:  26:     }
 3133:  27:     useEffect(() => {
 3134:  28:         fetchStudents(searchQuery, selectedRole)
 3135:  29:     }, [sortOrder, selectedRole])
 3136:  30:     const toggleSort = () => {
 3137:  31:         setSortOrder(prev => prev === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')
 3138:  32:     }
 3139:  33:     const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 3140:  34:         e.preventDefault()
 3141:  35:         fetchStudents(searchQuery, selectedRole)
 3142:  36:     }
 3143:  37:     return (
 3144:  38:         <div className="space-y-6 pb-20">
 3145:  39:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
 3146:  40:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 3147:  41:                     <div>
 3148:  42:                         <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 leading-tight">Quản lý</h1>
 3149:  43:                         <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs font-medium">Thành viên & tiến độ</p>
 3150:  44:                     </div>
 3151:  45:                     <select 
 3152:  46:                         value={selectedRole}
 3153:  47:                         onChange={(e) => setSelectedRole(e.target.value)}
 3154:  48:                         className="bg-black text-yellow-400 border-none rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-500 outline-none shadow-lg cursor-pointer"
 3155:  49:                     >
 3156:  50:                         <option value="ALL">Tất cả</option>
 3157:  51:                         <option value="STUDENT">Học viên</option>
 3158:  52:                         <option value="ADMIN">Quản trị</option>
 3159:  53:                         <option value="INSTRUCTOR">Giảng viên</option>
 3160:  54:                         <option value="AFFILIATE">Đối tác</option>
 3161:  55:                         <option value="COURSE_86_DAYS">Coach 1:1</option>
 3162:  56:                     </select>
 3163:  57:                 </div>
 3164:  58:                 <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="relative w-full">
 3165:  59:                     <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
 3166:  60:                     <input
 3167:  61:                         type="text"
 3168:  62:                         placeholder="Tìm Tên, SĐT hoặc #ID..."
 3169:  63:                         className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500 shadow-sm text-sm"
 3170:  64:                         value={searchQuery}
 3171:  65:                         onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
 3172:  66:                     />
 3173:  67:                 </form>
 3174:  68:             </div>
 3175:  69:             <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm">
 3176:  70:                 <div className="w-full">
 3177:  71:                     <table className="w-full text-left border-collapse table-fixed">
 3178:  72:                         <thead>
 3179:  73:                             <tr className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
 3180:  74:                                 <th className="px-2 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center w-14 border-r border-gray-100">ID</th>
 3181:  75:                                 <th className="px-3 py-3 text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest relative">
 3182:  76:                                     <div className="flex items-center">
 3183:  77:                                         <span>Thông tin cơ bản</span>
 3184:  78:                                         <div className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 flex items-center gap-1.5">
 3185:  79:                                             <div className="bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[9px] font-black border border-orange-200 shadow-sm">
 3186:  80:                                                 {students.length}
 3187:  81:                                             </div>
 3188:  82:                                             <button 
 3189:  83:                                                 onClick={toggleSort}
 3190:  84:                                                 className="flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors bg-gray-100 p-1 rounded-lg border border-gray-200"
 3191:  85:                                                 title={sortOrder === 'desc' ? 'Mới nhất lên đầu' : 'Cũ nhất lên đầu'}
 3192:  86:                                             >
 3193:  87:                                                 <ArrowUpDown className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 ${sortOrder === 'desc' ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-purple-600'}`} />
 3194:  88:                                             </button>
 3195:  89:                                         </div>
 3196:  90:                                     </div>
 3197:  91:                                 </th>
 3198:  92:                             </tr>
 3199:  93:                         </thead>
 3200:  94:                         <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
 3201:  95:                             {loading ? (
 3202:  96:                                 <tr>
 3203:  97:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
 3204:  98:                                         <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-purple-500 mx-auto mb-2" />
 3205:  99:                                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Đang tải...</p>
 3206: 100:                                     </td>
 3207: 101:                                 </tr>
 3208: 102:                             ) : students.length === 0 ? (
 3209: 103:                                 <tr>
 3210: 104:                                     <td colSpan={2} className="px-6 py-12 text-center text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase">
 3211: 105:                                         Trống
 3212: 106:                                     </td>
 3213: 107:                                 </tr>
 3214: 108:                             ) : (
 3215: 109:                                     students.map((student) => {
 3216: 110:                                         const hasCourseOne = student.enrollments.some((e: any) => e.courseId === 1)
 3217: 111:                                         return (
 3218: 112:                                             <tr key={student.id} className="hover:bg-orange-50/30 transition-colors">
 3219: 113:                                                 <td className="px-2 py-4 text-center align-top space-y-3">
 3220: 114:                                                     <div className="text-[10px] font-black font-mono text-gray-900 bg-gray-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded border border-gray-200">
 3221: 115:                                                         #{student.id}
 3222: 116:                                                     </div>
 3223: 117:                                                     <Link 
 3224: 118:                                                         href={`/admin/students/${student.id}`} 
 3225: 119:                                                         className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-black text-yellow-400 rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-800 active:scale-90 transition-all shadow-md"
 3226: 120:                                                     >
 3227: 121:                                                         <Info className="w-4 h-4" />
 3228: 122:                                                     </Link>
 3229: 123:                                                 </td>
 3230: 124:                                                 <td className="px-3 py-4 space-y-1 overflow-hidden">
 3231: 125:                                                     <div className={`font-black text-sm truncate leading-tight capitalize tracking-tight ${hasCourseOne ? 'text-purple-600' : 'text-orange-600'}`}>
 3232: 126:                                                         {student.name ? student.name.toLowerCase() : 'N/A'}
 3233: 127:                                                     </div>
 3234: 128:                                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-medium truncate">
 3235: 129:                                                         <Mail className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-300 shrink-0" />
 3236: 130:                                                         {student.email}
 3237: 131:                                                     </div>
 3238: 132:                                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold truncate">
 3239: 133:                                                         <Phone className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-300 shrink-0" />
 3240: 134:                                                         {student.phone || '---'}
 3241: 135:                                                     </div>
 3242: 136:                                                 </td>
 3243: 137:                                             </tr>
 3244: 138:                                         )
 3245: 139:                                     })
 3246: 140:                             )}
 3247: 141:                         </tbody>
 3248: 142:                     </table>
 3249: 143:                 </div>
 3250: 144:             </div>
 3251: 145:         </div>
 3252: 146:     )
 3253: 147: }
 3254: ````

 3256: ## File: app/api/courses/[id]/route.ts
 3257: ````typescript
 3258:  1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
 3259:  2: import prisma from '@/lib/prisma';
 3260:  3: import { auth } from '@/auth';
 3261:  4: import { Role } from '@prisma/client';
 3262:  5: export async function GET(
 3263:  6:   req: NextRequest,
 3264:  7:   { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
 3265:  8: ) {
 3266:  9:   try {
 3267: 10:     const session = await auth();
 3268: 11:     if (!session || session.user?.role !== Role.ADMIN) {
 3269: 12:       return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
 3270: 13:     }
 3271: 14:     const { id } = await params;
 3272: 15:     const course = await prisma.course.findUnique({
 3273: 16:       where: { id: parseInt(id) },
 3274: 17:       include: {
 3275: 18:         lessons: {
 3276: 19:           orderBy: { order: 'asc' }
 3277: 20:         }
 3278: 21:       }
 3279: 22:     });
 3280: 23:     if (!course) {
 3281: 24:       return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Course not found' }, { status: 404 });
 3282: 25:     }
 3283: 26:     return NextResponse.json(course);
 3284: 27:   } catch (error: any) {
 3285: 28:     return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
 3286: 29:   }
 3287: 30: }
 3288: ````
 3289: 
 3290: ## File: app/api/docs/route.ts
 3291: ````typescript
 3292:  1: import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
 3293:  2: export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
 3294:  3:   const url = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('url')
 3295:  4:   if (!url) {
 3296:  5:     return new Response('Missing URL', { status: 400 })
 3297:  6:   }
 3298:  7:   try {
 3299:  8:     const res = await fetch(url, {
 3300:  9:       headers: {
 3301: 10:         // Giả lập browser để Google không chặn
 3302: 11:         'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',
 3303: 12:       },
 3304: 13:       cache: 'no-store',
 3305: 14:     })
 3306: 15:     if (!res.ok) {
 3307: 16:       return new Response('Failed to fetch document', { status: 500 })
 3308: 17:     }
 3309: 18:     const html = await res.text()
 3310: 19:     return new Response(html, {
 3311: 20:       headers: {
 3312: 21:         'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
 3313: 22:       },
 3314: 23:     })
 3315: 24:   } catch (err) {
 3316: 25:     return new Response('Server error', { status: 500 })
 3317: 26:   }
 3318: 27: }
 3319: ````
 3320: 
 3321: ## File: app/api/upload/payment/route.ts
 3322: ````typescript
 3323:  1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
 3324:  2: import { writeFile, mkdir } from 'fs/promises'
 3325:  3: import path from 'path'
 3326:  4: import { existsSync } from 'fs'
 3327:  5: export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
 3328:  6:   try {
 3329:  7:     const formData = await request.formData()
 3330:  8:     const file = formData.get('file') as File | null
 3331:  9:     if (!file) {
 3332: 10:       return NextResponse.json(
 3333: 11:         { error: 'No file uploaded' },
 3334: 12:         { status: 400 }
 3335: 13:       )
 3336: 14:     }
 3337: 15:     const bytes = await file.arrayBuffer()
 3338: 16:     const buffer = Buffer.from(bytes)
 3339: 17:     const uploadDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'public', 'uploads')
 3340: 18:     if (!existsSync(uploadDir)) {
 3341: 19:       await mkdir(uploadDir, { recursive: true })
 3342: 20:     }
 3343: 21:     const uniqueSuffix = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}`
 3344: 22:     const ext = file.name.split('.').pop() || 'jpg'
 3345: 23:     const filename = `payment-${uniqueSuffix}.${ext}`
 3346: 24:     const filepath = path.join(uploadDir, filename)
 3347: 25:     await writeFile(filepath, buffer)
 3348: 26:     const url = `/uploads/${filename}`
 3349: 27:     return NextResponse.json({ url, filename })
 3350: 28:   } catch (error) {
 3351: 29:     console.error('Upload error:', error)
 3352: 30:     return NextResponse.json(
 3353: 31:       { error: 'Upload failed' },
 3354: 32:       { status: 500 }
 3355: 33:     )
 3356: 34:   }
 3357: 35: }
 3358: ````

 3360: ## File: app/courses/[id]/learn/error.tsx
 3361: ````typescript
 3362:  1: 'use client'
 3363:  2: import { useEffect } from 'react'
 3364:  3: import { AlertCircle, RefreshCcw, Home } from 'lucide-react'
 3365:  4: import Link from 'next/link'
 3366:  5: export default function CourseLearnError({
 3367:  6:   error,
 3368:  7:   reset,
 3369:  8: }: {
 3370:  9:   error: Error & { digest?: string }
 3371: 10:   reset: () => void
 3372: 11: }) {
 3373: 12:   useEffect(() => {
 3374: 13:     // Log lỗi ra console để bạn xem được trong F12 trình duyệt (nếu là client error)
 3375: 14:     // Hoặc gửi về hệ thống giám sát lỗi
 3376: 15:     console.error('Course Learn Page Error:', error)
 3377: 16:   }, [error])
 3378: 17:   return (
 3379: 18:     <div className="min-h-screen bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 text-center">
 3380: 19:       <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-red-500/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
 3381: 20:         <AlertCircle className="w-10 h-10 text-red-500" />
 3382: 21:       </div>
 3383: 22:       <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Đã xảy ra lỗi hệ thống</h2>
 3384: 23:       <p className="text-zinc-400 text-sm max-w-md mb-8">
 3385: 24:         Hệ thống không thể tải nội dung bài học. Điều này có thể do phiên đăng nhập hết hạn hoặc dữ liệu khóa học gặp sự cố.
 3386: 25:       </p>
 3387: 26:       {error.digest && (
 3388: 27:         <div className="mb-8 px-4 py-2 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg">
 3389: 28:           <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 font-mono">Mã lỗi (Digest): {error.digest}</p>
 3390: 29:         </div>
 3391: 30:       )}
 3392: 31:       <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
 3393: 32:         <button
 3394: 33:           onClick={() => reset()}
 3395: 34:           className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all"
 3396: 35:         >
 3397: 36:           <RefreshCcw className="w-4 h-4" /> Thử lại ngay
 3398: 37:         </button>
 3399: 38:         <Link
 3400: 39:           href="/"
 3401: 40:           className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white font-bold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all"
 3402: 41:         >
 3403: 42:           <Home className="w-4 h-4" /> Quay về trang chủ
 3404: 43:         </Link>
 3405: 44:       </div>
 3406: 45:       <p className="mt-12 text-xs text-zinc-600 italic">
 3407: 46:         Nếu lỗi vẫn tiếp tục, vui lòng liên hệ Ban quản trị để được hỗ trợ.
 3408: 47:       </p>
 3409: 48:     </div>
 3410: 49:   )
 3411: 50: }
 3412: ````

 3414: ## File: app/register/page.tsx
 3415: ````typescript
 3416:   1: 'use client'
 3417:   2: import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"
 3418:   3: import { useState } from "react"
 3419:   4: import Link from "next/link"
 3420:   5: import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
 3421:   6: import { Loader2, Eye, EyeOff } from "lucide-react"
 3422:   7: import { registerUser } from "../actions/auth-actions"
 3423:   8: export default function RegisterPage() {
 3424:   9:     const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
 3425:  10:     const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
 3426:  11:     const [fieldErrors, setFieldErrors] = useState<Record<string, string[]> | null>(null)
 3427:  12:     const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false)
 3428:  13:     const router = useRouter()
 3429:  14:     const { register, handleSubmit, formState: { errors } } = useForm({
 3430:  15:         defaultValues: {
 3431:  16:             name: "",
 3432:  17:             email: "",
 3433:  18:             phone: "",
 3434:  19:             password: ""
 3435:  20:         }
 3436:  21:     })
 3437:  22:     async function onSubmit(data: any) {
 3438:  23:         setIsLoading(true)
 3439:  24:         setError(null)
 3440:  25:         setFieldErrors(null)
 3441:  26:         try {
 3442:  27:             const formData = new FormData()
 3443:  28:             formData.append("name", data.name)
 3444:  29:             formData.append("email", data.email)
 3445:  30:             formData.append("phone", data.phone)
 3446:  31:             formData.append("password", data.password)
 3447:  32:             // We call the server action directly here, but managing state manually 
 3448:  33:             // since we aren't using useFormState (React 19 feature, but next-auth guidelines often use client side wrappers)
 3449:  34:             // Actually, since this is a client component, we can just await the action.
 3450:  35:             // But `registerUser` redirects on success, so we might need to catch that?
 3451:  36:             // Wait, `registerUser` calls `redirect`. Next.js redirects throw an error in try/catch blocks unless handled specificially.
 3452:  37:             // But typically server actions with redirect are safe to call if we don't catch the redirect error.
 3453:  38:             // However, since we are in a client event handler, we need to be careful.
 3454:  39:             // Let's wrapping it.
 3455:  40:             const result = await registerUser(null, formData)
 3456:  41:             if (result?.message || result?.errors) {
 3457:  42:                 if (result.errors) {
 3458:  43:                     setFieldErrors(result.errors)
 3459:  44:                 }
 3460:  45:                 if (result.message) {
 3461:  46:                     setError(result.message)
 3462:  47:                 }
 3463:  48:             }
 3464:  49:             // If it redirects, the code below won't execute effectively (or at least the page changes)
 3465:  50:         } catch (err: any) {
 3466:  51:             // Next.js NEXT_REDIRECT error check
 3467:  52:             //   if (err.message === "NEXT_REDIRECT") throw err
 3468:  53:             // Actually for client components calling server actions, the redirect happens automatically. 
 3469:  54:             // But if we use `try/catch`, we might catch the redirect error.
 3470:  55:             // Best practice: Check if error is digest NEXT_REDIRECT
 3471:  56:             // but usually server actions are robust.
 3472:  57:         } finally {
 3473:  58:             setIsLoading(false)
 3474:  59:         }
 3475:  60:     }
 3476:  61:     return (
 3477:  62:         <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-gray-50 p-4">
 3478:  63:             <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-8 rounded-xl bg-white p-8 shadow-lg">
 3479:  64:                 <div className="text-center">
 3480:  65:                     <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900">Create an account</h2>
 3481:  66:                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
 3482:  67:                         Join BRK Academy today
 3483:  68:                     </p>
 3484:  69:                 </div>
 3485:  70:                 <div className="space-y-4">
 3486:  71:                     <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
 3487:  72:                         {error && (
 3488:  73:                             <div className="rounded-md bg-red-50 p-3 text-sm text-red-500">
 3489:  74:                                 {error}
 3490:  75:                             </div>
 3491:  76:                         )}
 3492:  77:                         <div>
 3493:  78:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
 3494:  79:                                 Full Name
 3495:  80:                             </label>
 3496:  81:                             <input
 3497:  82:                                 {...register("name", { required: "Name is required" })}
 3498:  83:                                 type="text"
 3499:  84:                                 className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-indigo-500"
 3500:  85:                             />
 3501:  86:                             {errors.name && (
 3502:  87:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{errors.name.message}</p>
 3503:  88:                             )}
 3504:  89:                             {fieldErrors?.name && (
 3505:  90:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{fieldErrors.name[0]}</p>
 3506:  91:                             )}
 3507:  92:                         </div>
 3508:  93:                         <div>
 3509:  94:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
 3510:  95:                                 Email
 3511:  96:                             </label>
 3512:  97:                             <input
 3513:  98:                                 {...register("email", {
 3514:  99:                                     required: "Email is required",
 3515: 100:                                     pattern: { value: /^\S+@\S+$/i, message: "Invalid email" }
 3516: 101:                                 })}
 3517: 102:                                 type="email"
 3518: 103:                                 className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-indigo-500"
 3519: 104:                             />
 3520: 105:                             {errors.email && (
 3521: 106:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{errors.email.message}</p>
 3522: 107:                             )}
 3523: 108:                             {fieldErrors?.email && (
 3524: 109:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{fieldErrors.email[0]}</p>
 3525: 110:                             )}
 3526: 111:                         </div>
 3527: 112:                         <div>
 3528: 113:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
 3529: 114:                                 Phone Number
 3530: 115:                             </label>
 3531: 116:                             <input
 3532: 117:                                 {...register("phone", { required: "Phone is required" })}
 3533: 118:                                 type="tel"
 3534: 119:                                 className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-indigo-500"
 3535: 120:                             />
 3536: 121:                             {errors.phone && (
 3537: 122:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{errors.phone.message}</p>
 3538: 123:                             )}
 3539: 124:                             {fieldErrors?.phone && (
 3540: 125:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{fieldErrors.phone[0]}</p>
 3541: 126:                             )}
 3542: 127:                         </div>
 3543: 128:                         <div>
 3544: 129:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">
 3545: 130:                                 Password
 3546: 131:                             </label>
 3547: 132:                             <div className="relative">
 3548: 133:                                 <input
 3549: 134:                                     {...register("password", {
 3550: 135:                                         required: "Password is required",
 3551: 136:                                         minLength: { value: 6, message: "Min 6 characters" }
 3552: 137:                                     })}
 3553: 138:                                     type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
 3554: 139:                                     className="mt-1 block w-full rounded-md border border-gray-300 px-3 py-2 pr-10 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-indigo-500"
 3555: 140:                                 />
 3556: 141:                                 <button
 3557: 142:                                     type="button"
 3558: 143:                                     onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
 3559: 144:                                     className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
 3560: 145:                                 >
 3561: 146:                                     {showPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-5 w-5" /> : <Eye className="h-5 w-5" />}
 3562: 147:                                 </button>
 3563: 148:                             </div>
 3564: 149:                             {errors.password && (
 3565: 150:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{errors.password.message}</p>
 3566: 151:                             )}
 3567: 152:                             {fieldErrors?.password && (
 3568: 153:                                 <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-500">{fieldErrors.password[0]}</p>
 3569: 154:                             )}
 3570: 155:                         </div>
 3571: 156:                         <button
 3572: 157:                             type="submit"
 3573: 158:                             disabled={isLoading}
 3574: 159:                             className="flex w-full justify-center rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50"
 3575: 160:                         >
 3576: 161:                             {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="animate-spin" /> : "Sign up"}
 3577: 162:                         </button>
 3578: 163:                     </form>
 3579: 164:                     <p className="text-center text-sm text-gray-600">
 3580: 165:                         Already have an account?{" "}
 3581: 166:                         <Link href="/login" className="font-medium text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-500">
 3582: 167:                             Sign in
 3583: 168:                         </Link>
 3584: 169:                     </p>
 3585: 170:                 </div>
 3586: 171:             </div>
 3587: 172:         </div>
 3588: 173:     )
 3589: 174: }
 3590: ````
