 3592: ## File: components/admin/roadmap/CustomNodes.tsx
 3593: ````typescript
 3594:  1: import React, { memo } from 'react';
 3595:  2: import { Handle, Position } from '@xyflow/react';
 3596:  3: // 1. Node Câu hỏi (Màu cam)
 3597:  4: export const QuestionNode = memo(({ data }: any) => {
 3598:  5:   return (
 3599:  6:     <div className="px-4 py-2 shadow-md rounded-md bg-orange-50 border-2 border-orange-500 min-w-[200px]">
 3600:  7:       <div className="flex items-center">
 3601:  8:         <div className="rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-orange-500 text-white mr-2">
 3602:  9:           ❓
 3603: 10:         </div>
 3604: 11:         <div className="ml-2">
 3605: 12:           <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-orange-500 uppercase">Câu hỏi</div>
 3606: 13:           <div className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800">{data.label || 'Chưa có nội dung'}</div>
 3607: 14:         </div>
 3608: 15:       </div>
 3609: 16:       <Handle type="target" position={Position.Top} className="w-3 h-3 bg-orange-500" />
 3610: 17:       <Handle type="source" position={Position.Bottom} className="w-3 h-3 bg-orange-500" />
 3611: 18:     </div>
 3612: 19:   );
 3613: 20: });
 3614: 21: // 2. Node Đáp án (Màu xám)
 3615: 22: export const OptionNode = memo(({ data }: any) => {
 3616: 23:   return (
 3617: 24:     <div className="px-4 py-2 shadow-md rounded-md bg-gray-50 border-2 border-gray-400 min-w-[150px]">
 3618: 25:       <div className="flex items-center">
 3619: 26:         <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">{data.label || 'Nhập đáp án...'}</div>
 3620: 27:       </div>
 3621: 28:       <Handle type="target" position={Position.Top} className="w-3 h-3 bg-gray-400" />
 3622: 29:       <Handle type="source" position={Position.Bottom} className="w-3 h-3 bg-gray-400" />
 3623: 30:     </div>
 3624: 31:   );
 3625: 32: });
 3626: 33: // 3. Node Khóa học (Màu tím)
 3627: 34: export const CourseNode = memo(({ data }: any) => {
 3628: 35:   return (
 3629: 36:     <div className="px-4 py-2 shadow-md rounded-md bg-purple-50 border-2 border-purple-600 min-w-[200px]">
 3630: 37:       <div className="flex items-center">
 3631: 38:         <div className="rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-purple-600 text-white mr-2">
 3632: 39:           🎓
 3633: 40:         </div>
 3634: 41:         <div className="ml-2">
 3635: 42:           <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-purple-600 uppercase">Khóa học cấp ra</div>
 3636: 43:           <div className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800">{data.courseName || 'Chọn khóa học...'}</div>
 3637: 44:         </div>
 3638: 45:       </div>
 3639: 46:       <Handle type="target" position={Position.Top} className="w-3 h-3 bg-purple-600" />
 3640: 47:     </div>
 3641: 48:   );
 3642: 49: });
 3643: 50: // 4. Node Video/Tư vấn (Màu xanh dương)
 3644: 51: export const AdviceNode = memo(({ data }: any) => {
 3645: 52:   return (
 3646: 53:     <div className="px-4 py-2 shadow-md rounded-md bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-500 min-w-[200px]">
 3647: 54:       <div className="flex items-center">
 3648: 55:         <div className="rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center bg-blue-500 text-white mr-2">
 3649: 56:           💡
 3650: 57:         </div>
 3651: 58:         <div className="ml-2">
 3652: 59:           <div className="text-[10px] font-bold text-blue-500 uppercase">Video tư vấn</div>
 3653: 60:           <div className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800">{data.label || 'Dán link video...'}</div>
 3654: 61:         </div>
 3655: 62:       </div>
 3656: 63:       <Handle type="target" position={Position.Top} className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-500" />
 3657: 64:     </div>
 3658: 65:   );
 3659: 66: });
 3660: 67: QuestionNode.displayName = 'QuestionNode';
 3661: 68: OptionNode.displayName = 'OptionNode';
 3662: 69: CourseNode.displayName = 'CourseNode';
 3663: 70: AdviceNode.displayName = 'AdviceNode';
 3664: ````
 3665: 
 3666: ## File: components/course/PaymentModal.tsx
 3667: ````typescript
 3668:   1: 'use client'
 3669:   2: import React, { useState } from 'react'
 3670:   3: import Image from 'next/image'
 3671:   4: import UploadProofModal from '@/components/payment/UploadProofModal'
 3672:   5: interface PaymentModalProps {
 3673:   6:     course: any
 3674:   7:     enrollment?: {
 3675:   8:         id?: number
 3676:   9:         status: string
 3677:  10:         payment?: {
 3678:  11:             id?: number
 3679:  12:             status: string
 3680:  13:             proofImage?: string | null
 3681:  14:             verifyMethod?: string | null
 3682:  15:             verifiedAt?: string | null
 3683:  16:             qrCodeUrl?: string | null
 3684:  17:             transferContent?: string | null
 3685:  18:             amount?: number | null
 3686:  19:             bankName?: string | null
 3687:  20:             accountNumber?: string | null
 3688:  21:         }
 3689:  22:     } | null
 3690:  23:     isCourseOneActive?: boolean
 3691:  24:     userPhone?: string | null
 3692:  25:     userId?: number | null
 3693:  26:     onClose: () => void
 3694:  27:     onUploadProof?: (enrollmentId: number) => void
 3695:  28: }
 3696:  29: export default function PaymentModal({ course, enrollment, isCourseOneActive = false, userPhone = null, userId = null, onClose, onUploadProof }: PaymentModalProps) {
 3697:  30:     const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false)
 3698:  31:     const [showFullQR, setShowFullQR] = useState(false)
 3699:  32:     const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false)
 3700:  33:     const [uploaded, setUploaded] = useState(!!enrollment?.payment?.proofImage)
 3701:  34:     const payment = enrollment?.payment
 3702:  35:     const paymentStatus = payment?.status
 3703:  36:     const isVerified = paymentStatus === 'VERIFIED'
 3704:  37:     const isPending = paymentStatus === 'PENDING' || paymentStatus === undefined
 3705:  38:     // QR từ VietQR API hoặc fallback
 3706:  39:     const effectiveAmount = isCourseOneActive ? 0 : (payment?.amount || course.phi_coc || 0)
 3707:  40:     // Format nội dung thống nhất với lib/vietqr: SDT [6_cuối] HV [userId] COC [courseCode]
 3708:  41:     const cleanPhone = userPhone ? userPhone.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-6) : ''
 3709:  42:     const effectiveContent = payment?.transferContent || `SDT ${cleanPhone} HV ${userId} COC ${course.id_khoa}`.toUpperCase().slice(0, 50)
 3710:  43:     // Mã BIN ngân hàng (Sacombank mặc định)
 3711:  44:     const bankMap: Record<string, string> = { 'SACOMBANK': '970403', 'VCB': '970436', 'ACB': '970416', 'MB': '970422', 'TCB': '970407' }
 3712:  45:     const bankId = bankMap[course.bank_stk?.toUpperCase()] || '970403'
 3713:  46:     const qrCodeUrl = payment?.qrCodeUrl || course.link_qrcode || `https://img.vietqr.io/image/${bankId}-${course.stk}-qr_only.png?amount=${effectiveAmount}&addInfo=${encodeURIComponent(effectiveContent)}&accountName=${encodeURIComponent(course.name_stk || '')}`
 3714:  47:     const handleUploadSuccess = () => {
 3715:  48:         setUploaded(true)
 3716:  49:         window.location.reload()
 3717:  50:     }
 3718:  51:     const handleUploadClick = () => {
 3719:  52:         setShowUploadModal(true)
 3720:  53:     }
 3721:  54:     return (
 3722:  55:         <>
 3723:  56:             <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-2 sm:p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
 3724:  57:             <div className="relative w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[95vh] flex flex-col animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-200 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl sm:rounded-3xl bg-white shadow-2xl">
 3725:  58:                 {/* Header Tím - Cố định */}
 3726:  59:                 <div className="bg-[#7c3aed] px-4 py-3 sm:px-6 sm:py-3 text-white shrink-0">
 3727:  60:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 3728:  61:                         <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pr-4">
 3729:  62:                             <h2 className="text-base sm:text-lg font-bold leading-tight truncate">Kích hoạt khóa học</h2>
 3730:  63:                             <p className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs text-purple-100 italic opacity-90 truncate">{course.name_lop}</p>
 3731:  64:                         </div>
 3732:  65:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 3733:  66:                             {enrollment?.payment && (
 3734:  67:                                 <div className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold shrink-0 ${
 3735:  68:                                     isVerified 
 3736:  69:                                         ? 'bg-green-500 text-white' 
 3737:  70:                                         : 'bg-yellow-500 text-white'
 3738:  71:                                 }`}>
 3739:  72:                                     {isVerified ? '✓ Xong' : '⏳ Chờ'}
 3740:  73:                                 </div>
 3741:  74:                             )}
 3742:  75:                             <button
 3743:  76:                                 onClick={onClose}
 3744:  77:                                 className="px-3 py-1 bg-white/20 hover:bg-white/30 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-colors border border-white/30"
 3745:  78:                             >
 3746:  79:                                 Để sau
 3747:  80:                             </button>
 3748:  81:                         </div>
 3749:  82:                     </div>
 3750:  83:                 </div>
 3751:  84:                 {/* Nội dung có thể cuộn */}
 3752:  85:                 <div className="overflow-y-auto flex-1 custom-scrollbar">
 3753:  86:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:gap-6 p-4 sm:p-6">
 3754:  87:                         {/* Cột trái: QR Code */}
 3755:  88:                         <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center">
 3756:  89:                             <div 
 3757:  90:                                 onClick={() => setShowFullQR(true)}
 3758:  91:                                 className="group relative cursor-zoom-in"
 3759:  92:                                 title="Nhấn để phóng to mã QR"
 3760:  93:                             >
 3761:  94:                                 <div className="relative mb-2 h-40 w-40 sm:h-48 sm:w-48 overflow-hidden rounded-xl border-2 border-purple-100 p-1 shadow-inner bg-white group-hover:border-purple-300 transition-colors">
 3762:  95:                                     <Image
 3763:  96:                                         src={qrCodeUrl}
 3764:  97:                                         alt="QR Code Thanh toán"
 3765:  98:                                         fill
 3766:  99:                                         className="object-contain"
 3767: 100:                                     />
 3768: 101:                                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/0 group-hover:bg-black/5 flex items-center justify-center transition-all">
 3769: 102:                                         <span className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 bg-white/90 text-[#7c3aed] text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full shadow-sm">
 3770: 103:                                             🔍 Phóng to
 3771: 104:                                         </span>
 3772: 105:                                     </div>
 3773: 106:                                 </div>
 3774: 107:                             </div>
 3775: 108:                             <p className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">
 3776: 109:                                 Nhấn vào mã QR để phóng to/tải về
 3777: 110:                             </p>
 3778: 111:                         </div>
 3779: 112:                         {/* Cột phải: Thông tin STK */}
 3780: 113:                         <div className="flex flex-col justify-center space-y-2 sm:space-y-2.5">
 3781: 114:                             <div className="rounded-xl bg-gray-50 px-3 py-1.5 border border-gray-100">
 3782: 115:                                 <p className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase">Tiền cọc cam kết:</p>
 3783: 116:                                 <p className="text-lg sm:text-xl font-black text-[#7c3aed]">
 3784: 117:                                     {effectiveAmount?.toLocaleString()}đ
 3785: 118:                                 </p>
 3786: 119:                                 {isCourseOneActive && (
 3787: 120:                                     <p className="text-[9px] font-bold text-green-600 italic">
 3788: 121:                                         * Miễn phí (Đã có khóa 86 ngày)
 3789: 122:                                     </p>
 3790: 123:                                 )}
 3791: 124:                             </div>
 3792: 125:                             <div className="space-y-1.5 sm:space-y-2 px-1">
 3793: 126:                                 <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
 3794: 127:                                     <div className="flex flex-col">
 3795: 128:                                         <span className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase leading-none mb-0.5">Ngân hàng</span>
 3796: 129:                                         <span className="text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 truncate">{payment?.bankName || course.bank_stk || 'N/A'}</span>
 3797: 130:                                     </div>
 3798: 131:                                     <div className="flex flex-col">
 3799: 132:                                         <span className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase leading-none mb-0.5">Số tài khoản</span>
 3800: 133:                                         <span className="text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 select-all">{payment?.accountNumber || course.stk || 'N/A'}</span>
 3801: 134:                                     </div>
 3802: 135:                                 </div>
 3803: 136:                                 <div className="flex flex-col">
 3804: 137:                                     <span className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase leading-none mb-0.5">Chủ tài khoản</span>
 3805: 138:                                     <span className="text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold text-gray-800">{course.name_stk || 'N/A'}</span>
 3806: 139:                                 </div>
 3807: 140:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 3808: 141:                                     <span className="text-[9px] sm:text-[10px] font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase leading-none shrink-0">Nội dung:</span>
 3809: 142:                                     <span className="inline-block rounded bg-purple-50 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs sm:text-sm font-mono font-bold text-[#7c3aed] select-all border border-purple-100">
 3810: 143:                                         {effectiveContent}
 3811: 144:                                     </span>
 3812: 145:                                 </div>
 3813: 146:                             </div>
 3814: 147:                         </div>
 3815: 148:                     </div>
 3816: 149:                     {/* Trạng thái thanh toán */}
 3817: 150:                     {enrollment?.payment && (
 3818: 151:                         <div className="px-4 sm:px-6 pb-2">
 3819: 152:                             <div className={`rounded-xl p-3 ${
 3820: 153:                                 isVerified ? 'bg-green-50 border border-green-200' : 'bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200'
 3821: 154:                             }`}>
 3822: 155:                                 <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3">
 3823: 156:                                     <div>
 3824: 157:                                         <p className={`text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold ${isVerified ? 'text-green-700' : 'text-yellow-700'}`}>
 3825: 158:                                             {isVerified ? '✓ Đã xác nhận' : '⏳ Chờ xác nhận'}
 3826: 159:                                         </p>
 3827: 160:                                         {!isVerified && (
 3828: 161:                                             <p className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs text-yellow-600 mt-0.5">
 3829: 162:                                                 Chuyển khoản đúng nội dung hoặc upload biên lai
 3830: 163:                                             </p>
 3831: 164:                                         )}
 3832: 165:                                     </div>
 3833: 166:                                     {!isVerified && (
 3834: 167:                                         <button
 3835: 168:                                             onClick={handleUploadClick}
 3836: 169:                                             disabled={uploading}
 3837: 170:                                             className="w-full sm:w-auto px-3 py-1.5 bg-[#7c3aed] text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-[#6d28d9] transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
 3838: 171:                                         >
 3839: 172:                                             {uploading ? '...' : '📤 Upload biên lai'}
 3840: 173:                                         </button>
 3841: 174:                                     )}
 3842: 175:                                 </div>
 3843: 176:                             </div>
 3844: 177:                         </div>
 3845: 178:                     )}
 3846: 179:                     {/* Footer Tips - Đẩy lên cao hơn */}
 3847: 180:                     <div className="bg-orange-50 px-4 py-2 sm:px-6 sm:py-2 text-center shrink-0">
 3848: 181:                         <p className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium text-orange-700 leading-tight">
 3849: 182:                             🚀 Hệ thống sẽ tự động kích hoạt sau 10-15 phút khi nhận được chuyển khoản đúng nội dung.
 3850: 183:                         </p>
 3851: 184:                     </div>
 3852: 185:                 </div>
 3853: 186:             </div>
 3854: 187:         </div>
 3855: 188:         {showUploadModal && enrollment && enrollment.id && (
 3856: 189:             <UploadProofModal
 3857: 190:                 enrollmentId={enrollment.id}
 3858: 191:                 onClose={() => setShowUploadModal(false)}
 3859: 192:                 onSuccess={handleUploadSuccess}
 3860: 193:             />
 3861: 194:         )}
 3862: 195:         {/* Modal Phóng to QR */}
 3863: 196:         {showFullQR && (
 3864: 197:             <div 
 3865: 198:                 className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] bg-black/95 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-200"
 3866: 199:                 onClick={() => setShowFullQR(false)}
 3867: 200:             >
 3868: 201:                 <div className="relative w-full max-w-sm flex flex-col items-center" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
 3869: 202:                     <div className="relative aspect-square w-full bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-2xl">
 3870: 203:                         <Image
 3871: 204:                             src={qrCodeUrl}
 3872: 205:                             alt="QR Code Large"
 3873: 206:                             fill
 3874: 207:                             className="object-contain p-2"
 3875: 208:                         />
 3876: 209:                     </div>
 3877: 210:                     <div className="mt-6 flex gap-4 w-full px-2">
 3878: 211:                         <a 
 3879: 212:                             href={qrCodeUrl}
 3880: 213:                             download={`QR_Payment_${course.id_khoa}.png`}
 3881: 214:                             className="flex-1 bg-white text-black py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm text-center shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform"
 3882: 215:                         >
 3883: 216:                             📥 Tải ảnh
 3884: 217:                         </a>
 3885: 218:                         <button 
 3886: 219:                             onClick={() => setShowFullQR(false)}
 3887: 220:                             className="flex-1 bg-white/20 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm border border-white/30 backdrop-blur-md active:scale-95 transition-transform"
 3888: 221:                         >
 3889: 222:                             ✕ Đóng lại
 3890: 223:                         </button>
 3891: 224:                     </div>
 3892: 225:                     <p className="mt-4 text-white/60 text-[10px] text-center px-4">
 3893: 226:                         Sau khi tải ảnh, hãy mở ứng dụng Ngân hàng và quét mã QR từ thư viện ảnh của bạn.
 3894: 227:                     </p>
 3895: 228:                 </div>
 3896: 229:             </div>
 3897: 230:         )}
 3898: 231:         </>
 3899: 232:     )
 3900: 233: }
 3901: ````
 3902: 
 3903: ## File: components/home/CommunityBoard.tsx
 3904: ````typescript
 3905:   1: 'use client'
 3906:   2: import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
 3907:   3: import { getPostsAction } from '@/app/actions/post-actions'
 3908:   4: import PostCard from './PostCard'
 3909:   5: import PostDetailModal from './PostDetailModal'
 3910:   6: import { Newspaper, Loader2, PlusCircle, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, ArrowRightCircle, ArrowLeftCircle } from 'lucide-react'
 3911:   7: import Link from 'next/link'
 3912:   8: interface CommunityBoardProps {
 3913:   9:     isAdmin: boolean
 3914:  10: }
 3915:  11: export default function CommunityBoard({ isAdmin }: CommunityBoardProps) {
 3916:  12:     const [posts, setPosts] = useState<any[]>([])
 3917:  13:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 3918:  14:     const [selectedPostId, setSelectedPostId] = useState<string | null>(null)
 3919:  15:     // Quản lý trang (mỗi trang 5 bài)
 3920:  16:     const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(0)
 3921:  17:     const postsPerPage = 5
 3922:  18:     const fetchPosts = async () => {
 3923:  19:         setLoading(true)
 3924:  20:         const res = await getPostsAction()
 3925:  21:         if (res.success) {
 3926:  22:             setPosts(res.posts || [])
 3927:  23:         }
 3928:  24:         setLoading(false)
 3929:  25:     }
 3930:  26:     useEffect(() => {
 3931:  27:         fetchPosts()
 3932:  28:     }, [])
 3933:  29:     const totalPages = Math.ceil(posts.length / postsPerPage)
 3934:  30:     const startIndex = currentPage * postsPerPage
 3935:  31:     const currentVisiblePosts = posts.slice(startIndex, startIndex + postsPerPage)
 3936:  32:     const hasNextPage = currentPage < totalPages - 1
 3937:  33:     const hasPrevPage = currentPage > 0
 3938:  34:     const nextGroup = () => { if (hasNextPage) setCurrentPage(prev => prev + 1) }
 3939:  35:     const prevGroup = () => { if (hasPrevPage) setCurrentPage(prev => prev - 1) }
 3940:  36:     return (
 3941:  37:         <div className="space-y-6">
 3942:  38:             <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-2">
 3943:  39:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 3944:  40:                     <Newspaper className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
 3945:  41:                     <div>
 3946:  42:                         <h2 className="text-xl font-black text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-tight leading-none">Bảng tin</h2>
 3947:  43:                         <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase mt-1">Trang {currentPage + 1} / {totalPages || 1}</p>
 3948:  44:                     </div>
 3949:  45:                 </div>
 3950:  46:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 3951:  47:                     {/* Nút điều hướng */}
 3952:  48:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 p-1 rounded-xl border border-gray-200">
 3953:  49:                         <button 
 3954:  50:                             onClick={prevGroup}
 3955:  51:                             disabled={!hasPrevPage}
 3956:  52:                             className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white disabled:opacity-20 transition-all active:scale-90"
 3957:  53:                         >
 3958:  54:                             <ChevronLeft className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-900" />
 3959:  55:                         </button>
 3960:  56:                         <button 
 3961:  57:                             onClick={nextGroup}
 3962:  58:                             disabled={!hasNextPage}
 3963:  59:                             className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white disabled:opacity-20 transition-all active:scale-90"
 3964:  60:                         >
 3965:  61:                             <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-900" />
 3966:  62:                         </button>
 3967:  63:                     </div>
 3968:  64:                     {isAdmin && (
 3969:  65:                         <Link 
 3970:  66:                             href="/admin/posts" 
 3971:  67:                             className="bg-black text-yellow-400 p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all shadow-lg active:scale-95"
 3972:  68:                         >
 3973:  69:                             <PlusCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
 3974:  70:                         </Link>
 3975:  71:                     )}
 3976:  72:                 </div>
 3977:  73:             </div>
 3978:  74:             {loading ? (
 3979:  75:                 <div className="py-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-400 gap-2">
 3980:  76:                     <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-purple-500" />
 3981:  77:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">Đang cập nhật tin mới...</p>
 3982:  78:                 </div>
 3983:  79:             ) : posts.length === 0 ? (
 3984:  80:                 <div className="py-12 text-center bg-white rounded-[2.5rem] border-2 border-dashed border-gray-100 text-gray-400 mx-2">
 3985:  81:                     <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">Hộp thư đang trống</p>
 3986:  82:                 </div>
 3987:  83:             ) : (
 3988:  84:                 <div className="relative group">
 3989:  85:                     {/* Danh sách vuốt ngang */}
 3990:  86:                     <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-6 px-2 no-scrollbar scroll-smooth snap-x snap-mandatory">
 3991:  87:                         {/* Nút Quay lại ở đầu trang nếu không phải trang đầu */}
 3992:  88:                         {hasPrevPage && (
 3993:  89:                             <div className="flex-none w-[120px] snap-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3">
 3994:  90:                                 <button 
 3995:  91:                                     onClick={prevGroup}
 3996:  92:                                     className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-400 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-black hover:text-yellow-400 transition-all shadow-lg active:scale-90"
 3997:  93:                                 >
 3998:  94:                                     <ArrowLeftCircle className="w-8 h-8" />
 3999:  95:                                 </button>
 4000:  96:                                 <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest text-center">Quay lại</span>
 4001:  97:                             </div>
 4002:  98:                         )}
 4003:  99:                         {currentVisiblePosts.map((post) => (
 4004: 100:                             <div key={post.id} className="flex-none w-[85%] sm:w-[350px] snap-center">
 4005: 101:                                 <PostCard 
 4006: 102:                                     post={post} 
 4007: 103:                                     onClick={(p) => setSelectedPostId(p.id)} 
 4008: 104:                                 />
 4009: 105:                             </div>
 4010: 106:                         ))}
 4011: 107:                         {/* Nút Xem thêm ở cuối trang nếu còn bài */}
 4012: 108:                         {hasNextPage && (
 4013: 109:                             <div className="flex-none w-[150px] snap-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3">
 4014: 110:                                 <button 
 4015: 111:                                     onClick={nextGroup}
 4016: 112:                                     className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-purple-100 text-purple-600 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-purple-600 hover:text-white transition-all shadow-lg active:scale-90"
 4017: 113:                                 >
 4018: 114:                                     <ArrowRightCircle className="w-8 h-8" />
 4019: 115:                                 </button>
 4020: 116:                                 <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-purple-600 uppercase tracking-widest">Tiếp tục ({posts.length - (startIndex + postsPerPage)})</span>
 4021: 117:                             </div>
 4022: 118:                         )}
 4023: 119:                     </div>
 4024: 120:                 </div>
 4025: 121:             )}
 4026: 122:             {/* Modal Chi tiết */}
 4027: 123:             {selectedPostId && (
 4028: 124:                 <PostDetailModal 
 4029: 125:                     postId={selectedPostId} 
 4030: 126:                     onClose={() => setSelectedPostId(null)} 
 4031: 127:                 />
 4032: 128:             )}
 4033: 129:         </div>
 4034: 130:     )
 4035: 131: }
 4036: ````
 4037: 
 4038: ## File: components/home/CourseSection.tsx
 4039: ````typescript
 4040:   1: 'use client'
 4041:   2: import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
 4042:   3: import CourseCard from '@/components/course/CourseCard'
 4043:   4: import { ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Clock } from 'lucide-react'
 4044:   5: interface CourseSectionProps {
 4045:   6:     title: string
 4046:   7:     courses: any[]
 4047:   8:     session: any
 4048:   9:     enrollmentsMap: any
 4049:  10:     isCourseOneActive: boolean
 4050:  11:     userPhone: string | null
 4051:  12:     userId: number | null
 4052:  13:     darkMode?: boolean
 4053:  14:     accentColor?: string
 4054:  15: }
 4055:  16: export default function CourseSection({
 4056:  17:     title,
 4057:  18:     courses,
 4058:  19:     session,
 4059:  20:     enrollmentsMap,
 4060:  21:     isCourseOneActive,
 4061:  22:     userPhone,
 4062:  23:     userId,
 4063:  24:     darkMode = false,
 4064:  25:     accentColor = 'bg-blue-600'
 4065:  26: }: CourseSectionProps) {
 4066:  27:     const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false)
 4067:  28:     const [countdown, setCountdown] = useState(10)
 4068:  29:     const timerRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
 4069:  30:     const intervalRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
 4070:  31:     // Hàm reset bộ đếm thời gian
 4071:  32:     const resetTimer = () => {
 4072:  33:         if (timerRef.current) clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
 4073:  34:         if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current)
 4074:  35:         if (isExpanded) {
 4075:  36:             setCountdown(10)
 4076:  37:             // Đếm ngược số giây
 4077:  38:             intervalRef.current = setInterval(() => {
 4078:  39:                 setCountdown(prev => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : 0))
 4079:  40:             }, 1000)
 4080:  41:             // Thực hiện thu gọn sau 10 giây
 4081:  42:             timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
 4082:  43:                 setIsExpanded(false)
 4083:  44:             }, 10000)
 4084:  45:         }
 4085:  46:     }
 4086:  47:     useEffect(() => {
 4087:  48:         if (isExpanded) {
 4088:  49:             resetTimer()
 4089:  50:             const handleActivity = () => resetTimer()
 4090:  51:             window.addEventListener('scroll', handleActivity)
 4091:  52:             window.addEventListener('touchmove', handleActivity)
 4092:  53:             return () => {
 4093:  54:                 if (timerRef.current) clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
 4094:  55:                 if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current)
 4095:  56:                 window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleActivity)
 4096:  57:                 window.removeEventListener('touchmove', handleActivity)
 4097:  58:             }
 4098:  59:         }
 4099:  60:     }, [isExpanded])
 4100:  61:     // Chỉ hiển thị 3 khóa học đầu tiên nếu chưa nhấn "Xem thêm"
 4101:  62:     const visibleCourses = isExpanded ? courses : courses.slice(0, 3)
 4102:  63:     const hasMore = courses.length > 3
 4103:  64:     return (
 4104:  65:         <div className={`mb-12 rounded-3xl transition-all duration-500 ${darkMode ? '-mx-4 px-4 py-10 bg-zinc-950 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50' : ''}`}>
 4105:  66:             {/* Thông báo đếm ngược nổi */}
 4106:  67:             {isExpanded && (
 4107:  68:                 <div className="fixed top-20 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[100] animate-in slide-in-from-top-4 duration-300">
 4108:  69:                     <div className="bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md text-yellow-400 px-4 py-2 rounded-full border border-yellow-400/30 shadow-2xl flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest ring-4 ring-black/10">
 4109:  70:                         <Clock className="w-3 h-3 animate-pulse" />
 4110:  71:                         <span>Tự động thu gọn sau <span className="text-white text-xs">{countdown}</span> giây</span>
 4111:  72:                     </div>
 4112:  73:                 </div>
 4113:  74:             )}
 4114:  75:             <div className="mb-8 text-center">
 4115:  76:                 <h2 className={`text-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight ${darkMode ? 'text-white' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
 4116:  77:                     {title}
 4117:  78:                 </h2>
 4118:  79:                 <div className={`mx-auto mt-2 h-1 w-12 rounded-full ${accentColor}`}></div>
 4119:  80:             </div>
 4120:  81:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3">
 4121:  82:                 {visibleCourses.map((course: any, index: number) => (
 4122:  83:                     <div key={course.id} className="animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500" style={{ animationDelay: `${index * 50}ms` }}>
 4123:  84:                         <CourseCard
 4124:  85:                             course={course}
 4125:  86:                             isLoggedIn={!!session}
 4126:  87:                             enrollment={enrollmentsMap[course.id] || null}
 4127:  88:                             isCourseOneActive={isCourseOneActive}
 4128:  89:                             userPhone={userPhone}
 4129:  90:                             userId={userId}
 4130:  91:                             priority={index < 3}
 4131:  92:                             darkMode={darkMode}
 4132:  93:                         />
 4133:  94:                     </div>
 4134:  95:                 ))}
 4135:  96:             </div>
 4136:  97:             {hasMore && (
 4137:  98:                 <div className="mt-10 flex justify-center">
 4138:  99:                     <button
 4139: 100:                         onClick={() => setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)}
 4140: 101:                         className={`group flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-3 rounded-2xl font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg ${
 4141: 102:                             darkMode 
 4142: 103:                             ? 'bg-white text-black hover:bg-yellow-400' 
 4143: 104:                             : 'bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800'
 4144: 105:                         }`}
 4145: 106:                     >
 4146: 107:                         {isExpanded ? (
 4147: 108:                             <> Thu gọn <ChevronUp className="w-4 h-4" /> </>
 4148: 109:                         ) : (
 4149: 110:                             <> Xem thêm ({courses.length - 3}) <ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 animate-bounce group-hover:animate-none" /> </>
 4150: 111:                         )}
 4151: 112:                     </button>
 4152: 113:                 </div>
 4153: 114:             )}
 4154: 115:         </div>
 4155: 116:     )
 4156: 117: }
 4157: ````
 4158: 
 4159: ## File: components/home/PostCard.tsx
 4160: ````typescript
 4161:  1: 'use client'
 4162:  2: import React from 'react'
 4163:  3: import { MessageSquare, Clock, User as UserIcon } from 'lucide-react'
 4164:  4: import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns'
 4165:  5: import { vi } from 'date-fns/locale'
 4166:  6: interface PostCardProps {
 4167:  7:     post: any
 4168:  8:     onClick: (post: any) => void
 4169:  9: }
 4170: 10: export default function PostCard({ post, onClick }: PostCardProps) {
 4171: 11:     return (
 4172: 12:         <div 
 4173: 13:             onClick={() => onClick(post)}
 4174: 14:             className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-gray-100 shadow-lg shadow-gray-100/50 space-y-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
 4175: 15:         >
 4176: 16:             {post.image && (
 4177: 17:                 <div className="aspect-video w-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-gray-100">
 4178: 18:                     <img src={post.image} alt={post.title} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
 4179: 19:                 </div>
 4180: 20:             )}
 4181: 21:             <div className="space-y-2">
 4182: 22:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 4183: 23:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-[10px] font-black text-purple-600 uppercase tracking-widest">
 4184: 24:                         <UserIcon className="w-3 h-3" />
 4185: 25:                         <span>{post.author?.name || 'Admin'}</span>
 4186: 26:                     </div>
 4187: 27:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">
 4188: 28:                         <Clock className="w-3 h-3" />
 4189: 29:                         <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(post.createdAt), { addSuffix: true, locale: vi })}</span>
 4190: 30:                     </div>
 4191: 31:                 </div>
 4192: 32:                 <h3 className="font-black text-gray-900 text-lg leading-tight line-clamp-2 uppercase tracking-tight">
 4193: 33:                     {post.title}
 4194: 34:                 </h3>
 4195: 35:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm line-clamp-3 leading-relaxed">
 4196: 36:                     {post.content}
 4197: 37:                 </p>
 4198: 38:             </div>
 4199: 39:             <div className="pt-4 border-t border-gray-50 flex items-center justify-between text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">
 4200: 40:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
 4201: 41:                     <MessageSquare className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-blue-500" />
 4202: 42:                     <span>{post._count?.comments || 0} bình luận</span>
 4203: 43:                 </div>
 4204: 44:                 <span className="text-purple-600">Xem chi tiết →</span>
 4205: 45:             </div>
 4206: 46:         </div>
 4207: 47:     )
 4208: 48: }
 4209: ````
 4210: 
 4211: ## File: components/home/PostDetailModal.tsx
 4212: ````typescript
 4213:   1: 'use client'
 4214:   2: import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
 4215:   3: import { X, Send, User as UserIcon, Clock, MessageCircle, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react'
 4216:   4: import { getPostDetailAction, commentOnPostAction } from '@/app/actions/post-actions'
 4217:   5: import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns'
 4218:   6: import { vi } from 'date-fns/locale'
 4219:   7: interface PostDetailModalProps {
 4220:   8:     postId: string
 4221:   9:     onClose: () => void
 4222:  10: }
 4223:  11: export default function PostDetailModal({ postId, onClose }: PostDetailModalProps) {
 4224:  12:     const [post, setPost] = useState<any>(null)
 4225:  13:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 4226:  14:     const [comment, setComment] = useState('')
 4227:  15:     const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false)
 4228:  16:     const fetchDetail = async () => {
 4229:  17:         setLoading(true)
 4230:  18:         const res = await getPostDetailAction(postId)
 4231:  19:         if (res.success) {
 4232:  20:             setPost(res.post)
 4233:  21:         }
 4234:  22:         setLoading(false)
 4235:  23:     }
 4236:  24:     useEffect(() => {
 4237:  25:         fetchDetail()
 4238:  26:     }, [postId])
 4239:  27:     const handleComment = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 4240:  28:         e.preventDefault()
 4241:  29:         if (!comment.trim() || submitting) return
 4242:  30:         setSubmitting(true)
 4243:  31:         const res = await commentOnPostAction(postId, comment)
 4244:  32:         if (res.success) {
 4245:  33:             setComment('')
 4246:  34:             fetchDetail() // Refresh comments
 4247:  35:         } else {
 4248:  36:             alert(res.error)
 4249:  37:         }
 4250:  38:         setSubmitting(false)
 4251:  39:     }
 4252:  40:     return (
 4253:  41:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4" onClick={onClose}>
 4254:  42:             <div className="bg-white w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] rounded-[2.5rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl flex flex-col animate-in zoom-in-95 duration-200" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
 4255:  43:                 {/* Header */}
 4256:  44:                 <div className="bg-black p-5 text-white flex justify-between items-center shrink-0">
 4257:  45:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 4258:  46:                         <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-yellow-400 flex items-center justify-center text-black font-black">
 4259:  47:                             BRK
 4260:  48:                         </div>
 4261:  49:                         <div>
 4262:  50:                             <h3 className="font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-yellow-400">Bảng tin cộng đồng</h3>
 4263:  51:                             <p className="text-[9px] opacity-60 font-bold uppercase">Chi tiết bài viết & thảo luận</p>
 4264:  52:                         </div>
 4265:  53:                     </div>
 4266:  54:                     <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-full transition-colors"><X className="w-6 h-6" /></button>
 4267:  55:                 </div>
 4268:  56:                 {loading ? (
 4269:  57:                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-gray-400 gap-2">
 4270:  58:                         <Loader2 className="w-8 h-8 animate-spin text-purple-500" />
 4271:  59:                         <p className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Đang tải bài viết...</p>
 4272:  60:                     </div>
 4273:  61:                 ) : post ? (
 4274:  62:                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
 4275:  63:                         {/* Post Content */}
 4276:  64:                         <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 custom-scrollbar space-y-6">
 4277:  65:                             <div className="space-y-4">
 4278:  66:                                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 4279:  67:                                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 4280:  68:                                         <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-purple-100 flex items-center justify-center text-purple-600 font-bold text-xs">
 4281:  69:                                             {post.author?.name?.charAt(0) || 'A'}
 4282:  70:                                         </div>
 4283:  71:                                         <div>
 4284:  72:                                             <p className="text-xs font-black text-gray-900">{post.author?.name || 'Admin'}</p>
 4285:  73:                                             <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">
 4286:  74:                                                 {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(post.createdAt), { addSuffix: true, locale: vi })}
 4287:  75:                                             </p>
 4288:  76:                                         </div>
 4289:  77:                                     </div>
 4290:  78:                                 </div>
 4291:  79:                                 <h2 className="text-2xl font-black text-gray-900 leading-tight uppercase tracking-tight">
 4292:  80:                                     {post.title}
 4293:  81:                                 </h2>
 4294:  82:                                 {post.image && (
 4295:  83:                                     <div className="rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-100">
 4296:  84:                                         <img src={post.image} alt={post.title} className="w-full h-auto" />
 4297:  85:                                     </div>
 4298:  86:                                 )}
 4299:  87:                                 <div className="text-gray-600 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap font-medium">
 4300:  88:                                     {post.content}
 4301:  89:                                 </div>
 4302:  90:                             </div>
 4303:  91:                             {/* Comments Section */}
 4304:  92:                             <div className="pt-10 space-y-6 border-t border-gray-100">
 4305:  93:                                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 4306:  94:                                     <MessageCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-500" />
 4307:  95:                                     <h4 className="text-sm font-black text-gray-900 uppercase tracking-widest">
 4308:  96:                                         Thảo luận ({post.comments?.length || 0})
 4309:  97:                                     </h4>
 4310:  98:                                 </div>
 4311:  99:                                 <div className="space-y-4">
 4312: 100:                                     {post.comments?.map((c: any) => (
 4313: 101:                                         <div key={c.id} className="flex gap-3 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left-2">
 4314: 102:                                             <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-black shrink-0">
 4315: 103:                                                 {c.user?.name?.charAt(0) || '?'}
 4316: 104:                                             </div>
 4317: 105:                                             <div className="bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none flex-1">
 4318: 106:                                                 <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1">
 4319: 107:                                                     <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-900">{c.user?.name}</span>
 4320: 108:                                                     <span className="text-[8px] text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase">
 4321: 109:                                                         {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(c.createdAt), { locale: vi })}
 4322: 110:                                                     </span>
 4323: 111:                                                 </div>
 4324: 112:                                                 <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 leading-relaxed font-medium">{c.content}</p>
 4325: 113:                                             </div>
 4326: 114:                                         </div>
 4327: 115:                                     ))}
 4328: 116:                                     {post.comments?.length === 0 && (
 4329: 117:                                         <p className="text-center py-4 text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter">
 4330: 118:                                             Chưa có thảo luận nào. Hãy là người đầu tiên!
 4331: 119:                                         </p>
 4332: 120:                                     )}
 4333: 121:                                 </div>
 4334: 122:                             </div>
 4335: 123:                         </div>
 4336: 124:                         {/* Comment Input */}
 4337: 125:                         <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-100 shrink-0">
 4338: 126:                             <form onSubmit={handleComment} className="flex gap-2 bg-white p-1 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-purple-500 transition-all">
 4339: 127:                                 <input 
 4340: 128:                                     type="text" 
 4341: 129:                                     value={comment}
 4342: 130:                                     onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
 4343: 131:                                     placeholder="Viết cảm nghĩ của bạn..." 
 4344: 132:                                     className="flex-1 bg-transparent px-4 py-2 text-xs font-bold outline-none"
 4345: 133:                                 />
 4346: 134:                                 <button 
 4347: 135:                                     type="submit"
 4348: 136:                                     disabled={!comment.trim() || submitting}
 4349: 137:                                     className="w-10 h-10 bg-black text-yellow-400 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-zinc-800 active:scale-90 transition-all disabled:opacity-30"
 4350: 138:                                 >
 4351: 139:                                     {submitting ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : <Send className="w-4 h-4" />}
 4352: 140:                                 </button>
 4353: 141:                             </form>
 4354: 142:                         </div>
 4355: 143:                     </div>
 4356: 144:                 ) : (
 4357: 145:                     <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 uppercase text-[10px] font-black">
 4358: 146:                         Không tìm thấy nội dung
 4359: 147:                     </div>
 4360: 148:                 )}
 4361: 149:             </div>
 4362: 150:         </div>
 4363: 151:     )
 4364: 152: }
 4365: ````

 4367: ## File: components/home/RealityMap.tsx
 4368: ````typescript
 4369:   1: 'use client'
 4370:   2: import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
 4371:   3: import { CheckCircle2, Lock, Flame, Star, Trophy, ArrowRight, Flag, ChevronRight, RefreshCcw, X, PlayCircle, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react'
 4372:   4: import Link from 'next/link'
 4373:   5: interface RealityMapProps {
 4374:   6:     customPath: number[]
 4375:   7:     enrollmentsMap: any
 4376:   8:     allCourses: any[]
 4377:   9:     userGoal: string
 4378:  10:     onReset: () => void
 4379:  11: }
 4380:  12: // ─── Component Popup Chi tiết Khóa học ─────────────────────────────────────
 4381:  13: function CourseDetailModal({ course, enrollment, onClose }: { course: any, enrollment: any, onClose: () => void }) {
 4382:  14:     const isCompleted = enrollment?.completedCount === enrollment?.totalLessons && enrollment?.totalLessons > 0
 4383:  15:     const isActive = enrollment?.status === 'ACTIVE'
 4384:  16:     return (
 4385:  17:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-200" onClick={onClose}>
 4386:  18:             <div className="bg-zinc-900 w-full max-w-sm rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden border border-white/10 shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
 4387:  19:                 {/* Ảnh bìa hoặc Header */}
 4388:  20:                 <div className="h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-indigo-800 relative flex items-center justify-center">
 4389:  21:                     <BookOpen className="w-12 h-12 text-white/20" />
 4390:  22:                     <button onClick={onClose} className="absolute top-4 right-4 p-2 bg-black/20 hover:bg-black/40 rounded-full transition-colors">
 4391:  23:                         <X className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
 4392:  24:                     </button>
 4393:  25:                 </div>
 4394:  26:                 <div className="p-8 space-y-6">
 4395:  27:                     <div className="space-y-2">
 4396:  28:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
 4397:  29:                             <span className={`text-[10px] font-black uppercase px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${isActive ? 'bg-green-500/20 text-green-400' : 'bg-gray-500/20 text-gray-400'}`}>
 4398:  30:                                 {isActive ? 'Đã kích hoạt' : 'Chưa sở hữu'}
 4399:  31:                             </span>
 4400:  32:                         </div>
 4401:  33:                         <h3 className="text-xl font-black text-white uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight">{course.name_lop}</h3>
 4402:  34:                         <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm font-medium line-clamp-3">{course.mo_ta_ngan || 'Khám phá những kiến thức thực chiến cùng Học viện BRK.'}</p>
 4403:  35:                     </div>
 4404:  36:                     {isActive ? (
 4405:  37:                         <Link 
 4406:  38:                             href={`/courses/${course.id_khoa}/learn`}
 4407:  39:                             className="w-full bg-yellow-400 text-black py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-yellow-400/10"
 4408:  40:                         >
 4409:  41:                             <PlayCircle className="w-5 h-5" /> Vào học ngay
 4410:  42:                         </Link>
 4411:  43:                     ) : (
 4412:  44:                         <Link 
 4413:  45:                             href={`/#khoa-hoc`}
 4414:  46:                             onClick={onClose}
 4415:  47:                             className="w-full bg-white text-black py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all active:scale-95"
 4416:  48:                         >
 4417:  49:                             Tìm hiểu thêm
 4418:  50:                         </Link>
 4419:  51:                     )}
 4420:  52:                 </div>
 4421:  53:             </div>
 4422:  54:         </div>
 4423:  55:     )
 4424:  56: }
 4425:  57: export default function RealityMap({ customPath, enrollmentsMap, allCourses, userGoal, onReset }: RealityMapProps) {
 4426:  58:     const [activeStage, setActiveStage] = useState<number | null>(null)
 4427:  59:     const [highlightedIds, setHighlightedIds] = useState<number[]>([])
 4428:  60:     const [selectedCourse, setSelectedCourse] = useState<any>(null)
 4429:  61:     const stages = [
 4430:  62:         { id: 1, name: 'Nền tảng số', courseIds: [15] },
 4431:  63:         { id: 2, name: 'Video & Traffic', courseIds: [18, 3] },
 4432:  64:         { id: 3, name: 'Livestream CB', courseIds: [4] },
 4433:  65:         { id: 4, name: 'Kỹ năng NC', courseIds: [19] },
 4434:  66:         { id: 5, name: 'Nhân hiệu & Đào tạo', courseIds: [2, 20] },
 4435:  67:         { id: 6, name: 'Hệ thống bền vững', courseIds: [21, 22] },
 4436:  68:     ]
 4437:  69:     const handleStageClick = (stage: any) => {
 4438:  70:         if (activeStage === stage.id) {
 4439:  71:             setActiveStage(null)
 4440:  72:             setHighlightedIds([])
 4441:  73:         } else {
 4442:  74:             setActiveStage(stage.id)
 4443:  75:             setHighlightedIds(stage.courseIds)
 4444:  76:         }
 4445:  77:     }
 4446:  78:     useEffect(() => {
 4447:  79:         if (highlightedIds.length > 0) {
 4448:  80:             const timer = setTimeout(() => setHighlightedIds([]), 5000)
 4449:  81:             return () => clearTimeout(timer)
 4450:  82:         }
 4451:  83:     }, [highlightedIds])
 4452:  84:     return (
 4453:  85:         <div className="bg-zinc-950 rounded-[3rem] p-6 md:p-10 text-white border border-white/10 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden">
 4454:  86:             <div className="absolute -top-24 -left-24 w-64 h-64 bg-yellow-500/10 rounded-full blur-[100px]"></div>
 4455:  87:             <div className="relative z-10 space-y-10">
 4456:  88:                 {/* 1. Header & Reset Button */}
 4457:  89:                 <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6 text-center md:text-left">
 4458:  90:                     <div className="space-y-2">
 4459:  91:                         <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter">
 4460:  92:                             Bức tranh <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-400 to-orange-500 text-glow">hiện thực</span>
 4461:  93:                         </h2>
 4462:  94:                         <p className="text-gray-500 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em]">Mục tiêu: <span className="text-white">{userGoal}</span></p>
 4463:  95:                     </div>
 4464:  96:                     <button 
 4465:  97:                         onClick={onReset}
 4466:  98:                         className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white/10 transition-all text-gray-400 active:scale-95"
 4467:  99:                     >
 4468: 100:                         <RefreshCcw className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Thiết lập lại lộ trình
 4469: 101:                     </button>
 4470: 102:                 </div>
 4471: 103:                 {/* 2. Timeline ngang */}
 4472: 104:                 <div className="space-y-4">
 4473: 105:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-2">
 4474: 106:                         <Flag className="w-4 h-4 text-yellow-400" />
 4475: 107:                         <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Lộ trình chặng đường</span>
 4476: 108:                     </div>
 4477: 109:                     <div className="flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-4 no-scrollbar snap-x">
 4478: 110:                         {stages.map((stage, idx) => (
 4479: 111:                             <button
 4480: 112:                                 key={stage.id}
 4481: 113:                                 onClick={() => handleStageClick(stage)}
 4482: 114:                                 className={`flex-none w-40 snap-start p-4 rounded-2xl border transition-all duration-300 relative group ${
 4483: 115:                                     activeStage === stage.id 
 4484: 116:                                     ? 'bg-yellow-400 border-yellow-400 text-black shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)]' 
 4485: 117:                                     : 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-gray-400 hover:border-white/30'
 4486: 118:                                 }`}
 4487: 119:                             >
 4488: 120:                                 <div className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase opacity-60 mb-1">Chặng {stage.id}</div>
 4489: 121:                                 <div className="font-black text-[11px] uppercase leading-tight">{stage.name}</div>
 4490: 122:                                 {idx < stages.length - 1 && (
 4491: 123:                                     <ChevronRight className={`absolute -right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 z-20 ${activeStage === stage.id ? 'text-yellow-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`} />
 4492: 124:                                 )}
 4493: 125:                             </button>
 4494: 126:                         ))}
 4495: 127:                     </div>
 4496: 128:                 </div>
 4497: 129:                 {/* 3. Ma trận Mảnh ghép */}
 4498: 130:                 <div className="space-y-4">
 4499: 131:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-2">
 4500: 132:                         <Star className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-500" />
 4501: 133:                         <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-400">Ma trận mảnh ghép kiến thức (Nhấn để xem)</span>
 4502: 134:                     </div>
 4503: 135:                     <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
 4504: 136:                         {customPath.map((courseId) => {
 4505: 137:                             const course = allCourses.find(c => c.id === courseId)
 4506: 138:                             if (!course) return null
 4507: 139:                             const enrollment = enrollmentsMap[courseId]
 4508: 140:                             const isCompleted = enrollment?.completedCount === enrollment?.totalLessons && enrollment?.totalLessons > 0
 4509: 141:                             const isActive = enrollment?.status === 'ACTIVE'
 4510: 142:                             const isHighlighted = highlightedIds.includes(courseId)
 4511: 143:                             return (
 4512: 144:                                 <button 
 4513: 145:                                     key={courseId}
 4514: 146:                                     onClick={() => setSelectedCourse({ ...course, enrollment })}
 4515: 147:                                     className={`relative aspect-square rounded-[2rem] p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center border-2 transition-all duration-500 active:scale-90 ${
 4516: 148:                                         isHighlighted 
 4517: 149:                                         ? 'border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-400/20 animate-pulse scale-105 z-20 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(250,204,21,0.5)]' 
 4518: 150:                                         : isCompleted
 4519: 151:                                         ? 'border-emerald-500/50 bg-emerald-500/10'
 4520: 152:                                         : isActive
 4521: 153:                                         ? 'border-orange-500/50 bg-orange-500/10'
 4522: 154:                                         : 'border-white/5 bg-white/5 opacity-40 grayscale hover:opacity-100 hover:grayscale-0 hover:bg-white/10'
 4523: 155:                                     }`}
 4524: 156:                                 >
 4525: 157:                                     <div className="absolute top-3 right-3">
 4526: 158:                                         {isCompleted ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-400" /> : isActive ? <Flame className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-500 animate-bounce" /> : <Lock className="w-3 h-3 text-gray-600" />}
 4527: 159:                                     </div>
 4528: 160:                                     <div className="text-2xl mb-2 filter drop-shadow-md">{isCompleted ? '🌟' : isActive ? '📖' : '🧩'}</div>
 4529: 161:                                     <h4 className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-tight line-clamp-2 px-1">{course.name_lop}</h4>
 4530: 162:                                     {isActive && !isCompleted && (
 4531: 163:                                         <div className="mt-2 w-full px-2">
 4532: 164:                                             <div className="h-1 bg-black/40 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
 4533: 165:                                                 <div className="h-full bg-yellow-500 transition-all duration-1000" style={{ width: `${Math.round((enrollment.completedCount / enrollment.totalLessons) * 100)}%` }} />
 4534: 166:                                             </div>
 4535: 167:                                         </div>
 4536: 168:                                     )}
 4537: 169:                                 </button>
 4538: 170:                             )
 4539: 171:                         })}
 4540: 172:                         <div className={`aspect-square rounded-[2rem] border-2 border-dashed flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center ${activeStage === 6 ? 'border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-400/5 text-yellow-400' : 'border-white/10 text-white/10'}`}>
 4541: 173:                             <Trophy className="w-8 h-8 mb-1" />
 4542: 174:                             <span className="text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest">Hero<br/>Status</span>
 4543: 175:                         </div>
 4544: 176:                     </div>
 4545: 177:                 </div>
 4546: 178:                 <div className="pt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-4 justify-center border-t border-white/5 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500">
 4547: 179:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500"></div> Hoàn thành</div>
 4548: 180:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-orange-500"></div> Đang học</div>
 4549: 181:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-gray-700"></div> Chưa mở</div>
 4550: 182:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5"><div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yellow-400 animate-pulse"></div> Đang chọn</div>
 4551: 183:                 </div>
 4552: 184:             </div>
 4553: 185:             {/* Popup chi tiết mảnh ghép */}
 4554: 186:             {selectedCourse && (
 4555: 187:                 <CourseDetailModal 
 4556: 188:                     course={selectedCourse} 
 4557: 189:                     enrollment={selectedCourse.enrollment} 
 4558: 190:                     onClose={() => setSelectedCourse(null)} 
 4559: 191:                 />
 4560: 192:             )}
 4561: 193:         </div>
 4562: 194:     )
 4563: 195: }
 4564: ````

 4566: ## File: components/ImageViewer.tsx
 4567: ````typescript
 4568:   1: "use client"
 4569:   2: import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"
 4570:   3: export default function ImageViewer() {
 4571:   4:   const [src, setSrc] = useState<string | null>(null)
 4572:   5:   const [scale, setScale] = useState(1)
 4573:   6:   const [position, setPosition] = useState({ x: 0, y: 0 })
 4574:   7:   const dragging = useRef(false)
 4575:   8:   const lastPos = useRef({ x: 0, y: 0 })
 4576:   9:   const imgRef = useRef<HTMLImageElement | null>(null)
 4577:  10:   // Click ảnh trong prose
 4578:  11:   useEffect(() => {
 4579:  12:     const handleClick = (e: any) => {
 4580:  13:       const img = e.target.closest(".prose img")
 4581:  14:       if (!img) return
 4582:  15:       setSrc(img.src)
 4583:  16:       setScale(1)
 4584:  17:       setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 })
 4585:  18:     }
 4586:  19:     document.addEventListener("click", handleClick)
 4587:  20:     return () => document.removeEventListener("click", handleClick)
 4588:  21:   }, [])
 4589:  22:   // ESC đóng
 4590:  23:   useEffect(() => {
 4591:  24:     const handleKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
 4592:  25:       if (e.key === "Escape") setSrc(null)
 4593:  26:     }
 4594:  27:     if (src) document.addEventListener("keydown", handleKey)
 4595:  28:     return () => document.removeEventListener("keydown", handleKey)
 4596:  29:   }, [src])
 4597:  30:   if (!src) return null
 4598:  31:   const handleWheel = (e: React.WheelEvent) => {
 4599:  32:     e.preventDefault()
 4600:  33:     setScale((prev) =>
 4601:  34:       e.deltaY < 0 ? Math.min(prev + 0.15, 6) : Math.max(prev - 0.15, 1)
 4602:  35:     )
 4603:  36:   }
 4604:  37:   const handleMouseDown = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
 4605:  38:     if (scale <= 1) return
 4606:  39:     dragging.current = true
 4607:  40:     lastPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY }
 4608:  41:   }
 4609:  42:   const handleMouseMove = (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
 4610:  43:     if (!dragging.current) return
 4611:  44:     const dx = e.clientX - lastPos.current.x
 4612:  45:     const dy = e.clientY - lastPos.current.y
 4613:  46:     setPosition((prev) => ({
 4614:  47:       x: prev.x + dx,
 4615:  48:       y: prev.y + dy,
 4616:  49:     }))
 4617:  50:     lastPos.current = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY }
 4618:  51:   }
 4619:  52:   const handleMouseUp = () => {
 4620:  53:     dragging.current = false
 4621:  54:   }
 4622:  55:   const handleDoubleClick = () => {
 4623:  56:     if (scale === 1) {
 4624:  57:       setScale(2)
 4625:  58:     } else {
 4626:  59:       setScale(1)
 4627:  60:       setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 })
 4628:  61:     }
 4629:  62:   }
 4630:  63:   return (
 4631:  64:     <div
 4632:  65:       className="fixed inset-0 z-[999] bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center"
 4633:  66:       onClick={() => setSrc(null)}
 4634:  67:     >
 4635:  68:       <div
 4636:  69:         className="relative w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden"
 4637:  70:         onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
 4638:  71:         onWheel={handleWheel}
 4639:  72:         onMouseMove={handleMouseMove}
 4640:  73:         onMouseUp={handleMouseUp}
 4641:  74:         onMouseLeave={handleMouseUp}
 4642:  75:       >
 4643:  76:         <img
 4644:  77:           ref={imgRef}
 4645:  78:           src={src}
 4646:  79:           alt=""
 4647:  80:           draggable={false}
 4648:  81:           className="select-none max-w-[90vw] max-h-[90vh] object-contain"
 4649:  82:           style={{
 4650:  83:             transform: `translate(${position.x}px, ${position.y}px) scale(${scale})`,
 4651:  84:             transition: dragging.current ? "none" : "transform 0.2s ease",
 4652:  85:             cursor: scale > 1 ? "grab" : "zoom-in",
 4653:  86:           }}
 4654:  87:           onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
 4655:  88:           onDoubleClick={handleDoubleClick}
 4656:  89:         />
 4657:  90:         <div className="absolute top-5 right-5 flex gap-2">
 4658:  91:           <button
 4659:  92:             onClick={() => setScale((s) => Math.min(s + 0.3, 6))}
 4660:  93:             className="bg-white text-black px-3 py-1 rounded shadow"
 4661:  94:           >
 4662:  95:             +
 4663:  96:           </button>
 4664:  97:           <button
 4665:  98:             onClick={() => {
 4666:  99:               setScale(1)
 4667: 100:               setPosition({ x: 0, y: 0 })
 4668: 101:             }}
 4669: 102:             className="bg-white text-black px-3 py-1 rounded shadow"
 4670: 103:           >
 4671: 104:             Reset
 4672: 105:           </button>
 4673: 106:           <button
 4674: 107:             onClick={() => setSrc(null)}
 4675: 108:             className="bg-white text-black px-3 py-1 rounded shadow"
 4676: 109:           >
 4677: 110:             ✕
 4678: 111:           </button>
 4679: 112:         </div>
 4680: 113:       </div>
 4681: 114:     </div>
 4682: 115:   )
 4683: 116: }
 4684: ````
 4685: 
 4686: ## File: components/payment/UploadProofModal.tsx
 4687: ````typescript
 4688:  1: 'use client'
 4689:  2: import { useState, useRef } from 'react'
 4690:  3: import { updatePaymentProof } from '@/app/actions/payment-actions'
 4691:  4: interface UploadProofModalProps {
 4692:  5:     enrollmentId: number
 4693:  6:     onClose: () => void
 4694:  7:     onSuccess: () => void
 4695:  8: }
 4696:  9: export default function UploadProofModal({ enrollmentId, onClose, onSuccess }: UploadProofModalProps) {
 4697: 10:     const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false)
 4698: 11:     const [preview, setPreview] = useState<string | null>(null)
 4699: 12:     const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
 4700: 13:     const handleFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 4701: 14:         const file = e.target.files?.[0]
 4702: 15:         if (file) {
 4703: 16:             const reader = new FileReader()
 4704: 17:             reader.onload = () => setPreview(reader.result as string)
 4705: 18:             reader.readAsDataURL(file)
 4706: 19:         }
 4707: 20:     }
 4708: 21:     const handleUpload = async () => {
 4709: 22:         const file = fileInputRef.current?.files?.[0]
 4710: 23:         if (!file) return
 4711: 24:         setUploading(true)
 4712: 25:         try {
 4713: 26:             const formData = new FormData()
 4714: 27:             formData.append('file', file)
 4715: 28:             const response = await fetch('/api/upload/payment', {
 4716: 29:                 method: 'POST',
 4717: 30:                 body: formData
 4718: 31:             })
 4719: 32:             if (!response.ok) {
 4720: 33:                 throw new Error('Upload failed')
 4721: 34:             }
 4722: 35:             const { url } = await response.json()
 4723: 36:             const result = await updatePaymentProof(enrollmentId, url)
 4724: 37:             if (result.success) {
 4725: 38:                 onSuccess()
 4726: 39:                 onClose()
 4727: 40:             } else {
 4728: 41:                 alert('Cập nhật thất bại: ' + result.error)
 4729: 42:             }
 4730: 43:         } catch (error) {
 4731: 44:             console.error('Upload error:', error)
 4732: 45:             alert('Upload thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại.')
 4733: 46:         } finally {
 4734: 47:             setUploading(false)
 4735: 48:         }
 4736: 49:     }
 4737: 50:     return (
 4738: 51:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[200] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/60 p-4">
 4739: 52:             <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 w-full max-w-md">
 4740: 53:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Upload biên lai chuyển khoản</h3>
 4741: 54:                 <div className="mb-4">
 4742: 55:                     <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
 4743: 56:                         Chọn ảnh biên lai
 4744: 57:                     </label>
 4745: 58:                     <input
 4746: 59:                         ref={fileInputRef}
 4747: 60:                         type="file"
 4748: 61:                         accept="image/*"
 4749: 62:                         onChange={handleFileChange}
 4750: 63:                         className="w-full border rounded-lg p-2"
 4751: 64:                     />
 4752: 65:                 </div>
 4753: 66:                 {preview && (
 4754: 67:                     <div className="mb-4">
 4755: 68:                         <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Preview:</p>
 4756: 69:                         <div className="relative w-full h-48 border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
 4757: 70:                             <img src={preview} alt="Preview" className="object-contain w-full h-full" />
 4758: 71:                         </div>
 4759: 72:                     </div>
 4760: 73:                 )}
 4761: 74:                 <div className="flex gap-3">
 4762: 75:                     <button
 4763: 76:                         onClick={onClose}
 4764: 77:                         className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-gray-50"
 4765: 78:                     >
 4766: 79:                         Hủy
 4767: 80:                     </button>
 4768: 81:                     <button
 4769: 82:                         onClick={handleUpload}
 4770: 83:                         disabled={!preview || uploading}
 4771: 84:                         className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-600 text-white rounded-lg font-medium hover:bg-purple-700 disabled:opacity-50"
 4772: 85:                     >
 4773: 86:                         {uploading ? 'Đang tải...' : 'Xác nhận'}
 4774: 87:                     </button>
 4775: 88:                 </div>
 4776: 89:             </div>
 4777: 90:         </div>
 4778: 91:     )
 4779: 92: }
 4780: ````
 4781: 
 4782: ## File: components/ui/button.tsx
 4783: ````typescript
 4784:  1: import * as React from "react"
 4785:  2: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 4786:  3: export interface ButtonProps
 4787:  4:     extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> {
 4788:  5:     variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link'
 4789:  6:     size?: 'default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon'
 4790:  7: }
 4791:  8: const Button = React.forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement, ButtonProps>(
 4792:  9:     ({ className, variant = 'default', size = 'default', ...props }, ref) => {
 4793: 10:         const variants = {
 4794: 11:             default: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90",
 4795: 12:             destructive: "bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90",
 4796: 13:             outline: "border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
 4797: 14:             secondary: "bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80",
 4798: 15:             ghost: "hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
 4799: 16:             link: "text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline",
 4800: 17:         }
 4801: 18:         const sizes = {
 4802: 19:             default: "h-10 px-4 py-2",
 4803: 20:             sm: "h-9 rounded-md px-3",
 4804: 21:             lg: "h-11 rounded-md px-8",
 4805: 22:             icon: "h-10 w-10",
 4806: 23:         }
 4807: 24:         return (
 4808: 25:             <button
 4809: 26:                 className={cn(
 4810: 27:                     "inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50",
 4811: 28:                     variants[variant],
 4812: 29:                     sizes[size],
 4813: 30:                     className
 4814: 31:                 )}
 4815: 32:                 ref={ref}
 4816: 33:                 {...props}
 4817: 34:             />
 4818: 35:         )
 4819: 36:     }
 4820: 37: )
 4821: 38: Button.displayName = "Button"
 4822: 39: export { Button }
 4823: ````

 4879: 24: export function DialogHeader({ className, children }: { className?: string, children: React.ReactNode }) {

 4888: 33: export function DialogFooter({ className, children }: { className?: string, children: React.ReactNode }) {
