 4962: ## File: lib/id-helper.ts
 4963: ````typescript
 4964:  1: import prisma from './prisma'
 4965:  2: /**
 4966:  3:  * Lấy ID tiếp theo khả dụng cho User mới.
 4967:  4:  * Logic:
 4968:  5:  * 1. Lấy Max ID hiện tại.
 4969:  6:  * 2. Tăng dần (+1).
 4970:  7:  * 3. Kiểm tra xem ID đó có nằm trong bảng ReservedId không.
 4971:  8:  * 4. Nếu có -> +1 tiếp. Nếu không -> Trả về.
 4972:  9:  */
 4973: 10: export async function getNextAvailableId(): Promise<number> {
 4974: 11:     // 1. Lấy danh sách ID đặc biệt
 4975: 12:     const reservedIds = await prisma.reservedId.findMany({
 4976: 13:         select: { id: true }
 4977: 14:     })
 4978: 15:     const reservedIdList = reservedIds.map((r: any) => r.id)
 4979: 16:     // 2. Lấy User có ID lớn nhất mà KHÔNG nằm trong danh sách đặc biệt
 4980: 17:     const maxNormalUser = await prisma.user.findFirst({
 4981: 18:         where: {
 4982: 19:             id: {
 4983: 20:                 notIn: reservedIdList
 4984: 21:             }
 4985: 22:         },
 4986: 23:         orderBy: { id: 'desc' },
 4987: 24:         select: { id: true }
 4988: 25:     })
 4989: 26:     let nextId = (maxNormalUser?.id || 0) + 1
 4990: 27:     while (true) {
 4991: 28:         // Kiểm tra xem nextId có bị reserve không
 4992: 29:         const isReserved = await prisma.reservedId.findUnique({
 4993: 30:             where: { id: nextId }
 4994: 31:         })
 4995: 32:         if (!isReserved) {
 4996: 33:             // Nếu không bị reserve -> Kiểm tra lại trong bảng User cho chắc chắn (Double check)
 4997: 34:             const existingUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: nextId } })
 4998: 35:             if (!existingUser) {
 4999: 36:                 return nextId
 5000: 37:             }
 5001: 38:         }
 5002: 39:         // Nếu bị reserve hoặc đã tồn tại -> Thử số tiếp theo
 5003: 40:         nextId++
 5004: 41:     }
 5005: 42: }
 5006: ````
 5007: 
 5008: ## File: lib/normalizeGoogleDocsHtml.ts
 5009: ````typescript
 5010:  1: import DOMPurify from "dompurify"
 5011:  2: export function normalizeGoogleDocsHtml(rawHtml: string) {
 5012:  3:   if (!rawHtml) return ""
 5013:  4:   // 1️⃣ Sanitize trước
 5014:  5:   let clean = DOMPurify.sanitize(rawHtml)
 5015:  6:   // 2️⃣ Xoá <p><br></p>
 5016:  7:   clean = clean.replace(/<p>\s*(<br\s*\/?>)?\s*<\/p>/gi, "")
 5017:  8:   // 3️⃣ Xoá &nbsp; thừa
 5018:  9:   clean = clean.replace(/&nbsp;/gi, " ")
 5019: 10:   // 4️⃣ Xoá div rỗng
 5020: 11:   clean = clean.replace(/<div>\s*<\/div>/gi, "")
 5021: 12:   // 5️⃣ Xoá page-break Google Docs
 5022: 13:   clean = clean.replace(/page-break-after:\s*always;?/gi, "")
 5023: 14:   // 6️⃣ Xoá margin inline lớn
 5024: 15:   clean = clean.replace(/margin-[^:]+:\s*\d+px;?/gi, "")
 5025: 16:   // 7️⃣ Xoá style width cố định
 5026: 17:   clean = clean.replace(/width="\d+"/gi, "")
 5027: 18:   clean = clean.replace(/style="[^"]*width:[^;"]*;?[^"]*"/gi, "")
 5028: 19:   // 8️⃣ Gắn attribute để image viewer dễ xử lý (tùy chọn)
 5029: 20:   clean = clean.replace(
 5030: 21:     /<img([^>]+?)src="([^"]+)"([^>]*)>/gi,
 5031: 22:     `<img $1 src="$2" $3 loading="lazy" />`
 5032: 23:   )
 5033: 24:   return clean
 5034: 25: }
 5035: ````
 5036:

 5113:  75:         type: 'INPUT_ACCOUNT',

 5129:  91:     q4_goal: {
 5130:  92:         id: 'q4_goal',
 5131:  93:         question: 'Thiết lập mục tiêu hành động',
 5132:  94:         type: 'INPUT_GOAL',
 5133:  95:         options: [
 5134:  96:             { id: 'no', label: 'Chưa có mục tiêu cụ thể', nextQuestionId: 'done' },
 5135:  97:             { id: 'yes', label: 'Đã sẵn sàng mục tiêu', nextQuestionId: 'done' }
 5136:  98:         ]
 5137:  99:     }
 5138: 100: };
 5139: 101: /**
 5140: 102:  * Lộ trình chuẩn của Học viện BRK
 5141: 103:  * ID: 15(MXH), 18(Video CB), 3(1k Follow), 4(Live CB), 19(Video NC), 19(Live NC), 2(Nhân hiệu), 20(Đào tạo), 21(Cộng đồng), 22(Hệ thống)
 5142: 104:  */
 5143: 105: export function generatePathFromAnswers(answers: Record<string, any>): number[] {
 5144: 106:     const commonPath = [15, 18, 4, 19, 2, 20, 21, 22]; // Lộ trình gốc
 5145: 107:     let finalPath = [...commonPath];
 5146: 108:     // Nhánh Affiliate chưa có 1k follow -> Chèn thêm khóa ID 3
 5147: 109:     if (answers['q2_selling'] === 'affiliate' && answers['q3_account_1k_status'] === 'no') {
 5148: 110:         if (!finalPath.includes(3)) {
 5149: 111:             finalPath.splice(2, 0, 3); // Chèn vào vị trí số 3 trong lộ trình
 5150: 112:         }
 5151: 113:     }
 5152: 114:     return finalPath;
 5153: 115: }
 5154: ````
 5155:

 5158: 1: import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
 5159: 2: import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"
 5160: 3: export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
 5161: 4:     return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
 5162: 5: }

 5165: ## File: prisma/cleanup-duplicates.js
 5166: ````javascript
 5167:  1: const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client')
 5168:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 5169:  3: async function main() {
 5170:  4:     console.log('Bắt đầu xóa bản ghi trùng lặp trong bảng LessonProgress...')
 5171:  5:     // Tìm tất cả các nhóm (enrollmentId, lessonId) bị trùng
 5172:  6:     const duplicates = await prisma.lessonProgress.groupBy({
 5173:  7:         by: ['enrollmentId', 'lessonId'],
 5174:  8:         _count: {
 5175:  9:             id: true
 5176: 10:         },
 5177: 11:         having: {
 5178: 12:             id: {
 5179: 13:                 _count: {
 5180: 14:                     gt: 1
 5181: 15:                 }
 5182: 16:             }
 5183: 17:         }
 5184: 18:     })
 5185: 19:     console.log(`Tìm thấy ${duplicates.length} nhóm trùng lặp. Đang xử lý...`)
 5186: 20:     let deletedCount = 0
 5187: 21:     // Xử lý từng nhóm bị trùng
 5188: 22:     for (const group of duplicates) {
 5189: 23:         // Lấy tất cả các bản ghi của nhóm này, sắp xếp ID để tìm bản nháp (rác) giữ lại bản mới nhất
 5190: 24:         const records = await prisma.lessonProgress.findMany({
 5191: 25:             where: {
 5192: 26:                 enrollmentId: group.enrollmentId,
 5193: 27:                 lessonId: group.lessonId
 5194: 28:             },
 5195: 29:             orderBy: [
 5196: 30:                 { status: 'asc' }, // Ưu tiên 'COMPLETED' (C) hoặc 'IN_PROGRESS' (I) lên trước 'RESET' (R)
 5197: 31:                 { updatedAt: 'desc' }, // Trong cùng status, ưu tiên cái mới cập nhật nhất
 5198: 32:             ]
 5199: 33:         })
 5200: 34:         // Bản ghi đầu tiên là bản ghi cần giữ lại
 5201: 35:         const [keepRecord, ...deleteRecords] = records
 5202: 36:         if (deleteRecords.length > 0) {
 5203: 37:             const deleteIds = deleteRecords.map(r => r.id)
 5204: 38:             await prisma.lessonProgress.deleteMany({
 5205: 39:                 where: {
 5206: 40:                     id: { in: deleteIds }
 5207: 41:                 }
 5208: 42:             })
 5209: 43:             deletedCount += deleteIds.length
 5210: 44:             console.log(`- Đã giữ lại ID ${keepRecord.id}, xóa ${deleteIds.length} bản ghi rác [${deleteIds.join(', ')}] cho Enrollment ${group.enrollmentId}, Lesson ${group.lessonId}`)
 5211: 45:         }
 5212: 46:     }
 5213: 47:     console.log(`✅ Hoàn tất! Đã xóa tổng cộng ${deletedCount} bản ghi thừa.`)
 5214: 48: }
 5215: 49: main()
 5216: 50:     .catch((e) => {
 5217: 51:         console.error(e)
 5218: 52:         process.exit(1)
 5219: 53:     })
 5220: 54:     .finally(async () => {
 5221: 55:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 5222: 56:     })
 5223: ````

 5267: ## File: scripts/auto-commit-push.ps1
 5268: ````powershell
 5269:  1: # ================================================================================
 5270:  2: # Script: auto-commit-push.ps1
 5271:  3: # Mục đích: Backup code hiện tại, đẩy code mới lên GitHub và cập nhật CODE_HISTORY.md
 5272:  4: # Cách chạy: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\auto-commit-push.ps1
 5273:  5: # ================================================================================
 5274:  6: 
 5275:  7: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
 5276:  8: 
 5277:  9: # Màu sắc cho output
 5278: 10: function Write-Green { param($msg) Write-Host $msg -ForegroundColor Green }
 5279: 11: function Write-Yellow { param($msg) Write-Host $msg -ForegroundColor Yellow }
 5280: 12: function Write-Red { param($msg) Write-Host $msg -ForegroundColor Red }
 5281: 13: 
 5282: 14: Write-Yellow "=== Bat dau auto commit va push ==="
 5283: 15: 
 5284: 16: # Buoc 1: Kiem tra co thay doi khong
 5285: 17: Write-Yellow "Kiem tra thay doi..."
 5286: 18: $status = git status --porcelain
 5287: 19: if (-not $status) {
 5288: 20:     Write-Red "Khong co thay doi nao. Thoat."
 5289: 21:     exit 0
 5290: 22: }
 5291: 23: 
 5292: 24: # Buoc 2: Hien thi cac file thay doi
 5293: 25: Write-Yellow "Cac file thay doi:"
 5294: 26: git status --porcelain
 5295: 27: 
 5296: 28: # Buoc 3: Tao mo ta commit
 5297: 29: $changedFiles = git diff --name-only
 5298: 30: Write-Green "Cac file thay doi:"
 5299: 31: $changedFiles | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  - $_" }
 5300: 32: 
 5301: 33: # Kiem tra neu co cap nhat CODE_HISTORY.md
 5302: 34: if ($changedFiles -contains "CODE_HISTORY.md") {
 5303: 35:     $commitMsg = "cap nhat CODE_HISTORY.md"
 5304: 36: } else {
 5305: 37:     # Tao commit message tu ten file
 5306: 38:     $fileNames = ($changedFiles | ForEach-Object { [System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($_) }) -join ", "
 5307: 39:     if ($fileNames.Length -gt 100) {
 5308: 40:         $commitMsg = $fileNames.Substring(0, 97) + "..."
 5309: 41:     } else {
 5310: 42:         $commitMsg = "cap nhat: $fileNames"
 5311: 43:     }
 5312: 44: }
 5313: 45: 
 5314: 46: Write-Green "Commit message: $commitMsg"
 5315: 47: 
 5316: 48: # Buoc 4: Git add
 5317: 49: Write-Yellow "Git add..."
 5318: 50: git add -A
 5319: 51: 
 5320: 52: # Buoc 5: Git commit
 5321: 53: Write-Yellow "Git commit..."
 5322: 54: git commit -m $commitMsg
 5323: 55: 
 5324: 56: # Buoc 6: Git push
 5325: 57: Write-Yellow "Git push..."
 5326: 58: git push origin master
 5327: 59: 
 5328: 60: Write-Green "=== Hoan thanh! ==="
 5329: 61: Write-Green "Da day code len GitHub"
 5330: ````
 5331: 
 5332: ## File: scripts/auto-commit-push.sh
 5333: ````bash
 5334:  1: #!/bin/bash
 5335:  2: # ================================================================================
 5336:  3: # Script: auto-commit-push.sh
 5337:  4: # Mục đích: Backup code hiện tại, đẩy code mới lên GitHub và cập nhật CODE_HISTORY.md
 5338:  5: # Cách chạy: bash scripts/auto-commit-push.sh
 5339:  6: # ================================================================================
 5340:  7: set -e
 5341:  8: # Màu sắc cho output
 5342:  9: GREEN='\033[0;32m'
 5343: 10: YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
 5344: 11: RED='\033[0;31m'
 5345: 12: NC='\033[0m' # No Color
 5346: 13: echo -e "${YELLOW}=== Bắt đầu auto commit và push ===${NC}"
 5347: 14: # Bước 1: Kiểm tra có thay đổi không
 5348: 15: echo -e "${YELLOW}Kiểm tra thay đổi...${NC}"
 5349: 16: if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
 5350: 17:     echo -e "${RED}Không có thay đổi nào. Thoát.${NC}"
 5351: 18:     exit 0
 5352: 19: fi
 5353: 20: # Bước 2: Tạo mô tả thay đổi từ git diff
 5354: 21: echo -e "${YELLOW}Tạo mô tả thay đổi...${NC}"
 5355: 22: CHANGES=$(git status --porcelain | head -20)
 5356: 23: echo "$CHANGES"
 5357: 24: # Bước 3: Đọc danh sách file thay đổi
 5358: 25: CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only)
 5359: 26: echo -e "${GREEN}Các file thay đổi:${NC}"
 5360: 27: echo "$CHANGED_FILES"
 5361: 28: # Bước 4: Tạo mô tả commit tự động
 5362: 29: if [ -n "$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -E "CODE_HISTORY.md")" ]; then
 5363: 30:     COMMIT_MSG="cap nhat CODE_HISTORY.md"
 5364: 31: else
 5365: 32:     # Lấy tên các file thay đổi (không có đường dẫn)
 5366: 33:     FILE_NAMES=$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | xargs -I {} basename {} | tr '\n' ', ')
 5367: 34:     # Cắt bỏ dấu , cuối cùng
 5368: 35:     FILE_NAMES=${FILE_NAMES%,}
 5369: 36:     COMMIT_MSG="cap nhat: $FILE_NAMES"
 5370: 37: fi
 5371: 38: # Giới hạn độ dài commit message
 5372: 39: if [ ${#COMMIT_MSG} -gt 100 ]; then
 5373: 40:     COMMIT_MSG="${COMMIT_MSG:0:97}..."
 5374: 41: fi
 5375: 42: echo -e "${GREEN}Commit message: $COMMIT_MSG${NC}"
 5376: 43: # Bước 5: Git add
 5377: 44: echo -e "${YELLOW}Git add...${NC}"
 5378: 45: git add -A
 5379: 46: # Bước 6: Git commit
 5380: 47: echo -e "${YELLOW}Git commit...${NC}"
 5381: 48: git commit -m "$COMMIT_MSG"
 5382: 49: # Bước 7: Git push
 5383: 50: echo -e "${YELLOW}Git push...${NC}"
 5384: 51: git push origin master
 5385: 52: echo -e "${GREEN}=== Hoàn thành! ===${NC}"
 5386: 53: echo -e "${GREEN}Đã đẩy code lên GitHub${NC}"
 5387: ````
 5388: 
 5389: ## File: scripts/auto-verify-payment.js
 5390: ````javascript
 5391:   1: require('dotenv').config()
 5392:   2: const { google } = require('googleapis')
 5393:   3: const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client')
 5394:   4: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 5395:   5: function extractTextFromHtml(html) {
 5396:   6:   return html
 5397:   7:     .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
 5398:   8:     .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 5399:   9:     .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
 5400:  10:     .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
 5401:  11:     .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
 5402:  12:     .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
 5403:  13:     .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
 5404:  14:     .trim()
 5405:  15: }
 5406:  16: function parseSacombankEmail(htmlContent) {
 5407:  17:   const text = extractTextFromHtml(htmlContent)
 5408:  18:   // Tìm nội dung chuyển khoản
 5409:  19:   const contentMatch = text.match(/(?:Description|Nội dung)[\s\/]*(.+?)(?=\s{2,}|$)/i)
 5410:  20:   const description = contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : ''
 5411:  21:   // Format: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03
 5412:  22:   const phoneMatch = description.match(/SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})/i)
 5413:  23:   const userIdMatch = description.match(/HV[\s\._]*(\d+)/i)
 5414:  24:   const courseCodeMatch = description.match(/COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i)
 5415:  25:   // Tìm số tiền - format: 386,868 VND
 5416:  26:   const amountMatch = text.match(/(?:Transaction|Phát sinh)[\s:+]*([\d,\.]+)\s*VND/i)
 5417:  27:   let amount = 0
 5418:  28:   if (amountMatch) {
 5419:  29:     const amountStr = amountMatch[1].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/,/g, '')
 5420:  30:     amount = parseInt(amountStr) || 0
 5421:  31:   }
 5422:  32:   return {
 5423:  33:     phone: phoneMatch ? phoneMatch[1] : null,
 5424:  34:     userId: userIdMatch ? parseInt(userIdMatch[1]) : null,
 5425:  35:     courseCode: courseCodeMatch ? courseCodeMatch[1].toUpperCase() : null,
 5426:  36:     amount: amount,
 5427:  37:     content: description,
 5428:  38:     rawText: text
 5429:  39:   }
 5430:  40: }
 5431:  41: async function getGmailClient() {
 5432:  42:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 5433:  43:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 5434:  44:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 5435:  45:     'http://localhost'
 5436:  46:   )
 5437:  47:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({ refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN })
 5438:  48:   return google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client })
 5439:  49: }
 5440:  50: async function processBankEmails() {
 5441:  51:   const gmail = await getGmailClient()
 5442:  52:   // Tìm email Sacombank TRƯA ĐỌC trong 7 ngày gần nhất
 5443:  53:   const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
 5444:  54:     userId: 'me',
 5445:  55:     q: 'sacombank thong bao giao dich is:unread',
 5446:  56:     maxResults: 20
 5447:  57:   })
 5448:  58:   const messages = response.data.messages || []
 5449:  59:   if (messages.length === 0) return;
 5450:  60:   console.log(`📧 Phát hiện ${messages.length} email Sacombank mới chưa đọc...`)
 5451:  61:   // Lấy enrollment PENDING
 5452:  62:   const pendingEnrollments = await prisma.enrollment.findMany({
 5453:  63:     where: { status: 'PENDING' },
 5454:  64:     include: {
 5455:  65:       course: { select: { id_khoa: true, phi_coc: true } },
 5456:  66:       user: { select: { name: true, phone: true } }
 5457:  67:     }
 5458:  68:   })
 5459:  69:   if (pendingEnrollments.length === 0) {
 5460:  70:       console.log('📝 Không có đăng ký nào đang chờ thanh toán.')
 5461:  71:       return;
 5462:  72:   }
 5463:  73:   for (const msg of messages) {
 5464:  74:     const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({ userId: 'me', id: msg.id, format: 'full' })
 5465:  75:     let body = ''
 5466:  76:     if (message.data.payload?.body?.data) {
 5467:  77:       body = Buffer.from(message.data.payload.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5468:  78:     } else if (message.data.payload?.parts) {
 5469:  79:       for (const part of message.data.payload.parts) {
 5470:  80:         if (part.mimeType === 'text/html' && part.body?.data) {
 5471:  81:           body = Buffer.from(part.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5472:  82:           break
 5473:  83:         }
 5474:  84:       }
 5475:  85:     }
 5476:  86:     const parsed = parseSacombankEmail(body)
 5477:  87:     for (const enrollment of pendingEnrollments) {
 5478:  88:       const userPhone = enrollment.user.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || ''
 5479:  89:       const emailPhone = parsed.phone || ''
 5480:  90:       const userIdMatch = parsed.userId && parsed.userId === enrollment.userId
 5481:  91:       const phoneMatch = userPhone && emailPhone && userPhone.includes(emailPhone)
 5482:  92:       const courseCodeMatch = parsed.courseCode && enrollment.course.id_khoa.toUpperCase().includes(parsed.courseCode)
 5483:  93:       const amountMatch = parsed.amount >= enrollment.course.phi_coc
 5484:  94:       if (((parsed.userId ? userIdMatch : phoneMatch) && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch)) {
 5485:  95:         console.log(`✅ Khớp! Đang kích hoạt HV: ${enrollment.user.name} - Khóa: ${enrollment.course.id_khoa}`)
 5486:  96:         await prisma.payment.update({
 5487:  97:           where: { enrollmentId: enrollment.id },
 5488:  98:           data: {
 5489:  99:             amount: parsed.amount, phone: parsed.phone, content: parsed.content,
 5490: 100:             bankName: 'Sacombank', status: 'VERIFIED', verifiedAt: new Date(), verifyMethod: 'AUTO_EMAIL'
 5491: 101:           }
 5492: 102:         })
 5493: 103:         await prisma.enrollment.update({
 5494: 104:           where: { id: enrollment.id },
 5495: 105:           data: { status: 'ACTIVE' }
 5496: 106:         })
 5497: 107:         // Đánh dấu đã đọc
 5498: 108:         await gmail.users.messages.modify({
 5499: 109:           userId: 'me', id: msg.id,
 5500: 110:           requestBody: { removeLabelIds: ['UNREAD'] }
 5501: 111:         })
 5502: 112:       }
 5503: 113:     }
 5504: 114:   }
 5505: 115: }
 5506: 116: processBankEmails()
 5507: 117:   .catch(console.error)
 5508: 118:   .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect())
 5509: ````
 5510: 
 5511: ## File: scripts/auto-verify-payment.ts
 5512: ````typescript
 5513:   1: require('dotenv').config()
 5514:   2: const { google } = require('googleapis')
 5515:   3: const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client')
 5516:   4: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 5517:   5: function extractTextFromHtml(html: string): string {
 5518:   6:   return html
 5519:   7:     .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
 5520:   8:     .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 5521:   9:     .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
 5522:  10:     .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
 5523:  11:     .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
 5524:  12:     .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
 5525:  13:     .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
 5526:  14:     .trim()
 5527:  15: }
 5528:  16: function parseSacombankEmail(htmlContent: string) {
 5529:  17:   const text = extractTextFromHtml(htmlContent)
 5530:  18:   // Tìm nội dung chuyển khoản
 5531:  19:   const contentMatch = text.match(/(?:Description|Nội dung)[\s\/]*(.+?)(?=\s{2,}|$)/i)
 5532:  20:   const description = contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : ''
 5533:  21:   // Format mới: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03
 5534:  22:   // Tìm 6 số điện thoại cuối sau "SDT" (linh hoạt khoảng trống/kí tự đặc biệt)
 5535:  23:   const phoneMatch = description.match(/SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})/i)
 5536:  24:   // Tìm mã học viên sau "HV" 
 5537:  25:   const userIdMatch = description.match(/HV[\s\._]*(\d+)/i)
 5538:  26:   // Tìm mã khóa học sau "COC"
 5539:  27:   const courseCodeMatch = description.match(/COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i)
 5540:  28:   // Tìm số tiền - format: 386,868 VND
 5541:  29:   const amountMatch = text.match(/(?:Transaction|Phát sinh)[\s:+]*([\d,\.]+)\s*VND/i)
 5542:  30:   let amount = 0
 5543:  31:   if (amountMatch) {
 5544:  32:     const amountStr = amountMatch[1].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/,/g, '')
 5545:  33:     amount = parseInt(amountStr) || 0
 5546:  34:   }
 5547:  35:   return {
 5548:  36:     phone: phoneMatch ? phoneMatch[1] : null,
 5549:  37:     userId: userIdMatch ? parseInt(userIdMatch[1]) : null,
 5550:  38:     courseCode: courseCodeMatch ? courseCodeMatch[1].toUpperCase() : null,
 5551:  39:     amount: amount,
 5552:  40:     content: description,
 5553:  41:     rawText: text
 5554:  42:   }
 5555:  43: }
 5556:  44: async function getGmailClient() {
 5557:  45:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 5558:  46:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 5559:  47:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 5560:  48:     'http://localhost'
 5561:  49:   )
 5562:  50:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({
 5563:  51:     refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN
 5564:  52:   })
 5565:  53:   return google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client })
 5566:  54: }
 5567:  55: async function processBankEmails() {
 5568:  56:   console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu kiểm tra email ngân hàng...')
 5569:  57:   const gmail = await getGmailClient()
 5570:  58:   // Tìm email Sacombank trong 7 ngày gần nhất
 5571:  59:   const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
 5572:  60:     userId: 'me',
 5573:  61:     q: 'sacombank thong bao giao dich',
 5574:  62:     maxResults: 10
 5575:  63:   })
 5576:  64:   const messages = response.data.messages || []
 5577:  65:   console.log(`📧 Tìm thấy ${messages.length} email Sacombank`)
 5578:  66:   if (messages.length === 0) {
 5579:  67:     console.log('✅ Không có email mới')
 5580:  68:     return
 5581:  69:   }
 5582:  70:   // Lấy enrollment PENDING
 5583:  71:   const pendingEnrollments = await prisma.enrollment.findMany({
 5584:  72:     where: { status: 'PENDING' },
 5585:  73:     include: {
 5586:  74:       course: {
 5587:  75:         select: { id_khoa: true, phi_coc: true, noidung_stk: true, name_lop: true }
 5588:  76:       },
 5589:  77:       user: {
 5590:  78:         select: { id: true, phone: true, name: true, email: true }
 5591:  79:       }
 5592:  80:     }
 5593:  81:   })
 5594:  82:   console.log(`📝 Có ${pendingEnrollments.length} enrollment chờ xác nhận`)
 5595:  83:   for (const msg of messages) {
 5596:  84:     const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({
 5597:  85:       userId: 'me',
 5598:  86:       id: msg.id,
 5599:  87:       format: 'full'
 5600:  88:     })
 5601:  89:     // Lấy body
 5602:  90:     let body = ''
 5603:  91:     if (message.data.payload?.body?.data) {
 5604:  92:       body = Buffer.from(message.data.payload.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5605:  93:     } else if (message.data.payload?.parts) {
 5606:  94:       for (const part of message.data.payload.parts) {
 5607:  95:         if (part.mimeType === 'text/html' && part.body?.data) {
 5608:  96:           body = Buffer.from(part.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5609:  97:           break
 5610:  98:         }
 5611:  99:       }
 5612: 100:     }
 5613: 101:     const parsed = parseSacombankEmail(body)
 5614: 102:     console.log(`\n📱 Parsed: SĐT=${parsed.phone}, Tiền=${parsed.amount}, ND=${parsed.content}`)
 5615: 103:     // Tìm enrollment khớp với userId hoặc phone + courseCode
 5616: 104:     for (const enrollment of pendingEnrollments) {
 5617: 105:       const userPhone = enrollment.user.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || ''
 5618: 106:       const emailPhone = parsed.phone || ''
 5619: 107:       // Khớp theo: userId + phone + courseCode
 5620: 108:       const userIdMatch = parsed.userId && parsed.userId === enrollment.userId
 5621: 109:       const phoneMatch = userPhone && emailPhone && userPhone.includes(emailPhone)
 5622: 110:       const courseCodeMatch = parsed.courseCode && enrollment.course.id_khoa.toUpperCase().includes(parsed.courseCode)
 5623: 111:       const amountMatch = parsed.amount >= enrollment.course.phi_coc
 5624: 112:       // Cần khớp: (userId HOẶC phone) VÀ courseCode VÀ amount
 5625: 113:       const matched = ((parsed.userId ? userIdMatch : phoneMatch) && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch)
 5626: 114:       if (matched) {
 5627: 115:         console.log(`✅ Tìm thấy khớp! Enrollment #${enrollment.id}`)
 5628: 116:         console.log(`   User: ${enrollment.user.name}, Phone: ${enrollment.user.phone}, UserID: ${enrollment.userId}`)
 5629: 117:         console.log(`   Course: ${enrollment.course.id_khoa}, Phi: ${enrollment.course.phi_coc}`)
 5630: 118:         console.log(`   Parsed: phone=${parsed.phone}, userId=${parsed.userId}, courseCode=${parsed.courseCode}, amount=${parsed.amount}`)
 5631: 119:         // Cập nhật payment và enrollment
 5632: 120:         await prisma.payment.update({
 5633: 121:           where: { enrollmentId: enrollment.id },
 5634: 122:           data: {
 5635: 123:             amount: parsed.amount,
 5636: 124:             phone: parsed.phone,
 5637: 125:             content: parsed.content,
 5638: 126:             bankName: 'Sacombank',
 5639: 127:             status: 'VERIFIED',
 5640: 128:             verifiedAt: new Date(),
 5641: 129:             verifyMethod: 'AUTO_EMAIL'
 5642: 130:           }
 5643: 131:         })
 5644: 132:         await prisma.enrollment.update({
 5645: 133:           where: { id: enrollment.id },
 5646: 134:           data: { status: 'ACTIVE' }
 5647: 135:         })
 5648: 136:         console.log(`   ✅ Đã kích hoạt khóa học!`)
 5649: 137:         // Đánh dấu đã đọc
 5650: 138:         await gmail.users.messages.modify({
 5651: 139:           userId: 'me',
 5652: 140:           id: msg.id,
 5653: 141:           requestBody: { removeLabelIds: ['UNREAD'] }
 5654: 142:         })
 5655: 143:       }
 5656: 144:     }
 5657: 145:   }
 5658: 146:   await prisma.$disconnect()
 5659: 147: }
 5660: 148: processBankEmails().catch(console.error)
 5661: ````

 5663: ## File: scripts/backup.ps1
 5664: ````powershell
 5665:   1: # ============================================================
 5666:   2: #  backup.ps1 - HocVien-BRK Project Backup Script
 5667:   3: #  Usage: .\scripts\backup.ps1
 5668:   4: #  Creates a timestamped ZIP of all important source files.
 5669:   5: # ============================================================
 5670:   6: 
 5671:   7: $ProjectRoot = (Resolve-Path "$PSScriptRoot\..").Path # Ensure $ProjectRoot is a string
 5672:   8: $Timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm"
 5673:   9: $BackupDir = "$ProjectRoot\backups"
 5674:  10: $ZipName = "backup_$Timestamp.zip"
 5675:  11: $ZipPath = "$BackupDir\$ZipName"
 5676:  12: $TempBackupDir = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "BRK_Backup_Temp_$Timestamp"
 5677:  13: 
 5678:  14: # --- Files & folders to include (relative to project root) ---
 5679:  15: $IncludePaths = @(
 5680:  16:     # App source
 5681:  17:     "app",
 5682:  18:     "components",
 5683:  19:     "lib",
 5684:  20:     "types",
 5685:  21:     "public",
 5686:  22: 
 5687:  23:     # Auth & config
 5688:  24:     "auth.ts",
 5689:  25:     "auth.config.ts",
 5690:  26:     "middleware.ts",
 5691:  27:     ".env",
 5692:  28:     ".env.local",
 5693:  29: 
 5694:  30:     # DB / Prisma
 5695:  31:     "prisma",
 5696:  32: 
 5697:  33:     # Scripts
 5698:  34:     "scripts",
 5699:  35: 
 5700:  36:     # Project config
 5701:  37:     "package.json",
 5702:  38:     "next.config.ts",
 5703:  39:     "tsconfig.json",
 5704:  40:     "tsconfig.seed.json",
 5705:  41:     "postcss.config.mjs",
 5706:  42:     "eslint.config.mjs",
 5707:  43:     "docker-compose.yml",
 5708:  44: 
 5709:  45:     # Docs
 5710:  46:     "README.md",
 5711:  47:     "DESIGN_SYSTEM.md"
 5712:  48: )
 5713:  49: 
 5714:  50: # --- Paths/patterns to EXCLUDE even if inside an included folder ---
 5715:  51: $ExcludePatterns = @(
 5716:  52:     "*.log",
 5717:  53:     "*.tsbuildinfo",
 5718:  54:     ".next",
 5719:  55:     "node_modules",
 5720:  56:     ".git",
 5721:  57:     "backups"
 5722:  58: )
 5723:  59: 
 5724:  60: Write-Host ""
 5725:  61: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 5726:  62: Write-Host "  BRK Project Backup" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 5727:  63: Write-Host "  Time   : $Timestamp" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 5728:  64: Write-Host "  Output : $ZipPath" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 5729:  65: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 5730:  66: Write-Host ""
 5731:  67: 
 5732:  68: # Create backups directory if it doesn't exist
 5733:  69: if (-not (Test-Path $BackupDir)) {
 5734:  70:     New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $BackupDir | Out-Null
 5735:  71:     Write-Host "[+] Created backups/ folder" -ForegroundColor Green
 5736:  72: }
 5737:  73: 
 5738:  74: # Create temporary directory for staging files
 5739:  75: if (Test-Path $TempBackupDir) {
 5740:  76:     Remove-Item -Path $TempBackupDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null
 5741:  77: }
 5742:  78: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $TempBackupDir | Out-Null
 5743:  79: Write-Host "[+] Created temporary staging folder: $TempBackupDir" -ForegroundColor Green
 5744:  80: 
 5745:  81: # Collect all files to backup
 5746:  82: $FilesToBackup = @()
 5747:  83: 
 5748:  84: foreach ($rel in $IncludePaths) {
 5749:  85:     $full = Join-Path $ProjectRoot $rel
 5750:  86: 
 5751:  87:     if (Test-Path $full -PathType Leaf) {
 5752:  88:         # It's a single file
 5753:  89:         $FilesToBackup += $full
 5754:  90:     }
 5755:  91:     elseif (Test-Path $full -PathType Container) {
 5756:  92:         # It's a folder — collect all files recursively, applying exclusions
 5757:  93:         $all = Get-ChildItem -Path $full -File -Recurse
 5758:  94: 
 5759:  95:         foreach ($file in $all) {
 5760:  96:             $skip = $false
 5761:  97:             foreach ($pattern in $ExcludePatterns) {
 5762:  98:                 # Check if any part of the full path matches the pattern
 5763:  99:                 if ($file.FullName -like "*\$pattern\*" -or $file.Name -like $pattern) {
 5764: 100:                     $skip = $true; break
 5765: 101:                 }
 5766: 102:             }
 5767: 103:             if (-not $skip) { $FilesToBackup += $file.FullName }
 5768: 104:         }
 5769: 105:     }
 5770: 106:     else {
 5771: 107:         Write-Host "[!] Not found, skipping: $rel" -ForegroundColor Yellow
 5772: 108:     }
 5773: 109: }
 5774: 110: 
 5775: 111: if ($FilesToBackup.Count -eq 0) {
 5776: 112:     Write-Host "[ERROR] No files found to backup." -ForegroundColor Red
 5777: 113:     # Clean up temp directory before exiting
 5778: 114:     if (Test-Path $TempBackupDir) {
 5779: 115:         Remove-Item -Path $TempBackupDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null
 5780: 116:     }
 5781: 117:     exit 1
 5782: 118: }
 5783: 119: 
 5784: 120: Write-Host "[*] Collecting $($FilesToBackup.Count) files..." -ForegroundColor Gray
 5785: 121: 
 5786: 122: # Copy files to the temporary directory, maintaining relative structure
 5787: 123: foreach ($filePath in $FilesToBackup) {
 5788: 124:     # Get relative path from ProjectRoot
 5789: 125:     $relativePath = $filePath.Substring($ProjectRoot.Length).TrimStart('\', '/')
 5790: 126:     $destinationPath = Join-Path $TempBackupDir $relativePath
 5791: 127: 
 5792: 128:     # Ensure the destination directory exists in the temp structure
 5793: 129:     $destinationDir = Split-Path -Parent $destinationPath
 5794: 130:     if (-not (Test-Path $destinationDir)) {
 5795: 131:         New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $destinationDir -Force | Out-Null
 5796: 132:     }
 5797: 133: 
 5798: 134:     # Copy the file
 5799: 135:     Copy-Item -Path $filePath -Destination $destinationPath -Force
 5800: 136: }
 5801: 137: 
 5802: 138: Write-Host "[*] Staged files to temporary directory. Creating ZIP archive..." -ForegroundColor Gray
 5803: 139: 
 5804: 140: # Create ZIP using Compress-Archive
 5805: 141: try {
 5806: 142:     Compress-Archive -Path "$TempBackupDir\*" -DestinationPath $ZipPath -Force
 5807: 143: }
 5808: 144: catch {
 5809: 145:     Write-Host "[ERROR] Failed to create ZIP archive: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
 5810: 146:     # Clean up temp directory before exiting
 5811: 147:     if (Test-Path $TempBackupDir) {
 5812: 148:         Remove-Item -Path $TempBackupDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null
 5813: 149:     }
 5814: 150:     exit 1
 5815: 151: }
 5816: 152: 
 5817: 153: # Clean up the temporary directory
 5818: 154: if (Test-Path $TempBackupDir) {
 5819: 155:     Remove-Item -Path $TempBackupDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null
 5820: 156:     Write-Host "[+] Cleaned up temporary staging folder." -ForegroundColor Green
 5821: 157: }
 5822: 158: 
 5823: 159: $sizeMB = [math]::Round((Get-Item $ZipPath).Length / 1MB, 2)
 5824: 160: 
 5825: 161: Write-Host ""
 5826: 162: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Green
 5827: 163: Write-Host "  Backup complete!" -ForegroundColor Green
 5828: 164: Write-Host "  File : $ZipName" -ForegroundColor Green
 5829: 165: Write-Host "  Size : ${sizeMB} MB" -ForegroundColor Green
 5830: 166: Write-Host "  Files: $($FilesToBackup.Count)" -ForegroundColor Green
 5831: 167: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Green
 5832: 168: Write-Host ""
 5833: 169: 
 5834: 170: # Keep only the 5 most recent backups to save disk space
 5835: 171: $OldBackups = Get-ChildItem -Path $BackupDir -Filter "backup_*.zip" |
 5836: 172: Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending |
 5837: 173: Select-Object -Skip 5
 5838: 174: 
 5839: 175: if ($OldBackups.Count -gt 0) {
 5840: 176:     Write-Host "[*] Removing $($OldBackups.Count) old backup(s)..." -ForegroundColor Gray
 5841: 177:     $OldBackups | Remove-Item -Force
 5842: 178: }
 5843: ````
 5844: 
 5845: ## File: scripts/check-gmail-info.js
 5846: ````javascript
 5847:  1: require('dotenv').config()
 5848:  2: const { google } = require('googleapis')
 5849:  3: async function checkProfile() {
 5850:  4:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 5851:  5:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 5852:  6:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 5853:  7:     'http://localhost'
 5854:  8:   )
 5855:  9:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({ refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN })
 5856: 10:   const gmail = google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client })
 5857: 11:   try {
 5858: 12:     // 1. Kiểm tra profile (Địa chỉ email)
 5859: 13:     const profile = await gmail.users.getProfile({ userId: 'me' })
 5860: 14:     console.log('\n--- THÔNG TIN HỆ THỐNG ---')
 5861: 15:     console.log(`📧 Đang kết nối Gmail: ${profile.data.emailAddress}`)
 5862: 16:     console.log(`📦 Tổng số tin nhắn: ${profile.data.messagesTotal}`)
 5863: 17:     // 2. Tìm kiếm email Sacombank chưa đọc
 5864: 18:     const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
 5865: 19:       userId: 'me',
 5866: 20:       q: 'sacombank thong bao giao dich is:unread',
 5867: 21:       maxResults: 10
 5868: 22:     })
 5869: 23:     const messages = response.data.messages || []
 5870: 24:     console.log(`✉️ Số email Sacombank chưa đọc (unread): ${messages.length}`)
 5871: 25:     if (messages.length > 0) {
 5872: 26:         console.log('\n--- DANH SÁCH EMAIL CHỜ XỬ LÝ ---')
 5873: 27:         for (const msg of messages) {
 5874: 28:             const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({ userId: 'me', id: msg.id, format: 'metadata' })
 5875: 29:             const subject = message.data.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'Subject')?.value
 5876: 30:             const date = message.data.payload.headers.find(h => h.name === 'Date')?.value
 5877: 31:             console.log(`- ID: ${msg.id} | Ngày: ${date} | Tiêu đề: ${subject}`)
 5878: 32:         }
 5879: 33:     } else {
 5880: 34:         console.log('\n✅ Hiện tại không có email Sacombank nào chưa đọc.')
 5881: 35:     }
 5882: 36:     console.log('--------------------------')
 5883: 37:   } catch (error) {
 5884: 38:     console.error('❌ Lỗi kiểm tra:', error.message)
 5885: 39:   }
 5886: 40: }
 5887: 41: checkProfile()
 5888: ````
 5889: 
 5890: ## File: scripts/check-latest-sacombank.js
 5891: ````javascript
 5892:  1: require('dotenv').config()
 5893:  2: const { google } = require('googleapis')
 5894:  3: function extractTextFromHtml(html) {
 5895:  4:   return html
 5896:  5:     .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
 5897:  6:     .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 5898:  7:     .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
 5899:  8:     .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
 5900:  9:     .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
 5901: 10:     .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
 5902: 11:     .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
 5903: 12:     .trim()
 5904: 13: }
 5905: 14: function parseSacombankEmail(htmlContent) {
 5906: 15:   const text = extractTextFromHtml(htmlContent)
 5907: 16:   // Tìm nội dung chuyển khoản
 5908: 17:   const contentMatch = text.match(/(?:Description|Nội dung)[\s\/]*(.+?)(?=\s{2,}|$)/i)
 5909: 18:   const description = contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : ''
 5910: 19:   // Format mới: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03
 5911: 20:   const phoneMatch = description.match(/SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})/i)
 5912: 21:   const userIdMatch = description.match(/HV[\s\._]*(\d+)/i)
 5913: 22:   const courseCodeMatch = description.match(/COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i)
 5914: 23:   // Tìm số tiền - format: 386,868 VND
 5915: 24:   const amountMatch = text.match(/(?:Transaction|Phát sinh)[\s:+]*([\d,\.]+)\s*VND/i)
 5916: 25:   let amount = 0
 5917: 26:   if (amountMatch) {
 5918: 27:     const amountStr = amountMatch[1].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/,/g, '')
 5919: 28:     amount = parseInt(amountStr) || 0
 5920: 29:   }
 5921: 30:   return {
 5922: 31:     phone: phoneMatch ? phoneMatch[1] : null,
 5923: 32:     userId: userIdMatch ? parseInt(userIdMatch[1]) : null,
 5924: 33:     courseCode: courseCodeMatch ? courseCodeMatch[1].toUpperCase() : null,
 5925: 34:     amount: amount,
 5926: 35:     content: description,
 5927: 36:     rawText: text
 5928: 37:   }
 5929: 38: }
 5930: 39: async function getGmailClient() {
 5931: 40:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 5932: 41:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 5933: 42:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 5934: 43:     'http://localhost'
 5935: 44:   )
 5936: 45:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({
 5937: 46:     refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN
 5938: 47:   })
 5939: 48:   return google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client })
 5940: 49: }
 5941: 50: async function checkLatestEmail() {
 5942: 51:   console.log('🔍 Đang kiểm tra email Sacombank mới nhất...')
 5943: 52:   const gmail = await getGmailClient()
 5944: 53:   const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
 5945: 54:     userId: 'me',
 5946: 55:     q: 'sacombank thong bao giao dịch',
 5947: 56:     maxResults: 1
 5948: 57:   })
 5949: 58:   const messages = response.data.messages || []
 5950: 59:   if (messages.length === 0) {
 5951: 60:     console.log('❌ Không tìm thấy email Sacombank nào.')
 5952: 61:     return
 5953: 62:   }
 5954: 63:   const msgId = messages[0].id
 5955: 64:   const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({
 5956: 65:     userId: 'me',
 5957: 66:     id: msgId,
 5958: 67:     format: 'full'
 5959: 68:   })
 5960: 69:   let body = ''
 5961: 70:   if (message.data.payload?.body?.data) {
 5962: 71:     body = Buffer.from(message.data.payload.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5963: 72:   } else if (message.data.payload?.parts) {
 5964: 73:     for (const part of message.data.payload.parts) {
 5965: 74:       if (part.mimeType === 'text/html' && part.body?.data) {
 5966: 75:         body = Buffer.from(part.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 5967: 76:         break
 5968: 77:       }
 5969: 78:     }
 5970: 79:   }
 5971: 80:   const parsed = parseSacombankEmail(body)
 5972: 81:   console.log('\n--- KẾT QUẢ TRÍCH XUẤT ---')
 5973: 82:   console.log(`Email ID: ${msgId}`)
 5974: 83:   console.log(`Nội dung chuyển khoản (Gốc): ${parsed.content}`)
 5975: 84:   console.log(`SĐT (6 số cuối): ${parsed.phone || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 5976: 85:   console.log(`Mã học viên (HV): ${parsed.userId || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 5977: 86:   console.log(`Mã khóa học (COC): ${parsed.courseCode || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 5978: 87:   console.log(`Số tiền: ${parsed.amount.toLocaleString()} VND`)
 5979: 88:   console.log('--------------------------')
 5980: 89: }
 5981: 90: checkLatestEmail().catch(console.error)
 5982: ````
 5983: 
 5984: ## File: scripts/check-latest-sacombank.ts
 5985: ````typescript
 5986:  1: require('dotenv').config()
 5987:  2: const { google } = require('googleapis')
 5988:  3: function extractTextFromHtml(html: string): string {
 5989:  4:   return html
 5990:  5:     .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
 5991:  6:     .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
 5992:  7:     .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
 5993:  8:     .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
 5994:  9:     .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
 5995: 10:     .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
 5996: 11:     .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
 5997: 12:     .trim()
 5998: 13: }
 5999: 14: function parseSacombankEmail(htmlContent: string) {
 6000: 15:   const text = extractTextFromHtml(htmlContent)
 6001: 16:   // Tìm nội dung chuyển khoản
 6002: 17:   const contentMatch = text.match(/(?:Description|Nội dung)[\s\/]*(.+?)(?=\s{2,}|$)/i)
 6003: 18:   const description = contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : ''
 6004: 19:   // Format mới: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03
 6005: 20:   const phoneMatch = description.match(/SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})/i)
 6006: 21:   const userIdMatch = description.match(/HV[\s\._]*(\d+)/i)
 6007: 22:   const courseCodeMatch = description.match(/COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i)
 6008: 23:   // Tìm số tiền - format: 386,868 VND
 6009: 24:   const amountMatch = text.match(/(?:Transaction|Phát sinh)[\s:+]*([\d,\.]+)\s*VND/i)
 6010: 25:   let amount = 0
 6011: 26:   if (amountMatch) {
 6012: 27:     const amountStr = amountMatch[1].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/,/g, '')
 6013: 28:     amount = parseInt(amountStr) || 0
 6014: 29:   }
 6015: 30:   return {
 6016: 31:     phone: phoneMatch ? phoneMatch[1] : null,
 6017: 32:     userId: userIdMatch ? parseInt(userIdMatch[1]) : null,
 6018: 33:     courseCode: courseCodeMatch ? courseCodeMatch[1].toUpperCase() : null,
 6019: 34:     amount: amount,
 6020: 35:     content: description,
 6021: 36:     rawText: text
 6022: 37:   }
 6023: 38: }
 6024: 39: async function getGmailClient() {
 6025: 40:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 6026: 41:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 6027: 42:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 6028: 43:     'http://localhost'
 6029: 44:   )
 6030: 45:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({
 6031: 46:     refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN
 6032: 47:   })
 6033: 48:   return google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client })
 6034: 49: }
 6035: 50: async function checkLatestEmail() {
 6036: 51:   console.log('🔍 Đang kiểm tra email Sacombank mới nhất...')
 6037: 52:   const gmail = await getGmailClient()
 6038: 53:   const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
 6039: 54:     userId: 'me',
 6040: 55:     q: 'sacombank thong bao giao dich',
 6041: 56:     maxResults: 1
 6042: 57:   })
 6043: 58:   const messages = response.data.messages || []
 6044: 59:   if (messages.length === 0) {
 6045: 60:     console.log('❌ Không tìm thấy email Sacombank nào.')
 6046: 61:     return
 6047: 62:   }
 6048: 63:   const msgId = messages[0].id
 6049: 64:   const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({
 6050: 65:     userId: 'me',
 6051: 66:     id: msgId,
 6052: 67:     format: 'full'
 6053: 68:   })
 6054: 69:   let body = ''
 6055: 70:   if (message.data.payload?.body?.data) {
 6056: 71:     body = Buffer.from(message.data.payload.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 6057: 72:   } else if (message.data.payload?.parts) {
 6058: 73:     for (const part of message.data.payload.parts) {
 6059: 74:       if (part.mimeType === 'text/html' && part.body?.data) {
 6060: 75:         body = Buffer.from(part.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8')
 6061: 76:         break
 6062: 77:       }
 6063: 78:     }
 6064: 79:   }
 6065: 80:   const parsed = parseSacombankEmail(body)
 6066: 81:   console.log('\n--- KẾT QUẢ TRÍCH XUẤT ---')
 6067: 82:   console.log(`Email ID: ${msgId}`)
 6068: 83:   console.log(`Nội dung chuyển khoản (Gốc): ${parsed.content}`)
 6069: 84:   console.log(`SĐT (6 số cuối): ${parsed.phone || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 6070: 85:   console.log(`Mã học viên (HV): ${parsed.userId || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 6071: 86:   console.log(`Mã khóa học (COC): ${parsed.courseCode || 'Không tìm thấy'}`)
 6072: 87:   console.log(`Số tiền: ${parsed.amount.toLocaleString()} VND`)
 6073: 88:   console.log('--------------------------')
 6074: 89: }
 6075: 90: checkLatestEmail().catch(console.error)
 6076: ````

 6079: ````javascript
 6080:  1: const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client')
 6081:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 6082:  3: async function debugEnrollment() {
 6083:  4:   const userId = 1;
 6084:  5:   const courseCode = 'CB';
 6085:  6:   console.log(`🔍 Đang kiểm tra Enrollment cho User ID: ${userId}, Course Code: ${courseCode}...`)
 6086:  7:   const enrollments = await prisma.enrollment.findMany({
 6087:  8:     where: { 
 6088:  9:       userId: userId,
 6089: 10:       course: {
 6090: 11:         id_khoa: courseCode
 6091: 12:       }
 6092: 13:     },
 6093: 14:     include: {
 6094: 15:       course: true,
 6095: 16:       user: true,
 6096: 17:       payment: true
 6097: 18:     }
 6098: 19:   })
 6099: 20:   if (enrollments.length === 0) {
 6100: 21:     console.log('❌ Không tìm thấy Enrollment nào khớp.')
 6101: 22:     return
 6102: 23:   }
 6103: 24:   enrollments.forEach(e => {
 6104: 25:     console.log('\n--- THÔNG TIN ENROLLMENT ---')
 6105: 26:     console.log(`ID: ${e.id}`)
 6106: 27:     console.log(`Trạng thái: ${e.status}`)
 6107: 28:     console.log(`Học viên: ${e.user.name} (Phone: ${e.user.phone})`)
 6108: 29:     console.log(`Khóa học: ${e.course.name_lop} (${e.course.id_khoa})`)
 6109: 30:     console.log(`Phí cọc yêu cầu: ${e.course.phi_coc.toLocaleString()} VND`)
 6110: 31:     console.log(`Thanh toán đi kèm: ${e.payment ? e.payment.status : 'Chưa có payment'}`)
 6111: 32:     if (e.payment) {
 6112: 33:         console.log(`   Số tiền đã nhận: ${e.payment.amount.toLocaleString()} VND`)
 6113: 34:     }
 6114: 35:     console.log('----------------------------')
 6115: 36:   })
 6116: 37: }
 6117: 38: debugEnrollment()
 6118: 39:   .catch(e => console.error(e))
 6119: 40:   .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect())
 6120: ````

 6122: ## File: scripts/generate-code-history.ts
 6123: ````typescript
 6124:   1: import * as fs from 'fs';
 6125:   2: import * as path from 'path';
 6126:   3: import * as child_process from 'child_process';
 6127:   4: const PROJECT_ROOT = process.cwd();
 6128:   5: const OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(PROJECT_ROOT);
 6129:   6: function getTimestamp(): string {
 6130:   7:   const now = new Date();
 6131:   8:   const year = now.getFullYear();
 6132:   9:   const month = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
 6133:  10:   const day = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
 6134:  11:   const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
 6135:  12:   const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
 6136:  13:   const seconds = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
 6137:  14:   return `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hours}${minutes}${seconds}`;
 6138:  15: }
 6139:  16: function getProjectStructure(): string {
 6140:  17:   const ignoreDirs = ['node_modules', '.next', '.git', '.agent', 'test-github-run', '__pycache__'];
 6141:  18:   const structure: string[] = [];
 6142:  19:   function walkDir(dir: string, prefix: string = '') {
 6143:  20:     const items = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
 6144:  21:     const dirs: string[] = [];
 6145:  22:     const files: string[] = [];
 6146:  23:     for (const item of items) {
 6147:  24:       const relativePath = path.relative(PROJECT_ROOT, path.join(dir, item.name));
 6148:  25:       if (ignoreDirs.includes(item.name)) continue;
 6149:  26:       if (item.isDirectory()) {
 6150:  27:         dirs.push(item.name);
 6151:  28:       } else if (item.isFile() && (item.name.endsWith('.ts') || item.name.endsWith('.tsx') || item.name.endsWith('.json') || item.name.endsWith('.prisma') || item.name.endsWith('.css') || item.name.endsWith('.md') || item.name.match(/^(next\.config|tsconfig|postcss|tailwind)/i))) {
 6152:  29:         files.push(item.name);
 6153:  30:       }
 6154:  31:     }
 6155:  32:     for (const d of dirs) {
 6156:  33:       structure.push(`${prefix}├── ${d}/`);
 6157:  34:       walkDir(path.join(dir, d), prefix + '│   ');
 6158:  35:     }
 6159:  36:     for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
 6160:  37:       const isLast = i === files.length - 1 && dirs.length === 0;
 6161:  38:       structure.push(`${prefix}${isLast ? '└── ' : '├── '}${files[i]}`);
 6162:  39:     }
 6163:  40:   }
 6164:  41:   structure.push('HocVien-BRK/');
 6165:  42:   walkDir(PROJECT_ROOT);
 6166:  43:   return structure.join('\n');
 6167:  44: }
 6168:  45: function getAllSourceFiles(): { filePath: string; relativePath: string; category: string }[] {
 6169:  46:   const files: { filePath: string; relativePath: string; category: string }[] = [];
 6170:  47:   const seen = new Set<string>();
 6171:  48:   const extensions = ['.ts', '.tsx', '.json', '.prisma'];
 6172:  49:   function walkDir(dir: string) {
 6173:  50:     try {
 6174:  51:       const items = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
 6175:  52:       for (const item of items) {
 6176:  53:         const fullPath = path.join(dir, item.name);
 6177:  54:         const relativePath = path.relative(PROJECT_ROOT, fullPath).replace(/\\/g, '/');
 6178:  55:         if (relativePath.includes('node_modules') || 
 6179:  56:             relativePath.includes('.next') || 
 6180:  57:             relativePath.includes('test-github-run') ||
 6181:  58:             relativePath.includes('generate-code-history') ||
 6182:  59:             relativePath.includes('.agent') ||
 6183:  60:             relativePath.startsWith('.')) continue;
 6184:  61:         if (seen.has(relativePath)) continue;
 6185:  62:         if (item.isDirectory()) {
 6186:  63:           walkDir(fullPath);
 6187:  64:         } else if (item.isFile()) {
 6188:  65:           const ext = path.extname(item.name);
 6189:  66:           if (!extensions.includes(ext) && !item.name.match(/^(next\.config|tsconfig|postcss|tailwind)/i)) continue;
 6190:  67:           seen.add(relativePath);
 6191:  68:           let category = 'other';
 6192:  69:           if (relativePath.startsWith('app/actions/')) category = 'actions';
 6193:  70:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('app/api/')) category = 'api';
 6194:  71:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('app/admin/')) category = 'admin';
 6195:  72:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('app/courses/')) category = 'courses';
 6196:  73:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('components/')) category = 'components';
 6197:  74:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('lib/')) category = 'lib';
 6198:  75:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('prisma/')) category = 'prisma';
 6199:  76:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('scripts/')) category = 'scripts';
 6200:  77:           else if (relativePath.startsWith('types/')) category = 'types';
 6201:  78:           else if (relativePath === 'auth.ts' || relativePath === 'auth.config.ts' || relativePath === 'middleware.ts') category = 'auth';
 6202:  79:           else if (relativePath.includes('package.json') || relativePath.includes('tsconfig') || relativePath.includes('next.config')) category = 'config';
 6203:  80:           files.push({
 6204:  81:             filePath: fullPath,
 6205:  82:             relativePath,
 6206:  83:             category
 6207:  84:           });
 6208:  85:         }
 6209:  86:       }
 6210:  87:     } catch (e) {
 6211:  88:       // Ignore permission errors
 6212:  89:     }
 6213:  90:   }
 6214:  91:   walkDir(PROJECT_ROOT);
 6215:  92:   return files;
 6216:  93: }
 6217:  94: function readFileContent(filePath: string): string {
 6218:  95:   try {
 6219:  96:     return fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
 6220:  97:   } catch {
 6221:  98:     return '';
 6222:  99:   }
 6223: 100: }
 6224: 101: function generateMarkdown(): string {
 6225: 102:   const timestamp = getTimestamp();
 6226: 103:   const now = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
 6227: 104:   let md = `# CODE_HISTORY_${timestamp}.md
 6228: 105: ================================================================================
 6229: 106: PHIÊN BẢN: ${timestamp}
 6230: 107: NGÀY TẠO: ${now}
 6231: 108: MÔ TẢ: Tự động generate toàn bộ code dự án BRK Academy
 6232: 109: ================================================================================
 6233: 110: `;
 6234: 111:   md += `## CẤU TRÚC DỰ ÁN
 6235: 112: \`\`\`
 6236: 113: ${getProjectStructure()}
 6237: 114: \`\`\`
 6238: 115: `;
 6239: 116:   const files = getAllSourceFiles();
 6240: 117:   const categoryOrder = ['auth', 'config', 'prisma', 'lib', 'actions', 'api', 'components', 'admin', 'courses', 'scripts', 'types', 'other'];
 6241: 118:   for (const category of categoryOrder) {
 6242: 119:     const categoryFiles = files.filter(f => f.category === category);
 6243: 120:     if (categoryFiles.length === 0) continue;
 6244: 121:     md += `## ${category.toUpperCase()} FILES\n\n`;
 6245: 122:     for (const file of categoryFiles) {
 6246: 123:       const content = readFileContent(file.filePath);
 6247: 124:       if (!content) continue;
 6248: 125:       const ext = path.extname(file.relativePath);
 6249: 126:       const lang = ext === '.tsx' ? 'tsx' : ext === '.prisma' ? 'prisma' : 'ts';
 6250: 127:       md += `### ${file.relativePath}\n\n`;
 6251: 128:       md += `\`\`\`${lang}\n${content}\n\`\`\`\n\n`;
 6252: 129:     }
 6253: 130:   }
 6254: 131:   return md;
 6255: 132: }
 6256: 133: function main() {
 6257: 134:   console.log('🔄 Đang generate CODE_HISTORY...');
 6258: 135:   const timestamp = getTimestamp();
 6259: 136:   const outputFile = path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, `CODE_HISTORY_${timestamp}.md`);
 6260: 137:   const content = generateMarkdown();
 6261: 138:   fs.writeFileSync(outputFile, content, 'utf-8');
 6262: 139:   const stats = fs.statSync(outputFile);
 6263: 140:   const sizeKB = (stats.size / 1024).toFixed(2);
 6264: 141:   console.log(`✅ Đã tạo file: ${outputFile}`);
 6265: 142:   console.log(`📊 Kích thước: ${sizeKB} KB`);
 6266: 143: }
 6267: 144: main();
 6268: ````

 6276: ## File: scripts/import-lessons-from-csv.ts
 6277: ````typescript
 6278:  1: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
 6279:  2: import fs from 'fs'
 6280:  3: import csv from 'csv-parser'
 6281:  4: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 6282:  5: const COURSE_ID = 16
 6283:  6: interface CSVRow {
 6284:  7:   STT: string
 6285:  8:   'Tên File': string
 6286:  9:   'Link Chia Sẻ': string
 6287: 10: }
 6288: 11: async function main() {
 6289: 12:   console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu import lessons từ CSV...')
 6290: 13:   const results: CSVRow[] = []
 6291: 14:   fs.createReadStream('Danh sach bai hoc Mentor 7.csv')
 6292: 15:     .pipe(csv())
 6293: 16:     .on('data', (data) => results.push(data))
 6294: 17:     .on('end', async () => {
 6295: 18:       console.log(`📊 Đọc được ${results.length} dòng từ CSV`)
 6296: 19:       let successCount = 0
 6297: 20:       let errorCount = 0
 6298: 21:       for (const row of results) {
 6299: 22:         try {
 6300: 23:           const order = parseInt(row.STT)
 6301: 24:           const fileName = row['Tên File']
 6302: 25:           const rawUrl = row['Link Chia Sẻ']
 6303: 26:           if (isNaN(order)) {
 6304: 27:             console.log(`⚠️ STT không hợp lệ: ${row.STT}`)
 6305: 28:             errorCount++
 6306: 29:             continue
 6307: 30:           }
 6308: 31:           // Chuyển đổi link: /edit -> /preview (để embed)
 6309: 32:           let embedUrl = rawUrl
 6310: 33:           if (embedUrl.includes('/edit')) {
 6311: 34:             embedUrl = embedUrl.replace('/edit', '/preview')
 6312: 35:           }
 6313: 36:           // Tạo title từ tên file (lấy phần sau số ngày)
 6314: 37:           const title = fileName.replace(/^Ngay\d+-P💎\s*/, '').trim()
 6315: 38:           // Upsert lesson
 6316: 39:           await prisma.lesson.upsert({
 6317: 40:             where: {
 6318: 41:               courseId_order: {
 6319: 42:                 courseId: COURSE_ID,
 6320: 43:                 order: order
 6321: 44:               }
 6322: 45:             },
 6323: 46:             update: {
 6324: 47:               title: title,
 6325: 48:               videoUrl: embedUrl,
 6326: 49:               content: embedUrl
 6327: 50:             },
 6328: 51:             create: {
 6329: 52:               courseId: COURSE_ID,
 6330: 53:               order: order,
 6331: 54:               title: title,
 6332: 55:               videoUrl: embedUrl,
 6333: 56:               content: embedUrl
 6334: 57:             }
 6335: 58:           })
 6336: 59:           successCount++
 6337: 60:           console.log(`✅ Lesson ${order}: ${title.substring(0, 50)}...`)
 6338: 61:         } catch (error) {
 6339: 62:           errorCount++
 6340: 63:           console.error(`❌ Lỗi khi xử lý dòng:`, error)
 6341: 64:         }
 6342: 65:       }
 6343: 66:       console.log(`\n🎉 Hoàn thành!`)
 6344: 67:       console.log(`   - Thành công: ${successCount}`)
 6345: 68:       console.log(`   - Lỗi: ${errorCount}`)
 6346: 69:       await prisma.$disconnect()
 6347: 70:       process.exit(0)
 6348: 71:     })
 6349: 72: }
 6350: 73: main().catch(async (e) => {
 6351: 74:   console.error('❌ Lỗi nghiêm trọng:', e)
 6352: 75:   await prisma.$disconnect()
 6353: 76:   process.exit(1)
 6354: 77: })
 6355: ````
 6356: 
 6357: ## File: scripts/migrate-to-flow.ts
 6358: ````typescript
 6359:  1: import { surveyQuestions } from '../lib/survey-data';
 6360:  2: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
 6361:  3: const prisma = new PrismaClient();
 6362:  4: const ROADMAP_FLOW_KEY = 'ZERO_TO_HERO_FLOW';
 6363:  5: async function migrate() {
 6364:  6:   console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu chuyển đổi dữ liệu khảo sát cũ sang sơ đồ Mindmap...');
 6365:  7:   const nodes: any[] = [];
 6366:  8:   const edges: any[] = [];
 6367:  9:   let x = 100;
 6368: 10:   let y = 100;
 6369: 11:   const spacingX = 300;
 6370: 12:   const spacingY = 150;
 6371: 13:   // Duyệt qua các câu hỏi cũ
 6372: 14:   Object.keys(surveyQuestions).forEach((qId, qIndex) => {
 6373: 15:     const q = (surveyQuestions as any)[qId];
 6374: 16:     // 1. Tạo Node Câu hỏi
 6375: 17:     const questionNodeId = qId;
 6376: 18:     nodes.push({
 6377: 19:       id: questionNodeId,
 6378: 20:       type: 'questionNode',
 6379: 21:       position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX, y: y },
 6380: 22:       data: { label: q.question, type: q.type }
 6381: 23:     });
 6382: 24:     // 2. Tạo các Node Đáp án và nối dây
 6383: 25:     if (q.options) {
 6384: 26:       q.options.forEach((opt: any, optIndex: number) => {
 6385: 27:         const optionNodeId = `opt_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 6386: 28:         // Node Đáp án
 6387: 29:         nodes.push({
 6388: 30:           id: optionNodeId,
 6389: 31:           type: 'optionNode',
 6390: 32:           position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 100 - 50), y: y + spacingY },
 6391: 33:           data: { label: opt.label }
 6392: 34:         });
 6393: 35:         // Dây nối: Câu hỏi -> Đáp án
 6394: 36:         edges.push({
 6395: 37:           id: `e_${questionNodeId}_${optionNodeId}`,
 6396: 38:           source: questionNodeId,
 6397: 39:           target: optionNodeId
 6398: 40:         });
 6399: 41:         // Nếu có rẽ nhánh tiếp theo (nextQuestionId)
 6400: 42:         if (opt.nextQuestionId && opt.nextQuestionId !== 'done') {
 6401: 43:             // Dây nối: Đáp án -> Câu hỏi tiếp theo
 6402: 44:             edges.push({
 6403: 45:               id: `e_${optionNodeId}_${opt.nextQuestionId}`,
 6404: 46:               source: optionNodeId,
 6405: 47:               target: opt.nextQuestionId
 6406: 48:             });
 6407: 49:         }
 6408: 50:         // Nếu là tư vấn (isAdvice)
 6409: 51:         if (opt.isAdvice) {
 6410: 52:             const adviceNodeId = `advice_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 6411: 53:             nodes.push({
 6412: 54:                 id: adviceNodeId,
 6413: 55:                 type: 'adviceNode',
 6414: 56:                 position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX, y: y + spacingY * 2 },
 6415: 57:                 data: { label: 'https://youtube.com' }
 6416: 58:             });
 6417: 59:             edges.push({
 6418: 60:                 id: `e_${optionNodeId}_${adviceNodeId}`,
 6419: 61:                 source: optionNodeId,
 6420: 62:                 target: adviceNodeId
 6421: 63:             });
 6422: 64:         }
 6423: 65:       });
 6424: 66:     }
 6425: 67:   });
 6426: 68:   // Lưu vào Database
 6427: 69:   const flow = { nodes, edges };
 6428: 70:   await prisma.systemConfig.upsert({
 6429: 71:     where: { key: ROADMAP_FLOW_KEY },
 6430: 72:     update: { value: flow },
 6431: 73:     create: {
 6432: 74:       key: ROADMAP_FLOW_KEY,
 6433: 75:       value: flow
 6434: 76:     }
 6435: 77:   });
 6436: 78:   console.log('✅ Đã chuyển đổi thành công! Hãy vào trang Admin > Lộ trình để kiểm tra.');
 6437: 79: }
 6438: 80: migrate()
 6439: 81:   .catch(e => console.error(e))
 6440: 82:   .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect());
 6441: ````
 6442: 
 6443: ## File: scripts/payment-watcher.js
 6444: ````javascript
 6445:  1: require('dotenv').config()
 6446:  2: const { exec } = require('child_process');
 6447:  3: // Cấu hình thời gian quét (ví dụ: 3 phút = 180000ms)
 6448:  4: const CHECK_INTERVAL = 3 * 60 * 1000; 
 6449:  5: function runVerification() {
 6450:  6:     const now = new Date().toLocaleString();
 6451:  7:     console.log(`[${now}] 🔍 Đang quét email giao dịch mới...`);
 6452:  8:     // Chạy file auto-verify-payment.js (Tôi sẽ tạo bản JS để tránh lỗi thực thi TS-node)
 6453:  9:     exec('node scripts/auto-verify-payment.js', (error, stdout, stderr) => {
 6454: 10:         if (error) {
 6455: 11:             console.error(`[${now}] ❌ Lỗi khi chạy xác thực: ${error.message}`);
 6456: 12:             return;
 6457: 13:         }
 6458: 14:         if (stderr) {
 6459: 15:             console.log(`[${now}] ⚠️ Cảnh báo: ${stderr}`);
 6460: 16:         }
 6461: 17:         console.log(`[${now}] ✅ Kết quả: \n${stdout}`);
 6462: 18:     });
 6463: 19: }
 6464: 20: // Chạy lần đầu tiên ngay khi khởi động
 6465: 21: runVerification();
 6466: 22: // Thiết lập vòng lặp chạy định kỳ
 6467: 23: setInterval(runVerification, CHECK_INTERVAL);
 6468: 24: console.log('🚀 Payment Watcher đã khởi động!');
 6469: 25: console.log(`Hệ thống sẽ tự động quét Gmail mỗi ${CHECK_INTERVAL / 60000} phút.`);
 6470: 26: console.log('Nhấn Ctrl+C để dừng.');
 6471: ````
 6472: 
 6473: ## File: scripts/seed-initial-survey.js
 6474: ````javascript
 6475:  1: const { PrismaClient } = require('@prisma/client');
 6476:  2: const { surveyQuestions } = require('../lib/survey-data');
 6477:  3: const prisma = new PrismaClient();
 6478:  4: async function seedInitialSurvey() {
 6479:  5:   console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu chuyển đổi dữ liệu khảo sát tĩnh sang Database...');
 6480:  6:   const nodes = [];
 6481:  7:   const edges = [];
 6482:  8:   let x = 100;
 6483:  9:   let y = 100;
 6484: 10:   const spacingX = 450;
 6485: 11:   const spacingY = 200;
 6486: 12:   const questions = surveyQuestions;
 6487: 13:   const questionKeys = Object.keys(questions);
 6488: 14:   questionKeys.forEach((qId, qIndex) => {
 6489: 15:     const q = questions[qId];
 6490: 16:     // 1. Tạo Node Câu hỏi
 6491: 17:     nodes.push({
 6492: 18:       id: qId,
 6493: 19:       type: 'questionNode',
 6494: 20:       position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX, y: y },
 6495: 21:       data: { label: q.question, type: q.type }
 6496: 22:     });
 6497: 23:     // 2. Tạo các Node Đáp án và nối dây
 6498: 24:     if (Array.isArray(q.options)) {
 6499: 25:       q.options.forEach((opt, optIndex) => {
 6500: 26:         const optionNodeId = `opt_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 6501: 27:         // Node Đáp án
 6502: 28:         nodes.push({
 6503: 29:           id: optionNodeId,
 6504: 30:           type: 'optionNode',
 6505: 31:           position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 180 - 150), y: y + spacingY },
 6506: 32:           data: { label: opt.label }
 6507: 33:         });
 6508: 34:         // Dây nối: Câu hỏi -> Đáp án
 6509: 35:         edges.push({
 6510: 36:           id: `e_${qId}_${optionNodeId}`,
 6511: 37:           source: qId,
 6512: 38:           target: optionNodeId
 6513: 39:         });
 6514: 40:         // Nếu có rẽ nhánh tiếp theo (nextQuestionId)
 6515: 41:         if (opt.nextQuestionId && opt.nextQuestionId !== 'done') {
 6516: 42:             // Dây nối: Đáp án -> Câu hỏi tiếp theo
 6517: 43:             edges.push({
 6518: 44:               id: `e_${optionNodeId}_${opt.nextQuestionId}`,
 6519: 45:               source: optionNodeId,
 6520: 46:               target: opt.nextQuestionId
 6521: 47:             });
 6522: 48:         }
 6523: 49:         // Nếu là tư vấn (isAdvice)
 6524: 50:         if (opt.isAdvice) {
 6525: 51:             const adviceNodeId = `advice_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 6526: 52:             nodes.push({
 6527: 53:                 id: adviceNodeId,
 6528: 54:                 type: 'adviceNode',
 6529: 55:                 position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 180 - 150), y: y + spacingY * 2 },
 6530: 56:                 data: { label: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ' }
 6531: 57:             });
 6532: 58:             edges.push({
 6533: 59:                 id: `e_${optionNodeId}_${adviceNodeId}`,
 6534: 60:                 source: optionNodeId,
 6535: 61:                 target: adviceNodeId
 6536: 62:             });
 6537: 63:         }
 6538: 64:       });
 6539: 65:     }
 6540: 66:   });
 6541: 67:   try {
 6542: 68:     // Lưu vào Database bài khảo sát đầu tiên
 6543: 69:     const survey = await prisma.survey.create({
 6544: 70:       data: {
 6545: 71:         name: 'Lộ trình Zero 2 Hero (Bản gốc)',
 6546: 72:         description: 'Bài khảo sát mặc định được chuyển đổi từ mã nguồn tĩnh.',
 6547: 73:         flow: { nodes, edges },
 6548: 74:         isActive: true
 6549: 75:       }
 6550: 76:     });
 6551: 77:     console.log(`✅ Thành công! Đã tạo bài khảo sát với ID: ${survey.id}`);
 6552: 78:     console.log('💡 Bây giờ học viên sẽ thực hiện khảo sát dựa trên dữ liệu trong Database.');
 6553: 79:   } catch (error) {
 6554: 80:     console.error('❌ Lỗi khi lưu vào Database:', error.message);
 6555: 81:   }
 6556: 82: }
 6557: 83: seedInitialSurvey()
 6558: 84:   .catch(e => console.error(e))
 6559: 85:   .finally(async () => await prisma.$disconnect());
 6560: ````
 6561: 
 6562: ## File: scripts/seed-lessons.ts
 6563: ````typescript
 6564:  1: import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'
 6565:  2: const prisma = new PrismaClient()
 6566:  3: async function main() {
 6567:  4:     console.log('--- SEEDING LESSONS ---')
 6568:  5:     // 1. Khóa Tiếp thị liên kết (AF06) - 21 ngày
 6569:  6:     const af06 = await (prisma as any).course.findUnique({ where: { id_khoa: 'AF06' } })
 6570:  7:     if (af06) {
 6571:  8:         console.log(`Found AF06 with ID: ${af06.id}`)
 6572:  9:         for (let i = 1; i <= 21; i++) {
 6573: 10:             await (prisma as any).lesson.upsert({
 6574: 11:                 where: { courseId_order: { courseId: af06.id, order: i } },
 6575: 12:                 update: {},
 6576: 13:                 create: {
 6577: 14:                     id: `AF06_L${i}`,
 6578: 15:                     courseId: af06.id,
 6579: 16:                     order: i,
 6580: 17:                     title: `Bài ${i}: Nội dung thực chiến ngày ${i}`,
 6581: 18:                     videoUrl: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ', // Placeholder
 6582: 19:                     content: `Nội dung hướng dẫn chi tiết cho ngày thứ ${i} của lộ trình Affiliate.`
 6583: 20:                 }
 6584: 21:             })
 6585: 22:         }
 6586: 23:     }
 6587: 24:     // 2. Khóa Nhân hiệu từ gốc (NH06) - 21 ngày
 6588: 25:     const nh06 = await (prisma as any).course.findUnique({ where: { id_khoa: 'NH06' } })
 6589: 26:     if (nh06) {
 6590: 27:         for (let i = 1; i <= 21; i++) {
 6591: 28:             await (prisma as any).lesson.upsert({
 6592: 29:                 where: { courseId_order: { courseId: nh06.id, order: i } },
 6593: 30:                 update: {},
 6594: 31:                 create: {
 6595: 32:                     id: `NH06_L${i}`,
 6596: 33:                     courseId: nh06.id,
 6597: 34:                     order: i,
 6598: 35:                     title: `Bài ${i}: Xây dựng nhân hiệu ngày ${i}`,
 6599: 36:                     videoUrl: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ',
 6600: 37:                     content: `Bước thứ ${i} trong hành trình xây dựng nhân hiệu từ gốc.`
 6601: 38:                 }
 6602: 39:             })
 6603: 40:         }
 6604: 41:     }
 6605: 42:     // 3. Khóa Thử thách độc lập
 6606: 43:     let challengeCourse = await (prisma as any).course.findUnique({ where: { id_khoa: 'CHALLENGE_DAILY' } })
 6607: 44:     if (!challengeCourse) {
 6608: 45:         console.log('Creating CHALLENGE_DAILY course...')
 6609: 46:         challengeCourse = await (prisma as any).course.create({
 6610: 47:             data: {
 6611: 48:                 id_khoa: 'CHALLENGE_DAILY',
 6612: 49:                 name_lop: 'Thử thách rèn luyện hàng ngày',
 6613: 50:                 name_khoa: 'BRK Discipline',
 6614: 51:                 type: 'CHALLENGE',
 6615: 52:                 phi_coc: 0,
 6616: 53:                 status: true,
 6617: 54:                 mo_ta_ngan: 'Chương trình rèn luyện kỷ luật 7-90 ngày tùy chọn.',
 6618: 55:                 mo_ta_dai: 'Tham gia thử thách để rèn luyện thói quen nộp bài tâm đắc ngộ và thực hành mỗi ngày.'
 6619: 56:             }
 6620: 57:         })
 6621: 58:     } else {
 6622: 59:         await (prisma as any).course.update({
 6623: 60:             where: { id: challengeCourse.id },
 6624: 61:             data: { type: 'CHALLENGE' }
 6625: 62:         })
 6626: 63:     }
 6627: 64:     // Seed cho Challenge Course (Giả sử tối đa 90 ngày)
 6628: 65:     for (let i = 1; i <= 90; i++) {
 6629: 66:         await (prisma as any).lesson.upsert({
 6630: 67:             where: { courseId_order: { courseId: challengeCourse.id, order: i } },
 6631: 68:             update: { isDailyChallenge: true },
 6632: 69:             create: {
 6633: 70:                 id: `CHALLENGE_D${i}`,
 6634: 71:                 courseId: challengeCourse.id,
 6635: 72:                 order: i,
 6636: 73:                 title: `Ngày ${i}: Rèn luyện kỷ luật`,
 6637: 74:                 isDailyChallenge: true,
 6638: 75:                 content: `Ngày thứ ${i} trong chuỗi thử thách rèn luyện. Tập trung vào Tâm đắc ngộ và Thực hành mới.`
 6639: 76:             }
 6640: 77:         })
 6641: 78:     }
 6642: 79:     console.log('✅ Seeding completed.')
 6643: 80: }
 6644: 81: main()
 6645: 82:     .catch((e) => {
 6646: 83:         console.error(e)
 6647: 84:         process.exit(1)
 6648: 85:     })
 6649: 86:     .finally(async () => {
 6650: 87:         await prisma.$disconnect()
 6651: 88:     })
 6652: ````
