 8151: ## File: app/api/webhooks/gmail/route.ts
 8152: ````typescript
 8153:  1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
 8154:  2: import { processPaymentEmails } from '@/lib/auto-verify';
 8155:  3: export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
 8156:  4:   try {
 8157:  5:     // Nhận thông báo từ Google Pub/Sub
 8158:  6:     console.log('📩 Nhận được thông báo Push từ Gmail!');
 8159:  7:     // Gọi trực tiếp logic xử lý thanh toán
 8160:  8:     const result = await processPaymentEmails();
 8161:  9:     console.log(`✅ Kết quả Webhook: Đã quét ${result?.processed} email, khớp ${result?.matched} giao dịch.`);
 8162: 10:     return NextResponse.json({ status: 'ok', ...result }, { status: 200 });
 8163: 11:   } catch (error: any) {
 8164: 12:     console.error('⚠️ Webhook Error:', error);
 8165: 13:     return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
 8166: 14:   }
 8167: 15: }
 8168: ````
 8169: 
 8170: ## File: app/login/page.tsx
 8171: ````typescript
 8172:   1: 'use client'
 8173:   2: import { signIn } from "next-auth/react"
 8174:   3: import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"
 8175:   4: import { useState } from "react"
 8176:   5: import Link from "next/link"
 8177:   6: import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
 8178:   7: import { Loader2, Eye, EyeOff } from "lucide-react"
 8179:   8: export default function LoginPage() {
 8180:   9:     const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
 8181:  10:     const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
 8182:  11:     const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false)
 8183:  12:     const router = useRouter()
 8184:  13:     const { register, handleSubmit, formState: { errors } } = useForm({
 8185:  14:         defaultValues: {
 8186:  15:             identifier: "",
 8187:  16:             password: ""
 8188:  17:         }
 8189:  18:     })
 8190:  19:     async function onSubmit(data: any) {
 8191:  20:         setIsLoading(true)
 8192:  21:         setError(null)
 8193:  22:         try {
 8194:  23:             const result = await signIn("credentials", {
 8195:  24:                 identifier: data.identifier,
 8196:  25:                 password: data.password,
 8197:  26:                 redirect: false,
 8198:  27:             })
 8199:  28:             if (result?.error) {
 8200:  29:                 setError("Invalid credentials. Please try again.")
 8201:  30:             } else {
 8202:  31:                 router.push("/")
 8203:  32:                 router.refresh()
 8204:  33:             }
 8205:  34:         } catch (err) {
 8206:  35:             setError("An unexpected error occurred.")
 8207:  36:         } finally {
 8208:  37:             setIsLoading(false)
 8209:  38:         }
 8210:  39:     }
 8211:  40:     const handleGoogleSignIn = () => {
 8212:  41:         setIsLoading(true)
 8213:  42:         signIn("google", { callbackUrl: "/" })
 8214:  43:     }
 8215:  44:     return (
 8216:  45:         <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-zinc-900 to-black flex items-center justify-center p-4">
 8217:  46:             <div className="w-full max-w-sm">
 8218:  47:                 {/* Logo */}
 8219:  48:                 <div className="text-center mb-8">
 8220:  49:                     <h1 className="text-2xl font-black text-white tracking-tight">HỌC VIỆN BRK</h1>
 8221:  50:                     <p className="text-zinc-400 text-sm mt-1">Đăng nhập để tiếp tục hành trình</p>
 8222:  51:                 </div>
 8223:  52:                 <div className="bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 space-y-5 shadow-2xl">
 8224:  53:                     {/* Google */}
 8225:  54:                     <button
 8226:  55:                         onClick={handleGoogleSignIn}
 8227:  56:                         disabled={isLoading}
 8228:  57:                         className="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-zinc-600 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
 8229:  58:                     >
 8230:  59:                         <svg className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" viewBox="0 0 488 512"><path fill="currentColor" d="M488 261.8C488 403.3 391.1 504 248 504 110.8 504 0 393.2 0 256S110.8 8 248 8c66.8 0 123 24.5 166.3 64.9l-67.5 64.9C258.5 52.6 94.3 116.6 94.3 256c0 86.5 69.1 156.6 153.7 156.6 98.2 0 135-70.4 140.8-106.9H248v-85.3h236.1c2.3 12.7 3.9 24.9 3.9 41.4z" /></svg>
 8231:  60:                         Đăng nhập bằng Google
 8232:  61:                     </button>
 8233:  62:                     <div className="relative">
 8234:  63:                         <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center"><div className="w-full border-t border-zinc-700" /></div>
 8235:  64:                         <div className="relative flex justify-center text-xs"><span className="bg-transparent px-2 text-zinc-500">hoặc dùng tài khoản</span></div>
 8236:  65:                     </div>
 8237:  66:                     <form onSubmit={handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4">
 8238:  67:                         {error && (
 8239:  68:                             <div className="rounded-lg bg-red-900/30 border border-red-700/50 p-3 text-sm text-red-400">{error}</div>
 8240:  69:                         )}
 8241:  70:                         <div>
 8242:  71:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 mb-1.5">Email / SĐT / Mã học viên</label>
 8243:  72:                             <input
 8244:  73:                                 {...register("identifier", { required: "Vui lòng nhập thông tin" })}
 8245:  74:                                 type="text"
 8246:  75:                                 autoComplete="username"
 8247:  76:                                 className="w-full rounded-xl border border-zinc-700 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 text-white text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:border-orange-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500"
 8248:  77:                                 placeholder="Nhập email hoặc mã học viên"
 8249:  78:                             />
 8250:  79:                             {errors.identifier && <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-400">{errors.identifier.message}</p>}
 8251:  80:                         </div>
 8252:  81:                         <div>
 8253:  82:                             <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-zinc-300 mb-1.5">Mật khẩu</label>
 8254:  83:                             <div className="relative">
 8255:  84:                                 <input
 8256:  85:                                     {...register("password", { required: "Vui lòng nhập mật khẩu" })}
 8257:  86:                                     type={showPassword ? "text" : "password"}
 8258:  87:                                     autoComplete="current-password"
 8259:  88:                                     className="w-full rounded-xl border border-zinc-700 bg-white/5 px-4 py-3 pr-10 text-white text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:border-orange-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500"
 8260:  89:                                     placeholder="••••••••"
 8261:  90:                                 />
 8262:  91:                                 <button
 8263:  92:                                     type="button"
 8264:  93:                                     onClick={() => setShowPassword(!showPassword)}
 8265:  94:                                     className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white"
 8266:  95:                                 >
 8267:  96:                                     {showPassword ? <EyeOff className="h-5 w-5" /> : <Eye className="h-5 w-5" />}
 8268:  97:                                 </button>
 8269:  98:                             </div>
 8270:  99:                             {errors.password && <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-red-400">{errors.password.message}</p>}
 8271: 100:                         </div>
 8272: 101:                         <button
 8273: 102:                             type="submit"
 8274: 103:                             disabled={isLoading}
 8275: 104:                             className="w-full rounded-xl bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold text-white transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
 8276: 105:                         >
 8277: 106:                             {isLoading ? <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /> : 'Đăng nhập'}
 8278: 107:                         </button>
 8279: 108:                     </form>
 8280: 109:                     <p className="text-center text-sm text-zinc-500">
 8281: 110:                         Chưa có tài khoản?{' '}
 8282: 111:                         <Link href="/register" className="font-semibold text-orange-400 hover:text-orange-300">Đăng ký ngay</Link>
 8283: 112:                     </p>
 8284: 113:                 </div>
 8285: 114:             </div>
 8286: 115:         </div>
 8287: 116:     )
 8288: 117: }
 8289: ````

 8291: ## File: DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
 8292: ````markdown
 8293:  1: # HỆ THỐNG THIẾT KẾ (DESIGN SYSTEM) - HỌC VIỆN BRK
 8294:  2: 
 8295:  3: Tài liệu này lưu trữ các thông số kỹ thuật về giao diện (UI) của dự án. Mọi thay đổi trong code sẽ được cập nhật đồng bộ vào đây.
 8296:  4: 
 8297:  5: ## 1. THÔNG SỐ CHUNG (GLOBAL)
 8298:  6: 
 8299:  7: | Đối tượng | Thông số | Chi tiết |
 8300:  8: | :--- | :--- | :--- |
 8301:  9: | **Phông chữ (Font)** | `Be Vietnam Pro` | Phông chữ chính toàn trang, hỗ trợ tiếng Việt hoàn hảo. |
 8302: 10: | **Màu nền (Background)** | `bg-black` / `bg-zinc-950` | Tone màu đen chủ đạo cho toàn bộ hệ thống Elite. |
 8303: 11: | **Màu chữ chính** | `text-white` | Màu trắng tinh khôi cho độ tương phản cao trên nền đen. |
 8304: 12: 
 8305: 13: ## 2. THANH ĐIỀU HƯỚNG (HEADER)
 8306: 14: 
 8307: 15: | Thành phần | Font & Kích thước | Màu sắc | Nội dung & Vị trí |
 8308: 16: | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
 8309: 17: | **Brand Logo** | `Image` (h-12, w-auto) | `logobrk-50px.png` | Logo hình ảnh - Góc trái. |
 8310: 18: | **Menu Desktop** | `text-[13px]`, `font-black`, `tracking-widest` | `white`, Hover: `yellow-400` | TRANG CHỦ, KHÓA HỌC... - Căn giữa. |
 8311: 19: | **Thông tin Học viên**| `text-[10px]/[13px]`, `font-black` | `yellow-300` | "CHÀO, [Tên] (ID: [Mã])" - Góc phải. |
 8312: 20: | **Nút Đăng xuất** | `text-xs`, `font-black` | Nền `white`, Chữ `black` | "ĐĂNG XUẤT" - Bo tròn full. |
 8313: 21: | **Mobile Menu** | `text-sm`, `font-black` | Nền `black`, Chữ `white` | Hiện khi bấm biểu tượng Ba gạch (Hamburger). |
 8314: 22: 
 8315: 23: ## 3. KHU VỰC TRUNG TÂM (HERO SECTION)
 8316: 24: 
 8317: 25: | Thành phần | Font & Kích thước | Màu sắc | Hiệu ứng & Vị trí |
 8318: 26: | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
 8319: 27: | **Tiêu đề chính** | `text-3xl/5xl/6xl`, `font-black` | `white` (Opacity 90%) | "HỌC VIỆN BRK" - Dòng trên, VIẾT HOA. |
 8320: 28: | **Tiêu đề phụ** | `text-2xl/4xl/5xl`, `font-black` | `yellow-400` (Glow) | "NGÂN HÀNG PHƯỚC BÁU" - Dòng dưới, VIẾT HOA. |
 8321: 29: | **Hiệu ứng Glow** | N/A | Vàng Lóe Sáng | Hiệu ứng 3D huyền bí, lóe sáng liên tục. |
 8322: 30: | **Khoảng cách** | `gap-6` | N/A | Khoảng cách giữa 2 dòng tiêu đề. |
 8323: 31: 
 8324: 32: ## 4. THẺ KHÓA HỌC (COURSE CARD)
 8325: 33: 
 8326: 34: | Thành phần | Font & Kích thước | Màu sắc | Quy cách hiển thị |
 8327: 35: | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
 8328: 36: | **Ảnh minh họa** | `aspect-[16/9]`, `object-cover` | `full-width` | Tỉ lệ chuẩn 16:9 (tương đương 1280x720). |
 8329: 37: | **Biểu tượng (Icon)** | `text-2xl` (📘) | Blue | Căn giữa hoàn hảo với dòng tiêu đề. |
 8330: 38: | **Tên khóa học** | `text-base/lg`, `font-black`, `Normal Case`, `Inter` | `black` | Hiển thị TRÊN 1 DÒNG duy nhất (Truncate). |
 8331: 39: | **Nhãn Phí cam kết**| `text-[10px]/[11px]`, `font-black` | Nền `Red`, Chữ `White` | Bo tròn full, bóng đổ nhẹ. |
 8332: 40: | **Nhãn Miễn phí** | `text-[10px]/[11px]`, `font-black` | Nền `Yellow`, Chữ `Black`| Bo tròn full, nổi bật. |
 8333: 41: | **Nhãn Kích hoạt** | `text-[10px]/[11px]`, `font-black` | Nền `Sky-500`, Chữ `White`| "ĐÃ KÍCH HOẠT" - Đồng bộ màu nút. |
 8334: 42: | **Mô tả ngắn** | `text-[14px]`, `medium` | `gray-500` | HIỆN ĐẦY ĐỦ nôi dung, không dùng line-clamp. |
 8335: 43: | **Nút Kích hoạt ngay**| `text-sm/base`, `font-black` | Nền `Sky-500`, Chữ `White`| "Kích hoạt miễn phí/ngay" - Bo tròn full. |
 8336: 44: | **Nút Vào học ngay** | `text-sm/base`, `font-black` | Nền `Green-600`, Chữ `White`| "VÀO HỌC NGAY" - Bo tròn full. |
 8337: 45: 
 8338: 46: ---
 8339: 47: *Lưu ý: Tài liệu này được cập nhật tự động bởi Antigravity Agent.*
 8340: ````
 8341: 
 8342: ## File: lib/email-parser.ts
 8343: ````typescript
 8344:   1: export interface ParsedTransfer {
 8345:   2:   phone: string | null;
 8346:   3:   userId: number | null; // Thêm userId
 8347:   4:   amount: number;
 8348:   5:   courseCode: string | null;
 8349:   6:   bankName: string | null;
 8350:   7:   accountNumber: string | null;
 8351:   8:   transferTime: Date | null;
 8352:   9:   rawContent: string;
 8353:  10: }
 8354:  11: interface BankParser {
 8355:  12:   pattern: RegExp;
 8356:  13:   extract: (matches: RegExpMatchArray) => ParsedTransfer;
 8357:  14: }
 8358:  15: const bankParsers: BankParser[] = [
 8359:  16:   // Mới: SDT 123456 HV 8286 COC LS03 (linh hoạt khoảng trống, dấu chấm, gạch dưới)
 8360:  17:   {
 8361:  18:     pattern: /SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})[\s\._]*HV[\s\._]*(\d+)[\s\._]*COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i,
 8362:  19:     extract: (matches) => ({
 8363:  20:       phone: matches[1],
 8364:  21:       userId: parseInt(matches[2]),
 8365:  22:       courseCode: matches[3].toUpperCase(), // Chuyển sang chữ hoa ngay lập tức
 8366:  23:       amount: 0,
 8367:  24:       bankName: null,
 8368:  25:       accountNumber: null,
 8369:  26:       transferTime: null,
 8370:  27:       rawContent: matches[0]
 8371:  28:     })
 8372:  29:   },
 8373:  30:   {
 8374:  31:     pattern: /(\d{10,11})\s*c[oó]\s*(\w+)|(\w+)\s*c[oó]\s*(\d{10,11})/i,
 8375:  32:     extract: (matches) => ({
 8376:  33:       phone: matches[1] || matches[4] || null,
 8377:  34:       userId: null,
 8378:  35:       amount: 0,
 8379:  36:       courseCode: matches[2] || matches[3] || null,
 8380:  37:       bankName: null,
 8381:  38:       accountNumber: null,
 8382:  39:       transferTime: null,
 8383:  40:       rawContent: matches[0]
 8384:  41:     })
 8385:  42:   },
 8386:  43:   {
 8387:  44:     pattern: /ND:\s*(\d{10,11})\s+(\w+)|(\w+)\s+(\d{10,11})/i,
 8388:  45:     extract: (matches) => ({
 8389:  46:       phone: matches[1] || matches[4] || null,
 8390:  47:       userId: null,
 8391:  48:       amount: 0,
 8392:  49:       courseCode: matches[2] || matches[3] || null,
 8393:  50:       bankName: null,
 8394:  51:       accountNumber: null,
 8395:  52:       transferTime: null,
 8396:  53:       rawContent: matches[0]
 8397:  54:     })
 8398:  55:   },
 8399:  56:   {
 8400:  57:     pattern: /(\d{10,11}).*?(c[oó]?|nạp).*?(\w{2,10})/i,
 8401:  58:     extract: (matches) => ({
 8402:  59:       phone: matches[1] || null,
 8403:  60:       userId: null,
 8404:  61:       amount: 0,
 8405:  62:       courseCode: matches[3] || null,
 8406:  63:       bankName: null,
 8407:  64:       accountNumber: null,
 8408:  65:       transferTime: null,
 8409:  66:       rawContent: matches[0]
 8410:  67:     })
 8411:  68:   }
 8412:  69: ];
 8413:  70: export function parseBankEmail(content: string): ParsedTransfer | null {
 8414:  71:   const normalizedContent = content.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
 8415:  72:   for (const parser of bankParsers) {
 8416:  73:     const matches = normalizedContent.match(parser.pattern);
 8417:  74:     if (matches) {
 8418:  75:       return parser.extract(matches);
 8419:  76:     }
 8420:  77:   }
 8421:  78:   const phoneMatch = normalizedContent.match(/(\d{10,11})/);
 8422:  79:   const courseMatch = normalizedContent.match(/c[oó]\s*(\w{2,10})|(\w{2,10})\s*c[oó]/i);
 8423:  80:   if (phoneMatch || courseMatch) {
 8424:  81:     return {
 8425:  82:       phone: phoneMatch?.[1] || null,
 8426:  83:       userId: null,
 8427:  84:       amount: 0,
 8428:  85:       courseCode: courseMatch?.[1] || courseMatch?.[2] || null,
 8429:  86:       bankName: null,
 8430:  87:       accountNumber: null,
 8431:  88:       transferTime: null,
 8432:  89:       rawContent: normalizedContent.substring(0, 200)
 8433:  90:     };
 8434:  91:   }
 8435:  92:   return null;
 8436:  93: }
 8437:  94: export function extractAmount(content: string): number {
 8438:  95:   const amountPatterns = [
 8439:  96:     /(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*)\s*đ/gi,
 8440:  97:     /SMT:\s*(\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*)/gi,
 8441:  98:     /(\d{6,12})/g
 8442:  99:   ];
 8443: 100:   for (const pattern of amountPatterns) {
 8444: 101:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
 8445: 102:     if (matches) {
 8446: 103:       const amountStr = matches[0]
 8447: 104:         .replace(/\D/g, '')
 8448: 105:         .replace(/^0+/, '');
 8449: 106:       const amount = parseInt(amountStr, 10);
 8450: 107:       if (amount >= 10000 && amount <= 1000000000) {
 8451: 108:         return amount;
 8452: 109:       }
 8453: 110:     }
 8454: 111:   }
 8455: 112:   return 0;
 8456: 113: }
 8457: 114: export function extractBankName(content: string): string | null {
 8458: 115:   const bankNames = [
 8459: 116:     'Vietcombank', 'VCB',
 8460: 117:     'Techcombank', 'TCB',
 8461: 118:     'MB Bank', 'MBBank', 'MB',
 8462: 119:     'BIDV',
 8463: 120:     'Agribank', 'AGRIBANK',
 8464: 121:     'ACB',
 8465: 122:     'Vietinbank', 'VTB',
 8466: 123:     'TPBank', 'TPB',
 8467: 124:     'Sacombank', 'SCB',
 8468: 125:     'SHB',
 8469: 126:     'SeABank',
 8470: 127:     'Eximbank', 'EIB',
 8471: 128:     'HD Bank',
 8472: 129:     'Bac A Bank', 'BAB',
 8473: 130:     'Oceanbank',
 8474: 131:     'GPBank',
 8475: 132:     'Kiên Long', 'KLB',
 8476: 133:     'Nam A Bank', 'NAB',
 8477: 134:     'PGBank',
 8478: 135:     'Public Bank', 'PB',
 8479: 136:     'Saigonbank', 'SGB'
 8480: 137:   ];
 8481: 138:   const upperContent = content.toUpperCase();
 8482: 139:   for (const bank of bankNames) {
 8483: 140:     if (upperContent.includes(bank.toUpperCase())) {
 8484: 141:       return bank;
 8485: 142:     }
 8486: 143:   }
 8487: 144:   return null;
 8488: 145: }
 8489: 146: export function extractAccountNumber(content: string): string | null {
 8490: 147:   const patterns = [
 8491: 148:     /STK[:\s]*(\d{6,20})/i,
 8492: 149:     /TK[:\s]*(\d{6,20})/i,
 8493: 150:     /(\d{6,20})/g
 8494: 151:   ];
 8495: 152:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
 8496: 153:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
 8497: 154:     if (matches && matches[1]) {
 8498: 155:       return matches[1];
 8499: 156:     }
 8500: 157:   }
 8501: 158:   return null;
 8502: 159: }
 8503: 160: export function extractTransferTime(content: string): Date | null {
 8504: 161:   const patterns = [
 8505: 162:     /(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})\s+(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/,
 8506: 163:     /(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})/,
 8507: 164:     /(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})\s+(\d{2})[\/\-](\d{2})[\/\-](\d{4})/
 8508: 165:   ];
 8509: 166:   for (const pattern of patterns) {
 8510: 167:     const matches = content.match(pattern);
 8511: 168:     if (matches) {
 8512: 169:       try {
 8513: 170:         if (matches.length >= 6) {
 8514: 171:           const [_, d1, d2, y, h, min] = matches;
 8515: 172:           return new Date(`${y}-${d2}-${d1}T${h || '00'}:${min || '00'}:00`);
 8516: 173:         }
 8517: 174:       } catch {
 8518: 175:         continue;
 8519: 176:       }
 8520: 177:     }
 8521: 178:   }
 8522: 179:   return null;
 8523: 180: }
 8524: 181: export interface FullParsedTransfer {
 8525: 182:   phone: string | null;
 8526: 183:   userId: number | null; // Thêm userId
 8527: 184:   amount: number;
 8528: 185:   courseCode: string | null;
 8529: 186:   bankName: string | null;
 8530: 187:   accountNumber: string | null;
 8531: 188:   transferTime: Date | null;
 8532: 189:   rawContent: string;
 8533: 190: }
 8534: 191: export function parseFullTransferEmail(content: string): FullParsedTransfer {
 8535: 192:   const parsed = parseBankEmail(content);
 8536: 193:   const amount = extractAmount(content);
 8537: 194:   const bankName = extractBankName(content);
 8538: 195:   const accountNumber = extractAccountNumber(content);
 8539: 196:   const transferTime = extractTransferTime(content);
 8540: 197:   return {
 8541: 198:     phone: parsed?.phone || null,
 8542: 199:     userId: parsed?.userId || null,
 8543: 200:     amount,
 8544: 201:     courseCode: parsed?.courseCode || null,
 8545: 202:     bankName,
 8546: 203:     accountNumber,
 8547: 204:     transferTime,
 8548: 205:     rawContent: content.substring(0, 500)
 8549: 206:   };
 8550: 207: }
 8551: 208: export function matchWithEnrollment(
 8552: 209:   transfer: FullParsedTransfer,
 8553: 210:   enrollments: Array<{
 8554: 211:     id: number;
 8555: 212:     userId: number; // Thêm userId vào input
 8556: 213:     courseId: number;
 8557: 214:     course: {
 8558: 215:       id_khoa: string;
 8559: 216:       phi_coc: number;
 8560: 217:       noidung_stk: string | null;
 8561: 218:     };
 8562: 219:     user: {
 8563: 220:       phone: string | null;
 8564: 221:     };
 8565: 222:     status: string;
 8566: 223:   }>
 8567: 224: ): { matched: boolean; enrollmentId: number | null; reason: string } {
 8568: 225:   for (const enrollment of enrollments) {
 8569: 226:     if (enrollment.status !== 'PENDING') continue;
 8570: 227:     const courseCode = enrollment.course.id_khoa.toUpperCase();
 8571: 228:     const transferCourseCode = transfer.courseCode?.toUpperCase();
 8572: 229:     // Khớp mã khóa học
 8573: 230:     const courseCodeMatch = transferCourseCode && 
 8574: 231:       (courseCode.includes(transferCourseCode) || transferCourseCode.includes(courseCode));
 8575: 232:     // Khớp số tiền
 8576: 233:     const amountMatch = transfer.amount >= enrollment.course.phi_coc;
 8577: 234:     // Ưu tiên 1: Khớp theo userId
 8578: 235:     const userIdMatch = transfer.userId && transfer.userId === enrollment.userId;
 8579: 236:     if (userIdMatch && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch) {
 8580: 237:       return {
 8581: 238:         matched: true,
 8582: 239:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
 8583: 240:         reason: `Khớp tuyệt đối: Mã HV ${transfer.userId} + Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
 8584: 241:       };
 8585: 242:     }
 8586: 243:     // Ưu tiên 2: Khớp theo SĐT (6 số cuối hoặc full)
 8587: 244:     const userPhone = enrollment.user.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || '';
 8588: 245:     const transferPhone = transfer.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || '';
 8589: 246:     const phoneMatch = transferPhone && userPhone && userPhone.includes(transferPhone);
 8590: 247:     if (phoneMatch && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch) {
 8591: 248:       return {
 8592: 249:         matched: true,
 8593: 250:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
 8594: 251:         reason: `Khớp: SĐT ${transfer.phone} + Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
 8595: 252:       };
 8596: 253:     }
 8597: 254:     // Ưu tiên 3: Chỉ khớp SĐT + Số tiền
 8598: 255:     if (phoneMatch && amountMatch && !transfer.courseCode) {
 8599: 256:       return {
 8600: 257:         matched: true,
 8601: 258:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
 8602: 259:         reason: `Khớp: SĐT ${transfer.phone} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
 8603: 260:       };
 8604: 261:     }
 8605: 262:     // Ưu tiên 4: Chỉ khớp Mã KH + Số tiền
 8606: 263:     if (courseCodeMatch && amountMatch && !transfer.phone && !transfer.userId) {
 8607: 264:       return {
 8608: 265:         matched: true,
 8609: 266:         enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
 8610: 267:         reason: `Khớp: Mã KH ${transfer.courseCode} + Số tiền ${transfer.amount}`
 8611: 268:       };
 8612: 269:     }
 8613: 270:   }
 8614: 271:   return {
 8615: 272:     matched: false,
 8616: 273:     enrollmentId: null,
 8617: 274:     reason: 'Không tìm thấy enrollment phù hợp'
 8618: 275:   };
 8619: 276: }
 8620: ````
 8621: 
 8622: ## File: lib/vietqr.ts
 8623: ````typescript
 8624:   1: export interface VietQRRequest {
 8625:   2:   accountNo: string
 8626:   3:   accountName: string
 8627:   4:   acqId: string
 8628:   5:   amount: number
 8629:   6:   addInfo: string
 8630:   7:   template?: string
 8631:   8:   format?: string
 8632:   9: }
 8633:  10: export interface VietQRResponse {
 8634:  11:   code: string
 8635:  12:   desc: string
 8636:  13:   data: {
 8637:  14:     qrCode: string
 8638:  15:     qrDataURL: string
 8639:  16:   }
 8640:  17: }
 8641:  18: export function generateTransferContent(options: {
 8642:  19:   phone: string
 8643:  20:   userId: number
 8644:  21:   courseCode: string
 8645:  22: }): string {
 8646:  23:   // Format: SDT [phone_cuoi] HV [id] COC [code]
 8647:  24:   const { phone, userId, courseCode } = options
 8648:  25:   const cleanPhone = phone.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-6)
 8649:  26:   const content = `SDT ${cleanPhone} HV ${userId} COC ${courseCode}`.toUpperCase()
 8650:  27:   return content.slice(0, 50) // Tăng giới hạn ký tự lên 50 vì có khoảng cách
 8651:  28: }
 8652:  29: export async function generateVietQR(options: {
 8653:  30:   accountNo: string
 8654:  31:   accountName: string
 8655:  32:   acqId: string // Nhận bank_stk từ Course
 8656:  33:   amount: number
 8657:  34:   addInfo: string
 8658:  35: }): Promise<{ qrCode: string; qrDataURL: string }> {
 8659:  36:   // Map tên ngân hàng sang mã BIN
 8660:  37:   const bankMap: Record<string, string> = {
 8661:  38:     'SACOMBANK': '970403',
 8662:  39:     'VIETCOMBANK': '970436',
 8663:  40:     'VCB': '970436',
 8664:  41:     'ACB': '970416',
 8665:  42:     'MBBANK': '970422',
 8666:  43:     'MB': '970422',
 8667:  44:     'TECHCOMBANK': '970407',
 8668:  45:     'TCB': '970407',
 8669:  46:     'VIETINBANK': '970415',
 8670:  47:     'CTG': '970415',
 8671:  48:     'BIDV': '970418',
 8672:  49:     'AGRIBANK': '970405',
 8673:  50:     'TPBANK': '970423',
 8674:  51:     'VPBANK': '970432'
 8675:  52:   }
 8676:  53:   const bankId = bankMap[options.acqId?.toUpperCase()] || options.acqId || '970403'
 8677:  54:   const requestBody: VietQRRequest = {
 8678:  55:     accountNo: options.accountNo,
 8679:  56:     accountName: options.accountName.toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z ]/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' '),
 8680:  57:     acqId: bankId,
 8681:  58:     amount: options.amount,
 8682:  59:     addInfo: options.addInfo,
 8683:  60:     template: 'qr_only',
 8684:  61:     format: 'text'
 8685:  62:   }
 8686:  63:   const response = await fetch('https://api.vietqr.io/v2/generate', {
 8687:  64:     method: 'POST',
 8688:  65:     headers: {
 8689:  66:       'x-client-id': process.env.VIETQR_CLIENT_ID || '',
 8690:  67:       'x-api-key': process.env.VIETQR_API_KEY || '',
 8691:  68:       'Content-Type': 'application/json'
 8692:  69:     },
 8693:  70:     body: JSON.stringify(requestBody)
 8694:  71:   })
 8695:  72:   if (!response.ok) {
 8696:  73:     const errorText = await response.text()
 8697:  74:     throw new Error(`VietQR API error: ${response.status} - ${errorText}`)
 8698:  75:   }
 8699:  76:   const data: VietQRResponse = await response.json()
 8700:  77:   if (data.code !== '00') {
 8701:  78:     throw new Error(`VietQR error: ${data.desc}`)
 8702:  79:   }
 8703:  80:   return {
 8704:  81:     qrCode: data.data.qrCode,
 8705:  82:     qrDataURL: data.data.qrDataURL
 8706:  83:   }
 8707:  84: }
 8708:  85: export async function createPaymentQR(options: {
 8709:  86:   phone: string
 8710:  87:   userId: number
 8711:  88:   courseId: number
 8712:  89:   courseCode: string
 8713:  90:   accountNo: string
 8714:  91:   accountName: string
 8715:  92:   acqId: string // Thêm acqId
 8716:  93:   amount: number
 8717:  94: }): Promise<{
 8718:  95:   transferContent: string
 8719:  96:   qrCodeUrl: string
 8720:  97: }> {
 8721:  98:   const transferContent = generateTransferContent({
 8722:  99:     phone: options.phone,
 8723: 100:     userId: options.userId,
 8724: 101:     courseCode: options.courseCode
 8725: 102:   })
 8726: 103:   const qrResult = await generateVietQR({
 8727: 104:     accountNo: options.accountNo,
 8728: 105:     accountName: options.accountName,
 8729: 106:     acqId: options.acqId, // Truyền acqId vào
 8730: 107:     amount: options.amount,
 8731: 108:     addInfo: transferContent
 8732: 109:   })
 8733: 110:   return {
 8734: 111:     transferContent,
 8735: 112:     qrCodeUrl: qrResult.qrDataURL
 8736: 113:   }
 8737: 114: }
 8738: ````

 8740: ## File: scripts/push.ps1
 8741: ````powershell
 8742:   1: # ============================================================
 8743:   2: #  push.ps1 - Backup + Push len GitHub
 8744:   3: #  Usage: .\scripts\push.ps1 "Noi dung ghi chu"
 8745:   4: # ============================================================
 8746:   5: 
 8747:   6: param (
 8748:   7:     [string]$Message = "Cap nhat he thong BRK Academy"
 8749:   8: )
 8750:   9: 
 8751:  10: $ProjectRoot = (Resolve-Path "$PSScriptRoot\..").Path
 8752:  11: 
 8753:  12: # ── BUOC 1: BACKUP ──────────────────────────────────────────
 8754:  13: $Timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm"
 8755:  14: $BackupDir = "$ProjectRoot\backups"
 8756:  15: $ZipName = "backup_$Timestamp.zip"
 8757:  16: $ZipPath = "$BackupDir\$ZipName"
 8758:  17: $TempDir = Join-Path ([System.IO.Path]::GetTempPath()) "BRK_Backup_$Timestamp"
 8759:  18: 
 8760:  19: Write-Host ""
 8761:  20: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8762:  21: Write-Host "  [1/2] BACKUP DU AN" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8763:  22: Write-Host "  Time   : $Timestamp" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8764:  23: Write-Host "  Output : $ZipPath" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8765:  24: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8766:  25: 
 8767:  26: $IncludePaths = @(
 8768:  27:     "app", "components", "lib", "types", "public",
 8769:  28:     "auth.ts", "auth.config.ts", "middleware.ts", ".env", ".env.local",
 8770:  29:     "prisma", "scripts",
 8771:  30:     "package.json", "next.config.ts", "tsconfig.json", "tsconfig.seed.json",
 8772:  31:     "postcss.config.mjs", "eslint.config.mjs", "docker-compose.yml",
 8773:  32:     "README.md", "DESIGN_SYSTEM.md"
 8774:  33: )
 8775:  34: $ExcludePatterns = @("*.log", "*.tsbuildinfo", ".next", "node_modules", ".git", "backups")
 8776:  35: 
 8777:  36: if (-not (Test-Path $BackupDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $BackupDir | Out-Null }
 8778:  37: if (Test-Path $TempDir) { Remove-Item -Path $TempDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null }
 8779:  38: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $TempDir | Out-Null
 8780:  39: 
 8781:  40: $FilesToBackup = @()
 8782:  41: foreach ($rel in $IncludePaths) {
 8783:  42:     $full = Join-Path $ProjectRoot $rel
 8784:  43:     if (Test-Path $full -PathType Leaf) {
 8785:  44:         $FilesToBackup += $full
 8786:  45:     }
 8787:  46:     elseif (Test-Path $full -PathType Container) {
 8788:  47:         foreach ($file in (Get-ChildItem -Path $full -File -Recurse)) {
 8789:  48:             $skip = $false
 8790:  49:             foreach ($p in $ExcludePatterns) {
 8791:  50:                 if ($file.FullName -like "*\$p\*" -or $file.Name -like $p) { $skip = $true; break }
 8792:  51:             }
 8793:  52:             if (-not $skip) { $FilesToBackup += $file.FullName }
 8794:  53:         }
 8795:  54:     }
 8796:  55: }
 8797:  56: 
 8798:  57: foreach ($filePath in $FilesToBackup) {
 8799:  58:     $rel = $filePath.Substring($ProjectRoot.Length).TrimStart('\', '/')
 8800:  59:     $dest = Join-Path $TempDir $rel
 8801:  60:     $dir = Split-Path -Parent $dest
 8802:  61:     if (-not (Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force | Out-Null }
 8803:  62:     Copy-Item -Path $filePath -Destination $dest -Force
 8804:  63: }
 8805:  64: 
 8806:  65: try {
 8807:  66:     Compress-Archive -Path "$TempDir\*" -DestinationPath $ZipPath -Force
 8808:  67:     $sizeMB = [math]::Round((Get-Item $ZipPath).Length / 1MB, 2)
 8809:  68:     Write-Host "[OK] Backup xong: $ZipName ($sizeMB MB, $($FilesToBackup.Count) files)" -ForegroundColor Green
 8810:  69: }
 8811:  70: catch {
 8812:  71:     Write-Host "[LOI] Khong the tao ZIP: $($_.Exception.Message)" -ForegroundColor Red
 8813:  72: }
 8814:  73: 
 8815:  74: # Xoa temp va giu toi da 5 ban backup gan nhat
 8816:  75: if (Test-Path $TempDir) { Remove-Item -Path $TempDir -Recurse -Force | Out-Null }
 8817:  76: $old = Get-ChildItem -Path $BackupDir -Filter "backup_*.zip" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -Skip 5
 8818:  77: if ($old.Count -gt 0) {
 8819:  78:     Write-Host "[*] Xoa $($old.Count) backup cu..." -ForegroundColor Gray
 8820:  79:     $old | Remove-Item -Force
 8821:  80: }
 8822:  81: 
 8823:  82: # ── BUOC 2: PUSH LEN GITHUB ─────────────────────────────────
 8824:  83: Write-Host ""
 8825:  84: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8826:  85: Write-Host "  [2/2] DAY CODE LEN GITHUB" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8827:  86: Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan
 8828:  87: 
 8829:  88: Write-Host "> Dang gom cac thay doi..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
 8830:  89: git add .
 8831:  90: 
 8832:  91: $status = git status --porcelain
 8833:  92: if ($status) {
 8834:  93:     Write-Host "> Commit: '$Message'" -ForegroundColor Yellow
 8835:  94:     git commit -m $Message
 8836:  95: }
 8837:  96: else {
 8838:  97:     Write-Host "> Khong co thay doi moi de commit." -ForegroundColor Gray
 8839:  98: }
 8840:  99: 
 8841: 100: Write-Host "> Dang day len nhanh master..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
 8842: 101: git push origin master
 8843: 102: 
 8844: 103: if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) {
 8845: 104:     Write-Host ""
 8846: 105:     Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Green
 8847: 106:     Write-Host "  HOAN THANH! Backup + Push thanh cong" -ForegroundColor Green
 8848: 107:     Write-Host "======================================" -ForegroundColor Green
 8849: 108: }
 8850: 109: else {
 8851: 110:     Write-Host "[LOI] Push that bai! Kiem tra ket noi hoac xung dot code." -ForegroundColor Red
 8852: 111: }
 8853: ````
 8854:

 8867: ## File: app/actions/message-actions.ts
 8868: ````typescript
 8869:  1: 'use server'
 8870:  2: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
 8871:  3: export async function getRandomMessage() {
 8872:  4:     const count = await prisma.message.count({ 
 8873:  5:         where: { isActive: true } 
 8874:  6:     })
 8875:  7:     if (count === 0) return null
 8876:  8:     const random = Math.floor(Math.random() * count)
 8877:  9:     return await prisma.message.findFirst({
 8878: 10:         where: { isActive: true },
 8879: 11:         skip: random
 8880: 12:     })
 8881: 13: }
 8882: 14: export async function getAllMessages() {
 8883: 15:     return await prisma.message.findMany({
 8884: 16:         where: { isActive: true },
 8885: 17:         orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }
 8886: 18:     })
 8887: 19: }
 8888: ````

 8890: ## File: app/admin/roadmap/page.tsx
 8891: ````typescript
 8892:   1: 'use client'
 8893:   2: import React, { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
 8894:   3: import {
 8895:   4:   ReactFlow,
 8896:   5:   MiniMap,
 8897:   6:   Controls,
 8898:   7:   Background,
 8899:   8:   useNodesState,
 8900:   9:   useEdgesState,
 8901:  10:   addEdge,
 8902:  11:   Panel,
 8903:  12:   ReactFlowProvider,
 8904:  13: } from '@xyflow/react';
 8905:  14: import '@xyflow/react/dist/style.css';
 8906:  15: import { QuestionNode, OptionNode, CourseNode, AdviceNode } from '@/components/admin/roadmap/CustomNodes';
 8907:  16: import { 
 8908:  17:   getAllSurveys, createSurvey, 
 8909:  18:   saveSurveyFlow, activateSurvey, deleteSurvey, 
 8910:  19:   getCoursesForBuilder 
 8911:  20: } from '@/app/actions/roadmap-actions';
 8912:  21: import { surveyQuestions } from '@/lib/survey-data';
 8913:  22: import { Loader2, ArrowLeft, Plus, CheckCircle, Trash2, Edit3, Settings, Save, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
 8914:  23: // Định nghĩa các loại Node tùy chỉnh
 8915:  24: const nodeTypes = {
 8916:  25:   questionNode: QuestionNode,
 8917:  26:   optionNode: OptionNode,
 8918:  27:   courseNode: CourseNode,
 8919:  28:   adviceNode: AdviceNode,
 8920:  29: };
 8921:  30: let idCounter = 0;
 8922:  31: const getId = () => `node_${Date.now()}_${idCounter++}`;
 8923:  32: const RoadmapBuilderContent = () => {
 8924:  33:   const [view, setView] = useState<'LIST' | 'EDITOR'>('LIST');
 8925:  34:   const [currentSurveyId, setCurrentSurveyId] = useState<number | null>(null);
 8926:  35:   const [surveys, setSurveys] = useState<any[]>([]);
 8927:  36:   const [isInitializing, setIsInitializing] = useState(true);
 8928:  37:   // Editor states
 8929:  38:   const reactFlowWrapper = useRef<any>(null);
 8930:  39:   const [nodes, setNodes, onNodesChange] = useNodesState<any>([]);
 8931:  40:   const [edges, setEdges, onEdgesChange] = useEdgesState<any>([]);
 8932:  41:   const [reactFlowInstance, setReactFlowInstance] = useState<any>(null);
 8933:  42:   const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<any>(null);
 8934:  43:   const [courses, setCourses] = useState<any[]>([]);
 8935:  44:   const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false);
 8936:  45:   // Load danh sách ban đầu
 8937:  46:   useEffect(() => {
 8938:  47:     loadSurveys();
 8939:  48:     loadCourses();
 8940:  49:   }, []);
 8941:  50:   const loadSurveys = async () => {
 8942:  51:     try {
 8943:  52:         setIsInitializing(true);
 8944:  53:         const list = await getAllSurveys();
 8945:  54:         // TỰ ĐỘNG KHỞI TẠO BẢN GỐC NẾU CHƯA CÓ BÀI NÀO
 8946:  55:         if (list.length === 0) {
 8947:  56:             console.log('🌱 Đang tự động khởi tạo bài khảo sát bản gốc...');
 8948:  57:             const newNodes: any[] = [];
 8949:  58:             const newEdges: any[] = [];
 8950:  59:             let x = 100, y = 100, spacingX = 400, spacingY = 180;
 8951:  60:             const questions = surveyQuestions as any;
 8952:  61:             Object.keys(questions).forEach((qId, qIndex) => {
 8953:  62:               const q = questions[qId];
 8954:  63:               newNodes.push({ id: qId, type: 'questionNode', position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX, y }, data: { label: q.question, type: q.type }});
 8955:  64:               if (Array.isArray(q.options)) {
 8956:  65:                 q.options.forEach((opt: any, optIndex: number) => {
 8957:  66:                   const optNodeId = `opt_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 8958:  67:                   newNodes.push({ id: optNodeId, type: 'optionNode', position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 160 - 120), y: y + spacingY }, data: { label: opt.label }});
 8959:  68:                   newEdges.push({ id: `e_${qId}_${optNodeId}`, source: qId, target: optNodeId });
 8960:  69:                   if (opt.nextQuestionId && opt.nextQuestionId !== 'done') {
 8961:  70:                       newEdges.push({ id: `e_${optNodeId}_${opt.nextQuestionId}`, source: optNodeId, target: opt.nextQuestionId });
 8962:  71:                   }
 8963:  72:                 });
 8964:  73:               }
 8965:  74:             });
 8966:  75:             const res = await createSurvey('Lộ trình Zero 2 Hero (Bản gốc)');
 8967:  76:             if (res.success && res.survey) {
 8968:  77:                 await saveSurveyFlow(res.survey.id, { nodes: newNodes, edges: newEdges });
 8969:  78:                 await activateSurvey(res.survey.id);
 8970:  79:                 const updatedList = await getAllSurveys();
 8971:  80:                 setSurveys(updatedList);
 8972:  81:             }
 8973:  82:         } else {
 8974:  83:             setSurveys(list);
 8975:  84:         }
 8976:  85:     } catch (err) {
 8977:  86:         console.error(err);
 8978:  87:     } finally {
 8979:  88:         setIsInitializing(false);
 8980:  89:     }
 8981:  90:   };
 8982:  91:   const loadCourses = async () => {
 8983:  92:     try {
 8984:  93:         const list = await getCoursesForBuilder();
 8985:  94:         setCourses(list || []);
 8986:  95:     } catch (err) {
 8987:  96:         console.error(err);
 8988:  97:     }
 8989:  98:   };
 8990:  99:   // ─── XỬ LÝ DANH SÁCH ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
 8991: 100:   const handleCreateNew = async () => {
 8992: 101:     const name = window.prompt('Nhập tên cho bài khảo sát mới:');
 8993: 102:     if (!name) return;
 8994: 103:     try {
 8995: 104:         const res = await createSurvey(name);
 8996: 105:         if (res.success) {
 8997: 106:           loadSurveys();
 8998: 107:         } else {
 8999: 108:           alert(res.error);
 9000: 109:         }
 9001: 110:     } catch (err) {
 9002: 111:         alert('Lỗi hệ thống khi tạo mới');
 9003: 112:     }
 9004: 113:   };
 9005: 114:   const handleEdit = (survey: any) => {
 9006: 115:     setCurrentSurveyId(survey.id);
 9007: 116:     const flow = survey.flow as any;
 9008: 117:     setNodes(Array.isArray(flow?.nodes) ? flow.nodes : []);
 9009: 118:     setEdges(Array.isArray(flow?.edges) ? flow.edges : []);
 9010: 119:     setView('EDITOR');
 9011: 120:     // Reset selected node
 9012: 121:     setSelectedNode(null);
 9013: 122:   };
 9014: 123:   const handleActivate = async (id: number) => {
 9015: 124:     if (window.confirm('Bạn có muốn kích hoạt bài khảo sát này và tạm dừng bài hiện tại không?')) {
 9016: 125:       try {
 9017: 126:           const res = await activateSurvey(id);
 9018: 127:           if (res.success) {
 9019: 128:               loadSurveys();
 9020: 129:           } else {
 9021: 130:               alert(res.error);
 9022: 131:           }
 9023: 132:       } catch (err) {
 9024: 133:           alert('Lỗi khi kích hoạt');
 9025: 134:       }
 9026: 135:     }
 9027: 136:   };
 9028: 137:   const handleDelete = async (id: number) => {
 9029: 138:     if (window.confirm('Xóa vĩnh viễn bài khảo sát này? Thao tác không thể hoàn tác.')) {
 9030: 139:       try {
 9031: 140:           const res = await deleteSurvey(id);
 9032: 141:           if (res.success) {
 9033: 142:               loadSurveys();
 9034: 143:           } else {
 9035: 144:               alert(res.error);
 9036: 145:           }
 9037: 146:       } catch (err) {
 9038: 147:           alert('Lỗi khi xóa');
 9039: 148:       }
 9040: 149:     }
 9041: 150:   };
 9042: 151:   // ─── XỬ LÝ EDITOR (REACT FLOW) ─────────────────────────────────────────
 9043: 152:   const onSave = async () => {
 9044: 153:     if (!currentSurveyId) return;
 9045: 154:     setIsSaving(true);
 9046: 155:     try {
 9047: 156:         const result = await saveSurveyFlow(currentSurveyId, { nodes, edges });
 9048: 157:         if (result.success) {
 9049: 158:           alert('Đã lưu bài khảo sát thành công!');
 9050: 159:           // Cập nhật lại danh sách ngầm
 9051: 160:           const updatedSurveys = await getAllSurveys();
 9052: 161:           setSurveys(updatedSurveys);
 9053: 162:         } else {
 9054: 163:           alert('Lỗi: ' + result.error);
 9055: 164:         }
 9056: 165:     } catch (err) {
 9057: 166:         console.error(err);
 9058: 167:         alert('Lỗi hệ thống khi lưu');
 9059: 168:     } finally {
 9060: 169:         setIsSaving(false);
 9061: 170:     }
 9062: 171:   };
 9063: 172:   const onConnect = useCallback(
 9064: 173:     (params: any) => setEdges((eds: any) => addEdge(params, eds)),
 9065: 174:     [setEdges]
 9066: 175:   );
 9067: 176:   const onDragOver = useCallback((event: any) => {
 9068: 177:     event.preventDefault();
 9069: 178:     if (event.dataTransfer) {
 9070: 179:         event.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
 9071: 180:     }
 9072: 181:   }, []);
 9073: 182:   const onDrop = useCallback(
 9074: 183:     (event: any) => {
 9075: 184:       event.preventDefault();
 9076: 185:       if (!reactFlowInstance || !event.dataTransfer) return;
 9077: 186:       const type = event.dataTransfer.getData('application/reactflow');
 9078: 187:       if (!type) return;
 9079: 188:       const position = reactFlowInstance.screenToFlowPosition({
 9080: 189:         x: event.clientX,
 9081: 190:         y: event.clientY,
 9082: 191:       });
 9083: 192:       const newNode = {
 9084: 193:         id: getId(),
 9085: 194:         type,
 9086: 195:         position,
 9087: 196:         data: { label: `Nội dung ${type === 'questionNode' ? 'câu hỏi' : 'mới'}...` },
 9088: 197:       };
 9089: 198:       setNodes((nds: any) => nds.concat(newNode));
 9090: 199:     },
 9091: 200:     [reactFlowInstance, setNodes]
 9092: 201:   );
 9093: 202:   const onMigrateFromOldVersion = () => {
 9094: 203:     if (!window.confirm('CẢNH BÁO: Thao tác này sẽ XÓA TOÀN BỘ sơ đồ hiện tại và nạp lại dữ liệu từ file code gốc. Bạn có chắc chắn?')) return;
 9095: 204:     const newNodes: any[] = [];
 9096: 205:     const newEdges: any[] = [];
 9097: 206:     let x = 100, y = 100, spacingX = 400, spacingY = 180;
 9098: 207:     const questions = surveyQuestions as any;
 9099: 208:     Object.keys(questions).forEach((qId, qIndex) => {
 9100: 209:       const q = questions[qId];
 9101: 210:       // Node Câu hỏi
 9102: 211:       newNodes.push({ 
 9103: 212:         id: qId, 
 9104: 213:         type: 'questionNode', 
 9105: 214:         position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX, y }, 
 9106: 215:         data: { label: q.question, type: q.type }
 9107: 216:       });
 9108: 217:       if (Array.isArray(q.options)) {
 9109: 218:         q.options.forEach((opt: any, optIndex: number) => {
 9110: 219:           const optNodeId = `opt_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 9111: 220:           // Node Đáp án
 9112: 221:           newNodes.push({ 
 9113: 222:             id: optNodeId, 
 9114: 223:             type: 'optionNode', 
 9115: 224:             position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 160 - 120), y: y + spacingY }, 
 9116: 225:             data: { label: opt.label }
 9117: 226:           });
 9118: 227:           // Edge: Câu hỏi -> Đáp án
 9119: 228:           newEdges.push({ id: `e_${qId}_${optNodeId}`, source: qId, target: optNodeId });
 9120: 229:           // Edge: Đáp án -> Câu hỏi tiếp theo
 9121: 230:           if (opt.nextQuestionId && opt.nextQuestionId !== 'done') {
 9122: 231:               newEdges.push({ id: `e_${optNodeId}_${opt.nextQuestionId}`, source: optNodeId, target: opt.nextQuestionId });
 9123: 232:           }
 9124: 233:           // Node Tư vấn nếu có
 9125: 234:           if (opt.isAdvice) {
 9126: 235:               const adviceNodeId = `advice_${qId}_${opt.id}`;
 9127: 236:               newNodes.push({
 9128: 237:                   id: adviceNodeId,
 9129: 238:                   type: 'adviceNode',
 9130: 239:                   position: { x: x + qIndex * spacingX + (optIndex * 160 - 120), y: y + spacingY * 2 },
 9131: 240:                   data: { label: 'https://youtube.com' }
 9132: 241:               });
 9133: 242:               newEdges.push({ id: `e_${optNodeId}_${adviceNodeId}`, source: optNodeId, target: adviceNodeId });
 9134: 243:           }
 9135: 244:         });
 9136: 245:       }
 9137: 246:     });
 9138: 247:     setNodes(newNodes);
 9139: 248:     setEdges(newEdges);
 9140: 249:   };
 9141: 250:   const updateNodeData = (newData: any) => {
 9142: 251:     if (!selectedNode) return;
 9143: 252:     setNodes((nds: any) => nds.map((node: any) => 
 9144: 253:         node.id === selectedNode.id ? { ...node, data: { ...node.data, ...newData } } : node
 9145: 254:     ));
 9146: 255:     setSelectedNode({ ...selectedNode, data: { ...selectedNode.data, ...newData } });
 9147: 256:   };
 9148: 257:   if (isInitializing) return (
 9149: 258:     <div className="p-20 flex flex-col items-center justify-center space-y-4">
 9150: 259:         <Loader2 className="w-10 h-10 animate-spin text-yellow-400" />
 9151: 260:         <p className="text-gray-400 font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest">Đang khởi tạo hệ thống...</p>
 9152: 261:     </div>
 9153: 262:   );
 9154: 263:   // VIEW: DANH SÁCH BÀI KHẢO SÁT
 9155: 264:   if (view === 'LIST') return (
 9156: 265:     <div className="space-y-8 animate-in fade-in duration-500 text-black max-w-6xl mx-auto">
 9157: 266:       <div className="flex justify-between items-end border-b border-gray-200 pb-6">
 9158: 267:         <div>
 9159: 268:           <h2 className="text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter italic flex items-center gap-3">
 9160: 269:             <Settings className="w-8 h-8 text-yellow-400" /> Quản lý bài khảo sát
 9161: 270:           </h2>
 9162: 271:           <p className="text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest mt-2 ml-1">Hệ thống Lộ trình cá nhân hóa BRK</p>
 9163: 272:         </div>
 9164: 273:         <button 
 9165: 274:             onClick={handleCreateNew} 
 9166: 275:             className="bg-black text-yellow-400 px-8 py-4 rounded-[2rem] font-black uppercase text-xs flex items-center gap-2 hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-2xl hover:shadow-yellow-400/20 active:scale-95"
 9167: 276:         >
 9168: 277:           <Plus className="w-5 h-5" /> Tạo bài khảo sát mới
 9169: 278:         </button>
 9170: 279:       </div>
 9171: 280:       <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
 9172: 281:         {surveys.length === 0 && (
 9173: 282:             <div className="col-span-full py-20 text-center bg-gray-50 rounded-[3rem] border-2 border-dashed border-gray-200">
 9174: 283:                 <p className="text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase text-xs">Chưa có bài khảo sát nào. Hãy tạo bài đầu tiên!</p>
 9175: 284:             </div>
 9176: 285:         )}
 9177: 286:         {surveys.map((survey) => (
 9178: 287:           <div key={survey.id} className={`bg-white rounded-[3rem] p-8 border-2 transition-all group relative overflow-hidden ${survey.isActive ? 'border-green-500 shadow-2xl shadow-green-500/10' : 'border-gray-100 hover:border-gray-300'}`}>
 9179: 288:             {survey.isActive && (
 9180: 289:                 <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 bg-green-500 text-white px-6 py-1.5 rounded-bl-[1.5rem] text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-lg">
 9181: 290:                     Đang chạy
 9182: 291:                 </div>
 9183: 292:             )}
 9184: 293:             <div className="mb-8">
 9185: 294:                 <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-black mb-2 uppercase tracking-tight line-clamp-1">{survey.name}</h3>
 9186: 295:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-400 text-[9px] font-black uppercase italic">
 9187: 296:                     <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" />
 9188: 297:                     Cập nhật: {new Date(survey.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')}
 9189: 298:                 </div>
 9190: 299:             </div>
 9191: 300:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3">
 9192: 301:               <button 
 9193: 302:                 onClick={() => handleEdit(survey)} 
 9194: 303:                 className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 bg-zinc-900 text-white py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest hover:bg-black transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-black/10"
 9195: 304:               >
 9196: 305:                 <Edit3 className="w-4 h-4" /> Chỉnh sửa sơ đồ
 9197: 306:               </button>
 9198: 307:               <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
 9199: 308:                   {!survey.isActive ? (
 9200: 309:                     <button 
 9201: 310:                         onClick={() => handleActivate(survey.id)} 
 9202: 311:                         className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-green-50 text-green-600 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[9px] tracking-tighter hover:bg-green-500 hover:text-white transition-all active:scale-95"
 9203: 312:                     >
 9204: 313:                       <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Kích hoạt ngay
 9205: 314:                     </button>
 9206: 315:                   ) : (
 9207: 316:                     <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-green-500 text-white py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[9px] tracking-tighter cursor-default">
 9208: 317:                       <CheckCircle className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Đang sử dụng
 9209: 318:                     </div>
 9210: 319:                   )}
 9211: 320:                   <button 
 9212: 321:                     onClick={() => handleDelete(survey.id)} 
 9213: 322:                     className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-red-50 text-red-500 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[9px] tracking-tighter hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white transition-all active:scale-95"
 9214: 323:                   >
 9215: 324:                     <Trash2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Xóa bài
 9216: 325:                   </button>
 9217: 326:               </div>
 9218: 327:             </div>
 9219: 328:           </div>
 9220: 329:         ))}
 9221: 330:       </div>
 9222: 331:     </div>
 9223: 332:   );
 9224: 333:   // VIEW: TRÌNH THIẾT KẾ SƠ ĐỒ (EDITOR)
 9225: 334:   return (
 9226: 335:     <div className="h-[calc(100vh-150px)] flex flex-col bg-white rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500 text-black relative">
 9227: 336:       {/* Header Editor */}
 9228: 337:       <div className="bg-black p-5 flex justify-between items-center z-50">
 9229: 338:         <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
 9230: 339:             <button 
 9231: 340:                 onClick={() => setView('LIST')} 
 9232: 341:                 className="p-3 bg-white/10 text-white rounded-2xl hover:bg-white/20 transition-all active:scale-90"
 9233: 342:             >
 9234: 343:                 <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
 9235: 344:             </button>
 9236: 345:             <div>
 9237: 346:                 <h2 className="text-white font-black uppercase tracking-tighter text-sm italic flex items-center gap-2">
 9238: 347:                     <span className="text-yellow-400">Thiết kế:</span> {surveys.find(s => s.id === currentSurveyId)?.name}
 9239: 348:                 </h2>
 9240: 349:                 <p className="text-[9px] font-black text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest mt-0.5">Dựng lộ trình rẽ nhánh cho học viên</p>
 9241: 350:             </div>
 9242: 351:             <button 
 9243: 352:                 onClick={onMigrateFromOldVersion} 
 9244: 353:                 className="bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/20 px-4 py-2 rounded-xl font-black text-[9px] uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white/20 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
 9245: 354:             >
 9246: 355:                 <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" /> Nạp từ bản cũ
 9247: 356:             </button>
 9248: 357:         </div>
 9249: 358:         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 9250: 359:             {isSaving && <span className="text-yellow-400 text-[9px] font-black uppercase animate-pulse">Đang đồng bộ...</span>}
 9251: 360:             <button 
 9252: 361:                 onClick={onSave} 
 9253: 362:                 disabled={isSaving} 
 9254: 363:                 className="bg-yellow-400 text-black px-10 py-3 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[11px] hover:scale-105 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 flex items-center gap-2 shadow-xl shadow-yellow-400/20 active:scale-95"
 9255: 364:             >
 9256: 365:               <Save className="w-4 h-4" /> Lưu sơ đồ
 9257: 366:             </button>
 9258: 367:         </div>
 9259: 368:       </div>
 9260: 369:       <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden" ref={reactFlowWrapper}>
 9261: 370:         {/* Sidebar Tools */}
 9262: 371:         <aside className="w-72 bg-gray-50 border-r border-gray-200 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar">
 9263: 372:           <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-2 border-b border-gray-200 pb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
 9264: 373:             <Plus className="w-3 h-3" /> Thư viện khối kiến trúc
 9265: 374:           </div>
 9266: 375:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3">
 9267: 376:             {[
 9268: 377:               { type: 'questionNode', color: 'orange', label: '❓ CÂU HỎI', desc: 'Nhập nội dung khảo sát' },
 9269: 378:               { type: 'optionNode', color: 'zinc', label: '🔘 ĐÁP ÁN', desc: 'Các lựa chọn rẽ nhánh' },
 9270: 379:               { type: 'courseNode', color: 'purple', label: '🎓 KHÓA HỌC', desc: 'Khóa học được cấp ra' },
 9271: 380:               { type: 'adviceNode', color: 'blue', label: '💡 TƯ VẤN', desc: 'Video/Nội dung định hướng' }
 9272: 381:             ].map(tool => (
 9273: 382:               <div 
 9274: 383:                 key={tool.type} 
 9275: 384:                 className={`p-4 bg-white border-2 border-gray-100 rounded-2xl cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing hover:border-${tool.color === 'zinc' ? 'gray' : tool.color}-500 transition-all group shadow-sm`} 
 9276: 385:                 onDragStart={(e) => e.dataTransfer.setData('application/reactflow', tool.type)} 
 9277: 386:                 draggable
 9278: 387:               >
 9279: 388:                 <div className={`text-${tool.color === 'zinc' ? 'gray' : tool.color}-600 text-[11px] font-black uppercase group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform`}>
 9280: 389:                     {tool.label}
 9281: 390:                 </div>
 9282: 391:                 <div className="text-[9px] text-gray-400 font-bold mt-1 uppercase italic">{tool.desc}</div>
 9283: 392:               </div>
 9284: 393:             ))}
 9285: 394:           </div>
 9286: 395:           {/* Properties Panel (Hiện ra khi click vào Node) */}
 9287: 396:           {selectedNode && (
 9288: 397:             <div className="mt-8 pt-8 border-t-2 border-dashed border-gray-200 space-y-5 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-4 duration-300">
 9289: 398:               <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
 9290: 399:                 <div className="text-[10px] font-black text-black uppercase tracking-widest bg-yellow-400 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg shadow-sm">
 9291: 400:                     Cấu hình khối
 9292: 401:                 </div>
 9293: 402:                 <button onClick={() => setSelectedNode(null)} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-black transition-colors text-[10px] font-black uppercase">Đóng</button>
 9294: 403:               </div>
 9295: 404:               <div className="space-y-4 bg-white p-5 rounded-[2rem] border-2 border-gray-100 shadow-sm">
 9296: 405:                   <div className="space-y-1.5">
 9297: 406:                     <label className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1 italic">Nội dung hiển thị</label>
 9298: 407:                     <textarea 
 9299: 408:                         className="w-full p-4 text-xs font-bold border-2 border-gray-50 rounded-2xl outline-none focus:ring-4 ring-yellow-400/20 focus:border-yellow-400 transition-all text-black" 
 9300: 409:                         value={selectedNode.data?.label || ''} 
 9301: 410:                         onChange={(e) => updateNodeData({ label: e.target.value })} 
 9302: 411:                         rows={4} 
 9303: 412:                         placeholder="Nhập nội dung cho khối này..." 
 9304: 413:                     />
 9305: 414:                   </div>
 9306: 415:                   {selectedNode.type === 'questionNode' && (
 9307: 416:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
 9308: 417:                         <label className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1 italic">Loại nhập liệu</label>
 9309: 418:                         <select 
 9310: 419:                             className="w-full p-4 text-xs font-bold border-2 border-gray-50 rounded-2xl outline-none focus:border-orange-500 transition-all text-black bg-white"
 9311: 420:                             value={selectedNode.data?.type || 'CHOICE'}
 9312: 421:                             onChange={(e) => updateNodeData({ type: e.target.value })}
 9313: 422:                         >
 9314: 423:                             <option value="CHOICE">Lựa chọn (Choice)</option>
 9315: 424:                             <option value="INPUT_ACCOUNT">Thông tin kênh (Account)</option>
 9316: 425:                             <option value="INPUT_GOAL">Cam kết mục tiêu (Goal)</option>
 9317: 426:                         </select>
 9318: 427:                     </div>
 9319: 428:                   )}
 9320: 429:                   {selectedNode.type === 'courseNode' && (
 9321: 430:                     <div className="space-y-1.5">
 9322: 431:                         <label className="text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-gray-400 ml-1 italic">Chọn khóa học từ hệ thống</label>
 9323: 432:                         <select 
 9324: 433:                             className="w-full p-4 text-xs font-bold border-2 border-gray-50 rounded-2xl outline-none focus:border-purple-500 transition-all text-black bg-white" 
 9325: 434:                             value={selectedNode.data?.courseId || ''} 
 9326: 435:                             onChange={(e) => {
 9327: 436:                                 const courseId = parseInt(e.target.value);
 9328: 437:                                 const course = courses.find(c => c.id === courseId);
 9329: 438:                                 updateNodeData({ courseId, courseName: course?.name_lop });
 9330: 439:                             }}
 9331: 440:                         >
 9332: 441:                             <option value="">-- Chọn khóa học --</option>
 9333: 442:                             {courses.map(c => <option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name_lop}</option>)}
 9334: 443:                         </select>
 9335: 444:                     </div>
 9336: 445:                   )}
 9337: 446:                   <button 
 9338: 447:                     onClick={() => { setNodes((nds: any) => nds.filter((n: any) => n.id !== selectedNode.id)); setSelectedNode(null); }} 
 9339: 448:                     className="w-full py-4 bg-red-50 text-red-600 text-[10px] font-black uppercase rounded-2xl border-2 border-red-100 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white hover:border-red-500 transition-all active:scale-95"
 9340: 449:                   >
 9341: 450:                     Xóa khối này
 9342: 451:                   </button>
 9343: 452:               </div>
 9344: 453:             </div>
 9345: 454:           )}
 9346: 455:         </aside>
 9347: 456:         {/* Canvas Area */}
 9348: 457:         <div className="flex-1 relative bg-[#F8F9FA]">
 9349: 458:           <ReactFlow 
 9350: 459:             nodes={nodes} 
 9351: 460:             edges={edges} 
 9352: 461:             onNodesChange={onNodesChange} 
 9353: 462:             onEdgesChange={onEdgesChange} 
 9354: 463:             onConnect={onConnect} 
 9355: 464:             onInit={setReactFlowInstance} 
 9356: 465:             onDrop={onDrop} 
 9357: 466:             onDragOver={onDragOver} 
 9358: 467:             onNodeClick={(_, node) => setSelectedNode(node)} 
 9359: 468:             nodeTypes={nodeTypes} 
 9360: 469:             fitView
 9361: 470:             minZoom={0.2}
 9362: 471:             maxZoom={1.5}
 9363: 472:           >
 9364: 473:             <Background color="#E5E7EB" variant={"dots" as any} gap={20} size={1} />
 9365: 474:             <Controls className="!bg-white !border-gray-200 !rounded-2xl !shadow-2xl overflow-hidden" />
 9366: 475:             <MiniMap 
 9367: 476:                 nodeStrokeColor={(n: any) => {
 9368: 477:                     if (n.type === 'questionNode') return '#f97316';
 9369: 478:                     if (n.type === 'courseNode') return '#9333ea';
 9370: 479:                     if (n.type === 'adviceNode') return '#3b82f6';
 9371: 480:                     return '#9ca3af';
 9372: 481:                 }}
 9373: 482:                 nodeColor={(n: any) => {
 9374: 483:                     if (n.type === 'questionNode') return '#fff7ed';
 9375: 484:                     if (n.type === 'courseNode') return '#faf5ff';
 9376: 485:                     if (n.type === 'adviceNode') return '#eff6ff';
 9377: 486:                     return '#f9fafb';
 9378: 487:                 }}
 9379: 488:                 className="!bg-white !rounded-[2rem] !border-2 !border-gray-100 !shadow-2xl"
 9380: 489:             />
 9381: 490:             <Panel position="top-right" className="bg-black/80 p-4 rounded-2xl text-[9px] font-black uppercase text-yellow-400 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl backdrop-blur-xl tracking-widest italic">
 9382: 491:               <p>💡 Click: Sửa • Kéo: Nối • Del: Xóa dây</p>
 9383: 492:             </Panel>
 9384: 493:           </ReactFlow>
 9385: 494:         </div>
 9386: 495:       </div>
 9387: 496:     </div>
 9388: 497:   );
 9389: 498: };
 9390: 499: export default function RoadmapBuilder() {
 9391: 500:     return (
 9392: 501:         <ReactFlowProvider>
 9393: 502:             <RoadmapBuilderContent />
 9394: 503:         </ReactFlowProvider>
 9395: 504:     );
 9396: 505: }
 9397: ````
 9398: 
 9399: ## File: app/globals.css
 9400: ````css
 9401:  1: @import "tailwindcss";
 9402:  2: :root {
 9403:  3:   --background: #ffffff;
 9404:  4:   --foreground: #171717;
 9405:  5: }
 9406:  6: @keyframes glow {
 9407:  7:   0%,
 9408:  8:   100% {
 9409:  9:     text-shadow: 0 0 10px #facc15, 0 0 20px #facc15, 2px 2px 0px #854d0e;
 9410: 10:   }
 9411: 11:   50% {
 9412: 12:     text-shadow: 0 0 20px #fde047, 0 0 35px #fde047, 2px 2px 0px #854d0e;
 9413: 13:   }
 9414: 14: }
 9415: 15: .text-glow-3d {
 9416: 16:   animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
 9417: 17:   color: #facc15;
 9418: 18:   letter-spacing: 0.1em;
 9419: 19: }
 9420: 20: @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
 9421: 21:   :root {
 9422: 22:     --background: #0a0a0a;
 9423: 23:     --foreground: #ededed;
 9424: 24:   }
 9425: 25: }
 9426: 26: body {
 9427: 27:   background: var(--background);
 9428: 28:   color: var(--foreground);
 9429: 29:   font-family: var(--font-be-vietnam-pro), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
 9430: 30: }
 9431: 31: /* ============================= */
 9432: 32: /* GOOGLE DOCS CONTENT FIX */
 9433: 33: /* ============================= */
 9434: 34: /* Ảnh responsive + zoom UX */
 9435: 35: .prose img {
 9436: 36:   width: 100% !important;
 9437: 37:   max-width: 100% !important;
 9438: 38:   height: auto !important;
 9439: 39:   display: block;
 9440: 40:   margin: 1em auto;
 9441: 41:   cursor: zoom-in;
 9442: 42:   transition: transform 0.2s ease;
 9443: 43:   user-select: none;
 9444: 44: }
 9445: 45: .prose img:hover {
 9446: 46:   transform: scale(1.02);
 9447: 47: }
 9448: 48: /* Table không tràn ngang */
 9449: 49: .prose table {
 9450: 50:   width: 100% !important;
 9451: 51:   display: block;
 9452: 52:   overflow-x: auto;
 9453: 53: }
 9454: 54: /* Reset container Google Docs nhưng KHÔNG phá layout */
 9455: 55: .prose div {
 9456: 56:   max-width: 100% !important;
 9457: 57: }
 9458: 58: /* Chuẩn hóa khoảng cách văn bản */
 9459: 59: .prose p {
 9460: 60:   margin-top: 0.6em !important;
 9461: 61:   margin-bottom: 0.6em !important;
 9462: 62: }
 9463: 63: .prose h1,
 9464: 64: .prose h2,
 9465: 65: .prose h3 {
 9466: 66:   margin-top: 1.4em !important;
 9467: 67:   margin-bottom: 0.7em !important;
 9468: 68: }
 9469: ````

 9471: ## File: app/layout.tsx
 9472: ````typescript
 9473:  1: import type { Metadata } from "next";
 9474:  2: import { Be_Vietnam_Pro, Inter } from "next/font/google";
 9475:  3: import "./globals.css";
 9476:  4: const beVietnamPro = Be_Vietnam_Pro({
 9477:  5:   weight: ["100", "200", "300", "400", "500", "600", "700", "800", "900"],
 9478:  6:   subsets: ["vietnamese", "latin"],
 9479:  7:   variable: "--font-be-vietnam-pro",
 9480:  8: });
 9481:  9: const inter = Inter({
 9482: 10:   subsets: ["vietnamese", "latin"],
 9483: 11:   variable: "--font-inter",
 9484: 12: });
 9485: 13: export const metadata: Metadata = {
 9486: 14:   title: "Học Viện BRK - Nâng Tầm Năng Lực",
 9487: 15:   description: "Học viện đào tạo thực chiến về AI, Nhân hiệu và Affiliate",
 9488: 16: };
 9489: 17: export default function RootLayout({
 9490: 18:   children,
 9491: 19: }: Readonly<{
 9492: 20:   children: React.ReactNode;
 9493: 21: }>) {
 9494: 22:   return (
 9495: 23:     <html lang="vi" suppressHydrationWarning>
 9496: 24:       <body
 9497: 25:         className={`${beVietnamPro.variable} ${inter.variable} antialiased`}
 9498: 26:         suppressHydrationWarning
 9499: 27:       >
 9500: 28:         {children}
 9501: 29:       </body>
 9502: 30:     </html>
 9503: 31:   );
 9504: 32: }
 9505: ````
