 9507: ## File: components/course/ChatSection.tsx
 9508: ````typescript
 9509:   1: 'use client'
 9510:   2: import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useMemo, useOptimistic, useTransition } from 'react'
 9511:   3: import { getCommentsByLesson, createComment } from '@/app/actions/comment-actions'
 9512:   4: import { Send, LogIn, Loader2, MessageCircle } from 'lucide-react'
 9513:   5: import Link from 'next/link'
 9514:   6: interface Comment {
 9515:   7:     id: number | string
 9516:   8:     content: string
 9517:   9:     createdAt: Date
 9518:  10:     userId: number
 9519:  11:     userName: string | null
 9520:  12:     userAvatar: string | null
 9521:  13:     sending?: boolean
 9522:  14: }
 9523:  15: interface ChatSectionProps {
 9524:  16:     lessonId: string
 9525:  17:     session: any
 9526:  18: }
 9527:  19: // Tách component nhỏ để tối ưu re-render
 9528:  20: const CommentItem = ({ comment }: { comment: Comment }) => {
 9529:  21:     const getInitials = (name: string | null) => {
 9530:  22:         if (!name) return '?'
 9531:  23:         return name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0, 2)
 9532:  24:     }
 9533:  25:     const formatTime = (date: Date) => {
 9534:  26:         return date.toLocaleTimeString('vi-VN', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
 9535:  27:     }
 9536:  28:     return (
 9537:  29:         <div className={`mb-3 group transition-opacity ${comment.sending ? 'opacity-50' : 'opacity-100'}`}>
 9538:  30:             <div className="flex gap-3">
 9539:  31:                 <div className="shrink-0">
 9540:  32:                     {comment.userAvatar ? (
 9541:  33:                         <img
 9542:  34:                             src={comment.userAvatar}
 9543:  35:                             alt={comment.userName || 'User'}
 9544:  36:                             className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover border border-zinc-800"
 9545:  37:                         />
 9546:  38:                     ) : (
 9547:  39:                         <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-yellow-400 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-black">
 9548:  40:                             {getInitials(comment.userName)}
 9549:  41:                         </div>
 9550:  42:                     )}
 9551:  43:                 </div>
 9552:  44:                 <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 9553:  45:                     <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2">
 9554:  46:                         <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">
 9555:  47:                             {comment.userName || 'Người dùng'}
 9556:  48:                         </span>
 9557:  49:                         <span className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500">
 9558:  50:                             {formatTime(comment.createdAt)}
 9559:  51:                         </span>
 9560:  52:                         {comment.sending && <span className="text-[9px] text-yellow-500 italic">Đang gửi...</span>}
 9561:  53:                     </div>
 9562:  54:                     <p className="text-[13px] italic text-zinc-300 mt-0.5 break-words leading-relaxed">
 9563:  55:                         {comment.content}
 9564:  56:                     </p>
 9565:  57:                 </div>
 9566:  58:             </div>
 9567:  59:         </div>
 9568:  60:     )
 9569:  61: }
 9570:  62: export default function ChatSection({ lessonId, session }: ChatSectionProps) {
 9571:  63:     const [comments, setComments] = useState<Comment[]>([])
 9572:  64:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
 9573:  65:     const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition()
 9574:  66:     const [newComment, setNewComment] = useState('')
 9575:  67:     const [error, setError] = useState('')
 9576:  68:     const commentsEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
 9577:  69:     // Optimistic UI: Hiển thị ngay lập tức khi nhấn gửi
 9578:  70:     const [optimisticComments, addOptimisticComment] = useOptimistic(
 9579:  71:         comments,
 9580:  72:         (state: Comment[], newItem: Comment) => [...state, newItem]
 9581:  73:     )
 9582:  74:     // Cache comments theo lessonId
 9583:  75:     const commentCache = useRef<Map<string, Comment[]>>(new Map())
 9584:  76:     useEffect(() => {
 9585:  77:         if (commentCache.current.has(lessonId)) {
 9586:  78:             setComments(commentCache.current.get(lessonId)!)
 9587:  79:             setLoading(false)
 9588:  80:             return
 9589:  81:         }
 9590:  82:         setLoading(true)
 9591:  83:         getCommentsByLesson(lessonId).then(data => {
 9592:  84:             const mapped = data.map((c: any) => ({
 9593:  85:                 ...c,
 9594:  86:                 createdAt: new Date(c.createdAt)
 9595:  87:             })) as Comment[]
 9596:  88:             commentCache.current.set(lessonId, mapped)
 9597:  89:             setComments(mapped)
 9598:  90:             setLoading(false)
 9599:  91:         })
 9600:  92:     }, [lessonId])
 9601:  93:     useEffect(() => {
 9602:  94:         commentsEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
 9603:  95:     }, [optimisticComments])
 9604:  96:     async function handleSendComment(e: React.FormEvent) {
 9605:  97:         e.preventDefault()
 9606:  98:         const content = newComment.trim()
 9607:  99:         if (!content || !session?.user) return
 9608: 100:         setNewComment('')
 9609: 101:         setError('')
 9610: 102:         // 1. Tạo bản tin nhắn tạm thời (Optimistic)
 9611: 103:         const tempId = Date.now().toString()
 9612: 104:         const tempComment: Comment = {
 9613: 105:             id: tempId,
 9614: 106:             content: content,
 9615: 107:             createdAt: new Date(),
 9616: 108:             userId: parseInt(session.user.id),
 9617: 109:             userName: session.user.name || session.user.studentId || 'Bạn',
 9618: 110:             userAvatar: session.user.image || null,
 9619: 111:             sending: true
 9620: 112:         }
 9621: 113:         // 2. Cập nhật UI ngay lập tức
 9622: 114:         startTransition(async () => {
 9623: 115:             addOptimisticComment(tempComment)
 9624: 116:             // 3. Gọi server action
 9625: 117:             const result = await createComment(lessonId, content)
 9626: 118:             if (result.success && result.comment) {
 9627: 119:                 const newEntry = {
 9628: 120:                     ...result.comment,
 9629: 121:                     createdAt: new Date(result.comment.createdAt)
 9630: 122:                 } as Comment
 9631: 123:                 // 4. Cập nhật state chính thức sau khi server trả về
 9632: 124:                 setComments(prev => {
 9633: 125:                     const updated = [...prev, newEntry]
 9634: 126:                     commentCache.current.set(lessonId, updated)
 9635: 127:                     return updated
 9636: 128:                 })
 9637: 129:             } else {
 9638: 130:                 setError(result.message || 'Gửi thất bại. Vui lòng thử lại.')
 9639: 131:             }
 9640: 132:         })
 9641: 133:     }
 9642: 134:     const groupedComments = useMemo(() => {
 9643: 135:         const map: Record<string, Comment[]> = {}
 9644: 136:         optimisticComments.forEach(comment => {
 9645: 137:             const dateKey = new Date(comment.createdAt).toDateString()
 9646: 138:             if (!map[dateKey]) map[dateKey] = []
 9647: 139:             map[dateKey].push(comment)
 9648: 140:         })
 9649: 141:         return map
 9650: 142:     }, [optimisticComments])
 9651: 143:     const formatDate = (dateKey: string) => {
 9652: 144:         const date = new Date(dateKey)
 9653: 145:         const today = new Date()
 9654: 146:         if (date.toDateString() === today.toDateString()) return 'Hôm nay'
 9655: 147:         const yesterday = new Date(today)
 9656: 148:         yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1)
 9657: 149:         if (date.toDateString() === yesterday.toDateString()) return 'Hôm qua'
 9658: 150:         return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit' })
 9659: 151:     }
 9660: 152:     return (
 9661: 153:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-zinc-950">
 9662: 154:             <div className="shrink-0 px-4 py-3 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm">
 9663: 155:                 <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white flex items-center gap-2">
 9664: 156:                     <MessageCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-yellow-400" />
 9665: 157:                     Tương tác
 9666: 158:                     <span className="text-zinc-500 font-normal text-xs">({optimisticComments.length})</span>
 9667: 159:                 </h3>
 9668: 160:             </div>
 9669: 161:             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-3 custom-scrollbar">
 9670: 162:                 {loading ? (
 9671: 163:                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 gap-3">
 9672: 164:                         <Loader2 className="h-6 w-6 animate-spin text-yellow-400" />
 9673: 165:                         <span className="text-xs text-zinc-500">Đang tải nội dung...</span>
 9674: 166:                     </div>
 9675: 167:                 ) : optimisticComments.length === 0 ? (
 9676: 168:                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center">
 9677: 169:                         <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-zinc-900 flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
 9678: 170:                             <MessageCircle className="h-6 w-6 text-zinc-700" />
 9679: 171:                         </div>
 9680: 172:                         <p className="text-zinc-500 text-sm font-medium">Chưa có bình luận nào</p>
 9681: 173:                         <p className="text-zinc-600 text-xs mt-1">Hãy là người đầu tiên bắt đầu cuộc trò chuyện!</p>
 9682: 174:                     </div>
 9683: 175:                 ) : (
 9684: 176:                     Object.entries(groupedComments).map(([dateKey, dateComments]) => (
 9685: 177:                         <div key={dateKey} className="mb-6">
 9686: 178:                             <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-4">
 9687: 179:                                 <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-zinc-800/50"></div>
 9688: 180:                                 <span className="text-[10px] font-medium text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
 9689: 181:                                     {formatDate(dateKey)}
 9690: 182:                                 </span>
 9691: 183:                                 <div className="h-px flex-1 bg-zinc-800/50"></div>
 9692: 184:                             </div>
 9693: 185:                             {dateComments.map(comment => (
 9694: 186:                                 <CommentItem key={comment.id} comment={comment} />
 9695: 187:                             ))}
 9696: 188:                         </div>
 9697: 189:                     ))
 9698: 190:                 )}
 9699: 191:                 <div ref={commentsEndRef} className="h-4" />
 9700: 192:             </div>
 9701: 193:             <div className="shrink-0 border-t border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/80 p-3 backdrop-blur-md">
 9702: 194:                 {session?.user ? (
 9703: 195:                     <form onSubmit={handleSendComment} className="relative flex items-center">
 9704: 196:                         <input
 9705: 197:                             type="text"
 9706: 198:                             value={newComment}
 9707: 199:                             onChange={(e) => setNewComment(e.target.value)}
 9708: 200:                             placeholder="Nhập nội dung tương tác..."
 9709: 201:                             className="w-full bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 rounded-2xl pl-4 pr-12 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-400/50 transition-all"
 9710: 202:                             disabled={isPending}
 9711: 203:                         />
 9712: 204:                         <button
 9713: 205:                             type="submit"
 9714: 206:                             disabled={!newComment.trim() || isPending}
 9715: 207:                             className="absolute right-1.5 w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-yellow-400 text-black flex items-center justify-center disabled:opacity-30 disabled:grayscale hover:bg-yellow-300 transition-all active:scale-90"
 9716: 208:                         >
 9717: 209:                             {isPending ? (
 9718: 210:                                 <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
 9719: 211:                             ) : (
 9720: 212:                                 <Send className="h-4 w-4" />
 9721: 213:                             )}
 9722: 214:                         </button>
 9723: 215:                     </form>
 9724: 216:                 ) : (
 9725: 217:                     <div className="bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 border border-zinc-700/50 text-center">
 9726: 218:                         <Link
 9727: 219:                             href="/login"
 9728: 220:                             className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-yellow-400 hover:text-yellow-300 transition-colors"
 9729: 221:                         >
 9730: 222:                             <LogIn className="h-4 w-4" />
 9731: 223:                             Đăng nhập để tham gia tương tác
 9732: 224:                         </Link>
 9733: 225:                     </div>
 9734: 226:                 )}
 9735: 227:                 {error && (
 9736: 228:                     <div className="bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 rounded-lg p-2 mt-2">
 9737: 229:                         <p className="text-red-400 text-[10px] text-center font-medium">{error}</p>
 9738: 230:                     </div>
 9739: 231:                 )}
 9740: 232:             </div>
 9741: 233:         </div>
 9742: 234:     )
 9743: 235: }
 9744: ````
 9745: 
 9746: ## File: components/course/LessonSidebar.tsx
 9747: ````typescript
 9748:   1: 'use client'
 9749:   2: import { useState } from 'react'
 9750:   3: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
 9751:   4: import { CheckCircle2, PlayCircle, Lock, CalendarDays, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react"
 9752:   5: interface Lesson {
 9753:   6:     id: string
 9754:   7:     title: string
 9755:   8:     order: number
 9756:   9: }
 9757:  10: interface LessonSidebarProps {
 9758:  11:     lessons: Lesson[]
 9759:  12:     currentLessonId: string
 9760:  13:     onLessonSelect: (lessonId: string) => void
 9761:  14:     progress: Record<string, any>
 9762:  15:     startedAt: Date | null
 9763:  16:     resetAt: Date | null
 9764:  17:     onResetStartDate: (date: Date) => Promise<void>
 9765:  18: }
 9766:  19: function formatDateVN(date: Date | null) {
 9767:  20:     if (!date) return ''
 9768:  21:     return date.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN', { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit', year: 'numeric' })
 9769:  22: }
 9770:  23: // Chuyển Date → string cho input (yyyy-MM-dd)
 9771:  24: function toInputValue(date: Date | null): string {
 9772:  25:     if (!date) return ''
 9773:  26:     const d = new Date(date)
 9774:  27:     return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)
 9775:  28: }
 9776:  29: function isLessonUnlocked(lesson: Lesson, lessons: Lesson[], progress: Record<string, any>) {
 9777:  30:     if (lesson.order === 1) return true
 9778:  31:     const prev = lessons.find(l => l.order === lesson.order - 1)
 9779:  32:     if (!prev) return true
 9780:  33:     const p = progress[prev.id]
 9781:  34:     return p?.status === 'COMPLETED' && (p?.totalScore ?? 0) >= 5
 9782:  35: }
 9783:  36: export default function LessonSidebar({
 9784:  37:     lessons, currentLessonId, onLessonSelect, progress, startedAt, resetAt, onResetStartDate
 9785:  38: }: LessonSidebarProps) {
 9786:  39:     const [showDatePicker, setShowDatePicker] = useState(false)
 9787:  40:     const [dateInput, setDateInput] = useState(toInputValue(startedAt))
 9788:  41:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
 9789:  42:     // Lọc progress chỉ hiển thị các bài học không bị reset (lộ trình hiện tại)
 9790:  43:     const filteredProgress = Object.entries(progress).reduce((acc, [lessonId, p]: [string, any]) => {
 9791:  44:         // Chỉ hiển thị progress không có status RESET
 9792:  45:         if (p.status !== 'RESET') {
 9793:  46:             acc[lessonId] = p
 9794:  47:         }
 9795:  48:         return acc
 9796:  49:     }, {} as Record<string, any>)
 9797:  50:     const handleReset = async () => {
 9798:  51:         if (!dateInput) return
 9799:  52:         // Hiển thị cảnh báo trước khi reset
 9800:  53:         const confirmReset = window.confirm(
 9801:  54:             "⚠️ Cảnh báo: Dữ liệu học tập cũ sẽ không được tính vào lộ trình mới.\n\n" +
 9802:  55:             "Bạn sẽ bắt đầu lại từ bài 1. Tiến trình cũ vẫn lưu trong hệ thống để admin xem lại.\n\n" +
 9803:  56:             "Nhấn OK để xác nhận đổi ngày bắt đầu mới."
 9804:  57:         )
 9805:  58:         if (!confirmReset) return
 9806:  59:         setSaving(true)
 9807:  60:         try {
 9808:  61:             await onResetStartDate(new Date(dateInput))
 9809:  62:             setShowDatePicker(false)
 9810:  63:         } finally {
 9811:  64:             setSaving(false)
 9812:  65:         }
 9813:  66:     }
 9814:  67:     return (
 9815:  68:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-zinc-900 border-r border-zinc-800 w-80 shrink-0">
 9816:  69:             {/* ── Ngày bắt đầu block ── */}
 9817:  70:             <div className="p-4 border-b border-zinc-800 space-y-2">
 9818:  71:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 9819:  72:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-zinc-300">
 9820:  73:                         <CalendarDays className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-400 shrink-0" />
 9821:  74:                         <div>
 9822:  75:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wide">Ngày bắt đầu lộ trình</p>
 9823:  76:                             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-white leading-tight">
 9824:  77:                                 {startedAt ? formatDateVN(startedAt) : '-- / -- / ----'}
 9825:  78:                             </p>
 9826:  79:                         </div>
 9827:  80:                     </div>
 9828:  81:                     <button
 9829:  82:                         onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(!showDatePicker)}
 9830:  83:                         className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/40 hover:border-orange-400 rounded-lg px-2 py-1 transition-colors"
 9831:  84:                     >
 9832:  85:                         <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" />
 9833:  86:                         Đặt lại
 9834:  87:                     </button>
 9835:  88:                 </div>
 9836:  89:                 {showDatePicker && (
 9837:  90:                     <div className="bg-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-3 space-y-2 border border-zinc-700">
 9838:  91:                         <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-400">Chọn ngày mới (dd/mm/yyyy):</p>
 9839:  92:                         <input
 9840:  93:                             type="date"
 9841:  94:                             value={dateInput}
 9842:  95:                             onChange={e => setDateInput(e.target.value)}
 9843:  96:                             className="w-full bg-zinc-700 text-white text-sm rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500"
 9844:  97:                         />
 9845:  98:                         <div className="flex gap-2">
 9846:  99:                             <button
 9847: 100:                                 onClick={handleReset}
 9848: 101:                                 disabled={!dateInput || saving}
 9849: 102:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs font-bold bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-lg py-1.5 disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors"
 9850: 103:                             >
 9851: 104:                                 {saving ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'Xác nhận'}
 9852: 105:                             </button>
 9853: 106:                             <button
 9854: 107:                                 onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(false)}
 9855: 108:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs text-zinc-400 hover:text-white border border-zinc-600 rounded-lg py-1.5 transition-colors"
 9856: 109:                             >
 9857: 110:                                 Hủy
 9858: 111:                             </button>
 9859: 112:                         </div>
 9860: 113:                     </div>
 9861: 114:                 )}
 9862: 115:             </div>
 9863: 116:             {/* ── Tiêu đề danh sách ── */}
 9864: 117:             <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-zinc-800">
 9865: 118:                 <h2 className="font-bold text-sm text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wide">Nội dung khóa học</h2>
 9866: 119:             </div>
 9867: 120:             {/* ── Danh sách bài ── */}
 9868: 121:             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
 9869: 122:                 {lessons.map((lesson) => {
 9870: 123:                     const prog = filteredProgress[lesson.id]
 9871: 124:                     const isCompleted = prog?.status === 'COMPLETED'
 9872: 125:                     const isActive = currentLessonId === lesson.id
 9873: 126:                     const unlocked = isLessonUnlocked(lesson, lessons, filteredProgress)
 9874: 127:                     return (
 9875: 128:                         <button
 9876: 129:                             key={lesson.id}
 9877: 130:                             onClick={() => unlocked && onLessonSelect(lesson.id)}
 9878: 131:                             disabled={!unlocked}
 9879: 132:                             title={!unlocked ? 'Hoàn thành bài trước ≥5đ để mở khóa' : undefined}
 9880: 133:                             className={cn(
 9881: 134:                                 "w-full flex items-center gap-3 p-4 text-left transition-colors border-b border-zinc-800/50",
 9882: 135:                                 isActive && "bg-zinc-800 border-l-2 border-l-orange-500",
 9883: 136:                                 unlocked && !isActive && "hover:bg-zinc-800/50",
 9884: 137:                                 !unlocked && "opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed"
 9885: 138:                             )}
 9886: 139:                         >
 9887: 140:                             <div className="shrink-0">
 9888: 141:                                 {isCompleted ? (
 9889: 142:                                     <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" />
 9890: 143:                                 ) : isActive ? (
 9891: 144:                                     <PlayCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-400" />
 9892: 145:                                 ) : !unlocked ? (
 9893: 146:                                     <Lock className="w-4 h-4 text-zinc-600" />
 9894: 147:                                 ) : (
 9895: 148:                                     <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full border-2 border-zinc-700 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] text-zinc-500">
 9896: 149:                                         {lesson.order}
 9897: 150:                                     </div>
 9898: 151:                                 )}
 9899: 152:                             </div>
 9900: 153:                             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
 9901: 154:                                 <p className={cn("text-sm font-medium line-clamp-2", isActive ? "text-white" : "text-zinc-400")}>
 9902: 155:                                     {lesson.title}
 9903: 156:                                 </p>
 9904: 157:                                 {prog?.totalScore !== undefined && (
 9905: 158:                                     <span className={cn("text-[10px] font-bold", prog.totalScore >= 5 ? "text-emerald-500" : "text-orange-400")}>
 9906: 159:                                         {prog.totalScore >= 5 ? '✓' : '✗'} {prog.totalScore}/10đ
 9907: 160:                                     </span>
 9908: 161:                                 )}
 9909: 162:                             </div>
 9910: 163:                         </button>
 9911: 164:                     )
 9912: 165:                 })}
 9913: 166:             </div>
 9914: 167:         </div>
 9915: 168:     )
 9916: 169: }
 9917: ````

 9919: ## File: lib/prisma.ts
 9920: ````typescript
 9921:  1: import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";
 9922:  2: const globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as {
 9923:  3:   prisma: PrismaClient | undefined;
 9924:  4: };
 9925:  5: const prisma =
 9926:  6:   globalForPrisma.prisma ??
 9927:  7:   new PrismaClient({
 9928:  8:     log: ["error"],
 9929:  9:   });
 9930: 10: if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
 9931: 11:   globalForPrisma.prisma = prisma;
 9932: 12: }
 9933: 13: export default prisma;
 9934: ````

 9936: ## File: app/api/cron/gmail-watch/route.ts
 9937: ````typescript
 9938:  1: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
 9939:  2: import { google } from 'googleapis';
 9940:  3: import { processPaymentEmails } from '@/lib/auto-verify';
 9941:  4: export const runtime = "nodejs";
 9942:  5: export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
 9943:  6:   console.log('🚀 Bắt đầu chạy Cron Job quét email...');
 9944:  7:   // 1. Kiểm tra Header bảo mật
 9945:  8:   const authHeader = req.headers.get('authorization');
 9946:  9:   if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
 9947: 10:     console.error('❌ Lỗi: Unauthorized - Sai CRON_SECRET');
 9948: 11:     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
 9949: 12:   }
 9950: 13:   // 2. Kiểm tra các biến môi trường thiết yếu
 9951: 14:   const requiredEnv = [
 9952: 15:     'GMAIL_CLIENT_ID', 
 9953: 16:     'GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET', 
 9954: 17:     'GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN', 
 9955: 18:     'GCP_PROJECT_ID'
 9956: 19:   ];
 9957: 20:   const missingEnv = requiredEnv.filter(key => !process.env[key]);
 9958: 21:   if (missingEnv.length > 0) {
 9959: 22:     const errorMsg = `Thiếu biến môi trường: ${missingEnv.join(', ')}`;
 9960: 23:     console.error(`❌ ${errorMsg}`);
 9961: 24:     return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: errorMsg }, { status: 500 });
 9962: 25:   }
 9963: 26:   try {
 9964: 27:     const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
 9965: 28:       process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
 9966: 29:       process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
 9967: 30:       'http://localhost'
 9968: 31:     );
 9969: 32:     oAuth2Client.setCredentials({ refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN });
 9970: 33:     const gmail = google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client });
 9971: 34:     console.log(`📡 Đang gọi Gmail Watch cho dự án: ${process.env.GCP_PROJECT_ID}`);
 9972: 35:     // 3. Gia hạn Watch
 9973: 36:     const watchResponse = await gmail.users.watch({
 9974: 37:       userId: 'me',
 9975: 38:       requestBody: {
 9976: 39:         topicName: `projects/${process.env.GCP_PROJECT_ID}/topics/gmail-notifications`,
 9977: 40:         labelIds: ['INBOX'],
 9978: 41:       },
 9979: 42:     });
 9980: 43:     console.log('📧 Đang tiến hành quét email giao dịch...');
 9981: 44:     // 4. Quét mail mới
 9982: 45:     const scanResult = await processPaymentEmails();
 9983: 46:     console.log('✅ Cron Job hoàn thành thành công!');
 9984: 47:     return NextResponse.json({ 
 9985: 48:       success: true, 
 9986: 49:       watch: watchResponse.data,
 9987: 50:       scan: scanResult 
 9988: 51:     });
 9989: 52:   } catch (error: any) {
 9990: 53:     // IN LỖI CHI TIẾT RA CONSOLE ĐỂ KIỂM TRA TRÊN VERCEL LOGS
 9991: 54:     console.error('❌ LỖI CRON JOB CHI TIẾT:', {
 9992: 55:       message: error.message,
 9993: 56:       stack: error.stack,
 9994: 57:       response: error.response?.data || 'No response data'
 9995: 58:     });
 9996: 59:     return NextResponse.json({ 
 9997: 60:       success: false, 
 9998: 61:       error: error.message,
 9999: 62:       details: error.response?.data || undefined
10000: 63:     }, { status: 500 });
10001: 64:   }
10002: 65: }
10003: ````
10004: 
10005: ## File: auth.ts
10006: ````typescript
10007:   1: import NextAuth from "next-auth"
10008:   2: import Credentials from "next-auth/providers/credentials"
10009:   3: import Google from "next-auth/providers/google"
10010:   4: import { z } from "zod"
10011:   5: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
10012:   6: import { PrismaAdapter } from "@auth/prisma-adapter"
10013:   7: import { Role } from "@prisma/client"
10014:   8: import bcrypt from "bcryptjs"
10015:   9: import { authConfig } from "./auth.config"
10016:  10: export const { handlers, signIn, signOut, auth } = NextAuth({
10017:  11:     ...authConfig,
10018:  12:     // Sử dụng 'as any' để giải quyết xung đột Type hệ thống
10019:  13:     adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma) as any, 
10020:  14:     session: { strategy: "jwt" },
10021:  15:     providers: [
10022:  16:         Google({
10023:  17:             clientId: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
10024:  18:             clientSecret: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
10025:  19:             allowDangerousEmailAccountLinking: true,
10026:  20:         }),
10027:  21:         Credentials({
10028:  22:             credentials: {
10029:  23:                 identifier: { label: "Student ID / Email / Phone", type: "text" },
10030:  24:                 password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },
10031:  25:             },
10032:  26:             authorize: async (credentials) => {
10033:  27:                 const parsedCredentials = z
10034:  28:                     .object({ identifier: z.string(), password: z.string() })
10035:  29:                     .safeParse(credentials)
10036:  30:                 if (!parsedCredentials.success) return null;
10037:  31:                 const { identifier, password } = parsedCredentials.data
10038:  32:                 const isNumeric = /^\d+$/.test(identifier);
10039:  33:                 const isEmail = identifier.includes("@");
10040:  34:                 // Tìm kiếm người dùng 1 lần duy nhất
10041:  35:                 const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
10042:  36:                     where: {
10043:  37:                         OR: [
10044:  38:                             ...(isNumeric ? [{ id: parseInt(identifier) }, { phone: identifier }] : []),
10045:  39:                             ...(isEmail ? [{ email: identifier }] : []),
10046:  40:                             ...(!isNumeric && !isEmail ? [{ phone: identifier }] : [])
10047:  41:                         ]
10048:  42:                     }
10049:  43:                 });
10050:  44:                 if (!user || !user.password) return null;
10051:  45:                 const passwordsMatch = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
10052:  46:                 if (passwordsMatch) {
10053:  47:                     return {
10054:  48:                         id: user.id.toString(),
10055:  49:                         name: user.name,
10056:  50:                         email: user.email,
10057:  51:                         role: user.role,
10058:  52:                         image: user.image,
10059:  53:                     };
10060:  54:                 }
10061:  55:                 return null;
10062:  56:             },
10063:  57:         }),
10064:  58:     ],
10065:  59:     callbacks: {
10066:  60:         async jwt({ token, user, trigger, session }) {
10067:  61:             // Sử dụng trường 'sub' làm định danh chuẩn của JWT
10068:  62:             if (user) {
10069:  63:                 token.sub = user.id;
10070:  64:                 token.role = (user as any).role;
10071:  65:             }
10072:  66:             // Cập nhật khi có tín hiệu update chủ động
10073:  67:             if (trigger === "update" && session?.role) {
10074:  68:                 token.role = session.role;
10075:  69:             }
10076:  70:             return token;
10077:  71:         },
10078:  72:         async session({ session, token }) {
10079:  73:             // Map từ 'sub' của token ngược lại 'id' của session cho đồng bộ UI
10080:  74:             if (token.sub && session.user) {
10081:  75:                 session.user.id = token.sub;
10082:  76:                 session.user.role = token.role as Role;
10083:  77:             }
10084:  78:             return session;
10085:  79:         }
10086:  80:     },
10087:  81:     pages: {
10088:  82:         signIn: '/login',
10089:  83:     },
10090:  84:     events: {
10091:  85:         async signIn({ user, account }) {
10092:  86:             console.log(`🔐 Sự kiện signIn kích hoạt cho user: ${user.email}, Provider: ${account?.provider}`);
10093:  87:             if (user && (account?.provider === 'credentials' || account?.provider === 'google')) {
10094:  88:                 try {
10095:  89:                     const { headers } = await import("next/headers");
10096:  90:                     const headerList = await headers();
10097:  91:                     const ip = headerList.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0] || 
10098:  92:                                headerList.get('x-real-ip') || 
10099:  93:                                '127.0.0.1';
10100:  94:                     const userAgent = headerList.get('user-agent') || 'Unknown';
10101:  95:                     console.log(`📡 Đang gửi thông báo đăng nhập cho #${user.id} từ IP: ${ip}`);
10102:  96:                     const { sendLoginNotification } = await import("@/lib/notifications");
10103:  97:                     // BẮT BUỘC dùng await trên Vercel để tránh function bị đóng sớm
10104:  98:                     await sendLoginNotification(user, ip, userAgent);
10105:  99:                     console.log(`✅ Đã xử lý xong thông báo đăng nhập.`);
10106: 100:                 } catch (error: any) {
10107: 101:                     console.error("❌ Lỗi trong sự kiện signIn:", error.message);
10108: 102:                 }
10109: 103:             }
10110: 104:         }
10111: 105:     }
10112: 106: })
10113: ````
10114: 
10115: ## File: lib/auto-verify.ts
10116: ````typescript
10117:   1: import { google } from 'googleapis';
10118:   2: import prisma from '@/lib/prisma';
10119:   3: import { sendTelegramAdmin, sendSuccessEmail } from './notifications';
10120:   4: function extractTextFromHtml(html: string): string {
10121:   5: // ... (giữ nguyên hàm này)
10122:   6:   return html
10123:   7:     .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
10124:   8:     .replace(/&nbsp;/g, ' ')
10125:   9:     .replace(/&amp;/g, '&')
10126:  10:     .replace(/&lt;/g, '<')
10127:  11:     .replace(/&gt;/g, '>')
10128:  12:     .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
10129:  13:     .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
10130:  14:     .trim();
10131:  15: }
10132:  16: function parseSacombankEmail(htmlContent: string) {
10133:  17: // ... (giữ nguyên hàm này)
10134:  18:   const text = extractTextFromHtml(htmlContent);
10135:  19:   const contentMatch = text.match(/(?:Description|Nội dung)[\s\/]*(.+?)(?=\s{2,}|$)/i);
10136:  20:   const description = contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : '';
10137:  21:   const phoneMatch = description.match(/SDT[\s\._]*(\d{6})/i);
10138:  22:   const userIdMatch = description.match(/HV[\s\._]*(\d+)/i);
10139:  23:   const courseCodeMatch = description.match(/COC[\s\._]*(\w+)/i);
10140:  24:   const amountMatch = text.match(/(?:Transaction|Phát sinh)[\s:+]*([\d,\.]+)\s*VND/i);
10141:  25:   let amount = 0;
10142:  26:   if (amountMatch) {
10143:  27:     const amountStr = amountMatch[1].replace(/\./g, '').replace(/,/g, '');
10144:  28:     amount = parseInt(amountStr) || 0;
10145:  29:   }
10146:  30:   return {
10147:  31:     phone: phoneMatch ? phoneMatch[1] : null,
10148:  32:     userId: userIdMatch ? parseInt(userIdMatch[1]) : null,
10149:  33:     courseCode: courseCodeMatch ? courseCodeMatch[1].toUpperCase() : null,
10150:  34:     amount: amount,
10151:  35:     content: description,
10152:  36:   };
10153:  37: }
10154:  38: export async function processPaymentEmails() {
10155:  39:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
10156:  40:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
10157:  41:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
10158:  42:     'http://localhost'
10159:  43:   );
10160:  44:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({ refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN });
10161:  45:   const gmail = google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client });
10162:  46:   const response = await gmail.users.messages.list({
10163:  47:     userId: 'me',
10164:  48:     q: 'from:info@sacombank.com.vn "thong bao giao dich" is:unread',
10165:  49:     maxResults: 10
10166:  50:   });
10167:  51:   const messages = response.data.messages || [];
10168:  52:   if (messages.length === 0) return { processed: 0, matched: 0 };
10169:  53:   let matchedCount = 0;
10170:  54:   const pendingEnrollments = await prisma.enrollment.findMany({
10171:  55:     where: { status: 'PENDING' },
10172:  56:     include: {
10173:  57:       course: { select: { id_khoa: true, phi_coc: true, name_lop: true } },
10174:  58:       user: { select: { id: true, name: true, phone: true, email: true } }
10175:  59:     }
10176:  60:   });
10177:  61:   for (const msg of messages) {
10178:  62:     const message = await gmail.users.messages.get({ userId: 'me', id: msg.id || '', format: 'full' });
10179:  63:     let body = '';
10180:  64:     const payload = message.data.payload;
10181:  65:     if (payload?.body?.data) {
10182:  66:       body = Buffer.from(payload.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8');
10183:  67:     } else if (payload?.parts) {
10184:  68:       for (const part of payload.parts) {
10185:  69:         if (part.mimeType === 'text/html' && part.body?.data) {
10186:  70:           body = Buffer.from(part.body.data, 'base64').toString('utf-8');
10187:  71:           break;
10188:  72:         }
10189:  73:       }
10190:  74:     }
10191:  75:     const parsed = parseSacombankEmail(body);
10192:  76:     for (const enrollment of pendingEnrollments) {
10193:  77:       const userPhone = enrollment.user.phone?.replace(/\D/g, '') || '';
10194:  78:       const emailPhone = parsed.phone || '';
10195:  79:       const userIdMatch = parsed.userId && parsed.userId === enrollment.userId;
10196:  80:       const phoneMatch = userPhone && emailPhone && userPhone.includes(emailPhone);
10197:  81:       const courseCodeMatch = parsed.courseCode && enrollment.course.id_khoa.toUpperCase().includes(parsed.courseCode);
10198:  82:       const amountMatch = parsed.amount >= enrollment.course.phi_coc;
10199:  83:       if (((parsed.userId ? userIdMatch : phoneMatch) && courseCodeMatch && amountMatch)) {
10200:  84:         await prisma.payment.update({
10201:  85:           where: { enrollmentId: enrollment.id },
10202:  86:           data: {
10203:  87:             amount: parsed.amount, phone: parsed.phone, content: parsed.content,
10204:  88:             bankName: 'Sacombank', status: 'VERIFIED', verifiedAt: new Date(), verifyMethod: 'AUTO_EMAIL'
10205:  89:           }
10206:  90:         });
10207:  91:         await prisma.enrollment.update({
10208:  92:           where: { id: enrollment.id },
10209:  93:           data: { status: 'ACTIVE' }
10210:  94:         });
10211:  95:         await gmail.users.messages.modify({
10212:  96:           userId: 'me', id: msg.id || '',
10213:  97:           requestBody: { removeLabelIds: ['UNREAD'] }
10214:  98:         });
10215:  99:         // Gửi thông báo Telegram cho Admin
10216: 100:         const msgAdmin = `✅ <b>KÍCH HOẠT TỰ ĐỘNG THÀNH CÔNG</b>\n\n` +
10217: 101:                          `👤 Học viên: <b>${enrollment.user.name}</b>\n` +
10218: 102:                          `📞 SĐT: ${enrollment.user.phone}\n` +
10219: 103:                          `🎓 Khóa học: <b>${enrollment.course.name_lop} (${enrollment.course.id_khoa})</b>\n` +
10220: 104:                          `💰 Số tiền: ${parsed.amount.toLocaleString()}đ\n` +
10221: 105:                          `🏦 Ngân hàng: Sacombank\n` +
10222: 106:                          `📅 Thời gian: ${new Date().toLocaleString('vi-VN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' })}`;
10223: 107:         await sendTelegramAdmin(msgAdmin);
10224: 108:         // Gửi email cho học viên
10225: 109:         if (enrollment.user.email) {
10226: 110:           const { sendActivationEmail } = await import("./notifications");
10227: 111:           await sendActivationEmail(
10228: 112:             enrollment.user.email,
10229: 113:             enrollment.user.name || 'Bạn',
10230: 114:             enrollment.user.id,
10231: 115:             enrollment.course.name_lop || enrollment.course.id_khoa,
10232: 116:             null
10233: 117:           );
10234: 118:         }
10235: 119:         matchedCount++;
10236: 120:       }
10237: 121:     }
10238: 122:   }
10239: 123:   return { processed: messages.length, matched: matchedCount };
10240: 124: }
10241: ````

10244: ````typescript
10245:  1: import { auth } from "@/auth"
10246:  2: import { Role } from "@prisma/client"
10247:  3: import { redirect } from "next/navigation"
10248:  4: import Link from 'next/link'
10249:  5: export default async function AdminLayout({
10250:  6:     children,
10251:  7: }: {
10252:  8:     children: React.ReactNode
10253:  9: }) {
10254: 10:     const session = await auth()
10255: 11:     if (!session?.user) redirect("/login")
10256: 12:     if (session.user.role !== Role.ADMIN) {
10257: 13:         return <div className="p-10 text-center text-red-600 font-bold">403 - KHÔNG CÓ QUYỀN TRUY CẬP</div>
10258: 14:     }
10259: 15:     const menuItems = [
10260: 16:         { label: 'Thanh toán', href: '/admin/payments', icon: '💰' },
10261: 17:         { label: 'Thành viên', href: '/admin/students', icon: '👥' },
10262: 18:         { label: 'Khóa học', href: '/admin/courses', icon: '📘' },

10278: 34:                 {menuItems.map((item) => (

10280: 36:                         key={item.href} 
10281: 37:                         href={item.href}

10285: 41:                         {item.label}
10286: 42:                     </a>
10287: 43:                 ))}
10288: 44:             </nav>

10290: 46:                 {/* Sidebar Máy tính */}

10292: 48:                     <nav className="space-y-2 sticky top-24">

10294: 50:                             <a 
10295: 51:                                 key={item.href}
10296: 52:                                 href={item.href}
10297: 53:                                 className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-2xl hover:bg-gray-100 font-bold text-gray-600 text-sm transition-all"
10298: 54:                             >
10299: 55:                                 <span className="text-xl">{item.icon}</span>
10300: 56:                                 {item.label}
10301: 57:                             </a>
10302: 58:                         ))}
10303: 59:                     </nav>
10304: 60:                 </aside>
10305: 61:                 {/* Nội dung chính */}
10306: 62:                 <main className="flex-1 p-4 md:p-8">
10307: 63:                     {children}

10309: 65:             </div>
10310: 66:         </div>
10311: 67:     )
10312: 68: }

10315: ## File: components/course/StartDateModal.tsx
10316: ````typescript
10317:   1: 'use client'
10318:   2: import { useState, useMemo } from 'react'
10319:   3: import {
10320:   4:   format,
10321:   5:   isBefore,
10322:   6:   isAfter,
10323:   7:   startOfDay,
10324:   8:   addDays,
10325:   9:   differenceInDays
10326:  10: } from 'date-fns'
10327:  11: import { vi } from 'date-fns/locale'
10328:  12: import { DayPicker } from 'react-day-picker'
10329:  13: import 'react-day-picker/dist/style.css'
10330:  14: import {
10331:  15:   Dialog,
10332:  16:   DialogContent,
10333:  17:   DialogHeader,
10334:  18:   DialogTitle,
10335:  19:   DialogFooter
10336:  20: } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
10337:  21: import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
10338:  22: import { CalendarDays, Loader2 } from "lucide-react"
10339:  23: interface StartDateModalProps {
10340:  24:   isOpen: boolean
10341:  25:   onConfirm: (date: Date) => Promise<void>
10342:  26: }
10343:  27: export default function StartDateModal({
10344:  28:   isOpen,
10345:  29:   onConfirm
10346:  30: }: StartDateModalProps) {
10347:  31:   const today = startOfDay(new Date())
10348:  32:   const maxSelectableDate = addDays(today, 90)
10349:  33:   const courseDuration = 60
10350:  34:   const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<Date>(today)
10351:  35:   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
10352:  36:   const deadline = useMemo(() => {
10353:  37:     return addDays(selectedDate, courseDuration)
10354:  38:   }, [selectedDate])
10355:  39:   const daysRemaining = useMemo(() => {
10356:  40:     return differenceInDays(deadline, today)
10357:  41:   }, [deadline, today])
10358:  42:   const handleConfirm = async () => {
10359:  43:     setLoading(true)
10360:  44:     try {
10361:  45:       await onConfirm(selectedDate)
10362:  46:     } catch (error: any) {
10363:  47:       alert(error.message)
10364:  48:     } finally {
10365:  49:       setLoading(false)
10366:  50:     }
10367:  51:   }
10368:  52:   return (
10369:  53:     <Dialog open={isOpen}>
10370:  54:       <DialogContent className="max-w-[92vw] sm:max-w-[380px] w-full bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 text-white p-4 gap-4 overflow-hidden rounded-xl">
10371:  55:         <DialogHeader className="space-y-1">
10372:  56:           <DialogTitle className="text-base sm:text-lg font-bold flex items-center gap-2 text-sky-400">
10373:  57:             <CalendarDays className="w-5 h-5" />
10374:  58:             Xác nhận ngày bắt đầu học
10375:  59:           </DialogTitle>
10376:  60:           <p className="text-xs text-zinc-400 leading-tight">
10377:  61:             Hệ thống sẽ tính Deadline dựa trên ngày này (trong 90 ngày tới).
10378:  62:           </p>
10379:  63:         </DialogHeader>
10380:  64:         <div className="space-y-3">
10381:  65:           {/* Display Current Selection */}
10382:  66:           <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
10383:  67:             <span className="text-xs uppercase font-bold text-zinc-500">Ngày bạn chọn:</span>
10384:  68:             <span className="text-sm font-bold text-sky-400">
10385:  69:               {format(selectedDate, 'dd/MM/yyyy', { locale: vi })}
10386:  70:             </span>
10387:  71:           </div>
10388:  72:           {/* Calendar - Compact but Readable */}
10389:  73:           <div className="bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg flex justify-center p-1">
10390:  74:             <DayPicker
10391:  75:               mode="single"
10392:  76:               selected={selectedDate}
10393:  77:               locale={vi}
10394:  78:               onSelect={(date) => {
10395:  79:                 if (date && !isBefore(date, today) && !isAfter(date, maxSelectableDate)) {
10396:  80:                   setSelectedDate(date)
10397:  81:                 }
10398:  82:               }}
10399:  83:               disabled={(date) => isBefore(date, today) || isAfter(date, maxSelectableDate)}
10400:  84:               classNames={{
10401:  85:                 months: "flex flex-col",
10402:  86:                 month: "space-y-1",
10403:  87:                 caption: "flex justify-center pt-1 relative items-center px-6 mb-1",
10404:  88:                 caption_label: "text-xs font-bold text-zinc-200",
10405:  89:                 nav: "flex items-center",
10406:  90:                 nav_button: "h-6 w-6 bg-transparent p-0 opacity-50 hover:opacity-100",
10407:  91:                 nav_button_previous: "absolute left-0",
10408:  92:                 nav_button_next: "absolute right-0",
10409:  93:                 table: "w-full border-collapse",
10410:  94:                 head_row: "flex",
10411:  95:                 head_cell: "text-zinc-500 w-7 sm:w-8 font-normal text-[0.65rem] uppercase",
10412:  96:                 row: "flex w-full mt-0.5",
10413:  97:                 cell: "relative p-0 text-center text-xs focus-within:relative focus-within:z-20",
10414:  98:                 day: "h-7 w-7 sm:h-8 sm:w-8 p-0 font-normal hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded transition-colors text-xs",
10415:  99:                 day_selected: "bg-sky-600 text-white hover:bg-sky-500 font-bold !opacity-100",
10416: 100:                 day_today: "text-sky-400 font-bold underline underline-offset-4",
10417: 101:                 day_outside: "text-zinc-700 opacity-30",
10418: 102:                 day_disabled: "text-zinc-800 opacity-10",
10419: 103:                 day_hidden: "invisible",
10420: 104:               }}
10421: 105:             />
10422: 106:           </div>
10423: 107:           {/* Info Summary - Clearer text */}
10424: 108:           <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 bg-sky-500/5 border border-sky-500/10 rounded-lg p-3 text-xs">
10425: 109:             <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
10426: 110:               <span className="text-zinc-500">Deadline dự kiến:</span>
10427: 111:               <span className="font-bold text-zinc-100">
10428: 112:                 {format(deadline, 'dd/MM/yyyy', { locale: vi })}
10429: 113:               </span>
10430: 114:             </div>
10431: 115:             <div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-1">
10432: 116:               <span className="text-zinc-500">Thời lượng:</span>
10433: 117:               <span className="font-bold text-sky-500">
10434: 118:                 {courseDuration} ngày ({daysRemaining} ngày còn lại)
10435: 119:               </span>
10436: 120:             </div>
10437: 121:           </div>
10438: 122:         </div>
10439: 123:         <DialogFooter className="mt-2">
10440: 124:           <Button
10441: 125:             onClick={handleConfirm}
10442: 126:             disabled={loading}
10443: 127:             className="w-full bg-sky-600 hover:bg-sky-500 text-white h-11 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg transition-all active:scale-95"
10444: 128:           >
10445: 129:             {loading ? (
10446: 130:               <Loader2 className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" />
10447: 131:             ) : (
10448: 132:               "XÁC NHẬN BẮT ĐẦU"
10449: 133:             )}
10450: 134:           </Button>
10451: 135:         </DialogFooter>
10452: 136:       </DialogContent>
10453: 137:     </Dialog>
10454: 138:   )
10455: 139: }
10456: ````
