10458: ## File: app/actions/survey-actions.ts
10459: ````typescript
10460:   1: 'use server'
10461:   2: import { auth } from "@/auth"
10462:   3: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
10463:   4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache"
10464:   5: import { generatePathFromAnswers, surveyQuestions } from "@/lib/survey-data"
10465:   6: import { getActiveSurvey } from "./roadmap-actions"
10466:   7: /**
10467:   8:  * Thuật toán duyệt sơ đồ Mindmap để lấy danh sách khóa học đề xuất
10468:   9:  */
10469:  10: function resolvePathFromFlow(flow: any, answers: Record<string, string>): { customPath: number[], goal: string } {
10470:  11:     const { nodes, edges } = flow
10471:  12:     const collectedCourseIds = new Set<number>()
10472:  13:     let currentGoal = ''
10473:  14:     if (!Array.isArray(nodes) || !Array.isArray(edges)) return { customPath: [], goal: '' }
10474:  15:     const startNode = nodes.find((n: any) => n.type === 'questionNode')
10475:  16:     if (!startNode) return { customPath: [], goal: '' }
10476:  17:     currentGoal = startNode.data?.label || ''
10477:  18:     const traverse = (currentNodeId: string) => {
10478:  19:         const outEdges = edges.filter((e: any) => e.source === currentNodeId)
10479:  20:         for (const edge of outEdges) {
10480:  21:             const targetNode = nodes.find((n: any) => n.id === edge.target)
10481:  22:             if (!targetNode) continue
10482:  23:             if (targetNode.type === 'optionNode') {
10483:  24:                 const optionLabel = targetNode.data?.label
10484:  25:                 // So khớp đáp án người dùng chọn cho câu hỏi nguồn
10485:  26:                 if (answers[currentNodeId] === optionLabel) {
10486:  27:                     traverse(targetNode.id)
10487:  28:                 }
10488:  29:             } 
10489:  30:             else if (targetNode.type === 'courseNode') {
10490:  31:                 if (targetNode.data?.courseId) {
10491:  32:                     collectedCourseIds.add(Number(targetNode.data.courseId))
10492:  33:                 }
10493:  34:                 traverse(targetNode.id)
10494:  35:             }
10495:  36:             else if (targetNode.type === 'adviceNode' || targetNode.type === 'questionNode') {
10496:  37:                 traverse(targetNode.id)
10497:  38:             }
10498:  39:         }
10499:  40:     }
10500:  41:     traverse(startNode.id)
10501:  42:     return { 
10502:  43:         customPath: Array.from(collectedCourseIds), 
10503:  44:         goal: currentGoal 
10504:  45:     }
10505:  46: }
10506:  47: /**
10507:  48:  * Lưu kết quả khảo sát và tạo lộ trình học tập cá nhân hóa
10508:  49:  */
10509:  50: export async function saveSurveyResultAction(answers: Record<string, string>) {
10510:  51:     const session = await auth()
10511:  52:     if (!session?.user?.id) {
10512:  53:         return { success: false, error: "Vui lòng đăng nhập để lưu lộ trình." }
10513:  54:     }
10514:  55:     try {
10515:  56:         const userId = parseInt(session.user.id)
10516:  57:         // 1. Lấy bài khảo sát ĐANG KÍCH HOẠT
10517:  58:         const flowData = await getActiveSurvey()
10518:  59:         const flow = flowData as any
10519:  60:         let customPath: number[] = []
10520:  61:         let goal = ''
10521:  62:         if (flow && flow.nodes && Array.isArray(flow.nodes) && flow.nodes.length > 0) {
10522:  63:             console.log('🤖 Đang tính toán lộ trình từ Mindmap ĐỘNG...')
10523:  64:             const result = resolvePathFromFlow(flow, answers)
10524:  65:             customPath = result.customPath
10525:  66:             goal = result.goal
10526:  67:         } else {
10527:  68:             console.log('📦 Đang sử dụng logic lộ trình tĩnh (Fallback)...')
10528:  69:             // FALLBACK THÔNG MINH: Nếu UI gửi node_id nhưng logic cũ cần q1, q2
10529:  70:             // Ta sẽ cố gắng trích xuất dữ liệu nếu có thể, hoặc dùng logic mặc định
10530:  71:             customPath = generatePathFromAnswers(answers)
10531:  72:             const q1AnswerId = answers['q1'] || 'unknown'
10532:  73:             const q1Data = (surveyQuestions as any)['q1']
10533:  74:             const goalOption = q1Data?.options?.find((o: any) => o.id === q1AnswerId)
10534:  75:             goal = goalOption ? goalOption.label : 'Hoàn thiện kỹ năng TikTok'
10535:  76:         }
10536:  77:         // Đảm bảo customPath không rỗng để RealityMap có thể hiển thị
10537:  78:         if (customPath.length === 0) {
10538:  79:             customPath = [1] // Mặc định cấp khóa 1 nếu không tính toán được
10539:  80:         }
10540:  81:         // 2. Lấy dữ liệu cũ để lưu lịch sử
10541:  82:         const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
10542:  83:             where: { id: userId },
10543:  84:             select: { surveyResults: true, customPath: true, goal: true }
10544:  85:         });
10545:  86:         const oldResults: any = user?.surveyResults || { history: [] };
10546:  87:         const newHistory = Array.isArray(oldResults.history) ? [...oldResults.history] : [];
10547:  88:         if (oldResults.current || user?.customPath) {
10548:  89:             newHistory.push({
10549:  90:                 answers: oldResults.current?.answers || answers,
10550:  91:                 customPath: user?.customPath,
10551:  92:                 goal: user?.goal,
10552:  93:                 archivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
10553:  94:             });
10554:  95:         }
10555:  96:         const surveyData = {
10556:  97:             current: {
10557:  98:                 answers,
10558:  99:                 customPath: customPath,
10559: 100:                 goal: goal,
10560: 101:                 completedAt: new Date().toISOString()
10561: 102:             },
10562: 103:             history: newHistory
10563: 104:         };
10564: 105:         // 3. Cập nhật Database (Dùng Transaction để tăng độ tin cậy)
10565: 106:         await prisma.user.update({
10566: 107:             where: { id: userId },
10567: 108:             data: {
10568: 109:                 surveyResults: surveyData as any,
10569: 110:                 customPath: customPath as any,
10570: 111:                 goal: goal
10571: 112:             }
10572: 113:         })
10573: 114:         revalidatePath('/')
10574: 115:         return { success: true, customPath, goal }
10575: 116:     } catch (error: any) {
10576: 117:         console.error("Lỗi khi lưu khảo sát:", error)
10577: 118:         // Nếu lỗi do Database (Prisma), trả về thông báo chi tiết hơn
10578: 119:         if (error.message?.includes('reach database')) {
10579: 120:             return { success: false, error: "Lỗi kết nối Database. Vui lòng thử lại sau giây lát." }
10580: 121:         }
10581: 122:         return { success: false, error: "Hệ thống đang bận (Error: " + error.message + ")" }
10582: 123:     }
10583: 124: }
10584: 125: /**
10585: 126:  * Reset lộ trình để làm lại khảo sát
10586: 127:  */
10587: 128: export async function resetSurveyAction() {
10588: 129:     const session = await auth()
10589: 130:     if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false }
10590: 131:     try {
10591: 132:         await prisma.user.update({
10592: 133:             where: { id: parseInt(session.user.id) },
10593: 134:             data: { customPath: null as any }
10594: 135:         })
10595: 136:         revalidatePath('/')
10596: 137:         return { success: true }
10597: 138:     } catch (error) {
10598: 139:         return { success: false }
10599: 140:     }
10600: 141: }
10601: ````
10602: 
10603: ## File: components/home/Zero2HeroSurvey.tsx
10604: ````typescript
10605:   1: 'use client'
10606:   2: import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
10607:   3: import { surveyQuestions } from '@/lib/survey-data'
10608:   4: import { saveSurveyResultAction } from '@/app/actions/survey-actions'
10609:   5: import { getActiveSurvey } from '@/app/actions/roadmap-actions'
10610:   6: import { Target, CheckCircle2, ChevronRight, Loader2, ArrowLeft, Play, Send } from 'lucide-react'
10611:   7: // ─── Component Popup Tư Vấn ────────────────────────────────────────────────
10612:   8: function AdviceModal({ videoUrl, onClose }: { videoUrl?: string, onClose: () => void }) {
10613:   9:     return (
10614:  10:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[250] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md p-4 animate-in fade-in duration-300">
10615:  11:             <div className="bg-zinc-900 w-full max-w-xl rounded-[3rem] overflow-hidden border border-white/10 shadow-2xl">
10616:  12:                 <div 
10617:  13:                     className="aspect-video bg-black relative flex items-center justify-center group cursor-pointer"
10618:  14:                     onClick={() => videoUrl && window.open(videoUrl, '_blank')}
10619:  15:                 >
10620:  16:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent"></div>
10621:  17:                     <Play className="w-16 h-16 text-yellow-400 fill-current group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" />
10622:  18:                     <p className="absolute bottom-4 left-6 text-white font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs">
10623:  19:                         {videoUrl ? 'Bấm để xem video tư vấn' : 'Video tư vấn lộ trình BRK'}
10624:  20:                     </p>
10625:  21:                 </div>
10626:  22:                 <div className="p-8 space-y-4">
10627:  23:                     <h3 className="text-2xl font-black text-white uppercase">Cố vấn định hướng</h3>
10628:  24:                     <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm leading-relaxed font-medium">
10629:  25:                         Chúng tôi hiểu bạn đang phân vân. Nội dung tư vấn này sẽ giúp bạn hiểu rõ từng hướng đi tại Học viện. 
10630:  26:                         Sau khi xem xong, hãy quay lại và chọn mục tiêu mà bạn cảm thấy tự tin nhất để bắt đầu.
10631:  27:                     </p>
10632:  28:                     <button 
10633:  29:                         onClick={onClose}
10634:  30:                         className="w-full bg-yellow-400 text-black py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-yellow-500 transition-all active:scale-95"
10635:  31:                     >
10636:  32:                         Tôi đã hiểu - Quay lại chọn
10637:  33:                     </button>
10638:  34:                 </div>
10639:  35:             </div>
10640:  36:         </div>
10641:  37:     )
10642:  38: }
10643:  39: export default function Zero2HeroSurvey({ onComplete }: { onComplete?: () => void }) {
10644:  40:     // State cho Dynamic Flow
10645:  41:     const [flow, setFlow] = useState<any>(null)
10646:  42:     const [currentNodeId, setCurrentNodeId] = useState<string | null>(null)
10647:  43:     const [isLoadingFlow, setIsLoadingFlow] = useState(true)
10648:  44:     // State kế thừa từ bản cũ
10649:  45:     const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState('q1')
10650:  46:     const [history, setHistory] = useState<any[]>([])
10651:  47:     const [answers, setAnswers] = useState<Record<string, any>>({})
10652:  48:     const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)
10653:  49:     const [showSuccess, setShowSuccess] = useState(false)
10654:  50:     const [showAdvice, setShowAdvice] = useState<string | null>(null)
10655:  51:     // Form inputs state
10656:  52:     const [input1, setInput1] = useState('')
10657:  53:     const [input2, setInput2] = useState('')
10658:  54:     const [videoPerDay, setVideoPerDay] = useState('1')
10659:  55:     const [days, setDays] = useState('30')
10660:  56:     const [targetVal, setTargetVal] = useState('1000')
10661:  57:     // Tải bài khảo sát ĐANG KÍCH HOẠT từ Database
10662:  58:     useEffect(() => {
10663:  59:         const loadFlow = async () => {
10664:  60:             try {
10665:  61:                 setIsLoadingFlow(true)
10666:  62:                 const data = await getActiveSurvey() as any
10667:  63:                 if (data && data.nodes && Array.isArray(data.nodes) && data.nodes.length > 0) {
10668:  64:                     setFlow(data)
10669:  65:                     const startNode = data.nodes.find((n: any) => n.type === 'questionNode')
10670:  66:                     if (startNode) setCurrentNodeId(startNode.id)
10671:  67:                 }
10672:  68:             } catch (err) {
10673:  69:                 console.error("Failed to load flow:", err)
10674:  70:             } finally {
10675:  71:                 setIsLoadingFlow(false)
10676:  72:             }
10677:  73:         }
10678:  74:         loadFlow()
10679:  75:     }, [])
10680:  76:     // Lấy dữ liệu câu hỏi hiện tại (Động hoặc Tĩnh)
10681:  77:     const getActiveQuestion = () => {
10682:  78:         if (flow && currentNodeId && Array.isArray(flow.nodes)) {
10683:  79:             const node = flow.nodes.find((n: any) => n.id === currentNodeId)
10684:  80:             if (node) {
10685:  81:                 const optionEdges = Array.isArray(flow.edges) ? flow.edges.filter((e: any) => e.source === currentNodeId) : []
10686:  82:                 const options = optionEdges.map((edge: any) => {
10687:  83:                     const optNode = flow.nodes.find((n: any) => n.id === edge.target)
10688:  84:                     return {
10689:  85:                         id: optNode?.id,
10690:  86:                         label: optNode?.data?.label,
10691:  87:                         edgeId: edge.id
10692:  88:                     }
10693:  89:                 }).filter((o: any) => o.id)
10694:  90:                 return {
10695:  91:                     id: node.id,
10696:  92:                     question: node.data?.label || 'Câu hỏi không có nội dung',
10697:  93:                     type: node.data?.type || 'CHOICE',
10698:  94:                     options: options,
10699:  95:                     isDynamic: true
10700:  96:                 }
10701:  97:             }
10702:  98:         }
10703:  99:         const staticQ = (surveyQuestions as any)[currentStep]
10704: 100:         return { 
10705: 101:             ...staticQ, 
10706: 102:             id: currentStep, 
10707: 103:             isDynamic: false,
10708: 104:             question: staticQ?.question || 'Câu hỏi không tìm thấy',
10709: 105:             options: staticQ?.options || []
10710: 106:         }
10711: 107:     }
10712: 108:     const currentQuestion = getActiveQuestion()
10713: 109:     const handleBack = () => {
10714: 110:         if (history.length > 0) {
10715: 111:             const prev = [...history]
10716: 112:             const last = prev.pop()!
10717: 113:             setHistory(prev)
10718: 114:             if (last.isDynamic) {
10719: 115:                 setCurrentNodeId(last.id)
10720: 116:             } else {
10721: 117:                 setCurrentStep(last.id)
10722: 118:             }
10723: 119:         }
10724: 120:     }
10725: 121:     const handleNext = async (optionId: string, label: string) => {
10726: 122:         const newAnswers: Record<string, any> = { ...answers, [currentQuestion.id]: label }
10727: 123:         if (currentQuestion.type === 'INPUT_ACCOUNT') {
10728: 124:             newAnswers[`${currentQuestion.id}_name`] = input1
10729: 125:             newAnswers[`${currentQuestion.id}_id`] = input2
10730: 126:             newAnswers[`${currentQuestion.id}_status`] = label
10731: 127:         }
10732: 128:         if (currentQuestion.type === 'INPUT_GOAL') {
10733: 129:             newAnswers['goal_config'] = { videoPerDay, days, targetVal }
10734: 130:         }
10735: 131:         setAnswers(newAnswers)
10736: 132:         if (currentQuestion.isDynamic && flow) {
10737: 133:             const nextEdge = Array.isArray(flow.edges) ? flow.edges.find((e: any) => e.source === optionId) : null
10738: 134:             if (nextEdge) {
10739: 135:                 const nextNode = flow.nodes.find((n: any) => n.id === nextEdge.target)
10740: 136:                 if (nextNode) {
10741: 137:                     if (nextNode.type === 'adviceNode') {
10742: 138:                         setShowAdvice(nextNode.data?.label || '')
10743: 139:                         return
10744: 140:                     }
10745: 141:                     if (nextNode.type === 'questionNode') {
10746: 142:                         setHistory([...history, { id: currentNodeId, isDynamic: true }])
10747: 143:                         setCurrentNodeId(nextNode.id)
10748: 144:                         return
10749: 145:                     }
10750: 146:                     if (nextNode.type === 'courseNode') {
10751: 147:                         const afterCourseEdge = flow.edges.find((e: any) => e.source === nextNode.id)
10752: 148:                         if (afterCourseEdge) {
10753: 149:                             const afterCourseNode = flow.nodes.find((n: any) => n.id === afterCourseEdge.target)
10754: 150:                             if (afterCourseNode && afterCourseNode.type === 'questionNode') {
10755: 151:                                 setHistory([...history, { id: currentNodeId, isDynamic: true }])
10756: 152:                                 setCurrentNodeId(afterCourseNode.id)
10757: 153:                                 return
10758: 154:                             }
10759: 155:                         }
10760: 156:                     }
10761: 157:                 }
10762: 158:             }
10763: 159:             finishSurvey(newAnswers)
10764: 160:         } else {
10765: 161:             const staticQData = (surveyQuestions as any)[currentStep]
10766: 162:             const staticOpt = staticQData?.options?.find((o: any) => o.id === optionId)
10767: 163:             if (staticOpt?.isAdvice) {
10768: 164:                 setShowAdvice('https://youtube.com')
10769: 165:                 return
10770: 166:             }
10771: 167:             if (staticOpt?.nextQuestionId && staticOpt.nextQuestionId !== 'done') {
10772: 168:                 setHistory([...history, { id: currentStep, isDynamic: false }])
10773: 169:                 setCurrentStep(staticOpt.nextQuestionId)
10774: 170:             } else {
10775: 171:                 finishSurvey(newAnswers)
10776: 172:             }
10777: 173:         }
10778: 174:         setInput1('')
10779: 175:         setInput2('')
10780: 176:     }
10781: 177:     const finishSurvey = async (finalAnswers: any) => {
10782: 178:         setIsSubmitting(true)
10783: 179:         try {
10784: 180:             const res = await saveSurveyResultAction(finalAnswers)
10785: 181:             if (res.success) {
10786: 182:                 setShowSuccess(true)
10787: 183:                 // ÉP TẢI LẠI TRANG CHỦ ĐỂ HIỆN LỘ TRÌNH MỚI
10788: 184:                 setTimeout(() => {
10789: 185:                     if (onComplete) {
10790: 186:                         onComplete()
10791: 187:                     } else {
10792: 188:                         window.location.href = '/' // Đây là giải pháp triệt để nhất
10793: 189:                     }
10794: 190:                 }, 2500)
10795: 191:             } else {
10796: 192:                 alert(res.error)
10797: 193:                 setIsSubmitting(false)
10798: 194:             }
10799: 195:         } catch (err) {
10800: 196:             console.error(err)
10801: 197:             setIsSubmitting(false)
10802: 198:         }
10803: 199:     }
10804: 200:     if (isLoadingFlow) return (
10805: 201:         <div className="bg-zinc-950 rounded-[3rem] p-20 flex flex-col items-center justify-center border border-white/10 shadow-2xl">
10806: 202:             <Loader2 className="w-10 h-10 animate-spin text-yellow-400 mb-4" />
10807: 203:             <p className="text-gray-500 font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest">Đang tải khảo sát...</p>
10808: 204:         </div>
10809: 205:     )
10810: 206:     if (showSuccess) return (
10811: 207:         <div className="bg-zinc-950 rounded-[2.5rem] p-10 text-center text-white border border-white/10 shadow-2xl animate-in zoom-in-95">
10812: 208:             <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-green-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6 shadow-xl shadow-green-500/20">
10813: 209:                 <CheckCircle2 className="w-10 h-10" />
10814: 210:             </div>
10815: 211:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight mb-4">Lộ trình đã sẵn sàng!</h2>
10816: 212:             <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-8">AI đã thiết kế xong Bức tranh hiện thực của riêng bạn.</p>
10817: 213:             <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 animate-spin text-yellow-400 mx-auto" />
10818: 214:         </div>
10819: 215:     )
10820: 216:     return (
10821: 217:         <div className="bg-zinc-950 rounded-[3rem] p-6 md:p-10 text-white border border-white/10 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden">
10822: 218:             <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-purple-600/10 rounded-full blur-[100px]"></div>
10823: 219:             <div className="relative z-10">
10824: 220:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
10825: 221:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
10826: 222:                         <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-2xl bg-yellow-400 flex items-center justify-center text-black shadow-lg shadow-yellow-400/20">
10827: 223:                             <Target className="w-5 h-5" />
10828: 224:                         </div>
10829: 225:                         <div>
10830: 226:                             <h2 className="text-lg font-black uppercase tracking-tight">Zero 2 Hero</h2>
10831: 227:                             <div className="flex gap-1 mt-1">
10832: 228:                                 {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
10833: 229:                                     <div key={i} className={`h-1 w-4 rounded-full ${i <= history.length ? 'bg-yellow-400' : 'bg-white/10'}`}></div>
10834: 230:                                 ))}
10835: 231:                             </div>
10836: 232:                         </div>
10837: 233:                     </div>
10838: 234:                     {history.length > 0 && (
10839: 235:                         <button onClick={handleBack} className="p-2 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-full transition-colors text-gray-400"><ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
10840: 236:                     )}
10841: 237:                 </div>
10842: 238:                 <div className="animate-in slide-in-from-right-4 fade-in duration-300">
10843: 239:                     <h3 className="text-2xl font-black leading-tight mb-2 uppercase tracking-tight">{currentQuestion.question}</h3>
10844: 240:                     <p className="text-gray-400 text-sm mb-8 font-medium">{'Hãy cung cấp thông tin chính xác để AI thiết kế lộ trình.'}</p>
10845: 241:                     {/* CHOICE TYPE */}
10846: 242:                     {currentQuestion.type === 'CHOICE' && (
10847: 243:                         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-3">
10848: 244:                             {currentQuestion.options?.map((opt: any) => (
10849: 245:                                 <button
10850: 246:                                     key={opt.id}
10851: 247:                                     onClick={() => handleNext(opt.id, opt.label)}
10852: 248:                                     className="w-full text-left bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 p-5 rounded-2xl transition-all flex items-center justify-between group active:scale-[0.98]"
10853: 249:                                 >
10854: 250:                                     <span className="font-bold text-gray-200 group-hover:text-white">{opt.label}</span>
10855: 251:                                     <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5 text-gray-600 group-hover:text-yellow-400" />
10856: 252:                                 </button>
10857: 253:                             ))}
10858: 254:                         </div>
10859: 255:                     )}
10860: 256:                     {/* INPUT ACCOUNT TYPE */}
10861: 257:                     {currentQuestion.type === 'INPUT_ACCOUNT' && (
10862: 258:                         <div className="space-y-6">
10863: 259:                             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
10864: 260:                                 <div className="space-y-1.5">
10865: 261:                                     <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-500 ml-1">Tên Shop / Kênh / Lĩnh vực</label>
10866: 262:                                     <input type="text" value={input1} onChange={e => setInput1(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500" placeholder="Nhập tên..." />
10867: 263:                                 </div>
10868: 264:                                 <div className="space-y-1.5">
10869: 265:                                     <label className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase text-gray-500 ml-1">ID TikTok / Link Kênh</label>
10870: 266:                                     <input type="text" value={input2} onChange={e => setInput2(e.target.value)} className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm font-bold outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500" placeholder="@id_cua_ban" />
10871: 267:                                 </div>
10872: 268:                             </div>
10873: 269:                             <div className="flex gap-3">
10874: 270:                                 {currentQuestion.options?.map((opt: any) => (
10875: 271:                                     <button
10876: 272:                                         key={opt.id}
10877: 273:                                         onClick={() => handleNext(opt.id, opt.label)}
10878: 274:                                         className={`flex-1 py-4 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase text-[10px] tracking-widest transition-all ${opt.id === 'yes' || opt.label?.toLowerCase() === 'tiếp tục' ? 'bg-yellow-400 text-black shadow-lg shadow-yellow-400/10' : 'bg-white/5 text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10'}`}
10879: 275:                                     >
10880: 276:                                         {opt.label}
10881: 277:                                     </button>
10882: 278:                                 ))}
10883: 279:                             </div>
10884: 280:                         </div>
10885: 281:                     )}
10886: 282:                     {/* INPUT GOAL TYPE */}
10887: 283:                     {currentQuestion.type === 'INPUT_GOAL' && (
10888: 284:                         <div className="space-y-6">
10889: 285:                             <div className="bg-white/5 p-6 rounded-[2rem] border border-white/10 space-y-6">
10890: 286:                                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 text-sm font-bold leading-relaxed">
10891: 287:                                     <span>Tôi sẽ làm</span>
10892: 288:                                     <input type="number" value={videoPerDay} onChange={e => setVideoPerDay(e.target.value)} className="w-16 bg-white/10 border-none rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-center text-yellow-400 outline-none" />
10893: 289:                                     <span>video/ngày đều đặn trong</span>
10894: 290:                                     <input type="number" value={days} onChange={e => setDays(e.target.value)} className="w-16 bg-white/10 border-none rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-center text-yellow-400 outline-none" />
10895: 291:                                     <span>ngày để đạt</span>
10896: 292:                                     <input type="number" value={targetVal} onChange={e => setTargetVal(e.target.value)} className="w-24 bg-white/10 border-none rounded-lg px-2 py-1 text-center text-yellow-400 outline-none" />
10897: 293:                                     <span className="text-gray-400 font-medium">Follow / Đơn hàng</span>
10898: 294:                                 </div>
10899: 295:                             </div>
10900: 296:                             <button
10901: 297:                                 disabled={isSubmitting}
10902: 298:                                 onClick={() => handleNext('yes', 'Xác nhận')}
10903: 299:                                 className="w-full bg-black text-yellow-400 py-5 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-xl hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50"
10904: 300:                             >
10905: 301:                                 {isSubmitting ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : <Send className="w-4 h-4" />} Xác nhận lộ trình & Cam kết
10906: 302:                             </button>
10907: 303:                         </div>
10908: 304:                     )}
10909: 305:                 </div>
10910: 306:             </div>
10911: 307:             {showAdvice && <AdviceModal videoUrl={showAdvice} onClose={() => setShowAdvice(null)} />}
10912: 308:         </div>
10913: 309:     )
10914: 310: }
10915: ````
10916: 
10917: ## File: components/home/MessageCard.tsx
10918: ````typescript
10919:   1: 'use client'
10920:   2: import { useState } from 'react'
10921:   3: import Image from 'next/image'
10922:   4: import dynamic from 'next/dynamic'
10923:   5: import { Lightbulb } from 'lucide-react'
10924:   6: // Tối ưu 1: Dynamic Import cho Dialog giúp giảm dung lượng file bundle ban đầu (Initial JS)
10925:   7: // Modal chỉ được tải khi người dùng thực sự click vào card.
10926:   8: const Dialog = dynamic(() => import("@/components/ui/dialog").then(mod => mod.Dialog), { ssr: false })
10927:   9: const DialogContent = dynamic(() => import("@/components/ui/dialog").then(mod => mod.DialogContent), { ssr: false })
10928:  10: const DialogHeader = dynamic(() => import("@/components/ui/dialog").then(mod => mod.DialogHeader), { ssr: false })
10929:  11: const DialogTitle = dynamic(() => import("@/components/ui/dialog").then(mod => mod.DialogTitle), { ssr: false })
10930:  12: interface Message {
10931:  13:     id: number
10932:  14:     content: string
10933:  15:     detail: string
10934:  16:     imageUrl: string | null
10935:  17: }
10936:  18: interface MessageCardProps {
10937:  19:     message: Message | null
10938:  20:     session: any
10939:  21:     userName: string
10940:  22:     userId: string
10941:  23: }
10942:  24: const DEFAULT_MESSAGE: Message = {
10943:  25:     id: 0,
10944:  26:     content: "Tri thức là sức mạnh - Học hôm nay, thành công ngày mai",
10945:  27:     detail: "Học viện BRK mang đến những tri thức thực chiến giúp bạn phát triển bản thân và sự nghiệp. Mỗi ngày học tập là một bước tiến trên con đường thành công.",
10946:  28:     imageUrl: null
10947:  29: }
10948:  30: export default function MessageCard({ message, session, userName, userId }: MessageCardProps) {
10949:  31:     const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)
10950:  32:     const displayMessage = message || DEFAULT_MESSAGE
10951:  33:     return (
10952:  34:         <>
10953:  35:             {/* Tỉ lệ 5:3 chuẩn xác bằng Aspect Ratio - Giúp trình duyệt tính toán Layout cực nhanh */}
10954:  36:             <div className="relative w-full aspect-[5/3] sm:overflow-hidden rounded-2xl md:rounded-none shadow-2xl border border-white/5 group cursor-pointer"
10955:  37:                 onClick={() => setIsOpen(true)}>
10956:  38:                 {/* ── Ảnh nền tối ưu ── */}
10957:  39:                 <div className="absolute inset-0">
10958:  40:                     {displayMessage.imageUrl ? (
10959:  41:                         <Image
10960:  42:                             src={displayMessage.imageUrl}
10961:  43:                             alt="Học viện BRK Background"
10962:  44:                             fill
10963:  45:                             priority // Tải trước ảnh này vì nó là thành phần quan trọng nhất trang (LCP)
10964:  46:                             quality={70} // Tối ưu: 70% là điểm ngọt giữa độ nét và dung lượng
10965:  47:                             className="object-cover object-center transition-transform duration-1000 group-hover:scale-105"
10966:  48:                             sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 1200px"
10967:  49:                         />
10968:  50:                     ) : (
10969:  51:                         <div className="w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-black via-zinc-900 to-indigo-950" />
10970:  52:                     )}
10971:  53:                     {/* Lớp phủ tối nhẹ để nổi bật chữ */}
10972:  54:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-[1px] transition-colors duration-500 group-hover:bg-black/33" />
10973:  55:                 </div>
10974:  56:                 {/* ── TOÀN BỘ NỘI DUNG: Flex layout ── */}
10975:  57:                 <div className="absolute inset-0 z-10 flex flex-col px-[5%] pt-[30px] md:pt-[70px] pb-[4%] text-center">
10976:  58:                     {/* ── TOP: Tiêu đề & Lời chào ── */}
10977:  59:                     <div className="flex flex-col items-center shrink-0">
10978:  60:                         <h1 className="flex flex-col items-center font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.2]">
10979:  61:                             <span
10980:  62:                                 className="uppercase text-white drop-shadow-xl"
10981:  63:                                 style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(0.5rem, 6vw, 4rem)' }}
10982:  64:                             >
10983:  65:                                 HỌC VIỆN BRK
10984:  66:                             </span>
10985:  67:                             <span
10986:  68:                                 className="text-glow-3d uppercase drop-shadow-xl"
10987:  69:                                 style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(0.5rem, 5vw, 3rem)' }}
10988:  70:                             >
10989:  71:                                 NGÂN HÀNG PHƯỚC BÁU
10990:  72:                             </span>
10991:  73:                             <span
10992:  74:                                 className="rounded-full bg-white/10 border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md"
10993:  75:                                 style={{
10994:  76:                                     padding: 'clamp(3px,0.8%,8px) clamp(8px,4%,20px)',
10995:  77:                                     marginTop: 'clamp(10px, 2%, 16px)'
10996:  78:                                 }}
10997:  79:                             >
10998:  80:                                 <span
10999:  81:                                     className="block font-semibold text-white whitespace-nowrap"
11000:  82:                                     style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(0.7rem, 1.8vw, 1.2rem)' }}
11001:  83:                                 >
11002:  84:                                     {session?.user
11003:  85:                                         ? `Mến chào ${userName || 'Học viên'} - Mã học tập ${userId}`
11004:  86:                                         : 'Mến chào bạn hữu đường xa!'}
11005:  87:                                 </span>
11006:  88:                             </span>
11007:  89:                         </h1>
11008:  90:                     </div>
11009:  91:                     {/* ── BOTTOM: Thông điệp (Chiếm trọn không gian dưới dòng Mến chào) ── */}
11010:  92:                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-0 w-full"
11011:  93:                         style={{
11012:  94:                             gap: 'clamp(4px, 1.2%, 12px)',
11013:  95:                             paddingTop: '3%',
11014:  96:                             paddingBottom: '1%'
11015:  97:                         }}>
11016:  98:                         {/* Container nội dung thông điệp - Tự động điều chỉnh theo nội dung */}
11017:  99:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-[8px] max-w-[95%] md:max-w-[85%] w-full">
11018: 100:                             <p
11019: 101:                                 className="text-yellow-400 font-medium italic leading-tight drop-shadow-lg whitespace-pre-line overflow-visible"
11020: 102:                                 style={{
11021: 103:                                     /* Font size đơn giản: tự động điều chỉnh theo độ dài nội dung */
11022: 104:                                     fontSize: `clamp(0.7rem, 2.5vw, 2rem)`,
11023: 105:                                 }}
11024: 106:                             >
11025: 107:                                 &ldquo;{displayMessage.content}&rdquo;
11026: 108:                             </p>
11027: 109:                             {/* Icon bóng đèn - Thu nhỏ scale khi chữ nhỏ đi để giữ sự cân đối */}
11028: 110:                             <div
11029: 111:                                 className="shrink-0 rounded-full bg-yellow-400 flex items-center justify-center opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity shadow-lg"
11030: 112:                                 style={{
11031: 113:                                     width: 'clamp(1.4rem, 3.2vw, 2.6rem)',
11032: 114:                                     height: 'clamp(1.4rem, 3.2vw, 2.6rem)'
11033: 115:                                 }}
11034: 116:                             >
11035: 117:                                 <Lightbulb
11036: 118:                                     className="text-black animate-pulse"
11037: 119:                                     style={{ width: '55%', height: '55%' }}
11038: 120:                                 />
11039: 121:                             </div>
11040: 122:                         </div>
11041: 123:                         {/* Gợi ý tương tác - Đẩy sát xuống dưới cùng của thông điệp */}
11042: 124:                         <p
11043: 125:                             className="text-white/40 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500 transform translate-y-1 group-hover:translate-y-0"
11044: 126:                             style={{ fontSize: 'clamp(0.4rem, 0.75vw, 0.65rem)' }}
11045: 127:                         >
11046: 128:                             Nhấn để xem chi tiết →
11047: 129:                         </p>
11048: 130:                     </div>
11049: 131:                 </div>
11050: 132:             </div>
11051: 133:             {/* ── Kết thúc card ảnh nền ── */}
11052: 134:             {/* ── Modal chi tiết (Lazy Loaded) ── */}
11053: 135:             {isOpen && (
11054: 136:                 <Dialog open={isOpen}>
11055: 137:                     <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 text-white overflow-hidden p-0 shadow-2xl">
11056: 138:                         <div className="relative w-full h-64">
11057: 139:                             {displayMessage.imageUrl ? (
11058: 140:                                 <Image
11059: 141:                                     src={displayMessage.imageUrl}
11060: 142:                                     alt="Detail Background"
11061: 143:                                     fill
11062: 144:                                     className="object-cover"
11063: 145:                                     sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 500px"
11064: 146:                                 />
11065: 147:                             ) : (
11066: 148:                                 <div className="w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-900 to-indigo-950" />
11067: 149:                             )}
11068: 150:                             <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center">
11069: 151:                                 <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-yellow-400 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 shadow-xl scale-110">
11070: 152:                                     <Lightbulb className="w-6 h-6 text-black" />
11071: 153:                                 </div>
11072: 154:                                 <p className="text-yellow-400 text-xl font-bold italic leading-tight whitespace-pre-line drop-shadow-md">
11073: 155:                                     &ldquo;{displayMessage.content}&rdquo;
11074: 156:                                 </p>
11075: 157:                             </div>
11076: 158:                         </div>
11077: 159:                         <div className="p-6 space-y-4 bg-zinc-950">
11078: 160:                             <div className="text-zinc-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-line bg-white/5 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 shadow-inner">
11079: 161:                                 {displayMessage.detail}
11080: 162:                             </div>
11081: 163:                             <p className="text-zinc-600 text-[11px] text-center pt-2 italic tracking-widest">
11082: 164:                                 💡 HỌC VIỆN BRK - NGÂN HÀNG PHƯỚC BÁU
11083: 165:                             </p>
11084: 166:                         </div>
11085: 167:                         {/* Nút đóng */}
11086: 168:                         <button
11087: 169:                             onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setIsOpen(false) }}
11088: 170:                             className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-white/70 hover:text-white transition-all bg-black/20 hover:bg-black/40 rounded-full p-2 z-20"
11089: 171:                         >
11090: 172:                             <svg className="w-5 h-5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
11091: 173:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
11092: 174:                             </svg>
11093: 175:                         </button>
11094: 176:                     </DialogContent>
11095: 177:                 </Dialog>
11096: 178:             )}
11097: 179:         </>
11098: 180:     )
11099: 181: }
11100: ````
11101: 
11102: ## File: components/layout/Header.tsx
11103: ````typescript
11104:   1: 'use client'
11105:   2: import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
11106:   3: import Link from 'next/link'
11107:   4: import Image from 'next/image'
11108:   5: import { signOut } from 'next-auth/react'
11109:   6: import { User, Settings, LogOut, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'
11110:   7: export default function Header({ session, userImage }: { session: any, userImage?: string | null }) {
11111:   8:     const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false)
11112:   9:     const [isUserMenuOpen, setIsUserMenuOpen] = useState(false)
11113:  10:     const userMenuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
11114:  11:     useEffect(() => {
11115:  12:         function handleClickOutside(event: MouseEvent) {
11116:  13:             if (userMenuRef.current && !userMenuRef.current.contains(event.target as Node)) {
11117:  14:                 setIsUserMenuOpen(false)
11118:  15:             }
11119:  16:         }
11120:  17:         document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
11121:  18:         return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside)
11122:  19:     }, [])
11123:  20:     const userInitials = session?.user?.name
11124:  21:         ? session.user.name.split(' ').map((n: string) => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0, 2)
11125:  22:         : '?'
11126:  23:     return (
11127:  24:         <header className="fixed top-0 z-50 w-full bg-black text-white shadow-xl border-b border-white/5">
11128:  25:             <div className="container mx-auto flex h-16 items-center justify-between px-4 lg:px-8">
11129:  26:                 {/* Logo & Brand */}
11130:  27:                 <Link href="/" className="shrink-0 transition-opacity hover:opacity-80">
11131:  28:                     <Image
11132:  29:                         src="/logobrk-50px.png"
11133:  30:                         alt="Học Viện BRK Logo"
11134:  31:                         width={150}
11135:  32:                         height={50}
11136:  33:                         priority
11137:  34:                         className="object-contain"
11138:  35:                         style={{ height: '48px', width: 'auto' }}
11139:  36:                     />
11140:  37:                 </Link>
11141:  38:                 {/* Navigation - Desktop */}
11142:  39:                 <nav className="hidden flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-12 text-[13px] font-black md:flex">
11143:  40:                     <Link href="/" className="transition-all hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 tracking-widest">TRANG CHỦ</Link>
11144:  41:                     <Link href="#khoa-hoc" className="transition-all hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 tracking-widest">KHÓA HỌC</Link>
11145:  42:                     <Link href="#" className="transition-all hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 tracking-widest">GIỚI THIỆU</Link>
11146:  43:                 </nav>
11147:  44:                 {/* Actions & Hamburger */}
11148:  45:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-6">
11149:  46:                     {session ? (
11150:  47:                         <div className="relative" ref={userMenuRef}>
11151:  48:                             <button
11152:  49:                                 onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(!isUserMenuOpen)}
11153:  50:                                 className="flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-zinc-800 px-2 py-1.5 transition-all hover:bg-zinc-700"
11154:  51:                             >
11155:  52:                                 {userImage || session?.user?.image ? (
11156:  53:                                     <img
11157:  54:                                         src={userImage || session?.user?.image}
11158:  55:                                         alt="Avatar"
11159:  56:                                         className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-yellow-400"
11160:  57:                                     />
11161:  58:                                 ) : (
11162:  59:                                     <div className="flex h-7 w-7 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-yellow-400 text-xs font-black text-black">
11163:  60:                                         {userInitials}
11164:  61:                                     </div>
11165:  62:                                 )}
11166:  63:                                 <ChevronDown className={`h-3 w-3 text-zinc-400 transition-transform ${isUserMenuOpen ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />
11167:  64:                             </button>
11168:  65:                             {/* User Dropdown Menu */}
11169:  66:                             {isUserMenuOpen && (
11170:  67:                                 <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-56 rounded-xl border border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-900 py-2 shadow-xl animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2">
11171:  68:                                     <div className="border-b border-zinc-800 px-4 py-2 mb-1">
11172:  69:                                         <p className="text-xs font-bold text-white truncate">{session.user?.name}</p>
11173:  70:                                         <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 truncate">{session.user?.email}</p>
11174:  71:                                     </div>
11175:  72:                                     {session.user?.role === 'ADMIN' && (
11176:  73:                                         <Link
11177:  74:                                             href="/admin/students"
11178:  75:                                             onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
11179:  76:                                             className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-yellow-400 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors font-bold"
11180:  77:                                         >
11181:  78:                                             <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
11182:  79:                                             Quản trị hệ thống
11183:  80:                                         </Link>
11184:  81:                                     )}
11185:  82:                                     <Link
11186:  83:                                         href="/account-settings"
11187:  84:                                         onClick={() => setIsUserMenuOpen(false)}
11188:  85:                                         className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors"
11189:  86:                                     >
11190:  87:                                         <Settings className="h-4 w-4" />
11191:  88:                                         Cài đặt tài khoản
11192:  89:                                     </Link>
11193:  90:                                     <button
11194:  91:                                         onClick={() => signOut()}
11195:  92:                                         className="flex w-full items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-red-400 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors"
11196:  93:                                     >
11197:  94:                                         <LogOut className="h-4 w-4" />
11198:  95:                                         Đăng xuất
11199:  96:                                     </button>
11200:  97:                                 </div>
11201:  98:                             )}
11202:  99:                         </div>
11203: 100:                     ) : (
11204: 101:                         <Link
11205: 102:                             href="/login"
11206: 103:                             className="hidden sm:inline-block rounded-full bg-white px-6 py-2 text-xs font-black text-black shadow-md transition-all hover:bg-yellow-400 hover:scale-105"
11207: 104:                         >
11208: 105:                             ĐĂNG NHẬP
11209: 106:                         </Link>
11210: 107:                     )}
11211: 108:                     {/* Hamburger Button */}
11212: 109:                     <button
11213: 110:                         onClick={() => setIsMenuOpen(!isMenuOpen)}
11214: 111:                         className="flex h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/5 text-white transition-all hover:bg-white/10 md:hidden"
11215: 112:                     >
11216: 113:                         <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" strokeWidth="2.5" stroke="currentColor" className="h-6 w-6">
11217: 114:                             {isMenuOpen ? (
11218: 115:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
11219: 116:                             ) : (
11220: 117:                                 <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M3.75 6.75h16.5M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 5.25h16.5" />
11221: 118:                             )}
11222: 119:                         </svg>
11223: 120:                     </button>
11224: 121:                 </div>
11225: 122:             </div>
11226: 123:             {/* Mobile Menu Dropdown */}
11227: 124:             {isMenuOpen && (
11228: 125:                 <div className="animate-in slide-in-from-top-4 absolute left-0 top-16 w-full border-b border-white/5 bg-black px-4 py-8 shadow-2xl md:hidden">
11229: 126:                     <nav className="flex flex-col gap-6 text-center text-sm font-black">
11230: 127:                         <Link href="/" onClick={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)} className="py-2 hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 transition-all">TRANG CHỦ</Link>
11231: 128:                         <Link href="#khoa-hoc" onClick={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)} className="py-2 hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 transition-all">KHÓA HỌC</Link>
11232: 129:                         <Link href="#" onClick={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)} className="py-2 hover:text-yellow-400 hover:scale-105 transition-all">GIỚI THIỆU</Link>
11233: 130:                         {!session ? (
11234: 131:                             <Link href="/login" onClick={() => setIsMenuOpen(false)} className="mt-4 rounded-xl bg-white py-4 text-black shadow-lg">ĐĂNG NHẬP</Link>
11235: 132:                         ) : (
11236: 133:                             <button
11237: 134:                                 onClick={() => signOut()}
11238: 135:                                 className="mt-4 rounded-xl bg-red-600 py-4 text-white shadow-lg"
11239: 136:                             >
11240: 137:                                 ĐĂNG XUẤT
11241: 138:                             </button>
11242: 139:                         )}
11243: 140:                     </nav>
11244: 141:                 </div>
11245: 142:             )}
11246: 143:         </header>
11247: 144:     )
11248: 145: }
11249: ````
11250: 
11251: ## File: next.config.ts
11252: ````typescript
11253:  1: import type { NextConfig } from "next";
11254:  2: const nextConfig: NextConfig = {
11255:  3:   // Tăng tốc phản hồi HTTP
11256:  4:   compress: true,
11257:  5:   // Tối ưu serverless deploy
11258:  6:   output: "standalone",
11259:  7:   // Strict mode giúp phát hiện bug React
11260:  8:   reactStrictMode: true,
11261:  9:   // Tối ưu import package lớn
11262: 10:   experimental: {
11263: 11:     optimizePackageImports: ["lucide-react"],
11264: 12:   },
11265: 13:   images: {
11266: 14:     // Tắt tối ưu hóa ảnh để sửa lỗi 400 Bad Request và cảnh báo chất lượng
11267: 15:     unoptimized: true,
11268: 16:     // Cấu hình các mức chất lượng được phép
11269: 17:     qualities: [50, 70, 75, 80, 90],
11270: 18:     // Chỉ cho phép domain ảnh thực sự dùng
11271: 19:     remotePatterns: [
11272: 20:       {
11273: 21:         protocol: "https",
11274: 22:         hostname: "**.supabase.co",
11275: 23:       },
11276: 24:       {
11277: 25:         protocol: "https",
11278: 26:         hostname: "images.unsplash.com",
11279: 27:       },
11280: 28:       {
11281: 29:         protocol: "https",
11282: 30:         hostname: "i.imgur.com",
11283: 31:       },
11284: 32:       {
11285: 33:         protocol: "https",
11286: 34:         hostname: "postimg.cc",
11287: 35:       },
11288: 36:       {
11289: 37:         protocol: "https",
11290: 38:         hostname: "**.postimg.cc",
11291: 39:       },
11292: 40:       {
11293: 41:         protocol: "https",
11294: 42:         hostname: "api.vietqr.io",
11295: 43:       },
11296: 44:       {
11297: 45:         protocol: "https",
11298: 46:         hostname: "img.vietqr.io",
11299: 47:       }
11300: 48:     ],
11301: 49:     // Format ảnh hiện đại
11302: 50:     formats: ["image/avif", "image/webp"],
11303: 51:     // Cache ảnh lâu hơn
11304: 52:     minimumCacheTTL: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30, // 30 ngày
11305: 53:   },
11306: 54:   // Tắt source map production để giảm bundle
11307: 55:   productionBrowserSourceMaps: false,
11308: 56:   // Headers bảo mật cơ bản
11309: 57:   async headers() {
11310: 58:     return [
11311: 59:       {
11312: 60:         source: "/(.*)",
11313: 61:         headers: [
11314: 62:           {
11315: 63:             key: "X-Frame-Options",
11316: 64:             value: "SAMEORIGIN",
11317: 65:           },
11318: 66:           {
11319: 67:             key: "X-Content-Type-Options",
11320: 68:             value: "nosniff",
11321: 69:           },
11322: 70:           {
11323: 71:             key: "Referrer-Policy",
11324: 72:             value: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin",
11325: 73:           },
11326: 74:         ],
11327: 75:       },
11328: 76:     ];
11329: 77:   },
11330: 78: };
11331: 79: export default nextConfig;
11332: ````

11335: ````json
11336:  1: {
11337:  2:   "name": "brk-academy",
11338:  3:   "version": "0.1.0",
11339:  4:   "private": true,
11340:  5:   "scripts": {
11341:  6:     "dev": "next dev",
11342:  7:     "build": "next build",
11343:  8:     "postinstall": "prisma generate",
11344:  9:     "start": "next start",
11345: 10:     "lint": "eslint",
11346: 11:     "import-csv": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/import-csv.ts",
11347: 12:     "process-legacy": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/process-legacy-users.ts",
11348: 13:     "check-missing": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/check-missing-ids.ts",
11349: 14:     "fill-missing": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/fill-missing-ids.ts",
11350: 15:     "change-id": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/change-id.ts",
11351: 16:     "add-reserved": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/add-reserved-id.ts",
11352: 17:     "import-reserved": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/import-reserved-list.ts",
11353: 18:     "make-admin": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/make-admin.ts",
11354: 19:     "seed-courses": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/seed-courses.ts",
11355: 20:     "seed-enrollments": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/seed-enrollments.ts",
11356: 21:     "import-v3": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} scripts/import-v3-data.ts",
11357: 22:     "push": "powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/push.ps1",
11358: 23:     "code-history": "ts-node --compiler-options \"{\\\"module\\\":\\\"CommonJS\\\"}\" scripts/generate-code-history.ts",
11359: 24:     "sync-ai": "npx repomix && ts-node --compiler-options \"{\\\"module\\\":\\\"CommonJS\\\"}\" scripts/sync-to-drive.ts"
11360: 25:   },
11361: 26:   "dependencies": {
11362: 27:     "@auth/prisma-adapter": "^2.11.1",
11363: 28:     "@hookform/resolvers": "^5.2.2",
11364: 29:     "@prisma/client": "5.22.0",
11365: 30:     "@supabase/supabase-js": "^2.95.3",
11366: 31:     "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6",
11367: 32:     "@xyflow/react": "^12.10.1",
11368: 33:     "bcryptjs": "^3.0.3",
11369: 34:     "clsx": "^2.1.1",
11370: 35:     "csv-parser": "^3.2.0",
11371: 36:     "csv-writer": "^1.6.0",
11372: 37:     "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
11373: 38:     "dompurify": "^3.3.1",
11374: 39:     "dotenv": "^17.3.1",
11375: 40:     "googleapis": "^171.4.0",
11376: 41:     "lucide-react": "^0.570.0",
11377: 42:     "next": "16.1.6",
11378: 43:     "next-auth": "^5.0.0-beta.30",
11379: 44:     "react": "19.2.3",
11380: 45:     "react-day-picker": "^9.14.0",
11381: 46:     "react-dom": "19.2.3",
11382: 47:     "react-hook-form": "^7.71.1",
11383: 48:     "tailwind-merge": "^3.4.1",
11384: 49:     "zod": "^4.3.6"
11385: 50:   },
11386: 51:   "devDependencies": {
11387: 52:     "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
11388: 53:     "@types/node": "^20",
11389: 54:     "@types/react": "^19",
11390: 55:     "@types/react-dom": "^19",
11391: 56:     "eslint": "^9",
11392: 57:     "eslint-config-next": "16.1.6",
11393: 58:     "prisma": "5.22.0",
11394: 59:     "tailwindcss": "^4",
11395: 60:     "ts-node": "^10.9.2",
11396: 61:     "typescript": "^5"
11397: 62:   },
11398: 63:   "prisma": {
11399: 64:     "seed": "ts-node --compiler-options {\"module\":\"CommonJS\"} prisma/seed.ts"
11400: 65:   }
11401: 66: }

11404: ## File: app/courses/[id]/learn/page.tsx
11405: ````typescript
11406:  1: import { auth } from "@/auth"
11407:  2: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
11408:  3: import { redirect } from "next/navigation"
11409:  4: import CoursePlayer from "@/components/course/CoursePlayer"
11410:  5: export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"; //test thử xem lỗi gì - dùng xong xóa
11411:  6: export default async function CourseLearnPage({
11412:  7:   params,
11413:  8: }: {
11414:  9:   params: Promise<{ id: string }>
11415: 10: }) {
11416: 11:   const { id } = await params
11417: 12:   const session = await auth()
11418: 13:   if (!session?.user?.id) redirect("/login")
11419: 14:   const userId = Number(session.user.id)
11420: 15:   // 🔥 BƯỚC 1: lấy course trước
11421: 16:   const course = await prisma.course.findUnique({
11422: 17:     where: { id_khoa: id },
11423: 18:     select: { id: true },
11424: 19:   })
11425: 20:   if (!course) redirect(`/courses/${id}`)
11426: 21:   // 🔥 BƯỚC 2: lấy enrollment bằng courseId
11427: 22:   const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
11428: 23:     where: {
11429: 24:       userId_courseId: {
11430: 25:         userId,
11431: 26:         courseId: course.id,
11432: 27:       },
11433: 28:     },
11434: 29:     select: {
11435: 30:       id: true,
11436: 31:       status: true,
11437: 32:       startedAt: true,
11438: 33:       resetAt: true,
11439: 34:       lastLessonId: true,
11440: 35:       course: {
11441: 36:         select: {
11442: 37:           id: true,
11443: 38:           id_khoa: true,
11444: 39:           name_lop: true,
11445: 40:           lessons: {
11446: 41:             select: {
11447: 42:               id: true,
11448: 43:               title: true,
11449: 44:               order: true,
11450: 45:               videoUrl: true,
11451: 46:               isDailyChallenge: true,
11452: 47:             },
11453: 48:             orderBy: { order: "asc" },
11454: 49:           },
11455: 50:         },
11456: 51:       },
11457: 52:       lessonProgress: {
11458: 53:         where: {
11459: 54:           status: { not: "RESET" },
11460: 55:         },
11461: 56:         select: {
11462: 57:           lessonId: true,
11463: 58:           status: true,
11464: 59:           totalScore: true,
11465: 60:           maxTime: true,
11466: 61:           duration: true,
11467: 62:           submittedAt: true,
11468: 63:           assignment: true,
11469: 64:           scores: true,
11470: 65:         },
11471: 66:       },
11472: 67:     },
11473: 68:   })
11474: 69:   if (!enrollment || enrollment.status !== "ACTIVE") {
11475: 70:     redirect(`/courses/${id}`)
11476: 71:   }
11477: 72:   return (
11478: 73:     <div className="h-screen h-dvh bg-black overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
11479: 74:       <CoursePlayer
11480: 75:         course={enrollment.course}
11481: 76:         enrollment={enrollment}
11482: 77:         session={session}
11483: 78:       />
11484: 79:     </div>
11485: 80:   )
11486: 81: }
11487: ````

11489: ## File: components/course/CourseCard.tsx
11490: ````typescript
11491:   1: 'use client'
11492:   2: import React, { useState } from 'react'
11493:   3: import Image from 'next/image'
11494:   4: import PaymentModal from './PaymentModal'
11495:   5: import UploadProofModal from '@/components/payment/UploadProofModal'
11496:   6: import { enrollInCourseAction } from '@/app/actions/course-actions'
11497:   7: interface CourseCardProps {
11498:   8:     course: any
11499:   9:     isLoggedIn: boolean
11500:  10:     enrollment?: {
11501:  11:         status: string
11502:  12:         startedAt: Date | null
11503:  13:         completedCount: number
11504:  14:         totalLessons: number
11505:  15:         enrollmentId?: number
11506:  16:         payment?: {
11507:  17:             id: number
11508:  18:             status: string
11509:  19:             proofImage?: string | null
11510:  20:         }
11511:  21:     } | null
11512:  22:     isCourseOneActive?: boolean
11513:  23:     userPhone?: string | null
11514:  24:     userId?: number | null
11515:  25:     priority?: boolean
11516:  26:     darkMode?: boolean
11517:  27: }
11518:  28: export default function CourseCard({ course, isLoggedIn, enrollment, isCourseOneActive = false, userPhone = null, userId = null, priority = false, darkMode = false }: CourseCardProps) {
11519:  29:     const [showPayment, setShowPayment] = useState(false)
11520:  30:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
11521:  31:     // Override phi_coc nếu đã kích hoạt khóa 1
11522:  32:     const effectivePhiCoc = isCourseOneActive ? 0 : course.phi_coc
11523:  33:     const isActive = enrollment?.status === 'ACTIVE'
11524:  34:     const isPending = enrollment?.status === 'PENDING'
11525:  35:     const handleAction = async (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
11526:  36:         e.preventDefault()
11527:  37:         e.stopPropagation()
11528:  38:         if (!isLoggedIn) {
11529:  39:             alert('Vui lòng Đăng nhập / Đăng ký tài khoản miễn phí để tiếp tục!')
11530:  40:             window.location.href = '/login'
11531:  41:             return
11532:  42:         }
11533:  43:         if (isActive) {
11534:  44:             window.location.href = `/courses/${course.id_khoa}/learn`
11535:  45:             return
11536:  46:         }
11537:  47:         if (effectivePhiCoc === 0) {
11538:  48:             setLoading(true)
11539:  49:             try {
11540:  50:                 const res = await enrollInCourseAction(course.id)
11541:  51:                 if (res.success) {
11542:  52:                     window.location.href = `/courses/${course.id_khoa}/learn`
11543:  53:                 }
11544:  54:             } catch (err: any) {
11545:  55:                 alert(err.message)
11546:  56:             } finally {
11547:  57:                 setLoading(false)
11548:  58:             }
11549:  59:         } else {
11550:  60:             if (isPending) {
11551:  61:                 setShowPayment(true)
11552:  62:             } else {
11553:  63:                 setLoading(true)
11554:  64:                 try {
11555:  65:                     const res = await enrollInCourseAction(course.id)
11556:  66:                     if (res.success) {
11557:  67:                         // Sau khi enroll thành công, component sẽ re-render do revalidatePath.
11558:  68:                         // Chúng ta cần đảm bảo setShowPayment(true) được giữ lại.
11559:  69:                         // Sử dụng timeout nhỏ để chạy sau chu kỳ re-render của Next.js
11560:  70:                         setTimeout(() => setShowPayment(true), 100)
11561:  71:                     }
11562:  72:                 } catch (err: any) {
11563:  73:                     alert(err.message)
11564:  74:                 } finally {
11565:  75:                     setLoading(false)
11566:  76:                 }
11567:  77:             }
11568:  78:         }
11569:  79:     }
11570:  80:     const progressPct = enrollment && enrollment.totalLessons > 0
11571:  81:         ? Math.round((enrollment.completedCount / enrollment.totalLessons) * 100)
11572:  82:         : 0
11573:  83:     return (
11574:  84:         <>
11575:  85:             <div className={`group overflow-hidden rounded-2xl shadow-lg transition-all hover:shadow-2xl flex flex-col h-full ${darkMode ? 'bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800' : 'bg-white border border-gray-100'}`}>
11576:  86:                 {/* Ảnh bìa - Đã tối ưu hóa */}
11577:  87:                 <div className="relative aspect-[16/9] w-full overflow-hidden shrink-0 bg-zinc-800">
11578:  88:                     <Image
11579:  89:                         src={course.link_anh_bia || 'https://i.postimg.cc/PJPkm7vB/1.jpg'}
11580:  90:                         alt={course.name_lop}
11581:  91:                         fill
11582:  92:                         priority={priority} // Ưu tiên load các card đầu tiên
11583:  93:                         sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 50vw, 33vw"
11584:  94:                         className="object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105"
11585:  95:                     />
11586:  96:                 </div>
11587:  97:                 {/* Nội dung - Giữ nguyên 100% */}
11588:  98:                 <div className="p-5 flex flex-col flex-grow">
11589:  99:                     {/* Title */}
11590: 100:                     <div className="mb-3 flex items-center gap-2.5">
11591: 101:                         <span className="text-2xl leading-none drop-shadow-sm select-none shrink-0">📘</span>
11592: 102:                         <h3 className={`text-base sm:text-lg font-black leading-tight truncate flex-1 ${darkMode ? 'text-white' : 'text-black'}`}
11593: 103:                             style={{ fontFamily: 'var(--font-inter), sans-serif' }}>
11594: 104:                             {course.name_lop}
11595: 105:                         </h3>
11596: 106:                     </div>
11597: 107:                     {/* Badges + Trạng thái + Ngày bắt đầu */}
11598: 108:                     <div className="mb-3 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
11599: 109:                         <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-[8px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider shadow-sm ${effectivePhiCoc === 0 ? 'bg-yellow-400 text-gray-900' : 'bg-red-600 text-white'}`}>
11600: 110:                             {effectivePhiCoc === 0 ? 'Miễn phí' : 'Phí cam kết'}
11601: 111:                         </span>
11602: 112:                         {isActive && (
11603: 113:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-sky-500 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-white shadow-sm border border-sky-400">
11604: 114:                                 <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white animate-pulse shrink-0" />
11605: 115:                                 Đã kích hoạt
11606: 116:                                 {enrollment?.startedAt && (
11607: 117:                                     <span className="opacity-80 font-normal" suppressHydrationWarning>
11608: 118:                                         · Từ {new Date(enrollment.startedAt).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')}
11609: 119:                                     </span>
11610: 120:                                 )}
11611: 121:                             </span>
11612: 122:                         )}
11613: 123:                         {isPending && (
11614: 124:                             <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full bg-orange-500 px-3 py-1 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider text-white shadow-sm border border-orange-400">
11615: 125:                                 <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white animate-pulse shrink-0" />
11616: 126:                                 Chờ thanh toán
11617: 127:                             </span>
11618: 128:                         )}
11619: 129:                     </div>
11620: 130:                     {/* Mô tả */}
11621: 131:                     <div
11622: 132:                         className={`mb-5 flex-grow text-[14px] font-medium leading-relaxed text-justify break-words ${darkMode ? 'text-gray-300' : 'text-gray-500'
11623: 133:                             }`}
11624: 134:                         dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: course.mo_ta_ngan || '' }}
11625: 135:                     />
11626: 136:                     {/* Button */}
11627: 137:                     <button
11628: 138:                         onClick={handleAction}
11629: 139:                         disabled={loading}
11630: 140:                         className={`group/btn relative flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 overflow-hidden rounded-full py-1.5 text-sm sm:text-base font-black shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-[0.97]
11631: 141:                             ${loading ? 'bg-gray-400 text-white cursor-not-allowed' :
11632: 142:                                 isActive ? 'bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 hover:shadow-emerald-200' :
11633: 143:                                 isPending ? 'bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 hover:shadow-orange-200' :
11634: 144:                                     'bg-sky-500 text-white hover:bg-sky-600 hover:shadow-sky-200'}`}
11635: 145:                     >
11636: 146:                         {loading ? (
11637: 147:                             <span className="flex items-center gap-2 relative z-10">
11638: 148:                                 <svg className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
11639: 149:                                     <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" />
11640: 150:                                     <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z" />
11641: 151:                                 </svg>
11642: 152:                                 Đang kết nối...
11643: 153:                             </span>
11644: 154:                         ) : (
11645: 155:                             <>
11646: 156:                                 {isActive && enrollment && enrollment.totalLessons > 0 && (
11647: 157:                                     <span
11648: 158:                                         className="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-700"
11649: 159:                                         style={{ width: `${progressPct}%`, background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.18)' }}
11650: 160:                                         aria-hidden="true"
11651: 161:                                     />
11652: 162:                                 )}
11653: 163:                                 <span className="relative z-10 flex items-center gap-2">
11654: 164:                                     <span>{isActive ? '📖' : isPending ? '💰' : '⚡'}</span>
11655: 165:                                     <span>
11656: 166:                                         {isActive ? 'Vào học tiếp' : isPending ? 'Xem thông tin thanh toán' : effectivePhiCoc === 0 ? 'Kích hoạt miễn phí' : 'Kích hoạt ngay'}
11657: 167:                                         {isActive && enrollment && enrollment.totalLessons > 0 && (
11658: 168:                                             <span className="ml-1.5 font-normal opacity-90 text-[12px]">
11659: 169:                                                 {enrollment.completedCount}/{enrollment.totalLessons} bài · {progressPct}%
11660: 170:                                             </span>
11661: 171:                                         )}
11662: 172:                                     </span>
11663: 173:                                     <span>{isActive ? '▶' : '🚀'}</span>
11664: 174:                                 </span>
11665: 175:                             </>
11666: 176:                         )}
11667: 177:                     </button>
11668: 178:                     {isPending && !loading && (
11669: 179:                         <p className="mt-3 text-center text-xs font-bold text-orange-600 animate-pulse italic">
11670: 180:                             Đang chờ thanh toán...
11671: 181:                         </p>
11672: 182:                     )}
11673: 183:                 </div>
11674: 184:             </div>
11675: 185:             {showPayment && (
11676: 186:                 <PaymentModal
11677: 187:                     course={course}
11678: 188:                     enrollment={enrollment}
11679: 189:                     isCourseOneActive={isCourseOneActive}
11680: 190:                     userPhone={userPhone}
11681: 191:                     userId={userId}
11682: 192:                     onClose={() => setShowPayment(false)}
11683: 193:                 />
11684: 194:             )}
11685: 195:         </>
11686: 196:     )
11687: 197: }
11688: ````
