11690: ## File: lib/notifications.ts
11691: ````typescript
11692:   1: import { google } from 'googleapis';
11693:   2: /**
11694:   3:  * Gửi thông báo đến Telegram (Hỗ trợ 3 Group khác nhau)
11695:   4:  */
11696:   5: export async function sendTelegram(message: string, type: 'REGISTER' | 'ACTIVATE' | 'LESSON' = 'ACTIVATE') {
11697:   6:   const token = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
11698:   7:   // Lấy Chat ID tương ứng với từng loại sự kiện
11699:   8:   const chatIdMap = {
11700:   9:     REGISTER: process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_REGISTER || process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID,
11701:  10:     ACTIVATE: process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_ACTIVATE || process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID,
11702:  11:     LESSON: process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_LESSON || process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID,
11703:  12:   };
11704:  13:   const chatId = chatIdMap[type];
11705:  14:   if (!token || !chatId) {
11706:  15:     console.error(`⚠️ Thiếu cấu hình Telegram cho loại: ${type}`);
11707:  16:     return;
11708:  17:   }
11709:  18:   try {
11710:  19:     const url = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${token}/sendMessage`;
11711:  20:     const response = await fetch(url, {
11712:  21:       method: 'POST',
11713:  22:       headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
11714:  23:       body: JSON.stringify({
11715:  24:         chat_id: chatId,
11716:  25:         text: message,
11717:  26:         parse_mode: 'HTML',
11718:  27:       }),
11719:  28:     });
11720:  29:     const result = await response.json();
11721:  30:     if (!result.ok) {
11722:  31:         console.error(`❌ Telegram API Error (${type}):`, result.description);
11723:  32:     } else {
11724:  33:         console.log(`✅ Telegram API Success (${type}): Tin nhắn đã được gửi đến ID ${chatId}`);
11725:  34:     }
11726:  35:   } catch (error) {
11727:  36:     console.error(`❌ Lỗi hệ thống khi gửi Telegram (${type}):`, error);
11728:  37:   }
11729:  38: }
11730:  39: /**
11731:  40:  * Cấu hình OAuth2 Client cho Gmail
11732:  41:  */
11733:  42: function getGmailClient() {
11734:  43:   const oAuth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
11735:  44:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_ID,
11736:  45:     process.env.GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET,
11737:  46:     'http://localhost'
11738:  47:   );
11739:  48:   oAuth2Client.setCredentials({ refresh_token: process.env.GMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN });
11740:  49:   return google.gmail({ version: 'v1', auth: oAuth2Client });
11741:  50: }
11742:  51: /**
11743:  52:  * Hàm chung để gửi Email qua Gmail API
11744:  53:  */
11745:  54: async function sendGmail(to: string, subject: string, htmlBody: string, bcc?: string) {
11746:  55:   const gmail = getGmailClient();
11747:  56:   const adminEmail = process.env.GMAIL_USER || 'hocvienbrk@gmail.com';
11748:  57:   const fromName = 'Học Viện BRK';
11749:  58:   const encodedFromName = `=?utf-8?B?${Buffer.from(fromName).toString('base64')}?=`;
11750:  59:   const encodedSubject = `=?utf-8?B?${Buffer.from(subject).toString('base64')}?=`;
11751:  60:   const messageParts = [
11752:  61:     `From: ${encodedFromName} <${adminEmail}>`,
11753:  62:     `To: ${to}`,
11754:  63:     bcc ? `Bcc: ${bcc}` : '',
11755:  64:     `Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8`,
11756:  65:     `MIME-Version: 1.0`,
11757:  66:     `Subject: ${encodedSubject}`,
11758:  67:     ``,
11759:  68:     htmlBody,
11760:  69:   ].filter(line => line !== '').join('\n');
11761:  70:   const encodedMessage = Buffer.from(messageParts)
11762:  71:     .toString('base64')
11763:  72:     .replace(/\+/g, '-')
11764:  73:     .replace(/\//g, '_')
11765:  74:     .replace(/=+$/, '');
11766:  75:   try {
11767:  76:     await gmail.users.messages.send({
11768:  77:       userId: 'me',
11769:  78:       requestBody: { raw: encodedMessage },
11770:  79:     });
11771:  80:     console.log(`✅ Đã gửi email thành công: ${subject} -> ${to}`);
11772:  81:   } catch (error) {
11773:  82:     console.error(`❌ Lỗi gửi Email (${subject}):`, error);
11774:  83:   }
11775:  84: }
11776:  85: /**
11777:  86:  * Email chào mừng học viên mới
11778:  87:  */
11779:  88: export async function sendWelcomeEmail(to: string, studentName: string, studentId: number) {
11780:  89:   const subject = `[Học Viện BRK] Chào mừng bạn gia nhập học viện - Mã học tập của bạn là #${studentId}`;
11781:  90:   const htmlBody = `
11782:  91:     Chào mừng <b>${studentName}</b> đến với Học Viện BRK,<br><br>
11783:  92:     Tài khoản của bạn đã được khởi tạo thành công.<br>
11784:  93:     <b>Mã số học tập của bạn là: <span style="font-size: 18px; color: #7c3aed;">#${studentId}</span></b><br><br>
11785:  94:     Mã số này rất quan trọng, bạn vui lòng ghi nhớ để sử dụng khi chuyển khoản cam kết hoặc nhận hỗ trợ từ học viện.<br><br>
11786:  95:     Chúc bạn có những trải nghiệm học tập tuyệt vời!<br><br>
11787:  96:     Trân trọng,<br>
11788:  97:     Đội ngũ Học Viện BRK
11789:  98:   `;
11790:  99:   await sendGmail(to, subject, htmlBody);
11791: 100: }
11792: 101: /**
11793: 102:  * Email thông báo kích hoạt khóa học (Dùng nội dung từ bảng Course)
11794: 103:  */
11795: 104: export async function sendActivationEmail(to: string, studentName: string, studentId: number, courseName: string, customContent: string | null) {
11796: 105:   const subject = `[Học Viện BRK] Kích hoạt thành công khóa học: ${courseName}`;
11797: 106:   const adminEmail = process.env.GMAIL_USER || 'hocvienbrk@gmail.com';
11798: 107:   const htmlBody = `
11799: 108:     Chào <b>${studentName}</b> (Mã số học tập: <b>#${studentId}</b>),<br><br>
11800: 109:     Chúc mừng bạn! Khóa học <b>${courseName}</b> của bạn đã được <b>kích hoạt thành công</b>.<br><br>
11801: 110:     ${customContent ? `---<br><b>Thông tin bổ sung từ giảng viên:</b><br>${customContent}<br>---<br><br>` : ''}
11802: 111:     Bây giờ bạn có thể đăng nhập để bắt đầu lộ trình học tập.<br><br>
11803: 112:     Trân trọng,<br>
11804: 113:     Đội ngũ Học Viện BRK
11805: 114:   `;
11806: 115:   await sendGmail(to, subject, htmlBody, adminEmail);
11807: 116: }
11808: 117: /**
11809: 118:  * Thông báo khi có người đăng nhập thành công
11810: 119:  */
11811: 120: export async function sendLoginNotification(user: any, ip: string, userAgent: string) {
11812: 121:   try {
11813: 122:     // 1. Tra cứu vị trí từ IP (Sử dụng IP-API miễn phí)
11814: 123:     let location = 'Không xác định';
11815: 124:     let isp = '';
11816: 125:     try {
11817: 126:       const geoRes = await fetch(`http://ip-api.com/json/${ip}?fields=status,country,regionName,city,isp`);
11818: 127:       const geoData = await geoRes.json();
11819: 128:       if (geoData.status === 'success') {
11820: 129:         location = `${geoData.city}, ${geoData.regionName}, ${geoData.country}`;
11821: 130:         isp = geoData.isp || '';
11822: 131:       }
11823: 132:     } catch (e) {
11824: 133:       console.error('Lỗi tra cứu GeoIP:', e);
11825: 134:     }
11826: 135:     // 2. Phân tích User Agent đơn giản (Trình duyệt/Hệ điều hành)
11827: 136:     const browser = userAgent.includes('Chrome') ? 'Chrome' : userAgent.includes('Firefox') ? 'Firefox' : userAgent.includes('Safari') ? 'Safari' : 'Trình duyệt khác';
11828: 137:     const os = userAgent.includes('Windows') ? 'Windows' : userAgent.includes('Android') ? 'Android' : userAgent.includes('iPhone') ? 'iPhone/iOS' : 'Hệ điều hành khác';
11829: 138:     const msg = `🔑 <b>THÔNG BÁO ĐĂNG NHẬP</b>\n\n` +
11830: 139:                 `👤 Học viên: <b>${user.name}</b> (#${user.id})\n` +
11831: 140:                 `📧 Email: ${user.email}\n` +
11832: 141:                 `📍 Vị trí: <b>${location}</b>\n` +
11833: 142:                 `🌐 IP: ${ip} (${isp})\n` +
11834: 143:                 `📱 Thiết bị: ${browser} on ${os}\n` +
11835: 144:                 `📅 Thời gian: ${new Date().toLocaleString('vi-VN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' })}`;
11836: 145:     await sendTelegram(msg, 'REGISTER');
11837: 146:   } catch (error) {
11838: 147:     console.error('Lỗi gửi thông báo đăng nhập:', error);
11839: 148:   }
11840: 149: }
11841: 150: // Giữ lại các hàm cũ để không làm gãy logic hiện tại (nhưng trỏ về hàm mới)
11842: 151: export const sendTelegramAdmin = (msg: string) => sendTelegram(msg, 'ACTIVATE');
11843: 152: export const sendSuccessEmail = (to: string, name: string, course: string) => sendActivationEmail(to, name, 0, course, null);
11844: ````
11845: 
11846: ## File: prisma/schema.prisma
11847: ````prisma
11848:   1: generator client {
11849:   2:   provider = "prisma-client-js"
11850:   3: }
11851:   4: 
11852:   5: datasource db {
11853:   6:   provider  = "postgresql"
11854:   7:   url       = env("DATABASE_URL")
11855:   8:   directUrl = env("DIRECT_URL")
11856:   9: }
11857:  10: 
11858:  11: model User {
11859:  12:   id            Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
11860:  13:   name          String?
11861:  14:   email         String       @unique
11862:  15:   emailVerified DateTime?
11863:  16:   image         String?
11864:  17:   password      String?
11865:  18:   phone         String?      @unique
11866:  19:   role          Role         @default(STUDENT)
11867:  20:   referrerId    Int?
11868:  21:   createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
11869:  22:   updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
11870:  23:   accounts      Account[]
11871:  24:   enrollments   Enrollment[]
11872:  25:   sessions      Session[]
11873:  26:   lessonComments LessonComment[] @relation("UserToLessonComment")
11874:  27:   posts         Post[]          @relation("UserToPost")
11875:  28:   postComments  PostComment[]   @relation("UserToPostComment")
11876:  29:   referrer      User?        @relation("ReferrerToReferee", fields: [referrerId], references: [id])
11877:  30:   referrals     User[]       @relation("ReferrerToReferee")
11878:  31:   
11879:  32:   // Zero 2 Hero Data
11880:  33:   goal          String?      // Mục tiêu học tập
11881:  34:   surveyResults Json?        // Kết quả khảo sát đầu vào
11882:  35:   customPath    Json?        // Lộ trình cá nhân hóa (danh sách ID khóa học)
11883:  36: 
11884:  37:   @@index([email])
11885:  38:   @@index([phone])
11886:  39:   @@index([referrerId])
11887:  40: }
11888:  41: 
11889:  42: model Post {
11890:  43:   id        String        @id @default(cuid())
11891:  44:   title     String
11892:  45:   content   String        @db.Text
11893:  46:   image     String?
11894:  47:   published Boolean       @default(true)
11895:  48:   pin       Boolean       @default(false)
11896:  49:   createdAt DateTime      @default(now())
11897:  50:   updatedAt DateTime      @updatedAt
11898:  51:   authorId  Int
11899:  52:   author    User          @relation("UserToPost", fields: [authorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
11900:  53:   comments  PostComment[]
11901:  54: 
11902:  55:   @@index([authorId])
11903:  56: }
11904:  57: 
11905:  58: model PostComment {
11906:  59:   id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
11907:  60:   postId    String
11908:  61:   userId    Int
11909:  62:   content   String   @db.Text
11910:  63:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
11911:  64:   updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
11912:  65:   post      Post     @relation(fields: [postId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
11913:  66:   user      User     @relation("UserToPostComment", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
11914:  67: 
11915:  68:   @@index([postId])
11916:  69:   @@index([userId])
11917:  70: }
11918:  71: 
11919:  72: model Account {
11920:  73:   userId            Int
11921:  74:   type              String
11922:  75:   provider          String
11923:  76:   providerAccountId String
11924:  77:   refresh_token     String?
11925:  78:   access_token      String?
11926:  79:   expires_at        Int?
11927:  80:   token_type        String?
11928:  81:   scope             String?
11929:  82:   id_token          String?
11930:  83:   session_state     String?
11931:  84:   createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
11932:  85:   updatedAt         DateTime @updatedAt
11933:  86:   user              User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
11934:  87: 
11935:  88:   @@id([provider, providerAccountId])
11936:  89: }
11937:  90: 
11938:  91: model Session {
11939:  92:   sessionToken String   @unique
11940:  93:   userId       Int
11941:  94:   expires      DateTime
11942:  95:   createdAt    DateTime @default(now())
11943:  96:   updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt
11944:  97:   user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
11945:  98: }
11946:  99: 
11947: 100: model VerificationToken {
11948: 101:   identifier String
11949: 102:   token      String
11950: 103:   expires    DateTime
11951: 104: 
11952: 105:   @@id([identifier, token])
11953: 106: }
11954: 107: 
11955: 108: model SystemConfig {
11956: 109:   key   String @id
11957: 110:   value Json
11958: 111: }
11959: 112: 
11960: 113: model Survey {
11961: 114:   id          Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
11962: 115:   name        String
11963: 116:   description String?
11964: 117:   flow        Json     // Lưu trữ nodes và edges của React Flow
11965: 118:   isActive    Boolean  @default(false)
11966: 119:   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
11967: 120:   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
11968: 121: }
11969: 122: 
11970: 123: model ReservedId {
11971: 124:   id        Int      @id
11972: 125:   note      String?
11973: 126:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
11974: 127: }
11975: 128: 
11976: 129: model Course {
11977: 130:   id            Int          @id @default(autoincrement())
11978: 131:   id_khoa       String       @unique
11979: 132:   name_lop      String
11980: 133:   name_khoa     String?
11981: 134:   date_join     String?
11982: 135:   status        Boolean      @default(true)
11983: 136:   pin           Int          @default(0)
11984: 137:   mo_ta_ngan    String?
11985: 138:   mo_ta_dai     String?
11986: 139:   link_anh_bia  String?      @map("link_anh_bia_khoa")
11987: 140:   link_zalo     String?
11988: 141:   phi_coc       Int          @default(0)
11989: 142:   stk           String?
11990: 143:   name_stk      String?
11991: 144:   bank_stk      String?
11992: 145:   noidung_stk   String?
11993: 146:   link_qrcode   String?
11994: 147:   file_email    String?
11995: 148:   noidung_email String?
11996: 149:   createdAt     DateTime     @default(now())
11997: 150:   updatedAt     DateTime     @updatedAt
11998: 151:   type          CourseType   @default(NORMAL)
11999: 152:   lessons       Lesson[]
12000: 153:   enrollments   Enrollment[]
12001: 154: }
12002: 155: 
12003: 156: model Lesson {
12004: 157:   id               String           @id @default(cuid())
12005: 158:   courseId         Int
12006: 159:   title            String
12007: 160:   videoUrl         String?
12008: 161:   content          String?
12009: 162:   order            Int
12010: 163:   isDailyChallenge Boolean          @default(false)
12011: 164:   course           Course           @relation(fields: [courseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12012: 165:   progress         LessonProgress[]
12013: 166:   comments         LessonComment[]
12014: 167: 
12015: 168:   @@unique([courseId, order])
12016: 169: }
12017: 170: 
12018: 171: model Enrollment {
12019: 172:   id           Int              @id @default(autoincrement())
12020: 173:   userId       Int
12021: 174:   courseId     Int
12022: 175:   status       EnrollmentStatus @default(PENDING)
12023: 176:   createdAt    DateTime         @default(now())
12024: 177:   updatedAt    DateTime         @updatedAt
12025: 178:   link_anh_coc String?
12026: 179:   phi_coc      Int              @default(0)
12027: 180:   startedAt    DateTime?
12028: 181:   resetAt      DateTime?
12029: 182:   lastLessonId String?
12030: 183:   challengeDays Int?
12031: 184:   course       Course           @relation(fields: [courseId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12032: 185:   user         User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12033: 186:   lessonProgress LessonProgress[]
12034: 187:   payment      Payment?
12035: 188: 
12036: 189:   @@unique([userId, courseId])
12037: 190:   @@index([userId])
12038: 191:   @@index([courseId])
12039: 192: }
12040: 193: 
12041: 194: model LessonProgress {
12042: 195:   id           Int        @id @default(autoincrement())
12043: 196:   enrollmentId Int
12044: 197:   lessonId     String
12045: 198:   scores       Json?
12046: 199:   totalScore   Int        @default(0)
12047: 200:   assignment   Json?
12048: 201:   status       String     @default("IN_PROGRESS")
12049: 202:   maxTime      Float      @default(0)
12050: 203:   duration     Float      @default(0)
12051: 204:   submittedAt  DateTime?
12052: 205:   createdAt    DateTime   @default(now())
12053: 206:   updatedAt    DateTime   @updatedAt
12054: 207:   enrollment   Enrollment @relation(fields: [enrollmentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12055: 208:   lesson       Lesson     @relation(fields: [lessonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12056: 209:   
12057: 210:   @@unique([enrollmentId, lessonId])
12058: 211:   @@index([enrollmentId])
12059: 212:   @@index([lessonId])
12060: 213:   @@index([status])
12061: 214: }
12062: 215: 
12063: 216: model LessonComment {
12064: 217:   id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
12065: 218:   lessonId  String
12066: 219:   userId    Int
12067: 220:   content   String
12068: 221:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
12069: 222:   user      User     @relation("UserToLessonComment", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12070: 223:   lesson    Lesson   @relation(fields: [lessonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12071: 224: 
12072: 225:   @@index([lessonId])
12073: 226:   @@index([userId])
12074: 227: }
12075: 228: 
12076: 229: model Message {
12077: 230:   id        Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
12078: 231:   content   String
12079: 232:   detail    String
12080: 233:   imageUrl  String?
12081: 234:   isActive  Boolean  @default(true)
12082: 235:   createdAt DateTime @default(now())
12083: 236: }
12084: 237: 
12085: 238: enum EnrollmentStatus {
12086: 239:   PENDING
12087: 240:   ACTIVE
12088: 241: }
12089: 242: 
12090: 243: enum Role {
12091: 244:   ADMIN
12092: 245:   STUDENT
12093: 246:   INSTRUCTOR
12094: 247:   AFFILIATE
12095: 248: }
12096: 249: 
12097: 250: enum CourseType {
12098: 251:   NORMAL
12099: 252:   CHALLENGE
12100: 253: }
12101: 254: 
12102: 255: enum PaymentStatus {
12103: 256:   PENDING
12104: 257:   VERIFIED
12105: 258:   REJECTED
12106: 259:   CANCELLED
12107: 260: }
12108: 261: 
12109: 262: model Payment {
12110: 263:   id              Int            @id @default(autoincrement())
12111: 264:   enrollmentId    Int            @unique
12112: 265:   amount          Int
12113: 266:   bankName        String?
12114: 267:   accountNumber   String?
12115: 268:   transferTime    DateTime?
12116: 269:   content         String?
12117: 270:   phone           String?
12118: 271:   courseCode      String?
12119: 272:   proofImage      String?
12120: 273:   status          PaymentStatus  @default(PENDING)
12121: 274:   verifiedAt      DateTime?
12122: 275:   verifyMethod    String?
12123: 276:   note            String?
12124: 277:   transferContent String?
12125: 278:   qrCodeUrl       String?
12126: 279:   createdAt       DateTime       @default(now())
12127: 280:   updatedAt       DateTime       @updatedAt
12128: 281:   enrollment      Enrollment     @relation(fields: [enrollmentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
12129: 282: }
12130: ````

12132: ## File: components/course/AssignmentForm.tsx
12133: ````typescript
12134:   1: 'use client'
12135:   2: import { useState, useMemo, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
12136:   3: import { useRouter, usePathname } from 'next/navigation'
12137:   4: import { Loader2, Info, X, Send } from "lucide-react"
12138:   5: import { saveAssignmentDraftAction } from '@/app/actions/course-actions'
12139:   6: interface AssignmentFormProps {
12140:   7:     lessonId: string
12141:   8:     lessonOrder: number
12142:   9:     startedAt: Date | null
12143:  10:     videoPercent: number
12144:  11:     videoUrl: string | null
12145:  12:     onSubmit: (data: any, isUpdate?: boolean) => Promise<{ success: boolean; totalScore: number } | void>
12146:  13:     initialData?: any
12147:  14:     onSaveDraft?: React.MutableRefObject<(() => Promise<void>) | undefined>
12148:  15:     onDraftSaved?: (draftInfo: any) => void
12149:  16:     onFormDataChange?: (data: { reflection: string; links: string[]; supports: boolean[] }) => void
12150:  17: }
12151:  18: function formatDate(date: Date | null) {
12152:  19:     if (!date) return '--/--/----'
12153:  20:     return new Date(date).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN')
12154:  21: }
12155:  22: function calcDeadline(startedAt: Date | null, order: number) {
12156:  23:     if (!startedAt) return null
12157:  24:     const d = new Date(startedAt)
12158:  25:     d.setDate(d.getDate() + (order - 1))
12159:  26:     return d
12160:  27: }
12161:  28: // ─── Popup Quy tắc ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
12162:  29: function RulesModal({ onClose }: { onClose: () => void }) {
12163:  30:     return (
12164:  31:         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-end p-4 bg-black/50" onClick={onClose}>
12165:  32:             <div
12166:  33:                 className="mt-16 mr-2 w-80 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-orange-200 text-sm text-gray-700 overflow-hidden"
12167:  34:                 onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
12168:  35:             >
12169:  36:                 <div className="bg-orange-500 text-white px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
12170:  37:                     <span className="font-bold text-base">📋 Quy tắc chấm điểm (Thang 10)</span>
12171:  38:                     <button onClick={onClose}><X className="w-4 h-4" /></button>
12172:  39:                 </div>
12173:  40:                 <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
12174:  41:                     <div className="bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
12175:  42:                         <p className="text-orange-700 text-xs font-semibold">✅ Điểm ≥ 5/10: Hoàn thành bài học và mở khóa bài tiếp theo.</p>
12176:  43:                     </div>
12177:  44:                     <div>
12178:  45:                         <p className="font-bold text-orange-600">1. Học theo Video (Max 2đ)</p>
12179:  46:                         <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">Xem &gt;50% <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>, Xem hết <span className="text-green-600">(+2đ)</span>.</p>
12180:  47:                     </div>
12181:  48:                     <div>
12182:  49:                         <p className="font-bold text-orange-600">2. Bài học Tâm đắc Ngộ (Max 2đ)</p>
12183:  50:                         <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">Có chia sẻ <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>, Sâu sắc (dài hơn 50 ký tự) <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>.</p>
12184:  51:                     </div>
12185:  52:                     <div>
12186:  53:                         <p className="font-bold text-orange-600">3. Thực hành nộp link video (Max 3đ)</p>
12187:  54:                         <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">Mỗi link video <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>.</p>
12188:  55:                     </div>
12189:  56:                     <div>
12190:  57:                         <p className="font-bold text-orange-600">4. Hỗ trợ (Max 2đ)</p>
12191:  58:                         <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">
12192:  59:                             Giúp người: Nhắc 2 đồng đội mình nhận hỗ trợ <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>.<br />
12193:  60:                             Giúp người giúp người: Đồng đội mình nhắc 2 người họ nhận hỗ trợ <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>.<br />
12194:  61:                             <span className="text-gray-400 text-xs">Nếu chưa có người để hỗ trợ: Nhắc ngược lên trên được tích vào ô đầu (+1đ).</span>
12195:  62:                         </p>
12196:  63:                     </div>
12197:  64:                     <div>
12198:  65:                         <p className="font-bold text-orange-600">5. Giữ tín đúng hạn (1đ)</p>
12199:  66:                         <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">
12200:  67:                             Nộp trước 23:59 <span className="text-green-600">(+1đ)</span>.<br />
12201:  68:                             <span className="text-red-500">Trừ điểm: Nộp muộn sau 23:59 (-1đ).</span>
12202:  69:                         </p>
12203:  70:                     </div>
12204:  71:                 </div>
12205:  72:             </div>
12206:  73:         </div>
12207:  74:     )
12208:  75: }
12209:  76: function SectionHead({ num, label, max, current }: { num: number; label: string; max: number; current: number }) {
12210:  77:     return (
12211:  78:         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1.5">
12212:  79:             <span className="font-semibold text-gray-800 text-sm">{num}. {label}</span>
12213:  80:             <span className={`text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${current > 0 ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-600' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'}`}>
12214:  81:                 {current}/{max}
12215:  82:             </span>
12216:  83:         </div>
12217:  84:     )
12218:  85: }
12219:  86: export default function AssignmentForm({
12220:  87:     lessonId,
12221:  88:     lessonOrder,
12222:  89:     startedAt,
12223:  90:     videoPercent = 0,
12224:  91:     videoUrl = null,
12225:  92:     onSubmit,
12226:  93:     initialData,
12227:  94:     onSaveDraft,
12228:  95:     onDraftSaved,
12229:  96:     onFormDataChange,
12230:  97: }: AssignmentFormProps) {
12231:  98:     const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
12232:  99:     const [showRules, setShowRules] = useState(false)
12233: 100:     const [reflection, setReflection] = useState<string>(initialData?.assignment?.reflection || "")
12234: 101:     const [links, setLinks] = useState<string[]>(
12235: 102:         initialData?.assignment?.links?.length > 0
12236: 103:             ? [...initialData.assignment.links, "", "", ""].slice(0, 3)
12237: 104:             : ["", "", ""]
12238: 105:     )
12239: 106:     const [supports, setSupports] = useState<boolean[]>(initialData?.assignment?.supports || [false, false])
12240: 107:     // Refs
12241: 108:     const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
12242: 109:     const initialRenderRef = useRef(true)
12243: 110:     const deadline = calcDeadline(startedAt, lessonOrder)
12244: 111:     const isCompleted = initialData?.status === 'COMPLETED'
12245: 112:     const existingTotalScore = initialData?.totalScore ?? 0
12246: 113:     const existingScores = initialData?.scores ?? {}
12247: 114:     const saveDraft = useCallback(async () => {
12248: 115:         if (isCompleted) return
12249: 116:         const hasData = reflection.trim() || links.some(l => l.trim()) || supports.some(s => s)
12250: 117:         if (hasData) {
12251: 118:             const draftData = { reflection, links, supports }
12252: 119:             try {
12253: 120:                 await saveAssignmentDraftAction({
12254: 121:                     enrollmentId: initialData?.enrollmentId,
12255: 122:                     lessonId,
12256: 123:                     ...draftData
12257: 124:                 })
12258: 125:                 if (onDraftSaved) onDraftSaved(draftData)
12259: 126:                 isDirtyRef.current = false
12260: 127:             } catch (error) {
12261: 128:                 console.error('Failed to save draft:', error)
12262: 129:             }
12263: 130:         }
12264: 131:     }, [reflection, links, supports, lessonId, initialData?.enrollmentId, onDraftSaved, isCompleted])
12265: 132:     // Track thay đổi để bật flag isDirty
12266: 133:     useEffect(() => {
12267: 134:         if (initialRenderRef.current) {
12268: 135:             initialRenderRef.current = false
12269: 136:             return
12270: 137:         }
12271: 138:         isDirtyRef.current = true
12272: 139:         if (onFormDataChange) {
12273: 140:             onFormDataChange({ reflection, links, supports })
12274: 141:         }
12275: 142:     }, [reflection, links, supports, onFormDataChange])
12276: 143:     // Đăng ký ref để parent ép lưu draft
12277: 144:     useEffect(() => {
12278: 145:         if (onSaveDraft) {
12279: 146:             onSaveDraft.current = async () => {
12280: 147:                 if (isDirtyRef.current) {
12281: 148:                     await saveDraft()
12282: 149:                     isDirtyRef.current = false
12283: 150:                 }
12284: 151:             }
12285: 152:         }
12286: 153:     }, [onSaveDraft, saveDraft])
12287: 154:     // Lưu draft khi rời trang
12288: 155:     useEffect(() => {
12289: 156:         if (isCompleted) return
12290: 157:         const handleBeforeUnload = () => {
12291: 158:             if (isDirtyRef.current) saveDraft()
12292: 159:         }
12293: 160:         window.addEventListener('beforeunload', handleBeforeUnload)
12294: 161:         window.addEventListener('pagehide', handleBeforeUnload)
12295: 162:         return () => {
12296: 163:             window.removeEventListener('beforeunload', handleBeforeUnload)
12297: 164:             window.removeEventListener('pagehide', handleBeforeUnload)
12298: 165:         }
12299: 166:     }, [saveDraft, isCompleted])
12300: 167:     // Realtime scoring
12301: 168:     // Rule: Nếu không có link video YouTube -> mặc định 2đ video
12302: 169:     const hasYouTubeVideo = !!videoUrl && /youtu\.be\/|youtube\.com\/|v=/.test(videoUrl)
12303: 170:     const displayPercent = hasYouTubeVideo ? videoPercent : 100
12304: 171:     const vidScore = useMemo(() => {
12305: 172:         if (!hasYouTubeVideo) return 2 // Không có video -> auto 2đ
12306: 173:         if (videoPercent >= 95) return 2
12307: 174:         if (videoPercent >= 50) return 1
12308: 175:         return 0
12309: 176:     }, [videoPercent, hasYouTubeVideo])
12310: 177:     const refScore = useMemo(() => {
12311: 178:         if (reflection.trim().length >= 86) return 2 // Mentor 7 yêu cầu 86 ký tự cho bài học tâm đắc ngộ
12312: 179:         if (reflection.trim().length > 0) return 1
12313: 180:         return 0
12314: 181:     }, [reflection])
12315: 182:     const validLinksCount = useMemo(() => links.filter(l => l.trim().length > 0).length, [links])
12316: 183:     const pracScore = useMemo(() => Math.min(validLinksCount, 3), [validLinksCount])
12317: 184:     const supportScore = useMemo(() => supports.filter(Boolean).length, [supports])
12318: 185:     const currentTimingScore = useMemo(() => {
12319: 186:         if (!deadline) return 0
12320: 187:         const dl = new Date(deadline)
12321: 188:         dl.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
12322: 189:         const isNowOnTime = new Date().getTime() <= dl.getTime()
12323: 190:         if (isCompleted) {
12324: 191:             // Nếu đã xong: 
12325: 192:             // - Nếu bây giờ vẫn trong hạn -> auto +1 (để gỡ điểm trễ)
12326: 193:             // - Nếu bây giờ quá hạn -> giữ nguyên điểm cũ (bảo vệ điểm đúng hạn)
12327: 194:             if (isNowOnTime) return 1
12328: 195:             return existingScores.timing ?? -1
12329: 196:         }
12330: 197:         return isNowOnTime ? 1 : -1
12331: 198:     }, [deadline, isCompleted, existingScores.timing])
12332: 199:     const total = Math.max(0, vidScore + refScore + pracScore + supportScore + currentTimingScore)
12333: 200:     const isOverdue = currentTimingScore === -1 && !isCompleted // Chỉ coi là trễ nếu chưa xong bài và hết hạn
12334: 201:     const handleSubmit = async () => {
12335: 202:         if (!startedAt) { alert("Bạn chưa xác nhận ngày bắt đầu lộ trình!"); return }
12336: 203:         if (isCompleted && isOverdue) {
12337: 204:             alert("Bài học đã nộp trễ hạn. Không thể cập nhật.")
12338: 205:             return
12339: 206:         }
12340: 207:         const isUpdate = isCompleted
12341: 208:         setLoading(true)
12342: 209:         try {
12343: 210:             // Lấy múi giờ hiện tại của thiết bị học viên
12344: 211:             const clientTimeZone = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone || 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh';
12345: 212:             const result = await onSubmit({ 
12346: 213:                 reflection, 
12347: 214:                 links, 
12348: 215:                 supports,
12349: 216:                 clientTimeZone // Gửi kèm múi giờ về server
12350: 217:             }, isUpdate)
12351: 218:             if (result?.success) {
12352: 219:                 isDirtyRef.current = false
12353: 220:                 if (onFormDataChange && !isUpdate) {
12354: 221:                     onFormDataChange({ reflection: '', links: ['', '', ''], supports: [false, false] })
12355: 222:                 }
12356: 223:             }
12357: 224:         } finally {
12358: 225:             setLoading(false)
12359: 226:         }
12360: 227:     }
12361: 228:     return (
12362: 229:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full min-h-0 bg-[#FFFDE7]">
12363: 230:             {showRules && <RulesModal onClose={() => setShowRules(false)} />}
12364: 231:             <div className="shrink-0 z-10 bg-[#FFFDE7] border-b border-orange-200 px-4 py-2">
12365: 232:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
12366: 233:                     <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500 leading-tight" suppressHydrationWarning>
12367: 234:                         Hoàn thành trước 23:59 ngày <span className="font-semibold text-gray-700" suppressHydrationWarning>{formatDate(deadline)}</span>
12368: 235:                     </p>
12369: 236:                     <span className="text-sm font-black text-orange-500">Tổng: {total}/10</span>
12370: 237:                 </div>
12371: 238:                 <div className="flex gap-1.5 mt-1.5">
12372: 239:                     {!(isCompleted && isOverdue) && (
12373: 240:                         <button
12374: 241:                             onClick={handleSubmit}
12375: 242:                             disabled={loading}
12376: 243:                             className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 active:scale-[0.98] text-white font-black rounded-xl py-2 transition-all shadow-md disabled:opacity-60 text-sm"
12377: 244:                         >
12378: 245:                             {loading
12379: 246:                                 ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
12380: 247:                                 : <><Send className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> {isCompleted ? 'CẬP NHẬT' : 'GHI NHẬN KẾT QUẢ'}</>
12381: 248:                             }
12382: 249:                         </button>
12383: 250:                     )}
12384: 251:                     {isCompleted && isOverdue && (
12385: 252:                         <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 font-black rounded-xl py-2 text-sm">
12386: 253:                             ĐÃ HOÀN THÀNH CẬP NHẬT
12387: 254:                         </div>
12388: 255:                     )}
12389: 256:                     <button
12390: 257:                         onClick={() => setShowRules(true)}
12391: 258:                         className="shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 bg-orange-100 hover:bg-orange-200 text-orange-600 rounded-xl border border-orange-300 transition text-xs font-semibold"
12392: 259:                         title="Xem quy tắc chấm điểm"
12393: 260:                     >
12394: 261:                         <Info className="w-3.5 h-3.5" /> Quy tắc
12395: 262:                     </button>
12396: 263:                 </div>
12397: 264:             </div>
12398: 265:             <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto flex flex-col gap-2 p-3">
12399: 266:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
12400: 267:                     <SectionHead num={1} label={hasYouTubeVideo ? "Mở TRÍ = học theo Video (2đ)" : "Mở TRÍ = Nội dung bài học (2đ)"} max={2} current={vidScore} />
12401: 268:                     <div className="h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
12402: 269:                         <div
12403: 270:                             className={`h-full transition-all duration-500 rounded-full ${!hasYouTubeVideo ? 'bg-emerald-500' : 'bg-orange-400'}`}
12404: 271:                             style={{ width: `${displayPercent}%` }}
12405: 272:                         />
12406: 273:                     </div>
12407: 274:                     <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
12408: 275:                         {hasYouTubeVideo
12409: 276:                             ? `Đang xem: ${videoPercent.toFixed(0)}%`
12410: 277:                             : '✓ Không có video - Đã hoàn thành nội dung'}
12411: 278:                     </p>
12412: 279:                 </div>
12413: 280:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
12414: 281:                     <SectionHead num={2} label="Bồi NHÂN = Bài học Tâm đắc Ngộ (2đ)" max={2} current={refScore} />
12415: 282:                     <textarea
12416: 283:                         value={reflection}
12417: 284:                         onChange={e => setReflection(e.target.value)}
12418: 285:                         placeholder="Điều bạn tâm đắc ngộ được từ bài học hôm nay..."
12419: 286:                         rows={3}
12420: 287:                         className="w-full text-sm text-gray-800 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-2 resize-none focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 placeholder:text-gray-300"
12421: 288:                     />
12422: 289:                     <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5">{reflection.length} ký tự {reflection.length >= 86 ? '✓ Sâu sắc' : '(cần ≥ 86 để đạt max)'}</p>
12423: 290:                 </div>
12424: 291:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
12425: 292:                     <SectionHead num={3} label="Hành LỄ = Link thực hành mỗi ngày (3đ)" max={3} current={pracScore} />
12426: 293:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
12427: 294:                         {links.map((link, i) => (
12428: 295:                             <input
12429: 296:                                 key={i}
12430: 297:                                 type="url"
12431: 298:                                 value={link}
12432: 299:                                 onChange={e => {
12433: 300:                                     const next = [...links]
12434: 301:                                     next[i] = e.target.value
12435: 302:                                     setLinks(next)
12436: 303:                                 }}
12437: 304:                                 placeholder={`link video hoặc link bài tập ${i + 1}`}
12438: 305:                                 className="w-full text-sm text-gray-800 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-300 placeholder:text-gray-300"
12439: 306:                             />
12440: 307:                         ))}
12441: 308:                     </div>
12442: 309:                 </div>
12443: 310:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
12444: 311:                     <SectionHead num={4} label="Trọng NGHĨA = hỗ trợ đồng đội (2đ)" max={2} current={supportScore} />
12445: 312:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
12446: 313:                         {[
12447: 314:                             'Giúp người (+1đ)',
12448: 315:                             'Giúp người giúp người (+1đ)'
12449: 316:                         ].map((label, i) => (
12450: 317:                             <label key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2.5 cursor-pointer select-none">
12451: 318:                                 <input
12452: 319:                                     type="checkbox"
12453: 320:                                     checked={supports[i]}
12454: 321:                                     onChange={e => {
12455: 322:                                         const next = [...supports]
12456: 323:                                         next[i] = e.target.checked
12457: 324:                                         setSupports(next)
12458: 325:                                     }}
12459: 326:                                     className="w-4 h-4 accent-orange-500 cursor-pointer"
12460: 327:                                 />
12461: 328:                                 <span className={`text-sm ${supports[i] ? 'text-gray-800 font-semibold' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
12462: 329:                                     {label}
12463: 330:                                 </span>
12464: 331:                             </label>
12465: 332:                         ))}
12466: 333:                     </div>
12467: 334:                 </div>
12468: 335:                 <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 px-3 py-2.5 shadow-sm">
12469: 336:                     <SectionHead num={5} label="Giữ TÍN = Làm đúng hạn (1đ)" max={1} current={currentTimingScore === 1 ? 1 : 0} />
12470: 337:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1 text-sm">
12471: 338:                         <div className="flex justify-between">
12472: 339:                             <span className="text-gray-500">Đúng hạn (Trước 23:59):</span>
12473: 340:                             <span className="text-green-600 font-bold">+1đ</span>
12474: 341:                         </div>
12475: 342:                         <div className="flex justify-between">
12476: 343:                             <span className="text-gray-500">Muộn (Sau 23:59):</span>
12477: 344:                             <span className="text-red-500 font-bold">-1đ</span>
12478: 345:                         </div>
12479: 346:                     </div>
12480: 347:                     <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-1">* Hệ thống tự động ghi nhận theo thời gian thực.</p>
12481: 348:                 </div>
12482: 349:                 <div className="h-2" />
12483: 350:             </div>
12484: 351:         </div>
12485: 352:     )
12486: 353: }
12487: ````
12488: 
12489: ## File: app/page.tsx
12490: ````typescript
12491:   1: import { auth } from "@/auth";
12492:   2: import Header from "@/components/layout/Header";
12493:   3: import CourseCard from "@/components/course/CourseCard";
12494:   4: import CourseSection from "@/components/home/CourseSection";
12495:   5: import MessageCard from "@/components/home/MessageCard";
12496:   6: import CommunityBoard from "@/components/home/CommunityBoard";
12497:   7: import Zero2HeroSurvey from "@/components/home/Zero2HeroSurvey";
12498:   8: import RealityMap from "@/components/home/RealityMap";
12499:   9: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma";
12500:  10: import { getRandomMessage } from "./actions/message-actions";
12501:  11: import { resetSurveyAction } from "./actions/survey-actions";
12502:  12: export default async function Home() {
12503:  13:   const session = await auth();
12504:  14:   // Parallel: lấy user + courses + message cùng lúc
12505:  15:   const [courses, userRecord, message] = await Promise.all([
12506:  16:     (prisma as any).course.findMany({
12507:  17:       where: { status: true },
12508:  18:       orderBy: [{ pin: 'asc' }, { id: 'asc' }]
12509:  19:     }),
12510:  20:     session?.user?.id
12511:  21:       ? (prisma as any).user.findUnique({
12512:  22:         where: { id: parseInt(session.user.id) },
12513:  23:         select: { name: true, id: true, image: true, phone: true, customPath: true, goal: true }
12514:  24:       })
12515:  25:       : Promise.resolve(null),
12516:  26:     getRandomMessage()
12517:  27:   ]);
12518:  28:   const userName = userRecord?.name ?? null;
12519:  29:   const userId = userRecord?.id ?? null;
12520:  30:   const userImage = userRecord?.image ?? session?.user?.image ?? null;
12521:  31:   const userPhone = userRecord?.phone ?? null;
12522:  32:   const customPath = userRecord?.customPath as number[] | null;
12523:  33:   const userGoal = userRecord?.goal ?? null;
12524:  34:   // 1. Sử dụng Set để lưu ID khóa học đã đăng ký
12525:  35:   let myCourseIds = new Set<number>();
12526:  36: let enrollmentsMap: Record<number, { 
12527:  37:   status: string; 
12528:  38:   startedAt: Date | null; 
12529:  39:   completedCount: number; 
12530:  40:   totalLessons: number;
12531:  41:   enrollmentId?: number;
12532:  42:   payment?: {
12533:  43:     id: number;
12534:  44:     status: string;
12535:  45:     proofImage?: string | null;
12536:  46:   };
12537:  47: }> = {};
12538:  48: if (session?.user?.id) {
12539:  49:   const userId = parseInt(session.user.id);
12540:  50:   const enrollments = await (prisma as any).enrollment.findMany({
12541:  51:     where: { userId },
12542:  52:     select: {
12543:  53:       id: true,
12544:  54:       courseId: true,
12545:  55:       status: true,
12546:  56:       startedAt: true,
12547:  57:       payment: {
12548:  58:         select: {
12549:  59:           id: true,
12550:  60:           status: true,
12551:  61:           proofImage: true
12552:  62:         }
12553:  63:       },
12554:  64:       course: {
12555:  65:         select: {
12556:  66:           _count: {
12557:  67:             select: { lessons: true }
12558:  68:           }
12559:  69:         }
12560:  70:       },
12561:  71:       _count: {
12562:  72:         select: {
12563:  73:           lessonProgress: {
12564:  74:             where: { status: 'COMPLETED' }
12565:  75:           }
12566:  76:         }
12567:  77:       }
12568:  78:     }
12569:  79:   });
12570:  80:   enrollments.forEach((e: any) => {
12571:  81:     myCourseIds.add(e.courseId);
12572:  82:     enrollmentsMap[e.courseId] = {
12573:  83:       status: e.status,
12574:  84:       startedAt: e.startedAt,
12575:  85:       completedCount: e._count?.lessonProgress || 0,
12576:  86:       totalLessons: e.course?._count?.lessons || 0,
12577:  87:       enrollmentId: e.id,
12578:  88:       payment: e.payment
12579:  89:     };
12580:  90:   });
12581:  91: }
12582:  92:   const myCourses = courses.filter((c: any) => myCourseIds.has(c.id));
12583:  93:   const otherCourses = courses.filter((c: any) => !myCourseIds.has(c.id));
12584:  94:   // Kiểm tra user có kích hoạt khóa 1 (86 ngày) không
12585:  95:   const isCourseOneActive = enrollmentsMap[1]?.status === 'ACTIVE';
12586:  96:   return (
12587:  97:     <main className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
12588:  98:       {/* Header */}
12589:  99:       <Header session={session} userImage={userImage} />
12590: 100:       {/* Hero Section */}
12591: 101:       <div className="pt-16">
12592: 102:         <MessageCard message={message} session={session} userName={userName || ''} userId={userId ? String(userId) : ''} />
12593: 103:       </div>
12594: 104:       {/* Lộ trình Zero 2 Hero */}
12595: 105:       {session?.user && (
12596: 106:         <section className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
12597: 107:           {!customPath || customPath.length === 0 ? (
12598: 108:             <Zero2HeroSurvey />
12599: 109:           ) : (
12600: 110:             <RealityMap 
12601: 111:               customPath={customPath}
12602: 112:               enrollmentsMap={enrollmentsMap}
12603: 113:               allCourses={courses}
12604: 114:               userGoal={userGoal || 'Hoàn thiện kỹ năng'}
12605: 115:               onReset={resetSurveyAction}
12606: 116:             />
12607: 117:           )}
12608: 118:         </section>
12609: 119:       )}
12610: 120:       {/* Community Board Module */}
12611: 121:       <section className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
12612: 122:         <CommunityBoard isAdmin={session?.user?.role === 'ADMIN'} />
12613: 123:       </section>
12614: 124:       {/* Course List Section */}
12615: 125:       <section id="khoa-hoc" className="container mx-auto px-4 pb-24">
12616: 126:         {session?.user ? (
12617: 127:           <>
12618: 128:             {/* Khóa học của tôi */}
12619: 129:             {myCourses.length > 0 && (
12620: 130:               <CourseSection 
12621: 131:                 title="Khóa học của tôi"
12622: 132:                 courses={myCourses}
12623: 133:                 session={session}
12624: 134:                 enrollmentsMap={enrollmentsMap}
12625: 135:                 isCourseOneActive={isCourseOneActive}
12626: 136:                 userPhone={userPhone}
12627: 137:                 userId={userId}
12628: 138:                 darkMode={true}
12629: 139:                 accentColor="bg-emerald-500"
12630: 140:               />
12631: 141:             )}
12632: 142:             {/* Các khóa học khác */}
12633: 143:             {otherCourses.length > 0 && (
12634: 144:               <CourseSection 
12635: 145:                 title="Tất cả khóa học"
12636: 146:                 courses={otherCourses}
12637: 147:                 session={session}
12638: 148:                 enrollmentsMap={enrollmentsMap}
12639: 149:                 isCourseOneActive={isCourseOneActive}
12640: 150:                 userPhone={userPhone}
12641: 151:                 userId={userId}
12642: 152:                 accentColor="bg-blue-600"
12643: 153:               />
12644: 154:             )}
12645: 155:           </>
12646: 156:         ) : (
12647: 157:           <CourseSection 
12648: 158:             title="Danh Sách Khóa Học"
12649: 159:             courses={courses}
12650: 160:             session={null}
12651: 161:             enrollmentsMap={{}}
12652: 162:             isCourseOneActive={false}
12653: 163:             userPhone={null}
12654: 164:             userId={null}
12655: 165:             accentColor="bg-blue-600"
12656: 166:           />
12657: 167:         )}
12658: 168:       </section>
12659: 169:       {/* Footer (Optional simple) */}
12660: 170:       <footer className="bg-gray-100 py-12 text-center text-gray-500 text-sm">
12661: 171:         <p>© 2026 Học viện BRK. All rights reserved.</p>
12662: 172:       </footer>
12663: 173:     </main>
12664: 174:   );
12665: 175: }
12666: ````
