12668: ## File: components/course/VideoPlayer.tsx
12669: ````typescript
12670:   1: 'use client'
12671:   2: import { useEffect, useRef, useState, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
12672:   3: import { 
12673:   4:     RotateCcw, CheckCircle, List, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, 
12674:   5:     Play, CheckCircle2, X, FileText, Clock, Loader2, PlayCircle, SkipBack, SkipForward, Maximize2
12675:   6: } from 'lucide-react'
12676:   7: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
12677:   8: import { saveVideoProgressAction } from '@/app/actions/course-actions'
12678:   9: interface VideoPlayerProps {
12679:  10:     enrollmentId: number
12680:  11:     lessonId: string
12681:  12:     videoUrl: string | null
12682:  13:     lessonContent: string | null
12683:  14:     initialMaxTime: number
12684:  15:     onProgress: (maxTime: number, duration: number) => void
12685:  16:     onPercentChange: (percent: number) => void
12686:  17:     playlistData?: any 
12687:  18:     lastVideoIndex?: number 
12688:  19: }
12689:  20: type PlaylistItem = {
12690:  21:     type: 'video' | 'doc'
12691:  22:     title: string
12692:  23:     url: string
12693:  24:     id?: string | null
12694:  25: }
12695:  26: export default function VideoPlayer({
12696:  27:     enrollmentId,
12697:  28:     lessonId,
12698:  29:     videoUrl,
12699:  30:     lessonContent,
12700:  31:     initialMaxTime,
12701:  32:     onProgress,
12702:  33:     onPercentChange,
12703:  34:     playlistData,
12704:  35:     lastVideoIndex = 0
12705:  36: }: VideoPlayerProps) {
12706:  37:     const playlist = useMemo(() => {
12707:  38:         if (!videoUrl) return []
12708:  39:         return videoUrl.split('|').map((item, index) => {
12709:  40:             const videoMatch = item.match(/^\[(.*?)\](.*)$/)
12710:  41:             if (videoMatch) return { type: 'video' as const, title: videoMatch[1], url: videoMatch[2].trim(), id: extractVideoId(videoMatch[2].trim()) }
12711:  42:             const docMatch = item.match(/^\((.*?)\)(.*)$/)
12712:  43:             if (docMatch) return { type: 'doc' as const, title: docMatch[1], url: docMatch[2].trim() }
12713:  44:             return { type: 'video' as const, title: `Phần ${index + 1}`, url: item.trim(), id: extractVideoId(item.trim()) }
12714:  45:         })
12715:  46:     }, [videoUrl])
12716:  47: const [currentIndex, setCurrentVideoIndex] = useState(lastVideoIndex < playlist.length ? lastVideoIndex : 0)
12717:  48: const [showPlaylist, setShowPlaylist] = useState(false)
12718:  49: const [isMounted, setIsMounted] = useState(false)
12719:  50: const [isFullscreen, setIsFullscreen] = useState(false) // State cho lớp phủ toàn màn hình
12720:  51: // Timer cho tài liệu (30s)
12721:  52: const [docTimer, setDocTimer] = useState<number>(0)
12722:  53: const [isReading, setIsReading] = useState(false)
12723:  54: // Tiến độ chi tiết từng mục: { index: { maxTime, duration } }
12724:  55: const [granularProgress, setGranularProgress] = useState<Record<number, {maxTime: number, duration: number}>>(() => {
12725:  56:     return playlistData || {}
12726:  57: })
12727:  58:     const playerRef = useRef<any>(null)
12728:  59:     const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
12729:  60: const saveIntervalRef = useRef<any>(null)
12730:  61: const docTimerRef = useRef<any>(null)
12731:  62: const currentItem = playlist[currentIndex]
12732:  63: useEffect(() => { setIsMounted(true) }, [])
12733:  64: // Xử lý phím Esc để thoát full màn hình
12734:  65: useEffect(() => {
12735:  66:     const handleEsc = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
12736:  67:         if (e.key === 'Escape') setIsFullscreen(false)
12737:  68:     }
12738:  69:     window.addEventListener('keydown', handleEsc)
12739:  70:     return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleEsc)
12740:  71: }, [])
12741:  72: const toggleFullScreen = () => {
12742:  73:     setIsFullscreen(!isFullscreen)
12743:  74: }
12744:  75:     const calculateAggregateProgress = useCallback((updatedGranular: any) => {
12745:  76:         let totalMaxTime = 0
12746:  77:         let totalDuration = 0
12747:  78:         playlist.forEach((item, idx) => {
12748:  79:             const p = updatedGranular[idx] || { maxTime: 0, duration: item.type === 'doc' ? 30 : 0 }
12749:  80:             totalMaxTime += p.maxTime
12750:  81:             totalDuration += p.duration
12751:  82:         })
12752:  83:         if (totalDuration === 0) return { maxTime: initialMaxTime, duration: 0 }
12753:  84:         return { maxTime: totalMaxTime, duration: totalDuration }
12754:  85:     }, [playlist, initialMaxTime])
12755:  86:     const saveProgress = useCallback(async (index: number, maxTime: number, duration: number) => {
12756:  87:         const nextGranular = { ...granularProgress, [index]: { maxTime, duration } }
12757:  88:         setGranularProgress(nextGranular)
12758:  89:         const aggregate = calculateAggregateProgress(nextGranular)
12759:  90:         // [FIX] Sử dụng setTimeout để đẩy các thay đổi state ra khỏi chu kỳ render hiện tại
12760:  91:         setTimeout(() => {
12761:  92:             onProgress(aggregate.maxTime, aggregate.duration)
12762:  93:             if (aggregate.duration > 0) {
12763:  94:                 onPercentChange(Math.min(100, Math.round((aggregate.maxTime / aggregate.duration) * 100)))
12764:  95:             }
12765:  96:             // Gọi Server Action an toàn sau render
12766:  97:             saveVideoProgressAction({ 
12767:  98:                 enrollmentId, 
12768:  99:                 lessonId, 
12769: 100:                 maxTime: aggregate.maxTime, 
12770: 101:                 duration: aggregate.duration, 
12771: 102:                 lastIndex: index, 
12772: 103:                 playlistScores: nextGranular 
12773: 104:             }).catch(() => {})
12774: 105:         }, 0)
12775: 106:     }, [enrollmentId, lessonId, granularProgress, calculateAggregateProgress, onProgress, onPercentChange])
12776: 107:     const trackVideoProgress = useCallback(() => {
12777: 108:         if (!playerRef.current || typeof playerRef.current.getCurrentTime !== 'function') return
12778: 109:         const currentTime = playerRef.current.getCurrentTime()
12779: 110:         const duration = playerRef.current.getDuration()
12780: 111:         const currentStored = granularProgress[currentIndex] || { maxTime: 0, duration: 0 }
12781: 112:         if (currentTime > currentStored.maxTime) saveProgress(currentIndex, currentTime, duration)
12782: 113:     }, [currentIndex, granularProgress, saveProgress])
12783: 114:     useEffect(() => {
12784: 115:         if (currentItem?.type === 'doc') {
12785: 116:             const currentStored = granularProgress[currentIndex] || { maxTime: 0, duration: 30 }
12786: 117:             if (currentStored.maxTime < 30) {
12787: 118:                 setDocTimer(currentStored.maxTime)
12788: 119:                 setIsReading(true)
12789: 120:                 docTimerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
12790: 121:                     setDocTimer(prev => {
12791: 122:                         const next = prev + 1
12792: 123:                         if (next >= 30) {
12793: 124:                             clearInterval(docTimerRef.current)
12794: 125:                             setIsReading(false)
12795: 126:                             saveProgress(currentIndex, 30, 30)
12796: 127:                             return 30
12797: 128:                         }
12798: 129:                         if (next % 5 === 0) saveProgress(currentIndex, next, 30)
12799: 130:                         return next
12800: 131:                     })
12801: 132:                 }, 1000)
12802: 133:             } else { setDocTimer(30); setIsReading(false); }
12803: 134:         }
12804: 135:         return () => { if (docTimerRef.current) clearInterval(docTimerRef.current) }
12805: 136:     }, [currentIndex, currentItem?.type])
12806: 137:     useEffect(() => {
12807: 138:         if (!isMounted || currentItem?.type !== 'video' || !currentItem?.id) return
12808: 139:         const initPlayer = () => {
12809: 140:             if (playerRef.current) playerRef.current.destroy()
12810: 141:             const stored = granularProgress[currentIndex] || { maxTime: 0, duration: 0 }
12811: 142:             // [FIX] Luôn bắt đầu từ mốc đã lưu (nếu đã xong thì đứng ở cuối)
12812: 143:             const startTime = Math.floor(stored.maxTime)
12813: 144:             playerRef.current = new (window as any).YT.Player(`multimedia-player`, {
12814: 145:                 videoId: currentItem.id,
12815: 146:                 playerVars: { 
12816: 147:                     autoplay: 1, 
12817: 148:                     modestbranding: 1, 
12818: 149:                     rel: 0, 
12819: 150:                     start: startTime 
12820: 151:                 },
12821: 152:                 events: {
12822: 153:                     onStateChange: (e: any) => {
12823: 154:                         const YT = (window as any).YT.PlayerState
12824: 155:                         if (e.data === YT.PLAYING) {
12825: 156:                             if (!saveIntervalRef.current) saveIntervalRef.current = setInterval(trackVideoProgress, 5000)
12826: 157:                         } else {
12827: 158:                             if (saveIntervalRef.current) { clearInterval(saveIntervalRef.current); saveIntervalRef.current = null; }
12828: 159:                         }
12829: 160:                         if (e.data === YT.ENDED) {
12830: 161:                             const dur = playerRef.current.getDuration()
12831: 162:                             saveProgress(currentIndex, dur, dur)
12832: 163:                         }
12833: 164:                     }
12834: 165:                 }
12835: 166:             })
12836: 167:         }
12837: 168:         if ((window as any).YT?.Player) initPlayer()
12838: 169:         else {
12839: 170:             const tag = document.createElement('script'); tag.src = 'https://www.youtube.com/iframe_api'; document.head.appendChild(tag)
12840: 171:             ;(window as any).onYouTubeIframeAPIReady = initPlayer
12841: 172:         }
12842: 173:         return () => { if (saveIntervalRef.current) clearInterval(saveIntervalRef.current); if (playerRef.current?.destroy) playerRef.current.destroy() }
12843: 174:     }, [currentIndex, isMounted, currentItem?.type, currentItem?.id])
12844: 175:     const handleNext = () => setCurrentVideoIndex((prev) => (prev + 1) % playlist.length)
12845: 176:     const handlePrev = () => setCurrentVideoIndex((prev) => (prev - 1 + playlist.length) % playlist.length)
12846: 177:     const getEmbedUrl = (url: string) => {
12847: 178:         if (!url.includes('docs.google.com')) return url
12848: 179:         if (url.includes('/pub')) return url
12849: 180:         const cleanUrl = url.split('/edit')[0].split('/view')[0].split('/preview')[0].replace(/\/+$/, '')
12850: 181:         return `${cleanUrl}/preview`
12851: 182:     }
12852: 183:     if (!isMounted) return <div className="w-full aspect-video bg-black animate-pulse" />
12853: 184:     return (
12854: 185:         <div className={cn(
12855: 186:             "flex flex-col bg-zinc-950 transition-all duration-300",
12856: 187:             isFullscreen ? "fixed inset-0 z-[9999] h-screen w-screen" : "w-full"
12857: 188:         )}>
12858: 189:             <div className={cn(
12859: 190:                 "relative bg-black overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transition-all",
12860: 191:                 isFullscreen ? "flex-1" : "w-full aspect-video"
12861: 192:             )}>
12862: 193:                 {currentItem?.type === 'video' ? (
12863: 194:                     <div id="multimedia-player" className="w-full h-full" />
12864: 195:                 ) : (
12865: 196:                     <div className="w-full h-full bg-white relative flex flex-col">
12866: 197:                         <iframe src={getEmbedUrl(currentItem.url)} className="flex-1 border-0" allow="autoplay" title="Tài liệu" />
12867: 198:                         {isReading && (
12868: 199:                             <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-1 bg-zinc-200 z-10">
12869: 200:                                 <div className="h-full bg-orange-500 transition-all duration-1000" style={{ width: `${(docTimer / 30) * 100}%` }} />
12870: 201:                             </div>
12871: 202:                         )}
12872: 203:                     </div>
12873: 204:                 )}
12874: 205:                 {/* PLAYLIST POPUP */}
12875: 206:                 {showPlaylist && (
12876: 207:                     <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/95 z-50 flex flex-col animate-in slide-in-from-bottom duration-300">
12877: 208:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-5 border-b border-zinc-800 shrink-0">
12878: 209:                             <h3 className="text-white font-black text-base flex items-center gap-3">
12879: 210:                                 <List className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-500" /> DANH SÁCH HỌC ({playlist.length})
12880: 211:                             </h3>
12881: 212:                             <button onClick={() => setShowPlaylist(false)} className="p-2 bg-zinc-800 rounded-full text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-all"><X className="w-5 h-5" /></button>
12882: 213:                         </div>
12883: 214:                         <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-2 max-h-[66vh] custom-scrollbar">
12884: 215:                             {playlist.map((item, idx) => {
12885: 216:                                 const isCurrent = idx === currentIndex
12886: 217:                                 const prog = granularProgress[idx] || { maxTime: 0, duration: item.type === 'doc' ? 30 : 0 }
12887: 218:                                 const pct = prog.duration > 0 ? Math.round((prog.maxTime / prog.duration) * 100) : 0
12888: 219:                                 return (
12889: 220:                                     <button key={idx} onClick={() => { setCurrentVideoIndex(idx); setShowPlaylist(false); }} className={`w-full flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-xl transition-all border ${isCurrent ? 'bg-orange-500/10 border-orange-500 shadow-lg' : 'bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/5 hover:bg-zinc-800'}`}>
12890: 221:                                         <div className={`shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center ${isCurrent ? 'bg-orange-500 text-white' : 'bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-500'}`}>{item.type === 'video' ? <Play className="w-3 h-3 fill-current" /> : <FileText className="w-3 h-3" />}</div>
12891: 222:                                         <div className="flex-1 text-left min-w-0">
12892: 223:                                             <p className={`text-xs font-bold truncate ${isCurrent ? 'text-white' : 'text-zinc-400'}`}>{item.title}</p>
12893: 224:                                             <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
12894: 225:                                                 <div className="flex-1 h-1 bg-zinc-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden"><div className={`h-full transition-all duration-1000 ${pct >= 100 ? 'bg-emerald-500' : 'bg-orange-500'}`} style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} /></div>
12895: 226:                                                 <span className="text-[9px] text-zinc-500 font-bold">{pct}%</span>
12896: 227:                                             </div>
12897: 228:                                         </div>
12898: 229:                                         {pct >= 95 && <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-500 shrink-0" />}
12899: 230:                                     </button>
12900: 231:                                 )
12901: 232:                             })}
12902: 233:                         </div>
12903: 234:                     </div>
12904: 235:                 )}
12905: 236:             </div>
12906: 237:             {/* ── 2. EXTERNAL CONTROL BAR ──────────────────────────────── */}
12907: 238:             <div className="bg-zinc-900 border-t border-zinc-800 px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between gap-2 sm:gap-4">
12908: 239:                 {/* Playlist Toggle */}
12909: 240:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
12910: 241:                     <button 
12911: 242:                         onClick={() => setShowPlaylist(!showPlaylist)}
12912: 243:                         className="flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1.5 bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all border border-zinc-700 shadow-sm"
12913: 244:                     >
12914: 245:                         <List className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-500" />
12915: 246:                         <span className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-tighter hidden sm:inline">Lộ trình ({currentIndex + 1}/{playlist.length})</span>
12916: 247:                     </button>
12917: 248:                 </div>
12918: 249:                 {/* Info & Type Icon */}
12919: 250:                 <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center min-w-0 px-1">
12920: 251:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 max-w-full">
12921: 252:                         {currentItem?.type === 'video' ? <PlayCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-zinc-500 shrink-0" /> : <FileText className="w-3 h-3 text-zinc-500 shrink-0" />}
12922: 253:                         <p className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-black text-orange-400 truncate tracking-tight uppercase">{currentItem?.title}</p>
12923: 254:                     </div>
12924: 255:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-0.5">
12925: 256:                         {currentItem?.type === 'doc' ? (
12926: 257:                             isReading ? (
12927: 258:                                 <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[8px] sm:text-[9px] text-zinc-500 font-bold uppercase"><Clock className="w-2.5 h-2.5 animate-spin" /> {30 - docTimer}s</span>
12928: 259:                             ) : (
12929: 260:                                 <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[8px] sm:text-[9px] text-emerald-500 font-bold uppercase"><CheckCircle2 className="w-2.5 h-2.5" /> Xong</span>
12930: 261:                             )
12931: 262:                         ) : (
12932: 263:                             <span className="text-[8px] sm:text-[9px] text-zinc-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">Video</span>
12933: 264:                         )}
12934: 265:                     </div>
12935: 266:                 </div>
12936: 267:                 {/* Navigation & Fullscreen Buttons */}
12937: 268:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1 sm:gap-1.5 shrink-0">
12938: 269:                     <button onClick={handlePrev} className="p-1.5 sm:p-2 bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-orange-500 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all border border-zinc-700 active:scale-90"><SkipBack className="w-3.5 h-3.5 sm:w-4 h-4" /></button>
12939: 270:                     <button onClick={handleNext} className="p-1.5 sm:p-2 bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-orange-500 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all border border-zinc-700 active:scale-90"><SkipForward className="w-3.5 h-3.5 sm:w-4 h-4" /></button>
12940: 271:                     {/* Fullscreen Button - Nổi bật hơn trên mobile */}
12941: 272:                     <button 
12942: 273:                         onClick={toggleFullScreen}
12943: 274:                         className="p-1.5 sm:p-2 bg-orange-500/10 hover:bg-orange-500 text-orange-500 hover:text-white rounded-lg transition-all border border-orange-500/20 active:scale-90 ml-1"
12944: 275:                         title="Xem toàn màn hình"
12945: 276:                     >
12946: 277:                         <Maximize2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5 sm:w-4 h-4" />
12947: 278:                     </button>
12948: 279:                 </div>
12949: 280:             </div>
12950: 281:         </div>
12951: 282:     )
12952: 283: }
12953: 284: function extractVideoId(url: string) {
12954: 285:     const regExp = /^.*((youtu.be\/)|(v\/)|(\/u\/\w\/)|(embed\/)|(watch\?v=)|(shorts\/)|(\&v=))([^#\&\?]*).*/
12955: 286:     const match = url.match(regExp)
12956: 287:     return (match && match[9].length === 11) ? match[9] : null
12957: 288: }
12958: ````
12959: 
12960: ## File: app/actions/course-actions.ts
12961: ````typescript
12962:   1: 'use server'
12963:   2: import { auth } from "@/auth"
12964:   3: import prisma from "@/lib/prisma"
12965:   4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache"
12966:   5: import { createPaymentQR } from "@/lib/vietqr"
12967:   6: /**
12968:   7:  * Đăng ký khóa học mới
12969:   8:  */
12970:   9: export async function enrollInCourseAction(courseId: number) {
12971:  10:     try {
12972:  11:         const session = await auth()
12973:  12:         if (!session?.user?.id) throw new Error("Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục.")
12974:  13:         const userId = Number(session.user.id)
12975:  14:         const course = await prisma.course.findUnique({
12976:  15:             where: { id: courseId },
12977:  16:             select: { 
12978:  17:                 phi_coc: true,
12979:  18:                 id_khoa: true,
12980:  19:                 name_lop: true,
12981:  20:                 stk: true,
12982:  21:                 name_stk: true,
12983:  22:                 bank_stk: true,
12984:  23:                 noidung_email: true
12985:  24:             }
12986:  25:         })
12987:  26:         if (!course) throw new Error("Khóa học không tồn tại.")
12988:  27:         // Lấy thông tin user
12989:  28:         const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
12990:  29:             where: { id: userId },
12991:  30:             select: { id: true, name: true, phone: true, email: true }
12992:  31:         })
12993:  32:         // Kiểm tra xem user có active course 1 không
12994:  33:         const vipEnrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findFirst({
12995:  34:             where: {
12996:  35:                 userId,
12997:  36:                 courseId: 1,
12998:  37:                 status: 'ACTIVE'
12999:  38:             }
13000:  39:         })
13001:  40:         const effectivePhiCoc = vipEnrollment ? 0 : course.phi_coc
13002:  41:         const existing = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
13003:  42:             where: { userId_courseId: { userId, courseId } }
13004:  43:         })
13005:  44:         if (existing) return { success: true, status: existing.status }
13006:  45:         const isAutoActive = effectivePhiCoc === 0
13007:  46:         const newEnrollment = await prisma.enrollment.create({
13008:  47:             data: {
13009:  48:                 userId,
13010:  49:                 courseId,
13011:  50:                 status: isAutoActive ? "ACTIVE" : "PENDING"
13012:  51:             }
13013:  52:         })
13014:  53:         const { sendTelegram, sendActivationEmail } = await import("@/lib/notifications")
13015:  54:         if (isAutoActive) {
13016:  55:             // Gửi thông báo kích hoạt MIỄN PHÍ
13017:  56:             const msgAdmin = `🎁 <b>KÍCH HOẠT MIỄN PHÍ</b>\n\n` +
13018:  57:                              `👤 Học viên: <b>${user?.name}</b> (#${user?.id})\n` +
13019:  58:                              `🎓 Khóa học: <b>${course.name_lop} (${course.id_khoa})</b>\n` +
13020:  59:                              `📅 Thời gian: ${new Date().toLocaleString('vi-VN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' })}`;
13021:  60:             await sendTelegram(msgAdmin, 'ACTIVATE');
13022:  61:             if (user?.email) {
13023:  62:                 await sendActivationEmail(user.email, user.name || '', user.id, course.name_lop || course.id_khoa, course.noidung_email);
13024:  63:             }
13025:  64:         }
13026:  65:         if (effectivePhiCoc > 0 && course.stk && course.name_stk) {
13027:  66:             let qrCodeUrl = null
13028:  67:             let transferContent = null
13029:  68:             // Tạo QR code nếu có đủ thông tin
13030:  69:             if (user?.phone && course.stk) {
13031:  70:                 try {
13032:  71:                     const qrResult = await createPaymentQR({
13033:  72:                         phone: user.phone,
13034:  73:                         userId: userId,
13035:  74:                         courseId: courseId,
13036:  75:                         courseCode: course.id_khoa,
13037:  76:                         accountNo: course.stk,
13038:  77:                         accountName: course.name_stk,
13039:  78:                         acqId: course.bank_stk || 'SACOMBANK',
13040:  79:                         amount: effectivePhiCoc
13041:  80:                     })
13042:  81:                     qrCodeUrl = qrResult.qrCodeUrl
13043:  82:                     transferContent = qrResult.transferContent
13044:  83:                 } catch (qrError) {
13045:  84:                     console.error("Failed to generate QR:", qrError)
13046:  85:                 }
13047:  86:             }
13048:  87:             // Fallback content nếu không tạo được qua API
13049:  88:             if (!transferContent) {
13050:  89:                 const cleanPhone = user?.phone ? user.phone.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-6) : ''
13051:  90:                 transferContent = `SDT ${cleanPhone} HV ${userId} COC ${course.id_khoa}`.toUpperCase()
13052:  91:             }
13053:  92:             await prisma.payment.create({
13054:  93:                 data: {
13055:  94:                     enrollmentId: newEnrollment.id,
13056:  95:                     amount: effectivePhiCoc,
13057:  96:                     status: 'PENDING',
13058:  97:                     transferContent: transferContent,
13059:  98:                     qrCodeUrl: qrCodeUrl,
13060:  99:                     bankName: course.bank_stk || 'Sacombank',
13061: 100:                     accountNumber: course.stk,
13062: 101:                     phone: user?.phone // Lưu thêm phone vào Payment record
13063: 102:                 }
13064: 103:             })
13065: 104:         }
13066: 105:         revalidatePath('/')
13067: 106:         revalidatePath('/courses')
13068: 107:         return { success: true, status: newEnrollment.status }
13069: 108:     } catch (error: any) {
13070: 109:         console.error("Enroll Course Error:", error)
13071: 110:         throw new Error(error.message || "Không thể đăng ký khóa học.")
13072: 111:     }
13073: 112: }
13074: 113: /**
13075: 114:  * Xác nhận ngày bắt đầu hoặc Đặt lại lộ trình
13076: 115:  */
13077: 116: export async function confirmStartDateAction(courseId: number, date: any) {
13078: 117:     const logId = `[RESET-COURSE-${courseId}-${Date.now()}]`
13079: 118:     try {
13080: 119:         const session = await auth()
13081: 120:         if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false, message: "Unauthorized" }
13082: 121:         const startDate = new Date(date)
13083: 122:         if (isNaN(startDate.getTime())) return { success: false, message: "Ngày bắt đầu không hợp lệ." }
13084: 123:         const userId = Number(session.user.id)
13085: 124:         const now = new Date()
13086: 125:         const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
13087: 126:             where: { userId_courseId: { userId, courseId } },
13088: 127:             select: { id: true }
13089: 128:         })
13090: 129:         if (!enrollment) throw new Error("Không tìm thấy thông tin đăng ký khóa học.")
13091: 130:         await prisma.$transaction([
13092: 131:             prisma.enrollment.update({
13093: 132:                 where: { id: enrollment.id },
13094: 133:                 data: { startedAt: startDate, resetAt: now, lastLessonId: null }
13095: 134:             }),
13096: 135:             prisma.lessonProgress.updateMany({
13097: 136:                 where: { enrollmentId: enrollment.id, status: { not: 'RESET' } },
13098: 137:                 data: { status: 'RESET' }
13099: 138:             })
13100: 139:         ])
13101: 140:         try {
13102: 141:             revalidatePath(`/courses`)
13103: 142:             revalidatePath(`/courses/${courseId}/learn`)
13104: 143:         } catch (e) {}
13105: 144:         return { success: true }
13106: 145:     } catch (error: any) {
13107: 146:         console.error(`${logId} LỖI KHI RESET LỘ TRÌNH:`, error)
13108: 147:         return { success: false, message: "Lỗi hệ thống khi đặt lại ngày bắt đầu." }
13109: 148:     }
13110: 149: }
13111: 150: /**
13112: 151:  * Lưu tiến độ video (Hỗ trợ đa video/playlist)
13113: 152:  */
13114: 153: export async function saveVideoProgressAction({
13115: 154:     enrollmentId, lessonId, maxTime, duration, lastIndex, playlistScores
13116: 155: }: {
13117: 156:     enrollmentId: number, lessonId: string, maxTime: number, duration: number,
13118: 157:     lastIndex?: number, playlistScores?: any
13119: 158: }) {
13120: 159:     try {
13121: 160:         const session = await auth()
13122: 161:         if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false }
13123: 162:         // [PLAYLIST LOGIC] Nếu có playlistScores, tính vidScore dựa trên tổng thể
13124: 163:         let vidScore = 0
13125: 164:         if (playlistScores) {
13126: 165:             let totalMax = 0
13127: 166:             let totalDur = 0
13128: 167:             Object.values(playlistScores).forEach((p: any) => {
13129: 168:                 totalMax += p.maxTime || 0
13130: 169:                 totalDur += p.duration || 0
13131: 170:             })
13132: 171:             const percent = totalDur > 0 ? totalMax / totalDur : 0
13133: 172:             vidScore = percent >= 0.95 ? 2 : percent >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
13134: 173:         } else {
13135: 174:             // Logic cũ cho 1 video
13136: 175:             const percent = duration > 0 ? maxTime / duration : 0
13137: 176:             vidScore = percent >= 0.95 ? 2 : percent >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
13138: 177:         }
13139: 178:         const existing = await prisma.lessonProgress.findUnique({
13140: 179:             where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13141: 180:             select: { scores: true, status: true }
13142: 181:         })
13143: 182:         const existingScores = existing?.status === 'RESET' ? {} : (existing?.scores as any ?? {})
13144: 183:         const updatedScores = { 
13145: 184:             ...existingScores, 
13146: 185:             video: vidScore,
13147: 186:             lastVideoIndex: lastIndex ?? existingScores.lastVideoIndex ?? 0,
13148: 187:             playlist: playlistScores ?? existingScores.playlist ?? null
13149: 188:         }
13150: 189:         await prisma.lessonProgress.upsert({
13151: 190:             where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13152: 191:             create: {
13153: 192:                 enrollmentId, lessonId, maxTime, duration,
13154: 193:                 scores: updatedScores as any,
13155: 194:                 status: "IN_PROGRESS"
13156: 195:             },
13157: 196:             update: {
13158: 197:                 maxTime, duration,
13159: 198:                 scores: updatedScores as any,
13160: 199:                 ...(existing?.status === 'RESET' ? { status: 'IN_PROGRESS' } : {})
13161: 200:             }
13162: 201:         })
13163: 202:         return { success: true, vidScore }
13164: 203:     } catch (error) {
13165: 204:         console.error("Save Video Progress Error:", error)
13166: 205:         return { success: false }
13167: 206:     }
13168: 207: }
13169: 208: /**
13170: 209:  * Nộp bài ghi nhận và tính điểm
13171: 210:  */
13172: 211: export async function submitAssignmentAction({
13173: 212:     enrollmentId, lessonId, reflection, links, supports,
13174: 213:     isUpdate = false, lessonOrder, startedAt,
13175: 214:     existingVideoScore, existingTimingScore,
13176: 215:     clientTimeZone = 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' // Mặc định là giờ VN nếu không có
13177: 216: }: {
13178: 217:     enrollmentId: number, lessonId: string, reflection: string, links: string[], supports: boolean[],
13179: 218:     isUpdate?: boolean, lessonOrder?: number, startedAt?: any,
13180: 219:     existingVideoScore?: number, existingTimingScore?: number,
13181: 220:     clientTimeZone?: string
13182: 221: }) {
13183: 222:     const logId = `[SUBMIT-${lessonId}]`
13184: 223:     try {
13185: 224:         const session = await auth()
13186: 225:         if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false, message: "Phiên đăng nhập hết hạn." }
13187: 226:         const now = new Date()
13188: 227:         let timingScore = 0
13189: 228:         // 1. Tính timingScore dựa trên múi giờ địa phương của học viên
13190: 229:         if (startedAt && lessonOrder) {
13191: 230:             const startDate = new Date(startedAt)
13192: 231:             if (!isNaN(startDate.getTime())) {
13193: 232:                 // Lấy thời điểm hiện tại theo múi giờ học viên
13194: 233:                 const nowStr = new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: clientTimeZone });
13195: 234:                 const nowLocal = new Date(nowStr);
13196: 235:                 // Tạo Deadline theo múi giờ học viên
13197: 236:                 const deadlineStr = new Date(startDate).toLocaleString('en-US', { timeZone: clientTimeZone });
13198: 237:                 const deadlineLocal = new Date(deadlineStr);
13199: 238:                 deadlineLocal.setDate(deadlineLocal.getDate() + (lessonOrder - 1));
13200: 239:                 deadlineLocal.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
13201: 240:                 const isCurrentlyOnTime = nowLocal.getTime() <= deadlineLocal.getTime();
13202: 241:                 if (isUpdate) {
13203: 242:                     timingScore = isCurrentlyOnTime ? 1 : (existingTimingScore ?? -1);
13204: 243:                 } else {
13205: 244:                     timingScore = isCurrentlyOnTime ? 1 : -1;
13206: 245:                 }
13207: 246:                 if (isUpdate && !isCurrentlyOnTime) {
13208: 247:                     const existingStatus = await prisma.lessonProgress.findUnique({
13209: 248:                         where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13210: 249:                         select: { status: true }
13211: 250:                     })
13212: 251:                     if (existingStatus?.status === 'COMPLETED') {
13213: 252:                         return { success: false, message: "Bài học đã hết hạn cập nhật." }
13214: 253:                     }
13215: 254:                 }
13216: 255:             }
13217: 256:         }
13218: 257:         // 2. Lấy thông tin bài học
13219: 258:         const lesson = await prisma.lesson.findUnique({
13220: 259:             where: { id: lessonId },
13221: 260:             select: { videoUrl: true }
13222: 261:         })
13223: 262:         if (!lesson) return { success: false, message: "Không tìm thấy bài học." }
13224: 263:         // 3. Tính toán các đầu điểm
13225: 264:         const rawUrl = lesson.videoUrl ? String(lesson.videoUrl).trim() : ""
13226: 265:         const isYouTube = /youtu\.be\/|youtube\.com\/|v=/.test(rawUrl)
13227: 266:         let videoScore = 0
13228: 267:         if (rawUrl === "" || rawUrl.toLowerCase() === "null" || !isYouTube) {
13229: 268:             videoScore = 2 // Không dùng video Youtube -> Auto +2
13230: 269:         } else {
13231: 270:             // Lấy dữ liệu mới nhất
13232: 271:             const currentProg = await prisma.lessonProgress.findUnique({
13233: 272:                 where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13234: 273:                 select: { scores: true, maxTime: true, duration: true }
13235: 274:             })
13236: 275:             const scoresJson = (currentProg?.scores as any) || {}
13237: 276:             // ƯU TIÊN 1: Tính từ Playlist detail nếu có
13238: 277:             if (scoresJson.playlist) {
13239: 278:                 let totalMax = 0
13240: 279:                 let totalDur = 0
13241: 280:                 Object.values(scoresJson.playlist).forEach((p: any) => {
13242: 281:                     totalMax += p.maxTime || 0
13243: 282:                     totalDur += p.duration || 0
13244: 283:                 })
13245: 284:                 const percent = totalDur > 0 ? totalMax / totalDur : 0
13246: 285:                 videoScore = percent >= 0.95 ? 2 : percent >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
13247: 286:             } 
13248: 287:             // ƯU TIÊN 2: Nếu mất playlist detail nhưng có maxTime/duration tổng ở ngoài (trường hợp bị ghi đè)
13249: 288:             else if (currentProg?.duration && currentProg.duration > 0) {
13250: 289:                 const percent = currentProg.maxTime / currentProg.duration
13251: 290:                 videoScore = percent >= 0.95 ? 2 : percent >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
13252: 291:             }
13253: 292:             // ƯU TIÊN 3: Dùng điểm gửi từ client
13254: 293:             else {
13255: 294:                 videoScore = existingVideoScore ?? 0
13256: 295:             }
13257: 296:         }
13258: 297:         const reflectionScore = reflection.trim().length >= 50 ? 2 : reflection.trim().length > 0 ? 1 : 0
13259: 298:         const linkScore = Math.min(links.filter(l => l && l.trim() !== "").length, 3)
13260: 299:         const supportScore = supports.filter(s => s === true).length
13261: 300:         const totalScore = Math.max(0, videoScore + reflectionScore + linkScore + supportScore + timingScore)
13262: 301:         console.log(`${logId} POINT: V:${videoScore} R:${reflectionScore} L:${linkScore} S:${supportScore} T:${timingScore} => TOTAL:${totalScore}`)
13263: 302:         // 4. Lưu Database
13264: 303:         const updatedProgress = await prisma.lessonProgress.upsert({
13265: 304:             where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13266: 305:             create: {
13267: 306:                 enrollmentId, lessonId,
13268: 307:                 assignment: { reflection, links, supports } as any,
13269: 308:                 scores: { video: videoScore, reflection: reflectionScore, link: linkScore, support: supportScore, timing: timingScore } as any,
13270: 309:                 totalScore, status: totalScore >= 5 ? "COMPLETED" : "IN_PROGRESS", submittedAt: now
13271: 310:             },
13272: 311:             update: {
13273: 312:                 assignment: { reflection, links, supports } as any,
13274: 313:                 scores: { video: videoScore, reflection: reflectionScore, link: linkScore, support: supportScore, timing: timingScore } as any,
13275: 314:                 totalScore, status: totalScore >= 5 ? "COMPLETED" : "IN_PROGRESS", submittedAt: now
13276: 315:             }
13277: 316:         })
13278: 317:         // Gửi thông báo Hoàn thành bài tập qua Telegram (Group LESSON)
13279: 318:         console.log(`🔍 Kiểm tra trạng thái bài học: ${updatedProgress.status}, Điểm: ${totalScore}`);
13280: 319:         if (updatedProgress.status === 'COMPLETED') {
13281: 320:             try {
13282: 321:                 const { sendTelegram } = await import("@/lib/notifications")
13283: 322:                 const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
13284: 323:                     where: { id: enrollmentId },
13285: 324:                     include: { 
13286: 325:                         user: { select: { name: true, id: true } },
13287: 326:                         course: { select: { name_lop: true } }
13288: 327:                     }
13289: 328:                 })
13290: 329:                 const lesson = await prisma.lesson.findUnique({
13291: 330:                     where: { id: lessonId },
13292: 331:                     select: { title: true }
13293: 332:                 })
13294: 333:                 const msgAdmin = `📚 <b>HOÀN THÀNH BÀI HỌC</b>\n\n` +
13295: 334:                                  `👤 Học viên: <b>${enrollment?.user?.name}</b> (#${enrollment?.user?.id})\n` +
13296: 335:                                  `🎓 Khóa học: ${enrollment?.course?.name_lop}\n` +
13297: 336:                                  `📖 Bài học: <b>${lesson?.title}</b>\n` +
13298: 337:                                  `🏆 Điểm số: <b>${totalScore}đ</b>\n` +
13299: 338:                                  `📅 Thời gian: ${now.toLocaleString('vi-VN', { timeZone: 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh' })}`;
13300: 339:                 console.log(`📡 Đang gửi thông báo Telegram LESSON đến ChatID: ${process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID_LESSON}`);
13301: 340:                 await sendTelegram(msgAdmin, 'LESSON');
13302: 341:                 console.log(`✅ Đã gửi thông báo Telegram LESSON thành công!`);
13303: 342:             } catch (teleError: any) {
13304: 343:                 console.error(`❌ Lỗi khi gửi thông báo Telegram LESSON:`, teleError.message);
13305: 344:             }
13306: 345:         }
13307: 346:         // 5. Revalidate
13308: 347:         try {
13309: 348:             const enrollment = await prisma.enrollment.findUnique({
13310: 349:                 where: { id: enrollmentId },
13311: 350:                 select: { course: { select: { id_khoa: true } } }
13312: 351:             })
13313: 352:             if (enrollment?.course?.id_khoa) {
13314: 353:                 revalidatePath(`/courses/${enrollment.course.id_khoa}/learn`, 'page')
13315: 354:             }
13316: 355:         } catch (e) {}
13317: 356:         return { success: true, totalScore }
13318: 357:     } catch (error: any) {
13319: 358:         console.error(`${logId} ERROR:`, error)
13320: 359:         return { success: false, message: "Lỗi hệ thống khi lưu kết quả." }
13321: 360:     }
13322: 361: }
13323: 362: /**
13324: 363:  * Lưu nháp bài ghi nhận
13325: 364:  */
13326: 365: export async function saveAssignmentDraftAction({
13327: 366:     enrollmentId, lessonId, reflection, links, supports
13328: 367: }: {
13329: 368:     enrollmentId: number, lessonId: string, reflection: string, links: string[], supports: boolean[]
13330: 369: }) {
13331: 370:     try {
13332: 371:         const session = await auth()
13333: 372:         if (!session?.user?.id) return { success: false }
13334: 373:         const validLinks = links.filter((l: string) => l && l.trim().length > 0)
13335: 374:         await prisma.lessonProgress.upsert({
13336: 375:             where: { enrollmentId_lessonId: { enrollmentId, lessonId } },
13337: 376:             create: {
13338: 377:                 enrollmentId, lessonId,
13339: 378:                 assignment: { reflection, links: validLinks, supports } as any,
13340: 379:                 status: "IN_PROGRESS"
13341: 380:             },
13342: 381:             update: {
13343: 382:                 assignment: { reflection, links: validLinks, supports } as any
13344: 383:             }
13345: 384:         })
13346: 385:         return { success: true }
13347: 386:     } catch (error) {
13348: 387:         return { success: false }
13349: 388:     }
13350: 389: }
13351: 390: /**
13352: 391:  * Cập nhật bài học cuối cùng
13353: 392:  */
13354: 393: export async function updateLastLessonAction(enrollmentId: number, lessonId: string) {
13355: 394:     try {
13356: 395:         const session = await auth()
13357: 396:         if (!session?.user?.id) return
13358: 397:         await prisma.enrollment.update({
13359: 398:             where: { id: enrollmentId },
13360: 399:             data: { lastLessonId: lessonId }
13361: 400:         })
13362: 401:     } catch (error) {}
13363: 402: }
13364: ````
13365: 
13366: ## File: components/course/CoursePlayer.tsx
13367: ````typescript
13368:   1: 'use client'
13369:   2: import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
13370:   3: import Link from "next/link"
13371:   4: import { 
13372:   5:     ArrowLeft, ListVideo, FileText, X, ClipboardCheck, 
13373:   6:     Loader2, CheckCircle2, PlayCircle, Lock, CalendarDays, RefreshCw 
13374:   7: } from "lucide-react"
13375:   8: import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
13376:   9: import LessonSidebar from "./LessonSidebar"
13377:  10: import VideoPlayer from "./VideoPlayer"
13378:  11: import AssignmentForm from "./AssignmentForm"
13379:  12: import ChatSection from "./ChatSection"
13380:  13: import StartDateModal from "./StartDateModal"
13381:  14: import {
13382:  15:     confirmStartDateAction,
13383:  16:     saveVideoProgressAction,
13384:  17:     submitAssignmentAction,
13385:  18:     updateLastLessonAction
13386:  19: } from "@/app/actions/course-actions"
13387:  20: interface CoursePlayerProps {
13388:  21:     course: any
13389:  22:     enrollment: any
13390:  23:     session: any
13391:  24: }
13392:  25: type MobileTab = 'list' | 'content' | 'record'
13393:  26: export default function CoursePlayer({ course, enrollment: initialEnrollment, session }: CoursePlayerProps) {
13394:  27:     const [enrollment, setEnrollment] = useState(initialEnrollment)
13395:  28:     const isSubmittingRef = useRef(false)
13396:  29:     const [isMounted, setIsMounted] = useState(false)
13397:  30:     // Lọc progress chỉ lấy các bài học không bị reset
13398:  31:     const filteredLessonProgress = enrollment.lessonProgress.filter((p: any) => p.status !== 'RESET')
13399:  32:     const [currentLessonId, setCurrentLessonId] = useState<string>(course.lessons[0]?.id)
13400:  33:     const [videoPercent, setVideoPercent] = useState(0)
13401:  34:     const [mobileTab, setMobileTab] = useState<MobileTab>('content')
13402:  35:     const [progressMap, setProgressMap] = useState<Record<string, any>>(() =>
13403:  36:         filteredLessonProgress.reduce((acc: any, p: any) => {
13404:  37:             acc[p.lessonId] = p
13405:  38:             return acc
13406:  39:         }, {})
13407:  40:     )
13408:  41:     const [showContentModal, setShowContentModal] = useState(false)
13409:  42:     const [currentFormData, setCurrentFormData] = useState<{ reflection: string; links: string[]; supports: boolean[] } | null>(null)
13410:  43:     const [statusMsg, setStatusMsg] = useState<{ text: string; type: 'loading' | 'success' | 'error' } | null>(null)
13411:  44:     const assignmentFormRef = useRef<(() => Promise<void>) | undefined>(undefined)
13412:  45:     const lastSavedPercentRef = useRef<number>(-1)
13413:  46:     const videoProgressRef = useRef<{ maxTime: number; duration: number } | null>(null)
13414:  47:     const prevMobileTabRef = useRef(mobileTab)
13415:  48:     // [HYDRATION FIX] Đảm bảo component đã mount trên client mới thực hiện các tính toán logic và render giao diện chính
13416:  49:     useEffect(() => {
13417:  50:         setIsMounted(true)
13418:  51:         // Chỉ tìm bài học cũ khi đã ở client
13419:  52:         if (enrollment.lastLessonId) {
13420:  53:             setCurrentLessonId(enrollment.lastLessonId)
13421:  54:         } else {
13422:  55:             const incomplete = filteredLessonProgress
13423:  56:                 .filter((p: any) => p.status !== 'COMPLETED')
13424:  57:                 .sort((a: any, b: any) => new Date(b.updatedAt).getTime() - new Date(a.updatedAt).getTime())
13425:  58:             if (incomplete[0]?.lessonId) {
13426:  59:                 setCurrentLessonId(incomplete[0].lessonId)
13427:  60:             }
13428:  61:         }
13429:  62:     }, [])
13430:  63:     const notify = useCallback((text: string, type: 'loading' | 'success' | 'error' = 'success', duration = 3000) => {
13431:  64:         setStatusMsg({ text, type })
13432:  65:         if (type !== 'loading') {
13433:  66:             setTimeout(() => setStatusMsg(null), duration)
13434:  67:         }
13435:  68:     }, [])
13436:  69:     const checkIsOnTime = useCallback((startedAt: Date | null, lessonOrder: number): boolean => {
13437:  70:         if (!startedAt) return false
13438:  71:         const deadline = new Date(startedAt)
13439:  72:         deadline.setDate(deadline.getDate() + (lessonOrder - 1))
13440:  73:         deadline.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999)
13441:  74:         return new Date() <= deadline
13442:  75:     }, [])
13443:  76:     const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)
13444:  77:     useEffect(() => {
13445:  78:         const mq = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 767px)')
13446:  79:         setIsMobile(mq.matches)
13447:  80:         const handler = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => setIsMobile(e.matches)
13448:  81:         mq.addEventListener('change', handler)
13449:  82:         return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', handler)
13450:  83:     }, [])
13451:  84:     useEffect(() => {
13452:  85:         const handleTabChange = async () => {
13453:  86:             const prevTab = prevMobileTabRef.current
13454:  87:             const currentTab = mobileTab
13455:  88:             if (currentTab !== prevTab) {
13456:  89:                 if (prevTab === 'record' && currentTab === 'content' && assignmentFormRef.current && !isSubmittingRef.current) {
13457:  90:                     await assignmentFormRef.current().catch(() => {})
13458:  91:                 }
13459:  92:             }
13460:  93:             prevMobileTabRef.current = mobileTab
13461:  94:         }
13462:  95:         handleTabChange()
13463:  96:     }, [mobileTab])
13464:  97:     const handleLessonSelect = async (lessonId: string) => {
13465:  98:         if (isSubmittingRef.current) return
13466:  99:         if (assignmentFormRef.current) {
13467: 100:             await assignmentFormRef.current().catch(() => {})
13468: 101:         }
13469: 102:         if (currentLessonId && videoProgressRef.current) {
13470: 103:             await saveVideoProgressAction({
13471: 104:                 enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
13472: 105:                 lessonId: currentLessonId,
13473: 106:                 maxTime: videoProgressRef.current.maxTime,
13474: 107:                 duration: videoProgressRef.current.duration
13475: 108:             }).catch(() => {})
13476: 109:         }
13477: 110:         setCurrentLessonId(lessonId)
13478: 111:         setVideoPercent(0)
13479: 112:         setMobileTab('content')
13480: 113:         setShowContentModal(false)
13481: 114:         updateLastLessonAction(enrollment.id, lessonId).catch(() => {})
13482: 115:     }
13483: 116:     const handleVideoProgress = useCallback(async (maxTime: number, duration: number) => {
13484: 117:         if (!currentLessonId || duration === 0) return
13485: 118:         const pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((maxTime / duration) * 100))
13486: 119:         setVideoPercent(pct)
13487: 120:         videoProgressRef.current = { maxTime, duration }
13488: 121:         const threshold = Math.floor(pct / 10) * 10
13489: 122:         if ((threshold > lastSavedPercentRef.current || pct === 100) && threshold <= 100) {
13490: 123:             lastSavedPercentRef.current = threshold
13491: 124:             saveVideoProgressAction({ enrollmentId: enrollment.id, lessonId: currentLessonId, maxTime, duration }).catch(() => {})
13492: 125:         }
13493: 126:     }, [currentLessonId, enrollment.id])
13494: 127:     const handleSubmitAssignment = async (data: any, isUpdate: boolean = false) => {
13495: 128:         if (isSubmittingRef.current) return
13496: 129:         isSubmittingRef.current = true
13497: 130:         notify(isUpdate ? 'Đang cập nhật bài học...' : 'Đang chấm điểm...', 'loading')
13498: 131:         try {
13499: 132:             const currentProg = progressMap[currentLessonId!]
13500: 133:             const currentLessonData = course.lessons.find((l: any) => l.id === currentLessonId)
13501: 134:             const result = await submitAssignmentAction({
13502: 135:                 enrollmentId: enrollment.id,
13503: 136:                 lessonId: currentLessonId!,
13504: 137:                 reflection: data.reflection,
13505: 138:                 links: data.links,
13506: 139:                 supports: data.supports,
13507: 140:                 isUpdate,
13508: 141:                 lessonOrder: currentLessonData?.order,
13509: 142:                 startedAt: enrollment.startedAt,
13510: 143:                 existingVideoScore: currentProg?.scores?.video,
13511: 144:                 existingTimingScore: currentProg?.scores?.timing
13512: 145:             })
13513: 146:             if (!(result as any)?.success) {
13514: 147:                 notify((result as any)?.message || 'Lỗi xử lý dữ liệu!', 'error')
13515: 148:                 return
13516: 149:             }
13517: 150:             const res = result as any
13518: 151:             notify(res.totalScore >= 5 ? `✅ Hoàn thành! Điểm: ${res.totalScore}/10` : `📊 Đã ghi nhận: ${res.totalScore}/10đ`, 'success')
13519: 152:             const updatedProgress = {
13520: 153:                 ...(progressMap[currentLessonId!] || {}),
13521: 154:                 assignment: { reflection: data.reflection, links: data.links, supports: data.supports },
13522: 155:                 status: res.totalScore >= 5 ? 'COMPLETED' : 'IN_PROGRESS',
13523: 156:                 totalScore: res.totalScore
13524: 157:             }
13525: 158:             setProgressMap(prev => ({ ...prev, [currentLessonId!]: updatedProgress }))
13526: 159:             if (res.totalScore >= 5 && !isUpdate) {
13527: 160:                 const currentIndex = course.lessons.findIndex((l: any) => l.id === currentLessonId)
13528: 161:                 if (currentIndex < course.lessons.length - 1) {
13529: 162:                     setTimeout(() => handleLessonSelect(course.lessons[currentIndex + 1].id), 2000)
13530: 163:                 }
13531: 164:             }
13532: 165:         } catch (error: any) {
13533: 166:             console.error("[SUBMIT-ERROR]", error)
13534: 167:             notify('Lỗi kết nối máy chủ!', 'error')
13535: 168:         } finally {
13536: 169:             isSubmittingRef.current = false
13537: 170:             setStatusMsg(null)
13538: 171:         }
13539: 172:     }
13540: 173:     const currentLesson = course.lessons.find((l: any) => l.id === currentLessonId)
13541: 174:     const currentProgress = progressMap[currentLessonId]
13542: 175:     const initialPercent = !currentLesson?.videoUrl ? 100 : (
13543: 176:         currentProgress?.duration ? (currentProgress.maxTime / currentProgress.duration) * 100 : 0
13544: 177:     )
13545: 178:     const completedCount = Object.values(progressMap).filter((p: any) => p.status === 'COMPLETED').length
13546: 179:     const startedAt = enrollment.startedAt ? new Date(enrollment.startedAt) : null
13547: 180:     // [HYDRATION SAFEGUARD] Trả về giao diện trống tối giản trên server
13548: 181:     if (!isMounted) {
13549: 182:         return <div className="h-screen w-full bg-black flex items-center justify-center text-zinc-700 font-mono text-xs">Đang tải ứng dụng...</div>
13550: 183:     }
13551: 184:     return (
13552: 185:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-black text-zinc-300">
13553: 186:             {/* Header */}
13554: 187:             <header className="h-14 shrink-0 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-zinc-900 z-50 fixed top-0 left-0 right-0">
13555: 188:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-3 min-w-0">
13556: 189:                     <Link href="/" className="shrink-0 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">
13557: 190:                         <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
13558: 191:                     </Link>
13559: 192:                     <h1 className="font-bold text-white truncate text-sm sm:text-base">{course.name_lop}</h1>
13560: 193:                 </div>
13561: 194:                 {statusMsg && (
13562: 195:                     <div className={`absolute left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 top-16 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold shadow-lg flex items-center gap-2 transition-all duration-300 z-[100] ${
13563: 196:                         statusMsg.type === 'loading' ? 'bg-orange-500 text-white' :
13564: 197:                         statusMsg.type === 'success' ? 'bg-emerald-600 text-white' : 'bg-red-600 text-white'
13565: 198:                     }`}>
13566: 199:                         {statusMsg.type === 'loading' && <Loader2 className="w-3 h-3 animate-spin" />}
13567: 200:                         {statusMsg.text}
13568: 201:                     </div>
13569: 202:                 )}
13570: 203:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
13571: 204:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
13572: 205:                         <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs text-zinc-400 font-mono">{completedCount}/{course.lessons.length}</span>
13573: 206:                         <div className="relative h-2 w-16 sm:w-24 bg-zinc-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
13574: 207:                             <div className="h-full bg-emerald-500 transition-all duration-500" style={{ width: `${(completedCount / course.lessons.length) * 100}%` }} />
13575: 208:                         </div>
13576: 209:                         <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-bold text-emerald-400 min-w-[35px] text-right">
13577: 210:                             {Math.round((completedCount / course.lessons.length) * 100)}%
13578: 211:                         </span>
13579: 212:                     </div>
13580: 213:                 </div>
13581: 214:             </header>
13582: 215:             <div className={`flex flex-1 min-h-0 pt-14 ${isMobile ? 'pb-14' : ''}`}>
13583: 216:                 {!isMobile && (
13584: 217:                     <LessonSidebar
13585: 218:                         lessons={course.lessons}
13586: 219:                         currentLessonId={currentLessonId}
13587: 220:                         onLessonSelect={handleLessonSelect}
13588: 221:                         progress={progressMap}
13589: 222:                         startedAt={startedAt}
13590: 223:                         resetAt={enrollment.resetAt}
13591: 224:                         onResetStartDate={async (d: Date) => {
13592: 225:                             await confirmStartDateAction(course.id, d)
13593: 226:                             window.location.reload()
13594: 227:                         }}
13595: 228:                     />
13596: 229:                 )}
13597: 230:                 <main className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0 overflow-hidden items-center bg-zinc-950">
13598: 231:                     <div className={isMobile ? 'shrink-0 w-full' : 'p-5 pb-0 shrink-0 w-full max-w-5xl'}>
13599: 232:                         <div className={isMobile ? '' : 'overflow-hidden border-2 border-white shadow-2xl bg-black'}>
13600: 233:                             <VideoPlayer
13601: 234:                                 key={currentLessonId}
13602: 235:                                 enrollmentId={enrollment.id}
13603: 236:                                 lessonId={currentLessonId!}
13604: 237:                                 videoUrl={currentLesson?.videoUrl || null}
13605: 238:                                 lessonContent={currentLesson?.content || null}
13606: 239:                                 initialMaxTime={currentProgress?.maxTime || 0}
13607: 240:                                 playlistData={currentProgress?.scores?.playlist}
13608: 241:                                 lastVideoIndex={currentProgress?.scores?.lastVideoIndex}
13609: 242:                                 onProgress={handleVideoProgress}
13610: 243:                                 onPercentChange={setVideoPercent}
13611: 244:                             />
13612: 245:                         </div>
13613: 246:                     </div>
13614: 247:                     {!isMobile && (
13615: 248:                         <div className="p-5 flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-h-0 overflow-hidden w-full max-w-5xl">
13616: 249:                             <div className="shrink-0">
13617: 250:                                 <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{currentLesson?.title}</h2>
13618: 251:                                 {currentLesson?.content && !currentLesson.content.includes('docs.google.com') && (
13619: 252:                                     <div className="text-zinc-400 mt-1 text-sm leading-relaxed line-clamp-2 hover:line-clamp-none transition-all">{currentLesson.content}</div>
13620: 253:                                 )}
13621: 254:                             </div>
13622: 255:                             <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl bg-zinc-900/30 overflow-hidden">
13623: 256:                                 <ChatSection lessonId={currentLessonId!} session={session} />
13624: 257:                             </div>
13625: 258:                         </div>
13626: 259:                     )}
13627: 260:                     {/* [HYDRATION FIX] Chỉ render Mobile logic khi đã Mounted và là Mobile */}
13628: 261:                     {isMounted && isMobile && (
13629: 262:                         <>
13630: 263:                             <div className="flex-1 min-h-0 w-full flex flex-col">
13631: 264:                                 {mobileTab === 'list' && (
13632: 265:                                     <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
13633: 266:                                         <LessonSidebarMobile
13634: 267:                                             lessons={course.lessons}
13635: 268:                                             currentLessonId={currentLessonId}
13636: 269:                                             onLessonSelect={handleLessonSelect}
13637: 270:                                             progress={progressMap}
13638: 271:                                             startedAt={startedAt}
13639: 272:                                             onResetStartDate={async (d: Date) => { await confirmStartDateAction(course.id, d); window.location.reload(); }}
13640: 273:                                         />
13641: 274:                                     </div>
13642: 275:                                 )}
13643: 276:                                 {mobileTab === 'content' && (
13644: 277:                                     <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0">
13645: 278:                                         <div className="px-4 py-4 bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800 shrink-0">
13646: 279:                                             <p className="text-base font-bold text-white leading-tight">{currentLesson?.title}</p>
13647: 280:                                             <button onClick={() => setShowContentModal(true)} className="text-xs text-orange-400 mt-2">Xem chi tiết nội dung →</button>
13648: 281:                                         </div>
13649: 282:                                         <div className="flex-1 min-h-0">
13650: 283:                                             <ChatSection lessonId={currentLessonId!} session={session} />
13651: 284:                                         </div>
13652: 285:                                     </div>
13653: 286:                                 )}
13654: 287:                                 {mobileTab === 'record' && (
13655: 288:                                     <div className="flex-1 overflow-hidden">
13656: 289:                                         <AssignmentForm
13657: 290:                                             key={currentLessonId}
13658: 291:                                             lessonId={currentLessonId!}
13659: 292:                                             lessonOrder={currentLesson?.order ?? 1}
13660: 293:                                             startedAt={startedAt}
13661: 294:                                             videoPercent={videoPercent}
13662: 295:                                             videoUrl={currentLesson?.videoUrl || null}
13663: 296:                                             onSubmit={handleSubmitAssignment}
13664: 297:                                             initialData={{ ...currentProgress, enrollmentId: enrollment.id }}
13665: 298:                                             onSaveDraft={assignmentFormRef}
13666: 299:                                             onFormDataChange={setCurrentFormData}
13667: 300:                                             onDraftSaved={(draftData) => {
13668: 301:                                                 setProgressMap(prev => ({
13669: 302:                                                     ...prev,
13670: 303:                                                     [currentLessonId!]: { ...prev[currentLessonId!], assignment: { ...prev[currentLessonId!]?.assignment, ...draftData } }
13671: 304:                                                 }))
13672: 305:                                             }}
13673: 306:                                         />
13674: 307:                                     </div>
13675: 308:                                 )}
13676: 309:                             </div>
13677: 310:                             <nav className="h-14 bg-zinc-900 border-t border-zinc-800 flex fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50">
13678: 311:                                 {[
13679: 312:                                     { id: 'list', icon: ListVideo, label: 'Danh sách' },
13680: 313:                                     { id: 'content', icon: FileText, label: 'Nội dung' },
13681: 314:                                     { id: 'record', icon: ClipboardCheck, label: 'Ghi nhận' },
13682: 315:                                 ].map(tab => (
13683: 316:                                     <button
13684: 317:                                         key={tab.id}
13685: 318:                                         onClick={() => setMobileTab(tab.id as MobileTab)}
13686: 319:                                         className={`flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-0.5 text-[10px] ${mobileTab === tab.id ? 'text-orange-400 bg-orange-400/5 border-t-2 border-orange-400' : 'text-zinc-500'}`}
13687: 320:                                     >
13688: 321:                                         <tab.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
13689: 322:                                         {tab.label}
13690: 323:                                     </button>
13691: 324:                                 ))}
13692: 325:                             </nav>
13693: 326:                         </>
13694: 327:                     )}
13695: 328:                 </main>
13696: 329:                 {!isMobile && (
13697: 330:                     <div className="w-[400px] shrink-0 border-l border-zinc-800 flex flex-col">
13698: 331:                         <AssignmentForm
13699: 332:                             key={currentLessonId}
13700: 333:                             lessonId={currentLessonId!}
13701: 334:                             lessonOrder={currentLesson?.order ?? 1}
13702: 335:                             startedAt={startedAt}
13703: 336:                             videoPercent={videoPercent}
13704: 337:                             videoUrl={currentLesson?.videoUrl || null}
13705: 338:                             onSubmit={handleSubmitAssignment}
13706: 339:                             initialData={{ ...currentProgress, enrollmentId: enrollment.id }}
13707: 340:                             onSaveDraft={assignmentFormRef}
13708: 341:                             onFormDataChange={setCurrentFormData}
13709: 342:                             onDraftSaved={(draftData) => {
13710: 343:                                 setProgressMap(prev => ({
13711: 344:                                     ...prev,
13712: 345:                                     [currentLessonId!]: { ...prev[currentLessonId!], assignment: { ...prev[currentLessonId!]?.assignment, ...draftData } }
13713: 346:                                 }))
13714: 347:                             }}
13715: 348:                         />
13716: 349:                     </div>
13717: 350:                 )}
13718: 351:             </div>
13719: 352:             {/* Content Modal */}
13720: 353:             {showContentModal && (
13721: 354:                 <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[100] bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center p-4" onClick={() => setShowContentModal(false)}>
13722: 355:                     <div className="bg-zinc-900 rounded-2xl border border-zinc-700 max-w-lg w-full max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
13723: 356:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-4 border-b border-zinc-800">
13724: 357:                             <h2 className="text-white font-bold text-sm truncate pr-4">{currentLesson?.title}</h2>
13725: 358:                             <button onClick={() => setShowContentModal(false)}><X className="w-5 h-5 text-zinc-400" /></button>
13726: 359:                         </div>
13727: 360:                         <div className="overflow-y-auto p-5 text-zinc-300 text-sm leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
13728: 361:                             {currentLesson?.content}
13729: 362:                         </div>
13730: 363:                     </div>
13731: 364:                 </div>
13732: 365:             )}
13733: 366:             <StartDateModal isOpen={!enrollment.startedAt} onConfirm={async (d) => { await confirmStartDateAction(course.id, d); window.location.reload(); }} />
13734: 367:         </div>
13735: 368:     )
13736: 369: }
13737: 370: function LessonSidebarMobile({ lessons, currentLessonId, onLessonSelect, progress, startedAt, onResetStartDate }: any) {
13738: 371:     const [showDatePicker, setShowDatePicker] = useState(false)
13739: 372:     const [dateInput, setDateInput] = useState(startedAt ? new Date(startedAt).toISOString().slice(0, 10) : '')
13740: 373:     const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
13741: 374:     // Lọc progress chỉ hiển thị các bài học không bị reset
13742: 375:     const filteredProgress = Object.entries(progress).reduce((acc: any, [id, p]: [string, any]) => { 
13743: 376:         if (p.status !== 'RESET') acc[id] = p; 
13744: 377:         return acc 
13745: 378:     }, {})
13746: 379:     const handleReset = async () => {
13747: 380:         if (!dateInput) return
13748: 381:         const confirmReset = window.confirm("⚠️ Cảnh báo: Dữ liệu học tập cũ sẽ không được tính vào lộ trình mới.\n\nNhấn OK để xác nhận đổi ngày bắt đầu mới.")
13749: 382:         if (!confirmReset) return
13750: 383:         setSaving(true)
13751: 384:         try {
13752: 385:             await onResetStartDate(new Date(dateInput))
13753: 386:             setShowDatePicker(false)
13754: 387:         } finally {
13755: 388:             setSaving(false)
13756: 389:         }
13757: 390:     }
13758: 391:     const completedCount = lessons.filter((l: any) => filteredProgress[l.id]?.status === 'COMPLETED').length
13759: 392:     return (
13760: 393:         <div className="flex flex-col h-full w-full bg-zinc-900 overflow-hidden">
13761: 394:             {/* ─ Cố định: ngày bắt đầu ─ */}
13762: 395:             <div className="shrink-0 bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800 p-4 space-y-3">
13763: 396:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
13764: 397:                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
13765: 398:                         <CalendarDays className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-400 shrink-0" />
13766: 399:                         <div>
13767: 400:                             <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold">Ngày bắt đầu</p>
13768: 401:                             <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white leading-tight">
13769: 402:                                 {startedAt ? new Date(startedAt).toLocaleDateString('vi-VN') : '-- / -- / ----'}
13770: 403:                             </p>
13771: 404:                         </div>
13772: 405:                     </div>
13773: 406:                     <button 
13774: 407:                         onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(!showDatePicker)}
13775: 408:                         className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/30 rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1 font-bold active:scale-95 transition-all"
13776: 409:                     >
13777: 410:                         <RefreshCw className="w-3 h-3" /> Đặt lại
13778: 411:                     </button>
13779: 412:                 </div>
13780: 413:                 {showDatePicker && (
13781: 414:                     <div className="bg-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-3 space-y-2.5 border border-zinc-700 shadow-xl">
13782: 415:                         <p className="text-[10px] text-zinc-400 font-medium">Chọn ngày mới cho lộ trình:</p>
13783: 416:                         <input 
13784: 417:                             type="date" 
13785: 418:                             value={dateInput} 
13786: 419:                             onChange={e => setDateInput(e.target.value)} 
13787: 420:                             className="w-full bg-zinc-700 text-white text-sm rounded-lg px-3 py-2 border border-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500" 
13788: 421:                         />
13789: 422:                         <div className="flex gap-2">
13790: 423:                             <button 
13791: 424:                                 onClick={handleReset} 
13792: 425:                                 disabled={!dateInput || saving} 
13793: 426:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs font-black bg-orange-500 text-white rounded-lg py-2 disabled:opacity-50"
13794: 427:                             >
13795: 428:                                 {saving ? 'Đang lưu...' : 'XÁC NHẬN'}
13796: 429:                             </button>
13797: 430:                             <button 
13798: 431:                                 onClick={() => setShowDatePicker(false)} 
13799: 432:                                 className="flex-1 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700 rounded-lg py-2"
13800: 433:                             >
13801: 434:                                 HỦY
13802: 435:                             </button>
13803: 436:                         </div>
13804: 437:                     </div>
13805: 438:                 )}
13806: 439:             </div>
13807: 440:             {/* ─ Tiêu đề danh sách ─ */}
13808: 441:             <div className="shrink-0 px-4 py-3 border-b border-zinc-800 flex items-center justify-between bg-zinc-900/50">
13809: 442:                 <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest text-white/60">Lộ trình học tập</span>
13810: 443:                 <span className="text-[10px] font-black text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-emerald-500/20">
13811: 444:                     {completedCount}/{lessons.length} BÀI
13812: 445:                 </span>
13813: 446:             </div>
13814: 447:             {/* ─ Danh sách cuộn ─ */}
13815: 448:             <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain">
13816: 449:                 {lessons.map((lesson: any) => {
13817: 450:                     const prog = filteredProgress[lesson.id]
13818: 451:                     const isActive = currentLessonId === lesson.id
13819: 452:                     const unlocked = lesson.order === 1 || (filteredProgress[lessons.find((l:any)=>l.order===lesson.order-1)?.id]?.status === 'COMPLETED')
13820: 453:                     return (
13821: 454:                         <button
13822: 455:                             key={lesson.id}
13823: 456:                             onClick={() => unlocked && onLessonSelect(lesson.id)}
13824: 457:                             className={cn(
13825: 458:                                 'w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-4 text-left border-b border-zinc-800/50 transition-all active:bg-zinc-800', 
13826: 459:                                 isActive && 'bg-zinc-800 border-l-4 border-l-orange-500', 
13827: 460:                                 !unlocked && 'opacity-40 grayscale'
13828: 461:                             )}
13829: 462:                         >
13830: 463:                             <div className="shrink-0">
13831: 464:                                 {prog?.status === 'COMPLETED' ? <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-500" /> : isActive ? <PlayCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-400 animate-pulse" /> : !unlocked ? <Lock className="w-4 h-4 text-zinc-600" /> : <div className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full border border-zinc-700 flex items-center justify-center text-[8px] text-zinc-500">{lesson.order}</div>}
13832: 465:                             </div>
13833: 466:                             <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
13834: 467:                                 <p className={cn('text-sm leading-snug', isActive ? 'text-white font-black' : 'text-zinc-400 font-medium')}>{lesson.title}</p>
13835: 468:                                 {prog?.totalScore !== undefined && <p className={cn('text-[10px] mt-1 font-bold', prog.totalScore >= 5 ? 'text-emerald-500' : 'text-orange-400')}>{prog.totalScore >= 5 ? '✓' : '✗'} Kết quả: {prog.totalScore}/10đ</p>}
13836: 469:                             </div>
13837: 470:                         </button>
13838: 471:                     )
13839: 472:                 })}
13840: 473:             </div>
13841: 474:         </div>
13842: 475:     )
13843: 476: }
13844: ````
`````
